These are not basic lock-in-key abilities, but powers that fundamentally change how you play. And heirlooms are not simply handed to you. You must prove your worth, provided you can find them. Traits 2.0 Though fun the first time, the traits in RL1 often wore their welcome later in the game. We’ve now added gold modifiers to entice players to take on new challenges. The more debilitating the trait is (in-game), the bigger the reward. This makes choosing your heirs a meaningful decision every time. Relics and Resolve One of the most exciting new features to Rogue Legacy 2 is the ability to pick up Relics, which are unique items that change how your run is played. Gain stat modifiers, complete special challenges, and even gain brand new abilities as you traverse the kingdom. But be careful, the more Relics you obtain the more your resolve is shaken, and all Relics are lost if your hero perishes. Improved Accessibility We’ve taken accessibility to the next level with the introduction of House Rules. Toggle contact damage, tweak global damage and health, and even give yourself flight for difficult platform sections. You have complete control over how you want to play the game. We’ve also introduced new mechanics such as Off-shore Banking to give struggling players more ways to succeed. A Rich Narrative Not only is the lore to the world of Rogue Legacy greatly expanded in the sequel, but it runs deep. New lore awaits you all the multiple NG’s in. Beating the game once is only the beginning. Learn about the inevitable collapse of a once thriving kingdom, and discover the dark secrets of the ones responsible. And connect and build relationships with the characters you meet along the way. New Game+ for Days Your journey has only begun after beating the final boss in RL2. There is a ton more to explore and discover on multiple playthroughs. You must choose how the game gets harder, from unique biome hazards, to special boss fights. The experience keeps changing for near infinite replayability. More of Everything Of course we’re also adding more of everything people loved from the original Rogue Legacy. More traits, more spells, more classes, more biomes, more enemies, more equipment, more rooms, more story. More secrets ... Just more everything. Clownanthropy. Holy smokes! Punching clowns! AND THERE'S A WHOLE LOT MORE. This only scratches the surface of what Rogue Legacy 2 has to offer. Scar Challenges, Fairy Rooms, the Curio Shoppe, the list goes on, but reading is for nerds. Go out and discover the world of Rogue Legacy 2 for yourself! /

Rogue Legacy is a unique rogue-lite game where heroism is passed down through generations. When your character dies, their child inherits the throne. Each heir has different traits that change how you play. These traits can be anything from colorblindness to vertigo or dwarfism. The game shows that you don't need to be perfect to win, but skill is very helpful due to its tough difficulty.

Gold earned in each run is used to upgrade your manor. This gives your next heir better abilities to fight the game's evil. While the trailer shows the game's basics, here's a closer look at its main features:

*   **Randomly Generated Castles:** Each new life explores a unique castle, making every playthrough fresh and unpredictable.
*   **Rogue-lite Growth:** Dying is part of the game. It helps your family line grow stronger over time.
*   **Unique Traits:** Many different traits add special challenges and twists to each game. For example, you might play as a dyslexic character.
*   **Many Classes:** Choose from over eight classes, each with unique skills. This lets you change your playstyle.
*   **Diverse Enemies:** Fight over sixty enemy types, including many variations. This keeps you on your toes.
*   **Big Skill Tree:** A large, upgradeable skill tree lets you develop your character significantly. Loot collected helps improve the manor and gives heirs an edge.
*   **Special Shops:** Visit shops like the Blacksmith and Enchantress to get better weapons, armor, and new abilities like flight or air jumping.
*   **Secret Content:** Discover many secrets and easter eggs hidden throughout the game world.
*   **Controller Support:** Rogue Legacy works perfectly with a controller and is Big Picture ready for easy setup.

Name: ScourgeBringer
Description:
From the developers of NeuroVoider, ScourgeBringer is a fast-paced free-moving roguelite platformer. Set in a post-apocalyptic world where a mysterious entity wreaked havoc on all humanity, ScourgeBringer puts you in the shoes of the deadliest warrior of her clan: Kyhra. Help her to explore the unknown and slash her way through ancient machines guarding the seal of her past, and maybe the redemption of humanity. Dive into fast-paced rogue-platforming gameplay described by Eurogamer as 'Dead Cells meets Celeste' Slash and shoot your way smoothly with super fluid platforming controls Sharpen your skills with a frantic combat system focused on attacks only Dash forward to the otherworldly adaptive sounds of Joonas Turner (Nuclear Throne, Downwell, Broforce...) Defy hordes of unspeakable enemies and giant bosses holding the secrets of the Scourge Explore the infinite depths of an ever-changing dungeon Uncover mysteries and find mementos of previous explorers to unlock reality defining secrets ScourgeBringer is being made with the help of the community ! You can follow its development through our weekly newsletter, or join our Discord.

Name: Dark Devotion
Description:
Be part of the Hibernian Workshop community by joining our dedicated Discord server ! Explore the secrets of a mysterious fallen temple and put your Templar faith to the test in Dark Devotion, where no sacrifice is too great in praise of your God. Measure your devotion and your bravery by journeying into deepest darkness for answers to questions that will challenge your very existence. Dark Devotion features a richly detailed, immersive narrative that unfolds a sombre tale of your Templar religion’s irresistible calling. Every encounter challenges your fortitude, piety, and conviction as you move deeper into your cursed pilgrimage. Spanning four unique worlds, each with their own incredibly detailed environments, you’ll wield dozens of weapons in your quest to discover the Temple’s secret: all the while assailed by dark enemies and devious bosses whose core mission is to destroy your soul and damn you forever. Throughout Dark Devotion you’ll discover an array of weapons, armors, and relics with which to enhance your character. Each item has its own attributes and statistics, and is customizable with mystical runes. It is essential that you maximize your strengths and adapt your inventory to the enemy you’re facing. Choose wisely... Dark Devotion is a story of perseverance, dedication, and secrets. Every chest you open, every item you encounter holds another piece of the story: be it a letter, weapon, or clue, all will help you on your quest. Whether you find these secrets amongst the shadows or in the dead hand of another character ...well, that all depends. In the Temple, Faith is your only recourse against the heathen droves. Defeat them to collect Faith and unlock secret paths, special chests, and more. But remember to use your Faith sparingly. Nothing lasts forever. The Temple yearns to see you dead. Your survival depends on using the right item at the right time to heal your wounds or dispel a curse. Some of these items can be looted, others are scattered throughout the Temple in secret places. Employ them wisely… your life depends on it. The eye of your God is ever-watchful. Complete an act of bravery or skill, and your God might bless you. But the Temple is also rife with despair and sickness, ready to destroy those who lack courage and temperance. Learn quickly its ways, or suffer. Salvation is fleeting, so choose your route wisely. Every world in Dark Devotion offers several different paths. Each one is original, but all are interconnected, and the only commonality they share is that there is no turning back. Completing your quest requires shrewd interpretation of the secrets shrouded within the Temple. It’s easy to get lost, though this might bring you favor...depending on the secret you uncover. Perhaps the Temple will reveal a hidden altar where one’s story can be saved if one honors the Temple appropriately...or perhaps not. ● Dynamic and heavy combat ● Dozens of weapons, armor, and items for various fighting styles ● Intricate system of blessings, curses, and illnesses ● White-knuckle boss battles ● Rich, complex storyline ● Dark levels and brooding environments

**Abyss Odyssey: A Challenging Descent into Procedural Chaos**

Prepare for an eternal struggle in **Abyss Odyssey**, where a formidable evil lurks at the pit's bottom, and survival is your only option. This side-scrolling action-adventure game from Chilean developer ACE Team plunges you into procedurally generated levels with a complex fighting engine. You'll command three distinct warriors: the **bold Katrien**, the **tortured Ghost Monk**, and the **ethereal Pincoya**. Master their unique abilities to perform devastating combos and chain attacks, unleashing a flurry of blows to overcome the horrors that await.

**Mastering the Abyss: Possession and Infinite Possibilities**

Your journey into the unknown begins with these three fierce heroes, but the true depth of **Abyss Odyssey** lies in its **possession mechanic**. By taking control of your enemies, you can harness their skills and combat prowess, adding their unique fighting styles to your arsenal. Each foe you encounter is as technically intricate as the main warriors, demanding that you utilize every available option to conquer the infinite abyss. With side-scrolling levels that are **never the same twice**, each playthrough offers a fresh experience. You'll face a constant stream of monsters, discover vital merchants, and unearth hidden treasures as you descend.

**Key Features That Define the Abyss Odyssey Experience:**

*   **Deep Fighting Game Combat:** Experience a **complex combat system** heavily influenced by the fighting game genre. Every playable character boasts an expansive array of basic and special attacks, complemented by universal mobility options and advanced techniques.
*   **Master Your Moves:** Hone your skills and invent new combos in the dedicated **Training room**. Here, you can select any character you've unlocked, including enemies, to perfect your strategy.
*   **Endless Replayability:** **Procedurally generated levels** guarantee that no two delves into the Abyss are alike. The layout of the rooms, complete with their twists and traps, is randomized with every entry. Expect different enemy spawns, equipment, items, and special characters each time you play.
*   **Character Progression and Customization:** Unlock up to **three hero characters** to level up, acquire new skills, and collect equipment. **Customize your heroes** to perfectly match your play style. Skill points earned through leveling can upgrade each hero's unique abilities in various ways. Equip a wide range of weapons and accessories to grant them new powers, from freezing opponents to inflicting curses.
*   **Play as Anyone:** The ability to **play as any character you encounter**, including bosses, is a game-changer. Unleash your hero's **ultra attack** to steal enemies' souls, allowing you to assume their form. Discover entirely new move sets and character styles by capturing over **30 unique enemies**, each as complex and advanced as the main heroes.
*   **Community-Driven Content:** **Work together as a community** to defeat the final boss. When the collective player base of **Abyss Odyssey** defeats him enough times, his mask will break, revealing a new identity. Each successful community achievement unlocks new in-game content, including fresh enemies and other dynamic elements.
*   **Artistic Vision and Cultural Roots:** Immerse yourself in **beautiful visuals inspired by Art Nouveau**, showcasing a story deeply rooted in **Chilean culture**. The flowing lines and organic styling of Art Nouveau are evident from the game's user interface to its character design. Set in late 19th-century Santiago, the characters and narrative draw significant inspiration from **Chilean folklore and mythology**.
*   **Multiplayer Options:** Embark on your campaign **solo or with a friend** through online or local cooperative multiplayer. A second player can join or leave your journey into the Abyss at any time.
*   **Competitive Versus Mode:** The **bonus versus mode** allows up to **4 players** to test their mettle against each other. Engage in free-for-all or team-based competitive multiplayer battles within specially designed arenas. Utilize any character you've unlocked, hero or enemy, for a roster of dozens of playable fighters.

Name: A Valley Without Wind
Description:
A 2D sidescroller without a linear path. An action game with tactical combat and citybuilding. An adventure game that lets you free-roam a vast, procedurally-generated world. A Valley Without Wind defies genre stereotypes. Unlike other procedurally-generated games, you also get a logical progression in difficulty, plus helpful tips and checklists to guide your travels (should you need them). Choose for yourself how to prepare to face the vastly stronger Overlord. Complete a variety of missions to earn new spells, and/or roam the wilds to uncover secret missions and stashes of magical crafting loot. Customize your characters with unique combinations of enchants and spells that change how you move, jump, and fight. Or rescue people and bring them back to your settlement so that they can then be sent on dispatch missions; you don't have to carry the burden of your fledgling civilization alone! You choose how to play, and the world adapts around you. Key features: Travel alone or with friends across an ever-expanding world of dangerous creatures, powerful magic, high technology, and mysteries. You have choice. The world of Environ is a procedurally generated sandbox, and lets you go anywhere you see -- including right into the overlord's keep at any time. (Good luck with that.) Environ is endless. When you save one continent from an overlord, a larger and more complex continent appears. The game adapts to how you play: as you demonstrate your proficiency, monsters and missions upgrade accordingly. Killed 100 bats? Okay, time for... bats on fire! Crazy amounts of character customization. Combine a multitude of spells, enchants, and equipment to create specialized character builds. Play as a long line of brave adventurers. It's not a question of IF your character is going to die, but WHEN. Any character that dies is permanently lost, but you keep all your inventory, enchants, and general progress in the game. Become a community leader. Rescue NPCs for your settlement, construct buildings for them, and improve their skill and mood -- then send them on dispatch missions to help you in return! Be a clever problem-solver. Challenges have more than one solution, each with its own pros and cons. You get to figure things out rather than just jumping through a set of hoops. Difficulty levels give exactly the challenge you want, from casual to hardcore on platforming, combat, and citybuilding independently. All owners of Valley 1 also get the much-improved sequel absolutely free! Valley 2 is out now, and features a different style of more-focused, non-sandbox play. Both games are quite distinct from one another, but you don’t have to choose between them -- both are yours for the price of one!

Name: Aura of Worlds
Description:
Aura of worlds is a creative tactics rogue-lite platformer. Explore multiple worlds where you must utilise your creative abilities to twist adversity to your advantage. You'll need planning, wits and reflexes to make a way through these ever-changing death labyrinths. Escape flooding passages, outrun toxic pollen, face off against gargantuan bosses that have made entire mazes their home. Do you play defensively with the spear and energy shield, or swing into the fray with a boomerang and grapple hook? Do you scour the levels for potions and runes; or do you dive headfirst into the chaos? Adversity as your ally F.A.Q. Let's be transparent... 'What Gamepads are compatible?” Currently Xbox and Xbox 360 controllers though other Xinput controllers may work. NOTE: Not natively compatible with Playstation controllers yet. Keyboard and mouse works just as well. Is there much of a story in game? There's minimal story exposition as of the current build. We do plan on integrating a loose narrative as development progresses though... “I'm running the game on an old computer, how can I make it run faster?” Please see the following forum thread on optimization : “Where can I report bugs/issues/suggestions?” Please look to the forums, we check messages there each day. Feedback is welcome and there are some excellent community members who are willing to help to. 'Anything else to be aware of?' Default gamepad controls are slightly different from convention, due to optional 360 degree aiming with right analogue stick. Though buttons can be rebound to suit. It’s designed to be challenging, and death may be encountered frequently during your initial runs. Though there is no stunlocking/one-hit demises on the player. Being able to multi-task between abilities will greatly increase survivability. **The game has a steeper learning curve than the average platformer, particularly in the first 25 minutes Every challenge has multiple solutions For example, if there is a chest on the other side of a lava pit; do you...? Grapple across Bend time and bounce off enemies Use a boomerang to fetch the item Blow up the pit with a grenade; setting everything nearby alight! ... More Features Over 80 unique enemies and traps 12+ randomized level themes. Such include tidal corridors filled with mines, rising lava, caverns lined with toxic and carnivorous plants... 4+ Primary world types (grotto, gardens, temple, cold crust caverns) each with their own traps, enemies, boss and special theme layouts. A plethora of creative abilities ranging from parkour to cloaking to warping time itself! Every object has multiple uses E.g. you can grab that lantern from the ceiling, and carry it around to use as a portable light source or improvised flaming molotov... Hand crafted pixel art and animations Regular updates A unique musical score. Customize character skin and clothing colors. Permanent progression: allows you to unlock world shortcuts, new items, character backgrounds... So much more... Whilst functionally complete; the game is under active development and more content is being added. This project was Greenlit by the community back in 2016.

Name: GetsuFumaDen: Undying Moon
Description:
GetsuFumaDen: Undying Moon combines intense roguelike hack-and-slash action with a stunning dark fantasy world, brought to life through the stroke of traditional Japanese art. As the chosen leader and guardian of the land of the living, wield the otherworldy arsenal and powers of the Getsu clan as you overcome multiple 'Death' and descend deeper into the depths of Hell to eradicate the source of the cataclysm. Distinct Ukiyo-e Inspired Visuals Inspired by the Japanese ukiyo-e art style, the world of GetsuFumaDen is as beautiful as it is deadly. Vibrant, dynamic 2D animations bring the artistic world to life. Brutal, Larger than Life Boss Battles A reanimated demon lord, a colossal centipede, and a five-headed hydra are only some of the myriad massive and fearsome monsters and yokai standing in your way. Defend yourself against their relentless onslaught and emerge victorious to descend deeper into the depths of Hell. Dynamic, Weapon-Based Combat. Master the rythmn of intense sword fighting action: pacing and timings of movements are inspired by Japanese martial arts. Utilize the unique special moves of a wide range of weapon types including katanas, battle umbrellas and spears to outsmart your enemies. Authentic Roguelike Action While death is not the end, the world of Hell lives and breathes, presenting new map layouts and challenges to overcome with each attempt. Permanent upgrades, customizable weapons, and variable level progression provide new opportunities and challenges for every run. Immersive Weapon Enhancement System The crafting process gives you complete control over the ability to collect, enhance and unlock abilities of main and sub weapons. Unlock enhancements to your favorite weapons at each run, and get back in the action! Soul Devour Power-Up System Collect souls during each descent to power up in real time. Utilize the unique power-up system to dynamically and strategically select enhancements. The Digital Deluxe Edition includes the following bonus contents. ・Bonus game - 1987 FC version 'GetsuFumaDen': discover the original game with an added English Menu (in-game text in Japanese only), the original Japanese guidebook and Quick Save features ・Digital Artbook: browse through 29 pages packed with key art, stage art, character designs and lore from the original world of GetsuFumaDen ・Mini-OST: listen to 15 tracks from the game's stunning atmospheric soundtrack

Name: Dungeon Warriors
Description:
'Dungeon Warriors' is a barrage shooting game, he will grow with your continuous exploration. In randomly generated levels, you can collect precious loot, discover hidden secrets, challenge enemies of various difficulty, and Chat with cute businessmen and shopkeepers and buy powerful items to gain an advantage. Here, the only thing you have to do is to grow stronger and survive. we are sorry to tell you guys that we descide to delay our game because we still need time to modfiy and improve our game. Of course, We promise not later than September. thanks for all you guys love our game. At this develop stage the game is not very complete, See the following sections for existing functions Game monster 1. Red zombie: move randomly, accelerate after finding a character 2. Green zombies: move randomly, speed up after finding characters, random attack power 3. Skeletons with guns: randomly launch 1-3 bullets at the character 4. Skeletons holding swords: randomly launch 1-3 swords at the characters 5. Skeleton Bomb Monster: Randomly launch 1-3 bombs at the character 6. Blue standing pile: launch bullets in all directions 7. Golden Bird: The bullet rotates as the character moves 8. King Kong Robot: Explore by you Game highlights 1. Weather system 2. Lighting system 3. Random weapons 4. Random map 5. Random monster 6. Random attribute bonus 7. Permanently save and upgrade skills or attributes after each level challenge is successful 8. Monster pathfinding function

**Trials Evolution: Gold Edition Revives Beloved Franchise on PC**

PC gamers can finally celebrate the return of the critically acclaimed **Trials franchise** with the release of **Trials Evolution: Gold Edition**. Developed by RedLynx, the series first gained significant traction on PC with the 2008 release of **Trials 2 SE**, an indie hit that subsequently found widespread success on Xbox. Recognizing the persistent demand from PC players for more of the franchise's unique gameplay, **Trials Evolution: Gold Edition** directly addresses this desire.

This special **Gold Edition** delivers exceptional value by bundling two complete Trials experiences that have never before been available on PC. It includes all the content from the original, best-selling XBLA title, **Trials Evolution**, alongside all the single-player tracks and skill games from the original **Trials HD**. This effectively doubles the amount of content, offering players a vast array of challenging courses and engaging gameplay.

**Trials Evolution: Gold Edition** has been meticulously **optimized and enhanced for the PC platform**, ensuring a superior gaming experience. All the fan-favorite features that made the series a hit are present and improved. Players can once again unleash their creativity with the **robust in-game editor**, allowing them to design and customize their own demanding tracks. The **player sharing functionality** enables seamless distribution of these creations to a global community, fostering a vibrant ecosystem of user-generated content. Furthermore, the **global leaderboards** provide an avenue for intense competition, allowing players to test their skills against others worldwide. These core features have been expertly integrated to provide an unparalleled PC experience, complemented by exciting **multiplayer gameplay**, diverse **indoor and outdoor environments**, extensive **bike and rider customizations**, and engaging **global competition**.

Name: Lonely Mountains: Downhill
Description:
Just you and your bike - take it on a thrilling ride down an unspoiled mountain landscape. Make your way through thick forests, narrow trails and wild rivers. Race, jump, slide and try not to crash - all the way from the peak to the valley! Explore the rich mountain worlds at your own pace or face the ticking clock. Each mountain features several trails - ride along quiet mountain lakes, majestic forests and steep canyons. A custom physics system lets you carefully drop from boulder to boulder, sprint over abysses or slide through muddy grounds. It’s all up to you! Take the relaxing scenic route or go off-road to find the fastest way to the finish line! Master the tight and responsive controls to make your way to hidden resting places and secret shortcuts. No audience, no barrier tapes - experience a beautiful nature unspoiled by men. Unlock new difficulty modes and prove your speed-running talents on the leaderboards! Train your skills day and night to ultimately compete with the best riders in the world in the risky Free Ride mode! Each bike handles differently, so find the perfect one for your playstyle and make your way down the mountain to unlock dozens of paint jobs and outfits! JOIN HERE!

Descenders is an extreme downhill biking game that's easy to learn but challenging to master. Developed by the creators of Action Henk, it offers a fresh take on extreme sports.

**Key Features:**

*   **Procedurally Generated Worlds:** Each playthrough presents new jumps, slopes, and challenges.
*   **Freestyle Bike Controls:** Master precise rider movements with an advanced physics system for stylish whips and scrubs.
*   **Rogue-Bike Mode:** Unlock unique mutators to discover abilities that suit your riding style.
*   **Build Your Reputation:** An online Rep system allows you to showcase your skills and earn new bikes and gear.
*   **Licensed Soundtrack:** Featuring music from drum & bass label Liquicity to enhance the mountain-riding experience.

**Become a Legendary Descender:**

Can you complete the game in a single run and join the ranks of the legendary Descenders?

**Choose Your Team, Forge Your Legend:**

In Descenders, your team is crucial. Select one of three factions:

*   **Team Enemy:** Known for their die-hard, trick-focused approach.
*   **Team Arboreal:** Masters of proficient, off-road riding.
*   **Team Kinetic:** Dedicated to high-octane speed.

You'll be united with other players who share your team choice. Wear your team's colors and apparel with pride to earn exclusive gear. The team with the most Rep gains access to special prizes and a dedicated channel on the Descenders Discord server.

Name: MotoGP™14
Description:
The official video game of the MotoGP™ hits the track with all the riders from the 2013 and 2014 seasons, as well as legendary champions from the history of the MotoGP™. Race on all the official tracks and take on your adversaries on the brand new Argentina circuit. Put yourself to the test with new game modes, including online Split Battle and offline Real Events 2013, not forgetting the compelling career mode. MotoGP™14 has been completely overhauled thanks to the new graphics engine that gives players the opportunity of experiencing all the thrills of being a real MotoGP™ rider.

Name: RIDE 3
Description:
Feel the adrenaline and experience the most complete racing ever with RIDE 3! Immerse yourself in a modern 3D environment where you will live side by side with your bike, modifying it mechanically and aesthetically thanks to the new Livery Editor, which will let your dreams run wild. Before starting, don't forget to customise your rider with the right outfit. THE BIKES More than 230 bike models available from the very first day, with more than 70 new models never seen before in a RIDE game. 30 different brands, both historic and contemporary, of which 9 are completely new. 7 different categories to satisfy every taste and riding style. THE TRACKS RIDE 3 will be a journey around the globe thanks to its 30 different tracks created from zero and faithfully reproduced via photogrammetry and drone scanning. Hurtle down breathtaking roads all around the world, including GP tracks, Road and Supermoto tracks, enjoy the panoramas of street and country tracks and compete in street and acceleration races. LIVERY EDITOR Choose your favourite bike and make it unique, just like your style. Create your livery from scratch, choose a background colour and an endless amount of 2D shapes, designs and effects. Work on various levels to create infinite compositions and find the aesthetic which works for you. Riding a bike is great. Riding a bike which you've created yourself is fantastic. Seeing other riders and players from all over the world racing in your livery is simply the best! CAREER The new career will be a Single Player experience which has never been seen before. Forget the old linear progression: the new Volumes-based system will allow you to collect, read and participate in races and competitions through more than 50 magazines. Each one will catapult you into a unique game experience, made up of competitions and anecdotes about the motorcycling world, which will improve your experience in RIDE 3. What are you waiting for? Start your adventure with RIDE 3.

**Experience the Thrill of RIDE: The Ultimate Motorcycle Racing Game**

Get ready for **RIDE**, the new videogame that puts you in the driver's seat of the world's most beloved motorcycles. Experience **breathtaking races** and embark on a **round-the-world trip** across 15 diverse locations.

**Choose Your Ride and Conquer the World Tour**

Select from **over 100 bikes** from legendary manufacturers that have shaped motorcycling history. Then, dive into the **World Tour**, a global challenge featuring Motorcycle Festivals. These festivals are divided into three distinct track typologies: the adrenaline-pumping **GP Tracks**, the scenic **Country Tracks**, and the demanding **City Tracks**.

As you race, **customize and upgrade your bike** to climb the World Rankings and become the fastest biker in RIDE. Beyond the World Tour, explore various game modes: **Quick Race**, **Time Trial**, **Split Screen**, and online multiplayer for up to 12 players in Quick Race and Championship modes.

**Dive Deeper into RIDE's Features**

*   **WORLD TOUR:** This is the heart of RIDE. Compete in Festivals across categories like Superbike 1000, Supersport 600, and Historic Championships. Each Festival offers diverse race modes, including single races, championships, time trials, track days, drag races, and endurance events. Your performance directly impacts your reputation and World Ranking.

*   **MULTIPLAYER:** Challenge up to 12 players online in Quick Race and Championship modes. You can also race a friend head-to-head with the **split screen feature**. All race results are tracked on the **Leaderboards**.

*   **BIKES:** Immerse yourself in a collection of over **100 stunning bikes**. Choose from current production models and iconic historical machines from 14 leading manufacturers. Bikes range from 250 to 1,299 cc, manufactured between 1987 and 2015. Each bike boasts unique mechanical and dynamic characteristics, faithfully recreated with a **new game physics engine** for an authentic riding experience.

*   **CUSTOMIZATION:** Personalize your rider with a vast selection of gear from top brands, offering over 100 items and 400 color schemes. Your bike is also fully customizable in terms of **appearance and performance**. Upgrade components like mirrors, wheel rims, racing exhausts, and remap the ECU from a catalog of over 100 parts.

*   **TRACKS:** RIDE features **15 unique circuits** set in diverse locations. Experience the thrill of **Country Tracks** through mountain passes and natural parks, navigate challenging **City Tracks** with long straights and tight corners, and push your limits on authentic **GP Tracks**. The **Evolving Track System** dynamically changes the track surface lap after lap, improving grip and creating a more realistic racing environment. This system encourages a clean riding style and helps you master braking points and trajectories by observing your rivals.

**RIDE 2: Your Ultimate Motorcycle Digital Garage**

Welcome to the ultimate temple of motorcycles! **RIDE 2** is your digital garage, offering an unparalleled experience to discover, transform, and test the world's fastest and most iconic bikes. Prepare to compete with the best from renowned brands and showcase their full potential in a unique video game.

**Over 170 Bikes Await**

The undisputed stars of this highly anticipated two-wheel racing game are the **over 170 bikes**. Feel the adrenaline surge as you tackle challenging bends with the passion of a professional rider. RIDE 2 features tracks from the most thrilling races ever, spanning various categories: Country, City, GP, Road, Motard, and Drag. Conquer diverse terrains and leave your mark with every tire squeal!

**Build Your Dream Garage**

Collect them all to create your personalized garage. Choose from powerful and iconic categories and models, including **Nakeds** and **Supersports**.

**Explore World-Class Tracks**

Embark on an unforgettable journey across the globe. Experience an extraordinary sequence of events on over **30 tracks**, featuring legendary circuits like the **Nürburgring Nordschleife**.

**Unleash Your Customization Potential**

Elevate your bike's performance by modifying five key areas:
*   **Engine**
*   **Brakes and Suspension**
*   **Wheels**
*   **Transmission**
*   **Aesthetics**

With **over 20 different modifications**, including the new race transmission for fiberglass fairings, you can tailor your ride for extreme races. Personalize your rider's profile, clothing (Street/Race/Supermoto), and riding style with an advanced pose editor.

**Experience 12 Thrilling Game Modes**

Enjoy a long-lasting and fun gaming experience with **12 distinct game modes**. Master the queen of tracks, the Nürburgring, ride motocross-style, navigate winding layouts with jumps and parabolic curves, and compete in special slaloms. Be quick and precise to outmaneuver opponents, as time waits for no rider!

**RIDE 2: Key Highlights**

*   **Over 170 bike models**
*   New categories like **Sport Bike 2 Strokes**, **Supermotos**, and **Naked Café Racers**
*   **30 diverse tracks** with unique features
*   **22 of the world's leading motorcycle manufacturers**
*   **Over 1200 customizable parts** and **600+ liveries** to create your unique bike
*   New **social features** and **friends integration** for an enhanced experience

**Urban Trial Freestyle: Conquer the City with Your Bike!**

Get ready to transform the urban landscape into your ultimate playground in **Urban Trial Freestyle**. This game empowers you to perform **spectacular tricks** like backflips, 360s, wallrides, and ollies on your freestyle trials bike, with nothing holding you back.

**Customize your ride** to enhance performance in either **Time Attack** or **Stunt mode**. You'll need to make crucial decisions, balancing **speed and style** as you cultivate your own distinctive riding technique.

**Challenge the elite** in **Ghost Mode**, where you'll compete against the best riders. The **impressive variety and intricate design** of the diverse backdrops are engineered to keep you engaged for hours, striving for that **perfect run** and aiming to **dethrone top riders** on the leaderboards.

**Key Features:**

*   **Impressive Levels:** Explore 5 unique and engaging environments.
*   **Diverse Game Modes:** Master Stunt, Time Attack, and Challenges.
*   **Personalization:** Customize both your bike and rider.
*   **Realistic Gameplay:** Experience advanced physics and dynamic animations.
*   **Competitive Play:** Compete on over 140 online leaderboards and utilize Ghost mode.

**Experience the Thrill of Ducati World Championship**

Dive into the exhilarating world of motorcycle racing with **Ducati World Championship**. This game puts you in the rider's seat, offering an unparalleled simulation of Ducati's legendary machines. You'll have the chance to **select your dream bike from over 70 original Ducati models**, each a **perfectly simulated replica** of its real-world counterpart. Forget being limited to just one; with Ducati World Championship, you can **experience them all!**

The game boasts an impressive collection of **over 70 superbly modeled motorbikes**, categorized into four distinct classes: **Classics, Sports, Road, and Grand Prix**. Prepare to test your skills on **more than 34 exciting circuits**, each offering a unique challenge. As you race, you'll discover an **incredible amount of extras to unlock**, adding even more depth to your gameplay.

**Ducati World Championship** provides a comprehensive 360-degree view into the heart of motorcycle racing. Players can immerse themselves as pilots, progressing through **amateur, semi-professional, and professional racing classes**. The ultimate goal? To reach the prestigious **Superbike and the Grand World Championship titles**.

Challenge your friends in the **split-screen multiplayer mode**, or test your mettle in **60 tournaments across five different game modes**. Feel the raw power as you **burn up the track at over 210 MPH on your Ducati Desmosedici**.

Explore the diverse range of bikes, from timeless **Classics** to high-performance **Sports** and **Road** models, and the cutting-edge **Grand Prix** machines. The **34 adrenalin-pumping circuits** are complemented by a **huge amount of unlockable extra content**, ensuring endless replayability. Experience dynamic gameplay with **varied weather and track conditions**, enhanced by **realistic lighting effects**.

Aspiring champions can hone their skills with **Loris' Riding Lessons**, a feature designed to teach you the secrets of becoming a champion rider. Ascend through the ranks in the **challenging Career Mode**, where you'll encounter increasingly faster bikes and enjoy the visual spectacle of **gorgeous Race Queens**. With **three distinct playing modes – arcade, normal, and simulation** – **Ducati World Championship** offers countless options for **endless hours of fun!**

Name: Urban Trial Tricky™ Deluxe Edition
Description:
ALRIGHT! URBAN TRIAL TRICKY DELUXE EDITION IS HERE! Now you can fully express yourself while exploring the urban jungle. With the full package of motorbike tricks, style, and extreme levels you will become unstoppable! 🏍️ KEY FEATURES 🏍️ Exciting light-hearted casual gameplay Crazy mix of tricks, platforming, and racing Killer tricks to combine in countless combos Super-smooth experience 3 single-player modes Over 30 levels + side challenges Savage customization options Leaderboards to rule Infinite gameplay More freedom, more fun. Riding in both directions. Urban Trial Tricky Deluxe Edition includes six additional savage customization options each with new rider skin, signature special trick, and the matching motorbike paint job. DEFY GRAVITY WITH CRAZY TRICKS! BECOME A CRAZY TRICKSTER! Grab your seat and pull off the most savage tricks and combos on your motorbike. Ride freely, spin around in the air, go back and forth and let yourself be carried away by the fun, fast-paced gameplay, colorful visuals, and smooth controls. GET STYLISH! Learn new freestyle, breakdance and FMX moves to fit your own style. Unlock crazy costumes and customize your motorbike at will. PUSH YOURSELF AND OTHERS TO GREATNESS! Complete challenges and master countless outstanding maneuvers and tricks to rule the leaderboards.

Name: BioShock™
Description:
BioShock is a shooter unlike any you've ever played, loaded with weapons and tactics never seen. You'll have a complete arsenal at your disposal from simple revolvers to grenade launchers and chemical throwers, but you'll also be forced to genetically modify your DNA to create an even more deadly weapon: you. Injectable plasmids give you super human powers: blast electrical currents into water to electrocute multiple enemies, or freeze them solid and obliterate them with the swing of a wrench. No encounter ever plays out the same, and no two gamers will play the game the same way. Biologically modify your body: send fire storming from your fingertips and unleash a swarm of killer hornets hatched from the veins in your arms. Hack devices and systems, upgrade your weapons and craft new ammo variants. Turn everything into a weapon: the environment, your body, fire and water, and even your worst enemies. Explore an incredible and unique art deco world hidden deep under the ocean. BioShock: Breaking the Mold A free download that takes an inside look at the art of BioShock. Download it now (75MB .PDF)

Name: BioShock Infinite
Description:
Indebted to the wrong people, with his life on the line, veteran of the U.S. Cavalry and now hired gun, Booker DeWitt has only one opportunity to wipe his slate clean. He must rescue Elizabeth, a mysterious girl imprisoned since childhood and locked up in the flying city of Columbia. Forced to trust one another, Booker and Elizabeth form a powerful bond during their daring escape. Together, they learn to harness an expanding arsenal of weapons and abilities, as they fight on zeppelins in the clouds, along high-speed Sky-Lines, and down in the streets of Columbia, all while surviving the threats of the air-city and uncovering its dark secret. Key Features The City in the Sky – Leave the depths of Rapture to soar among the clouds of Columbia. A technological marvel, the flying city is a beautiful and vibrant world that holds a very dark secret. Unlikely Mission – Set in 1912, hired gun Booker DeWitt must rescue a mysterious girl from the sky-city of Columbia or never leave it alive. Whip, Zip, and Kill – Turn the city’s Sky-Lines into weaponized roller coasters as you zip through the flying city and dish out fatal hands-on punishment. Tear Through Time – Open Tears in time and space to shape the battlefield and turn the tide in combat by pulling weapons, turrets, and other resources out of thin air. Vigorous Powers – Throw explosive fireballs, shoot lightning, and release murders of crows as devastatingly powerful Vigors surge through your body to be unleashed against all that oppose you. Custom Combat Experience – With deadly weapons in one hand, powerful Vigors in the other, and the ability to open Tears in time and space, fight your own way through the floating city of Columbia to rescue Elizabeth and reach freedom. 1999 Mode – Upon finishing BioShock Infinite, the player can unlock a game mode called “1999 Mode” that gives experienced players a taste of the kind of design and balance that hardcore gamers enjoyed back in the 20th century.

Name: Thief™ Gold
Description:
Stalk your prey on the quest for stolen goods with your blackjack, sword, and an assortment of unique arrows. Steal for money and uncover the hidden agendas of your allies and enemies as you play through an unravelling story of deception and revenge. Survive in a world where shadows are your only ally, trust is not an option, and confrontation results in death! Key Features: Pioneering stealth based gameplay brings a new dimension to first person action. Thief™ Gold includes Thief™ The Dark Project (12 huge missions with multiple environments) and the Gold update (3 new campaign missions which deepen the plot and add five new types of enemies) Advanced enemies can see, hear, speak, and sound alarms. Your arsenal includes: blackjack, sword, fire arrows, water arrows, rope arrows and more

## Dishonored: A Supernatural Assassin's Revenge

Dishonored is a deeply immersive first-person action game that places you in the role of a supernatural assassin fueled by a burning desire for revenge. The game's exceptionally flexible combat system empowers you to creatively eliminate your targets by seamlessly blending supernatural abilities, a diverse arsenal of weapons, and an array of unusual gadgets. You can choose to pursue your enemies under the cloak of darkness, moving like a phantom, or to launch a direct, ruthless assault with weapons drawn. Crucially, the outcome of each mission is directly shaped by the critical choices you make throughout your journey.

### The City of Dunwall: A World of Shadows and Intrigue

The narrative of Dishonored unfolds in Dunwall, a sprawling industrial whaling city where peculiar steampunk-inspired technology and unsettling otherworldly forces exist in a precarious balance within the shadows. You begin as the once-trusted bodyguard of the beloved Empress. However, you are unjustly framed for her murder, transforming you into an infamous assassin, recognized solely by the disturbing mask that has become your chilling calling card. This is a period of profound uncertainty; the city is not only besieged by a devastating plague but also governed by a corrupt regime wielding advanced industrial technologies. Amidst this turmoil, dark forces conspire to bestow upon you extraordinary abilities, far surpassing those of any ordinary man, but this power comes at a significant cost. The truth behind your betrayal remains as obscure as the murky waters surrounding the city, and the life you once knew is irrevocably lost.

### Key Features: Unlocking Your Assassin's Potential

#### Improvise and Innovate Your Playstyle

Approach each assassination with a unique style tailored to your preferences. You can leverage the advantages of shadow and sound to navigate levels silently, remaining unseen by your adversaries, or opt for a head-on confrontation, engaging enemies as they react to your aggressive presence. The game's remarkably flexible combat system encourages you to creatively combine your innate abilities, potent supernatural powers, and ingenious gadgets as you progress through the levels and dispatch your objectives. The freedom to improvise and innovate is paramount in defining your personal play style.

#### Action with Meaningful Consequences

The world of Dishonored dynamically reacts to your actions and the way you choose to play. You can move through the environment like a ghost, actively resisting the city's corruption, or you can show no mercy, leaving a devastating path of destruction in your wake. Your decision regarding the approach for each mission directly influences the subsequent outcomes, ensuring that your choices have tangible and lasting effects.

#### Master Supernatural Abilities

The game offers a suite of potent supernatural abilities that dramatically expand your tactical options. You can utilize teleportation for stealthy infiltrations, possess any living creature to manipulate your surroundings, or even stop time itself to orchestrate unearthly and precise executions. Combining these extraordinary supernatural abilities with your arsenal of weapons unlocks even more inventive ways to overcome obstacles and efficiently eliminate your targets. Furthermore, the game's comprehensive upgrade system allows for the mastery of deadly new abilities and the development of devious gadgets, further enhancing your assassin's toolkit.

#### A City Unlike Any Other

Dishonored invites you to explore an original world meticulously envisioned by Viktor Antonov, the art director behind the acclaimed Half-Life 2. Arkane Studios and Bethesda Softworks present a captivating steampunk city where the forces of industry and the supernatural collide, forging an atmosphere thick with intrigue and mystery. This richly detailed world is yours to discover and explore at your own pace.

Alchemical engineering is fundamental to the existence of civilization, a fact underscored by Anataeus Vaya, the most promising alchemist of his generation. Vaya has recently accepted the prestigious role of Head Alchemist for House Van Tassen, an ancient and affluent family within the city. However, the family's luxurious exterior conceals hidden dangers, suggesting that alchemy alone may not be sufficient to overcome all challenges.

Opus Magnum, the newest open-ended puzzle game from Zachtronics, the renowned developers behind SpaceChem, Infinifactory, TIS-100, and SHENZHEN I/O, invites players to explore this intricate world. In Opus Magnum, you will master the complex, physical mechanisms of the transmutation engine, the alchemist's most sophisticated instrument. This powerful tool allows you to craft essential remedies, valuable gemstones, potent weaponry, and a variety of other creations.

The game offers a deep and engaging experience through several key features:

*   **Design Machines:** Construct and assemble intricate machines to execute alchemical processes. You'll utilize a diverse array of components, including programmable arms, adaptable tracks, and more specialized devices such as Van Berlo's wheel and the Glyph of Animismus.
*   **Open-Ended Puzzles:** Engage in a competitive environment, challenging friends and players worldwide to devise the most efficient, rapid, and compact solutions to the game's numerous puzzles. Showcase your ingenious designs by exporting animated GIFs.
*   **Steam Workshop Integration:** Create and distribute your own puzzles with seamless Steam Workshop support and an intuitive puzzle editor. You can also play top user-submitted puzzles featured in the esteemed Journal of Alchemical Engineering, handpicked by Zachtronics.
*   **Rich Narrative:** Immerse yourself in a world of intrigue and clandestine schemes that permeate the city's ancient Houses. Alchemists, possessing the extraordinary ability to create nearly anything conceivable through science, are highly coveted—and exceptionally perilous.
*   **Solitaire Minigame:** Alchemical engineering demands intense focus. Take a respite with Sigmar's Garden, an original alchemy-themed solitaire game where every game is winnable, though not every game will be successfully completed.

Torchlight II, the acclaimed Action RPG, returns with an expanded and enhanced experience, offering players an even more thrilling adventure. This installment is packed with **randomized levels, enemies, and loot**, ensuring that no two playthroughs are ever the same. While retaining the beloved flavor and excitement of its predecessor, Torchlight II significantly broadens the game world and introduces highly anticipated features, most notably **online and LAN multiplayer**. Once again, the ultimate destiny of the world rests squarely in your capable hands.

Torchlight II boasts a diverse range of **character classes**, providing players with a multitude of distinct play styles to explore. Each class offers the flexibility of being played as either a male or female hero, complete with **customizable cosmetic features and appearances** to ensure your avatar is truly unique.

The game offers robust **multiplayer options**, allowing you to team up with friends for cooperative play via LAN or over the internet, completely free of charge. A sophisticated matchmaking service facilitates connections with players globally, making it easy to find and join games with others from around the world.

Embark on an epic journey through the expansive **open world** of Vilderan, traversing its vast overworld and numerous hub towns. Experience dynamic environmental changes as you battle through **rain, snow, and shifts between day and night**. The inherent **level randomization** guarantees fresh layouts, unique paths, varied loot, and challenging monsters with every new game session.

For those who wish to further tailor their experience, Torchlight II offers extensive **mod support** through the Steam Workshop. This integration allows for seamless mod subscription and synchronization, granting access to over a thousand community-created modifications that can dramatically alter gameplay. Furthermore, the powerful **GUTS editor** empowers you to create and share your own unique content with the global community.

The challenge doesn't end with the primary campaign. Torchlight II features a compelling **New Game Plus** mode, allowing you to continue your adventure with the same character for a **significantly greater challenge**. You'll retain all your hard-earned skills, gold, and gear, making your subsequent playthroughs even more rewarding.

Beloved features from the original game, such as **pets and fishing**, make a triumphant return in Torchlight II, now enhanced with more options and improved visual effects. Your loyal pet will continue to assist you by making trips to town to sell your accumulated loot, freeing you to focus on the action.

## BioShock 2: A Return to the Depths of Rapture

**BioShock 2** invites players back to the atmospheric and decaying underwater metropolis of Rapture, approximately a decade after the events of the original game. This time, you embody the iconic **Big Daddy**, a hulking protector tasked with navigating the city's haunting beauty and confronting a new, unseen threat that is abducting young girls and dragging them back into Rapture's crumbling embrace. Your mission is to unravel the mysteries of this resurgence of past sins and fight for your own survival within this once-grand, now-ruined world.

The single-player campaign offers an **evolved combat experience**, allowing for innovative new strategies through the dual-wielding of weapons and Plasmids, creating exciting and dynamic combat combinations. This narrative continues the award-winning storytelling that made the first game so acclaimed, driving forward one of gaming's most captivating and terrifying storylines. You will truly **experience the raw power and strength of Rapture's most feared denizen** as you battle a host of new enemies. Beyond the main story, the **Protector Trials** present intense combat challenges designed to test your mastery of weapons and Plasmids. In these trials, you must protect your Little Sister as she gathers ADAM from fallen foes, facing mounting opposition and a relentless onslaught. Each trial provides unique weapon and Plasmid load-outs, with an additional bonus load-out unlocked upon successful completion.

Adding another layer to the BioShock universe, the multiplayer mode serves as a rich prequel narrative, exploring the origins of Rapture and its inhabitants. Set during the city's catastrophic fall, you assume the role of a Plasmid test subject for Sinclair Solutions, a prominent provider of Plasmids and Tonics. To survive this unique experience, you will need to **master the full BioShock arsenal**. This genetically enhanced multiplayer allows you to earn experience points to unlock new Weapons, Plasmids, and Tonics, enabling the creation of hundreds of unique character builds tailored to your individual playstyle. You will **experience Rapture's civil war firsthand**, playing as its citizens and participating in the conflict that ultimately tore the city apart. Furthermore, you can **see Rapture before its fall**, engaging in combat within iconic locations like the Kashmir Restaurant and Mercury Suites, meticulously reimagined for the multiplayer arenas. This robust multiplayer experience is brought to you by Digital Extremes, a studio with over a decade of expertise in first-person shooter development.

The game also includes a wealth of downloadable content. The **Sinclair Solutions Test Pack** allows you to increase your rank to 50, offering new weapon upgrades, 20 additional Trials, two new playable characters, and five new Masks. The **Rapture Metro Map Pack** introduces six new maps within the Rapture Metro system. A fresh melee mode, **"Golf" Melee Mode**, transforms blunt objects into golf clubs for a unique combat experience. Finally, you can play as the distinct multiplayer characters **Zigo & Blanche**. Please note that all downloadable content requires the full game to play.

**Thief™ II: The Metal Age** brings back the ultimate thief for a new adventure. This stealth-based FPS game immerses you in a world of **powerful new technologies, fanatical religions, and corruption**.

You'll navigate **15 complex, non-linear levels**, each offering a unique path to **steal valuable loot and outsmart vigilant guards**. The game features **improved enemy AI**, ensuring a challenging experience. You'll also have access to **new gadgets and sophisticated master thief tools** to aid your missions.

The **gripping narrative** unfolds through 15 huge missions, complete with intriguing subplots. Thief™ II: The Metal Age has received significant acclaim, including an **entry in Gamespy's Greatest Games of All Time** and an award for **Outstanding Achievement in Character or Story Development** at the 3rd annual Academy of Interactive Arts and Sciences Awards in 2000.

## Embark on an Epic Victorian Space Adventure in Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition

Prepare to captain a magnificent steam locomotive as a burgeoning Victorian empire boldly ventures into the vast expanse of the cosmos. In *Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition*, you will guide your intrepid crew through perilous journeys, pushing the boundaries of their sanity and your strategic prowess. This definitive edition of *Sunless Skies* meticulously integrates all post-launch enhancements, including the addition of new officers, formidable enemies, advanced engines, compelling storylines, and even charming mascots. Furthermore, it features a completely reimagined region, a dedicated "Full Steam" mode for exhilarating long voyages and desperate escapes, and the highly anticipated horn functionality, alongside numerous quality-of-life improvements designed to enrich your experience.

### Forge Your Captain's Legacy

Your journey begins with the crucial decision of defining your captain's past. Were you once a streetwise urchin, a devout priest, or a fiery revolutionary? Uncover the motivations that brought you to the stars and the secrets you strive to conceal. With each advancement your character makes, you will select another defining aspect of their history, such as being the Black Sheep of the family or harboring a Lost Love. The unforgiving nature of the skies means that most captains will meet their end, but their legacy will endure, leaving behind an inheritance for those who follow, for better or for worse.

### Explore a Beautiful, Hostile Universe

Delve deeper into the rich, dark, and wondrous Fallen London Universe, a setting previously explored in our acclaimed game, *Sunless Sea*. While this is a completely new narrative and not a direct sequel, players can immerse themselves in this captivating world without prior experience. The High Wilderness presents a breathtaking yet terrifying vision of space, where conventional rules do not apply. Experience winds that howl through shattered celestial ruins, fogs that coil amidst stellar jungles, and industrial sprawl that chokes the heavens with smog. The very stars, known as the Judgements, are vast intelligences that govern existence, but they are mysteriously fading, leaving their thrones vacant. Your captain must navigate this impossible world, engaging in trade, exploration, combat, and survival.

### Enhance Your Locomotive and Conquer the Skies

Your locomotive serves as your sole bastion against the myriad dangers lurking in the Heavens. Meticulously maintain and upgrade it with exotic weaponry and specialized equipment, such as a Pneumatic Mining Array or the swift Brassraven. Learn to craft formidable weapons, like the Wrath of Heaven, from the spoils of your defeated adversaries. When your coffers allow, acquire an entirely new locomotive, perhaps the spacious Pellinore-class Trader or the sleek and menacing Medea-class Destroyer. Prepare to confront rival locomotives, ranging from opportunistic pirates to experimental imperial navy warships, as well as monstrous entities like the nightmarish Undeparted and swarms of irate Chorister-bees. Master the art of playing factions against each other and learn the unique combat behaviors of each foe. Utilize the Full Steam mode to either evade perilous situations or relentlessly pursue your quarry.

### Survive the Extremes: Starvation, Madness, and Terror

Effectively manage your crew's morale and your captain's own internal struggles with nightmares. Carefully balance your fuel and supplies against your insatiable desire to explore uncharted territories, pursue knowledge, or amass riches. Be warned: the darkness has a profound and transformative effect on all who venture into it. Populate your vessel with a diverse array of upgradeable officers, each possessing their own unique questlines. These companions may include a repentant devil, an incognito princess, an entire brigade of rats, or even your own Aunt, whose presence in the High Wilderness remains a perplexing mystery.

### The World Unfettered: An Ambitious Empire and Dying Stars

The Victorian Empire, liberated from the constraints of gravity, has extended its dominion across the celestial expanse, even constructing a new sun. The Empress, wielding control over time from her Throne of Hours, presides over an empire of vast ambition and scant mercy. Your captain must carve out an existence in this extraordinary world, making critical choices that could tip the balance of power. Will you align yourself with Her Majesty's new empire, support the rebels striving to break free from London's rule, or forge your own independent path between these warring factions? Your ultimate fate will be determined by your actions: will you retire in triumph, or be irrevocably lost to the encroaching darkness?

### Key Features of Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition

*   **Vast Narrative Depth:** Immerse yourself in over 800,000 words of interconnected stories, drawing inspiration from literary giants like C.S. Lewis, Jules Verne, H.P. Lovecraft, and H.G. Wells.
*   **Stunning Visuals:** Experience a beautifully rendered world brought to life through lush, hand-drawn 2D art.
*   **Diverse Regions:** Explore four distinct and captivating regions: the celestial wilderness, an impossible industrial empire, a pagan midnight expanse, and the domain of the dead.
*   **Real-Time Combat:** Engage in thrilling real-time battles against horrifying celestial foes and merciless pirates.
*   **Locomotive Customization:** Equip your engine with bizarre and powerful equipment and weaponry.
*   **Survival Mechanics:** Battle against starvation, mutiny, terror, and nightmares, or succumb to their influence.
*   **Legacy Playstyle:** Choose to build a lineage of captains, with each death passing on an inheritance, or reload your most recent captain to continue your journey.
*   **Narrative Progression:** Uncover your captain's past and develop their story as you traverse the skies.
*   **Rich Trading System:** Earn your fortune through a unique, story-driven trading system, or embrace the thrill of smuggling.
*   **Collectible Companions:** Gather a menagerie of unique pets, including the Inadvisably Big Dog, Useless Cat, and Perfect Pangolin.
*   **Full Control Support:** Enjoy seamless gameplay with key remapping for keyboard and mouse, and comprehensive controller support.

### About Failbetter Games

Failbetter Games is a small, independent British game studio based in London, dedicated to crafting unique and immersive narrative experiences since 2009. Join us as we venture into the dark.

Name: Dishonored 2
Description:
Game Description Reprise your role as a supernatural assassin in Dishonored 2. Praised by PC Gamer as “brilliant”, IGN as “amazing” and “a super sequel, IGN as “amazing” and “a superb sequel”, declared a “masterpiece” by Eurogamer, and hailed “a must-play revenge tale among the best in its class” by Game Informer, Dishonored 2 is the follow up to Arkane Studio's first-person action blockbuster and winner of more than 100 'Game of the Year' awards, Dishonored. Play your way in a world where mysticism and industry collide. Will you choose to play as Empress Emily Kaldwin or the royal protector, Corvo Attano? Will you make your way through the game unseen, make full use of its brutal combat system, or use a blend of both? How will you combine your character's unique set of powers, weapons and gadgets to eliminate your enemies? The story responds to your choices, leading to intriguing outcomes, as you play through each of the game's hand-crafted missions. Story Dishonored 2 is set 15 years after the Lord Regent has been vanquished and the dreaded Rat Plague has passed into history. An otherworldly usurper has seized Empress Emily Kaldwin’s throne, leaving the fate of the Isles hanging in the balance. As Emily or Corvo, travel beyond the legendary streets of Dunwall to Karnaca, the once-dazzling coastal city that holds the keys to restoring Emily to power. Armed with the Mark of the Outsider and powerful new abilities, track down your enemies and take back what’s rightfully yours. Key Features The Assassins As fully voiced characters, Emily Kaldwin and Corvo Attano now bring their own perspectives and emotional responses to the world and story. Use each character’s set of powers, gadgets and uniquely-tuned weapons in creative ways as you explore the world – whether you fight your way through the city streets or sneak across the rooftops - and which enemies you decide to eliminate or spare. Supernatural Powers Advanced bonecharm crafting and all-new upgrade trees allow you to customize your powers in vastly different ways. Become a living shadow to silently stalk your targets, link enemies so they share a common fate, or mesmerize your foes and dominate their minds. Choose from nearly infinite combinations of violence, nonlethal combat, powers and weapons to accomplish your objectives. Imaginative World From the grimy, rat-infested streets of Dunwall to the lush, exotic coasts of a decaying Karnaca, immerse yourself in stylized locales created by Arkane’s premiere art and narrative teams. The world is a character in its own right, rich with story, architecture and eclectic characters. It is also punctuated by signature mission locations, such as the Dust District, ravaged by dust storms and warring factions, and a madman’s mansion made of shifting walls, deadly traps and clockwork soldiers. The Void Engine Dishonored 2 is beautifully brought to life with the new Void Engine, a leap forward in rendering technology, built from id Tech and highly-customized by Arkane Studios. Designed to support world-class art direction and take full advantage of the powerful hardware this generation has to offer, the Void Engine allows for significant advances to all game systems, including responsive stealth and combat Artificial Intelligence, lighting and graphical rendering, impressively dense urban environments, and story presentation.

**Leisure Suit Larry - Wet Dreams Don't Dry: A Modern Adventure**

Get ready for the latest installment in the Leisure Suit Larry series! Larry is back and ready to navigate the 21st century. This point-and-click adventure throws Larry from the late '80s into today's world, where he'll discover how much things have changed.

Larry's 1980s perspective on the world and women clashes with modern reality. Despite this, he's determined to date his way through the contemporary landscape.

**Key Features:**

*   **A New Love Interest:** Larry falls for Faith, the assistant to the CEO of Prune, a global tech company.
*   **Digital Dating:** Since dating is now digital, Larry must use "Timber," a popular dating app.
*   **Improve Your Score:** Date women, fulfill their needs, and earn points to boost your Timber profile.
*   **Explore a New World:** Discover a non-linear game world with over 30 hand-drawn locations.
*   **Engaging Puzzles:** Solve puzzles and interact with over 30 unique, hand-drawn characters.
*   **Modern Twists:** Experience the 21st century with a humorous and nostalgic take.

Larry's journey involves using the in-game app "Timber" and its innovative dating mechanics. The goal is to improve his score, get closer to Faith, and navigate the complexities of modern romance. He'll also get a chance to check out "Instacrap," a social media platform, for some quick entertainment.

Name: Dream Daddy: A Dad Dating Simulator
Description:
Dream Daddy: A Dad Dating Simulator is a game where you play as a Dad and your goal is to meet and romance other hot Dads. You and your daughter have just moved into the sleepy seaside town of Maple Bay only to discover that everyone in your neighborhood is a single, dateable Dad! Will you go out with Teacher Dad? Goth Dad? Bad Dad? Or any of the other cool Dads in this game? With minigames, sidequests, and a variety of paths and endings, Dream Daddy: A Dad Dating Simulator is this year's most anticipated Dad-based game. Features 7 dateable Dads Dad character creator - Create your Dadsona! Multiple endings per-Dad Voiced by the Game Grumps and friends Written and created by Leighton Gray and Vernon Shaw Game Directed by Tyler J. Hutchison Artwork and pinups by Shanen Pae, J.N. Wiedle, Anna Pan, Tyson Hesse, Ellen Alsop, Evan Palmer, Ego Rodriguez, and many more! Original score by Jesse Cale Dad-themed mini and micro games throughout each date path So many Dad puns. Like, to the point where it made us all uncomfortable Secretssssssss.

Name: Genital Jousting
Description:
Genital Jousting is an online and local multiplayer party game about flaccid penises and wiggly anuses for up to eight players at once. Players control a detached penis complete with testicles and an anus. Multiple game modes provide a stimulating orgy of objectives: penetrate and be penetrated as fast as possible or compete in absurd, silly and sexually suggestive games and challenges. New Story Mode Play as John, a dick who wants to find a date for his high school reunion. He'll need some help along the way. He's wobbly, he's soft. But he wants to be hard. So very hard. He wants to show everyone his astounding rigidity. And with your help, that's exactly what he'll do. Features If this is something that makes you uncomfortable or sounds unappealing, please do not purchase or play Genital Jousting, or even continue reading. Online and Local Multiplayer for Eight: Genital Jousting is more fun with friends and can satisfy up to eight players at once! Find a few willing partners, cuddle up on the couch, and share controllers or go online to joust with anonymous players from all over the world. Traditional and Party Modes: Dabble in the throbbingly fast-paced Traditional Mode or jostle your way through some stiff competition in Party Mode including challenges like Double Delight, Obstacle Intercourse, and Weiner Round Up. Customize Your Member: Genitals come in all shapes and sizes so pick your favorite color and decorate it with the most appealing outfit to customize a penis you can really get behind!

Name: Lust for Darkness
Description:
/ Don't miss the new edition of the fan-favorite sequel! / Jonathan Moon receives a letter from his wife who has gone missing a year before. Following information from the message he heads for a secluded mansion where an eldritch, occult ceremony takes place. Gates to another world - the profane, perverse land of Lusst’ghaa are opened. TWO WORLDS Move in both a Victorian mansion and Lusst’ghaa - an alien dimension filled with otherworldly creatures. Lusst’ghaa used to be similar to our earth until the local beings decided to undergo total degeneration at their own wish. Through experiments they transformed their bodies so that they could never cease to experience carnal delights. Hundreds of years have passed since that metamorphosis and Lusst’ghaa is now a land overgrown with alien vegetation and full of monstrosities squirming in a never ending ecstasy. FEATURES Erotic and occult themes World design inspired with works of Lovecraft, Giger & Zdzisław Beksiński Exploring a Victorian mansion and the world of Lusst’ghaa Using portals to traverse between two alternative realities Searching for hidden items to unlock side stories find out more about the game’s backstory Escaping the creatures of Lusst’ghaa Original soundtrack by a known composer (Draco Nared)

Name: The Tower of Five Hearts
Description:
Story There are five continents of roughly-equal size, side-by-side, and all of them meet to an approximate point in the middle. At this meeting of borders, there is a tower: The Tower of Five Hearts. One Royal Family is in charge of upholding the peace for every continent, by marrying off their child to a prospective girl from one of the continents. It’s more of a contest-five girls trying to be Maids, in the hope that their master (the Prince) will fall in love with them... However this time, it’s a Princess . Features A cute and adorable yuri visual novel featuring kemonomimi (animal ears)! Play the role of a princess to find the girl meant for you! Over 10 Hscenes to explore! Multi-platform Support! (Windows, Mac, and Linux) Maids! --- Any future content for the game will be free dlc.

**Deep Space Waifu: FLAT JUSTICE** plunges players into a thrilling, one-handed shmup experience where the theme is **POLICE WOMEN** and the mission is to deliver **FLAT JUSTICE**. As a proud member of the **F.L.A.T. (Fabulous Law Application Taskforce)**, your duty is to rescue damsels in distress from the clutches of a menacing, corrupted alien police force. Embark on King Bear's epic quest for justice, a journey to reclaim lost dignity and, most importantly, to **FIND THE PERFECT WAIFU**, all while delivering a swift kick to the alien police's posterior.

This game is designed for **super casual play**, even allowing for **one-hand operation**, making it accessible to everyone. Beyond the exhilarating action, **Deep Space Waifu: FLAT JUSTICE** boasts **an actual plot** that unfolds as you progress. Dive into the **new gallery mode** to admire your progress and enjoy the game's unique aesthetic, which includes the much-anticipated **OPPAIS**. Prepare for an extensive list of features designed to keep you engaged:

*   **60 PIECES OF CLOTHING TO DESTROY!**
*   **40 MILESTONES TO THE PERFECT SCORE!**
*   **15 NEW CORRUPTED COP ENEMIES!**
*   **15 CARDS** to collect.
*   **12 WOMEN WITH UNIQUE POSES** to discover.
*   **12 CHALLENGING STAGES** to conquer.
*   **10 UNIQUE BOSS FIGHTS** to overcome.
*   **6 POWER UPS** to enhance your abilities.
*   **5 NEW MUSICS** to energize your gameplay.
*   **3 MOTORCYCLES** for stylish traversal.
*   **1 SNEAKY BEAR** adding an element of surprise.

Have a nice day, OFFICER!

## Unraveling the Darkness: Kara no Shojo's Murder Mystery

Kara no Shojo plunges players into a chilling murder mystery, casting them as a detective tasked with solving a series of disturbing crimes. The core of the game lies in player choice; every investigative decision, from actions taken to locations visited, profoundly shapes the narrative and determines the story's conclusion. As the investigation deepens, players will gradually uncover the truth, often through unsettling diary entries that challenge their perception of reality and reveal hidden secrets.

The year is March 1956, and Tokyo is a city still recovering from wartime. Private investigator Tokisaka Reiji receives a peculiar request in Inokashira Park from a young woman urging him to "look for something. Me. My true self." Simultaneously, the city is gripped by a wave of brutal murders. Young women are vanishing, only to be found dismembered with their wombs violently removed. Detective Uozumi Kyoko, confronting the grim reality of these crimes, seeks help from her old friend and former colleague, Reiji.

Reiji's investigation leads him to Ouba Girls Academy, a school on the outskirts of Hoya City where his younger sister is enrolled. The mysterious disappearance of two young women from the academy prompts the vice principal, Saeki Tokio, to enlist Reiji's aid, marking his third case. To gather information discreetly, Reiji poses as a substitute teacher. Here, he encounters Kuchiki Toko again, his initial client, the girl who urged him to find her true self. Her distinctly boyish demeanor is evident as she greets him, "Heya - so we meet again, Mr. Detective."

As the body count rises, what began as a search for missing students becomes a far more complex and perilous situation. The alarming discrepancy between missing persons and unidentified bodies raises critical questions. Who will be the next victim? What hidden mysteries lie at the heart of these new cases, and how do they connect to similar murders six years prior?

Innocent Grey presents an original, psychologically charged murder mystery that challenges players to unravel the truth through their own investigative prowess and deductive reasoning. **Effectively utilizing the clues meticulously documented in your notebook is paramount** to piecing together the solution to this pulse-pounding mystery. The game features a **rich cast of over thirty characters**, each meticulously designed with unique visuals and distinct personalities, contributing to a complex tapestry of human drama. These characters, embodying diverse ideas and holding their own deeply ingrained thoughts and beliefs, weave a narrative filled with intricate relationships, dramatic conflicts, and perplexing riddles. You may find yourself stifling a scream or narrowly missing the perpetrator, but one thing is certain: this remarkable work of interactive storytelling should not be overlooked. Beneath the layers of tragedy, perhaps a single girl's smile awaits discovery.

**Key Features:**

*   **Player-Driven Narrative:** Your choices as the detective directly impact the story's outcome, offering a truly personalized experience.
*   **Extensive Character Roster:** Over 30 unique characters with distinct personalities and motivations contribute to a complex and engaging human drama.
*   **Intricate Plot:** A compelling storyline masterfully interweaves multiple incidents, connecting each event in a chain that culminates in an exhilarating and suspenseful mystery.
*   **Investigative Gameplay:** Utilize clues and deductions to uncover the truth behind a series of brutal murders, making your intellect the key to progression.
*   **Psychological Thriller Elements:** Experience a suspenseful narrative filled with unexpected twists and turns that will keep you on the edge of your seat.

Name: King of Phoenix
Description:
King of Phoenix is a comedic adult harem dating sim set in sunny Phoenix, Arizona. Play as Dan Miller, a British journalist who is forced to take a layover in Phoenix and meets a couple of very lovely ladies there. What treasures lie in wait for him in this city? Money? Friendship? Passion? Waifus? Experience the sexiest layover known to man as you spend a few decadent days in a resort and watch your “Phoenix” rise through the ashes! A hilarious and sexy storyline Anime characters Four possible endings Plenty of “entertaining” CGs Lovely Waifus to charm A sexy and very funky OST

Name: The Spirit Master of Retarnia -Conqueror of the Labyrinth-
Description:
