A Classic 3D Dungeon RPG featuring cute girls, skill trees, and vast loot items to explore! Features - Traverse numerous dungeons and battle monsters! - Loot tons of gear, including epic Artifacts, from the dungeons to power up your heroines! - Your party members will suffer if you lose in battle! - Brace for battle by stocking up on potions and goods! - Level up and customize your team to your playstyle! - Face off against fearsome monsters to restore peace to Retarnia! Story Our story begins in the Kingdom of Retania, a country that has been at peace for five hundred years. However, portals to the Demon World have suddenly opened up, and the vile monsters which lie beyond it are determined to invade and take over the kingdom. Five hundred years earlier, a certain hero known as the 'Spirit Master of Retarnia' averted a similar crisis and led five spirits--The White Spirit Norn, the Red Spirit Vesta, the Blue Spirit Rusalka, the Green Spirit Melissa, and the Black Spirit Iris--to battle against the demons and seal the portals to their world. At the request of Queen Sylvia, Leonard, a descendant of the Spirit Master, stepped forth across the portal into the Demon World to save the kingdom...

Welcome to Camp Bearfoot, an abandoned campground where your instructor has accidentally led your group. For the next seven days, you and three other campers will face the challenges of nature. Without provisions and no immediate sign of rescue, can your group survive a week in the wilderness?

This visual novel offers a unique experience:

*   **Protagonist Choice:** Play as either a male or female character.
*   **Engaging Story:** Experience a blend of lighthearted comedy and rising tensions as the days pass.
*   **Character Dynamics:** Explore a lesbian subplot between two of the girls, with the potential for a romantic encounter with one of them.

Prepare for a week of unexpected adventures, where survival is key and relationships may blossom amidst the challenges.

Grand Theft Auto V for PC offers an enhanced experience of the award-winning open world of Los Santos and Blaine County. This version allows players to explore the game in stunning resolutions up to 4K and beyond, and enjoy smooth gameplay at 60 frames per second.

### PC-Specific Enhancements

The PC version boasts extensive customization options. Players can fine-tune over 25 settings for texture quality, shaders, tessellation, and anti-aliasing. Mouse and keyboard controls are fully supported and highly customizable.

### Traffic and Display Options

Control the flow of Los Santos with a population density slider, adjusting car and pedestrian traffic. The game also supports dual and triple monitor setups, 3D compatibility, and plug-and-play controller functionality.

### Grand Theft Auto Online

Grand Theft Auto V for PC includes Grand Theft Auto Online, supporting up to 30 players and two spectators. All existing gameplay upgrades and content, including Heists and Adversary modes, are included.

### First Person Mode

Experience the detailed world of Los Santos and Blaine County in an entirely new way with the introduction of First Person Mode.

### Rockstar Editor

The Rockstar Editor is a powerful suite of tools for capturing, editing, and sharing gameplay footage.

#### Director Mode

Director Mode allows players to create their own scenes using story characters, pedestrians, and animals. Advanced camera controls, editing effects like slow motion, and various camera filters are available. Players can add their own music from GTAV radio stations or dynamically adjust the game's score.

#### Sharing Your Creations

Completed videos can be uploaded directly from the Rockstar Editor to YouTube and the Rockstar Games Social Club.

### New Radio Stations

The Lab FM, hosted by The Alchemist and Oh No, features new music inspired by the game's soundtrack, with guest artists like Earl Sweatshirt and Freddie Gibbs. Self Radio allows players to enjoy their own custom soundtracks.

*Special access content requires a Rockstar Games Social Club account. Visit for details.*

Name: Portal 2
Description:
Portal 2 draws from the award-winning formula of innovative gameplay, story, and music that earned the original Portal over 70 industry accolades and created a cult following. The single-player portion of Portal 2 introduces a cast of dynamic new characters, a host of fresh puzzle elements, and a much larger set of devious test chambers. Players will explore never-before-seen areas of the Aperture Science Labs and be reunited with GLaDOS, the occasionally murderous computer companion who guided them through the original game. The game’s two-player cooperative mode features its own entirely separate campaign with a unique story, test chambers, and two new player characters. This new mode forces players to reconsider everything they thought they knew about portals. Success will require them to not just act cooperatively, but to think cooperatively. Product Features Extensive single player: Featuring next generation gameplay and a wildly-engrossing story. Complete two-person co-op: Multiplayer game featuring its own dedicated story, characters, and gameplay. Advanced physics: Allows for the creation of a whole new range of interesting challenges, producing a much larger but not harder game. Original music. Massive sequel: The original Portal was named 2007's Game of the Year by over 30 publications worldwide. Editing Tools: Portal 2 editing tools will be included.

Name: Portal 2
Description:
Portal 2 draws from the award-winning formula of innovative gameplay, story, and music that earned the original Portal over 70 industry accolades and created a cult following. The single-player portion of Portal 2 introduces a cast of dynamic new characters, a host of fresh puzzle elements, and a much larger set of devious test chambers. Players will explore never-before-seen areas of the Aperture Science Labs and be reunited with GLaDOS, the occasionally murderous computer companion who guided them through the original game. The game’s two-player cooperative mode features its own entirely separate campaign with a unique story, test chambers, and two new player characters. This new mode forces players to reconsider everything they thought they knew about portals. Success will require them to not just act cooperatively, but to think cooperatively. Product Features Extensive single player: Featuring next generation gameplay and a wildly-engrossing story. Complete two-person co-op: Multiplayer game featuring its own dedicated story, characters, and gameplay. Advanced physics: Allows for the creation of a whole new range of interesting challenges, producing a much larger but not harder game. Original music. Massive sequel: The original Portal was named 2007's Game of the Year by over 30 publications worldwide. Editing Tools: Portal 2 editing tools will be included.

**Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas** plunges players into the turbulent world of Los Santos, a city ravaged by gang warfare, rampant drug use, and pervasive corruption. This sprawling metropolis, where the elite strive to remain detached from the grim realities of street life, serves as the backdrop for an epic narrative.

The story centers on Carl "CJ" Johnson, who returns to his hometown after a five-year absence. He is drawn back by tragedy: his mother's murder and the subsequent disintegration of his family. Upon his arrival, CJ finds his childhood friends teetering on the brink of ruin. His homecoming takes a sinister turn when corrupt police officers falsely accuse him of homicide.

This injustice forces CJ onto a perilous odyssey that spans the entire state of San Andreas. His mission is twofold: to **reunite and protect his fractured family** and to **reclaim dominance over the city's volatile streets**. The game challenges players to navigate this treacherous landscape, making critical decisions that will shape CJ's destiny and the fate of San Andreas.

Name: Undertale
Description:
Welcome to UNDERTALE. In this RPG, you control a human who falls underground into the world of monsters. Now you must find your way out... or stay trapped forever. ((Healthy Dog's Warning: Game contains imagery that may be harmful to players with photosensitive epilepsy or similar condition.)) features: Killing is unnecessary: negotiate out of danger using the unique battle system. Time your attacks for extra damage, then dodge enemy attacks in a style reminiscent of top-down shooters. Original art and soundtrack brimming with personality. Soulful, character-rich story with an emphasis on humor. Created mostly by one person. Become friends with all of the bosses! At least 5 dogs. You can date a skeleton. Hmmm... now there are 6 dogs...? Maybe you won't want to date the skeleton. I thought I found a 7th dog, but it was actually just the 3rd dog. If you play this game, can you count the dogs for me...? I'm not good at it.

Name: Team Fortress 2
Description:
The most fun you can have online - PC Gamer Is now FREE! There’s no catch! Play as much as you want, as long as you like! The most highly-rated free game of all time! One of the most popular online action games of all time, Team Fortress 2 delivers constant free updates—new game modes, maps, equipment and, most importantly, hats. Nine distinct classes provide a broad range of tactical abilities and personalities, and lend themselves to a variety of player skills. New to TF? Don’t sweat it! No matter what your style and experience, we’ve got a character for you. Detailed training and offline practice modes will help you hone your skills before jumping into one of TF2’s many game modes, including Capture the Flag, Control Point, Payload, Arena, King of the Hill and more. Make a character your own! There are hundreds of weapons, hats and more to collect, craft, buy and trade. Tweak your favorite class to suit your gameplay style and personal taste. You don’t need to pay to win—virtually all of the items in the Mann Co. Store can also be found in-game.

Name: The Longest Journey
Description:
The Longest Journey is an amazing graphical adventure, where the player controls the protagonist, April Ryan, on her journey between parallel universes. Embark on an exciting and original journey of discovery, where you will explore, solve puzzles, meet new people, face terrifying monsters, learn, grow, and live the adventure of a lifetime! Over 150 locations spanning two distinct and detailed worlds More than 70 speaking characters 40+ hours of gameplay 20+ minutes of high-resolution pre-rendered video footage Cinematic musical score

## Slay the Princess: A Twisted Fairy Tale of World-Ending Stakes

Embark on a perilous journey through a foreboding forest, leading you to a secluded cabin where a dark secret resides in its basement: a Princess who must be slain. The fate of the entire world hinges on your success; failure means utter annihilation. This formidable Princess will employ every tactic imaginable to thwart your mission, resorting to charm, deceit, and alluring promises that, if succumbed to, will lead to your demise countless times over. It is imperative that you resist her manipulations and remain steadfast in your objective, for the weight of the world rests squarely upon your shoulders.

### The Princess: A Deceptive Adversary

Contrary to what you might expect, the Princess is not a cosmic horror but a seemingly ordinary human. However, her malevolence is undeniable, and eliminating her is crucial for the survival of all. Despite her human guise, she possesses a cunning nature and will relentlessly attempt to manipulate you. Resist any temptation to pursue a romantic entanglement, as such endeavors will inevitably end disastrously. While death is a distinct possibility, you will find yourself facing it repeatedly, underscoring the need for vigilance and unwavering focus on your grim task.

### Unique Features and Gameplay Mechanics

*   **Stellar Voice Acting:** Experience the narrative brought to life by the exceptional vocal talents of Jonathan Sims and Nichole Goodnight.
*   **Artistic Hand-Penciled Graphics:** Immerse yourself in a visually striking world where every background and character sprite is meticulously hand-drawn with pencil and paper by Ignatz-winning graphic novelist Abby Howard.
*   **A Branching Narrative:** Engage with a dynamic story where your dialogue choices and deeply held beliefs shape your character and dictate the unfolding events, offering a truly personalized experience.
*   **No Time Loops:** Rest assured, this is not a game of repeating cycles. Time progresses in a strictly linear fashion, ensuring a fresh and unpredictable narrative with each playthrough.
*   **Psychological Horror and RPG Elements:** Slay the Princess offers a unique blend of choice-driven psychological horror, dramatic branching narratives, and light roleplaying game mechanics, creating a compelling and immersive experience.

Developed by the creators of *Scarlet Hollow*, *Slay the Princess* redefines the visual novel genre with its intense narrative, captivating art style, and the constant threat of a world-ending catastrophe.

## Portal: A Revolutionary Puzzle Experience

**Portal™**, a groundbreaking single-player game from Valve, offers a truly **revolutionary puzzle experience**. Set within the enigmatic **Aperture Science Laboratories**, this innovative title redefines puzzle-solving and promises hours of unique gameplay.

The game is designed to fundamentally alter how players **perceive and interact with their surroundings**. Much like the Gravity Gun in Half-Life® 2 revolutionized object manipulation, Portal challenges players to think creatively about environmental possibilities. The core mechanic involves using the **Portal Gun** to create inter-spatial gateways. Players must strategically place these portals to solve intricate physical puzzles and navigate challenging environments. This allows for unique methods of maneuvering both objects and themselves through space, offering a **truly fresh gameplay experience**.

**Bayonetta: A PC Masterpiece of Stylish Action**

Experience the critically acclaimed character action game, Bayonetta, now on PC from SEGA. Developed by PlatinumGames, led by Hideki Kamiya (creator of Resident Evil and Devil May Cry), this title offers a unique blend of intense combat and captivating narrative.

Bayonetta is the last of an ancient witch lineage tasked with maintaining the delicate balance between light, dark, and chaos. After being sealed away for 500 years to protect herself and the world, she is awakened, triggering a series of events with world-altering consequences. With only fragmented memories of her past, Bayonetta must fight for the future and uncover the truth behind her awakening. Her journey pits her against hordes of angelic adversaries and colossal enemies in a pure action spectacle.

**Key Features:**

*   **Deadly Grace:** Embody Bayonetta, a captivating and stylish heroine who will test your skills and senses.
*   **Climax Action:** Engage in over-the-top combat set in extreme environments, delivering constant tension and excitement that elevates the action genre.
*   **Extravagant Combat:** Master an intuitive and fluid combat system, wielding a vast arsenal of weapons to unleash devastating combos and special attacks.
*   **Supernatural Powers:** Utilize gruesome "Witch Time" abilities and brutal torture attacks like the Iron Maiden and Guillotine to dispatch your foes.
*   **Full Steam Support:** Enjoy features such as Steam Achievements, Cloud Saves, Trading Cards, Leaderboards, and Big Picture Mode.
*   **Enhanced PC Graphics:** Customize your experience with unlocked resolutions up to 4K, anti-aliasing, anisotropic filtering, SSAO lighting, and scalable texture and shadow quality.
*   **Bilingual Support:** Seamlessly switch between English and Japanese voiceovers and subtitles.

For the optimal Bayonetta experience on PC, a controller is highly recommended.

Name: Disco Elysium - The Final Cut
Description:
Disco Elysium - The Final Cut is the definitive edition of the groundbreaking role playing game. You’re a detective with a unique skill system at your disposal and a whole city block to carve your path across. Interrogate unforgettable characters, crack murders, or take bribes. Become a hero or an absolute disaster of a human being. Full voice acting. All of the city's beautiful people are brought to life with full English voiceover. Play characters against each other, try to help them, or fall hopelessly in love as each word is spoken to you with the appropriate accent and emotion. New political vision quests. Face the reality of your worldview as your political compass leads you down new paths. Discover more citizens, a whole extra area, and monumental sights as you leave an even bigger mark on the world by chasing your dreams. Unprecedented freedom of choice​. Intimidate, sweet-talk, resort to violence, write poetry, sing karaoke, dance like a beast, or solve the meaning of life. Disco Elysium - The Final Cut is the most faithful representation of desktop role playing ever attempted in video games. Countless tools for role playing. ​ Mix and match from 24 wildly different skills. Develop a personal style with over 80 clothing items. Wield 14 tools from guns to flashlights to a boombox, or pour yourself a cocktail of 6 different psychoactive substances. Develop your character even further with 60 wild ​thoughts ​to think – with the detective's Thought Cabinet. A revolutionary dialogue system with unforgettable characters. ​The world is alive with real people, not extras. Ask probing questions, make insightful observations, or express your wildest desires as you play cop or something completely different. Disco Elysium's revolutionary dialogue system lets you do almost anything. Carve your unique path across the city​. Explore, manipulate, collect tare, or become a millionaire in an open world unlike anything you've seen before. The city of Revachol is yours for the taking, one small piece at a time. From the streets to the beaches – and beyond. Hard boiled, hard core. ​Death, sex, taxes, and disco – nothing is off the table. Revachol is a real place with real challenges. Solve a massive murder investigation, or relax and kick back with sprawling side-cases. The detective decides, the citizens abide.

Name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
Description:
EPIC FANTASY REBORN The next chapter in the highly anticipated Elder Scrolls saga arrives from the makers of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Bethesda Game Studios. Skyrim reimagines and revolutionizes the open-world fantasy epic, bringing to life a complete virtual world open for you to explore any way you choose. LIVE ANOTHER LIFE, IN ANOTHER WORLD Play any type of character you can imagine, and do whatever you want; the legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure of The Elder Scrolls is realized like never before. ALL NEW GRAPHICS AND GAMEPLAY ENGINE Skyrim’s new game engine brings to life a complete virtual world with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons. YOU ARE WHAT YOU PLAY Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities. The new character system allows you to play any way you want and define yourself through your actions. DRAGON RETURN Battle ancient dragons like you’ve never seen. As Dragonborn, learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

Name: Mass Effect 2 (2010)
Description:
Recruit. Explore. Control. Two years after Commander Shepard repelled invading Reapers bent on the destruction of organic life, a mysterious new enemy has emerged. On the fringes of known space, something is silently abducting entire human colonies. Now Shepard must work with Cerberus, a ruthless organization devoted to human survival at any cost, to stop the most terrifying threat mankind has ever faced. To even attempt this perilous mission, Shepard must assemble the galaxy’s most elite team and command the most powerful ship ever built. Even then, they say it would be suicide. Commander Shepard intends to prove them wrong. Just like in the previous game, what you say to the other characters matters a great deal. Fortunately, the conversation system has been improved. The camera now pans around characters as they talk to one another to evoke a dramatic, cinematic feel. Also, Shepard can interrupt the conversation when given the appropriate prompt, taking situations into new directions that could help or hinder the mission. Shepard is more customizable than ever, letting you create your ideal lead character — gender, facial features, class, and of course, attitude. Once you embark on missions, you’ll be treated to an improved battle system that lets you target weak points and blast off your enemy’s limbs with a variety of weapons. Set out to lead your team to victory… or die at the hands of The Collectors. Either path is possible in BioWare’s smash hit, Mass Effect 2. Which destiny will you choose? Features: The second act of BioWare’s epic sci-fi trilogy continues the story of Commander Shepard and humanity’s first steps onto the galactic stage Success – or failure – depends heavily on the crew you assemble and their loyalty to you and the mission Stunning graphics and a refined dialog system will draw you into the story like never before Numerous improvements to the intense, third-person shooter combat Deep character customization options let you create your own vision of Commander Shepard Online Disclaimer EA ACCOUNT, REGISTRATION WITH ENCLOSED SERIAL CODE, INTERNET CONNECTION AND ACCEPTANCE OF END USER LICENSE AGREEMENT REQUIRED TO ACCESS ONLINE FEATURES AND/OR SERVICES. EA ONLINE TERMS AND CONDITIONS CAN BE FOUND AT WWW.EA.COM . YOU MUST BE 13+ TO REGISTER FOR AN EA ACCOUNT. EA MAY PROVIDE CERTAIN INCREMENTAL CONTENT AND/OR UPDATES FOR NO ADDITIONAL CHARGE, IF AND WHEN AVAILABLE. EA MAY RETIRE ONLINE FEATURES AFTER 30 DAYS NOTICE POSTED ON WWW.EA.COM .

Name: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe
Description:
The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition presents one of the best RPGs of all time like never before. Step inside the most richly detailed and vibrant game-world ever created. With a powerful combination of freeform gameplay and unprecedented graphics, you can unravel the main quest at your own pace or explore the vast world and find your own challenges. Also included in the Game of the Year edition are Knights of the Nine and the Shivering Isles expansion, adding new and unique quests and content to the already massive world of Oblivion. See why critics called Oblivion the Best Game of 2006. Key features: Live Another Life in Another World Create and play any character you can imagine, from the noble warrior to the sinister assassin to the wizened sorcerer. First Person Melee and Magic An all-new combat and magic system brings first person role-playing to a new level of intensity where you feel every blow. Radiant AI This groundbreaking AI system gives Oblivion's characters full 24/7 schedules and the ability to make their own choices based on the world around them. Non-player characters eat, sleep, and complete goals all on their own. New Lands to Explore In the Shivering Isles expansion, see a world created in Sheogorath's own image, one divided between Mania and Dementia and unlike anything you've experienced in Oblivion. Challenging new foes Battle the denizens of Shivering Isles, a land filled with hideous insects, Flesh Atronachs, skeletal Shambles, amphibious Grummites, and many more. Begin a New Faction The Knights of the Nine have long been disbanded. Reclaim their former glory as you traverse the far reaches of Cyrodill across an epic quest line. This English-only Deluxe version includes the following Downloadable Content (DLC) Fighter's Stronghold Expansion Live the life of a noble warrior in this expansive castle with private quarters, grand dining hall, and a wine cellar. Knights of the Nine Quest Vanquish the evil that has been released upon the land. New dungeons, characters, quests, and mysteries await. Spell Tome Treasures Get these books and find low and high-level spells, as well as new powerful spells with multiple effects added. Vile Lair An underwater multilevel hideout for evil players to find refuge, providing your character with safe haven. Mehrune's Razor Conquer one of the deepest and most challenging dungeons in all of Cyrodiil to claim this fearsome weapon. The Thieves Den Uncover a famous pirate's lost ship and claim it for your own. Designed for stealth-based characters. Wizard's Tower In the frozen mountains of Cyrodiil stands Frostcrag Spire, a tower of wonders for your magic-oriented character. Orrery Harness the power of the stars. Rebuild the Orrery to unlock the secrets of this Mages Guild Inner Sanctum. Horse Armor Pack Tamriel is a dangerous place. Protect your horse from danger with this beautiful handcrafted armor.

Name: Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition
Description:
Gather your party and get back to the roots of great RPG gameplay. Discuss your decisions with companions; fight foes in turn-based combat; explore an open world and interact with everything and everyone you see. You take on the role of a young Source Hunter: your job is to rid the world of those who use the foulest of magics. Embarking on what should have been a routine murder investigation, you find yourself in the middle of a plot that threatens to destroy the very fabric of time. A complete revamp : Thousands of enhancements, full voiceovers, new game modes, full controller support, split-screen co-op, hours of new and revised story content, a brand-new ending, new weapon styles, new skills, new puzzles, new enemies, better loot, better balancing and much, much more! New game modes for extra replay . Explorer Mode for story-focused RPG fans. Classic Mode for those who want it just right. Tactician Mode for hardcore players, featuring fully reworked encounters, different traps and new and smarter enemy types. And Honour Mode, for the tactical geniuses among you! Pen-and-paper-like freedom . Explore many different environments, fight all kinds of fantastical creatures, and discover tons of desirable items. You will be amazed at how much freedom the games gives you. Manipulate the environment and use skill & spell combos to overcome your many foes. Warm up ice to create water. Boil the water to create a steam cloud. Electrify the steam cloud to create a static cloud and stun your enemies! Play with a friend in co-op multiplayer , either online or with dynamic split-screen. Unravel a deep and epic story , set in the early days of the Divinity universe. Discuss with your party members how to handle the many decisions you'll need to make. Classless creation lets you design the character of your choice . Endless item interaction and combinations take exploration and experimentation to new levels of freedom.

Name: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition
Description:
The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition presents one of the best RPGs of all time like never before. Step inside the most richly detailed and vibrant game-world ever created. With a powerful combination of freeform gameplay and unprecedented graphics, you can unravel the main quest at your own pace or explore the vast world and find your own challenges. Also included in the Game of the Year edition are Knights of the Nine and the Shivering Isles expansion, adding new and unique quests and content to the already massive world of Oblivion. See why critics called Oblivion the Best Game of 2006. Key features: Live Another Life in Another World Create and play any character you can imagine, from the noble warrior to the sinister assassin to the wizened sorcerer. First Person Melee and Magic An all-new combat and magic system brings first person role-playing to a new level of intensity where you feel every blow. Radiant AI This groundbreaking AI system gives Oblivion's characters full 24/7 schedules and the ability to make their own choices based on the world around them. Non-player characters eat, sleep, and complete goals all on their own. New Lands to Explore In the Shivering Isles expansion, see a world created in Sheogorath's own image, one divided between Mania and Dementia and unlike anything you've experienced in Oblivion. Challenging new foes Battle the denizens of Shivering Isles, a land filled with hideous insects, Flesh Atronachs, skeletal Shambles, amphibious Grummites, and many more. Begin a New Faction The Knights of the Nine have long been disbanded. Reclaim their former glory as you traverse the far reaches of Cyrodill across an epic quest line.

Prepare for an **epic confrontation** in Mass Effect 2 (2010 Edition), where the fate of the galaxy hangs precariously in the balance. As Commander Shepard, you are tasked with assembling your most **trusted allies** and recruiting the galaxy's **finest warriors** to stand against the relentless invasion of the Reapers. This is not a mission for the faint of heart; it demands **immense sacrifices** and will push you to make **difficult choices** against **new and formidable enemies**. Arm yourself for an **unforgettable intergalactic adventure** that will test your resolve.

Mass Effect 2 (2010 Edition) offers a wealth of features designed to enhance your gameplay experience. **Shift the tide of battle** in your favor with a **streamlined inventory system** that allows for the **instant equipping of powerful new weapons**. Furthermore, an **improved health regeneration system** significantly reduces the need to search for restorative items, allowing you to stay in the fight longer.

**Every decision you make carries weight**. Beyond managing **divisive crew members**, you will also be thrust into the complex arena of **intergalactic diplomacy**. Time is of the essence, so don't hesitate to utilize **new prompt-based actions** that enable you to interrupt conversations, potentially altering the destiny of your crew and the entire galaxy.

**Forge alliances with strategic care**. While you will fight alongside your most **loyal companions**, the opportunity to recruit **new talent** will also arise. Choose your new partners **wisely**, as the **survival of the galaxy rests squarely on your shoulders**.

This comprehensive edition of Mass Effect 2 (2010) includes **all previously released downloadable content (DLC)**, ensuring a complete and immersive experience.

**Expansions included:**
*   Kasumi — Stolen Memory
*   Overlord
*   Lair of the Shadow Broker
*   Arrival

**Cerberus Network content:**
*   Normandy Crash Site expansion
*   Zaeed — The Price of Revenge expansion
*   Firewalker Pack

**Cerberus Weapon and Armor pack:**
*   Contains **Cerberus Assault Armor** and the **M-22 Eviscerator shotgun**.

**Packs and Bundles:**
*   **Aegis Pack:** Features the **M-29 Incisor sniper rifle** and the **Kestrel armor**.
*   **Equalizer Pack:** Includes the **Capacitor Helmet**, **Archon Visor**, and **Inferno Armor**.
*   **Firepower Pack:** Offers the **M-5 Phalanx heavy pistol**, **M-96 Mattock heavy rifle**, and **Geth Plasma Shotgun**.
*   **Alternate Appearance Pack 1:** Provides new outfits for **Garrus, Thane, and Jack**.
*   **Alternate Appearance Pack 2:** Grants new outfits for **Tali, Grunt, and Miranda**.
*   **Collectors’ Weapon and Armor pack:** Contains **Collector Armor** and the **Collector Assault Rifle**.
*   **Terminus Weapon and Armor pack:** Includes **Terminus Assault Armor** and the **M-490 Blackstorm heavy weapon**.
*   **Mass Effect 2 promo bundle:** Features the **Umbra Visor**, **Sentry Interface**, and **Recon Hood**.
*   **Blood Dragon Armor**

Name: Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition
Description:
The Divine is dead. The Void approaches. And the powers lying dormant within you are soon to awaken. The battle for Divinity has begun. Choose wisely and trust sparingly; darkness lurks within every heart. Who will you be? A flesh-eating Elf, an Imperial Lizard or an Undead, risen from the grave? Discover how the world reacts differently to who - or what - you are. It’s time for a new Divinity! Gather your party and develop relationships with your companions. Blast your opponents in deep, tactical, turn-based combat. Use the environment as a weapon, use height to your advantage, and manipulate the elements themselves to seal your victory. Ascend as the god that Rivellon so desperately needs. Explore the vast and layered world of Rivellon alone or in a party of up to 4 players in drop-in/drop-out cooperative play. Go anywhere, unleash your imagination, and explore endless ways to interact with the world. Beyond Rivellon, there’s more to explore in the brand-new PvP and Game Master modes. Choose your race and origin. Choose from 6 unique origin characters with their own backgrounds and quests, or create your own as a Human, Lizard, Elf, Dwarf, or Undead. All choices have consequences. Unlimited freedom to explore and experiment . Go anywhere, talk to anyone, and interact with everything! Kill any NPC without sacrificing your progress, and speak to every animal. Even ghosts might be hiding a secret or two… The next generation of turn-based combat. Blast your opponents with elemental combinations. Use height to your advantage. Master over 200 skills in 12 skill schools. But beware - the game’s AI 2.0 is our most devious invention to date. Up to 4 player online and split-screen multiplayer. Play with your friends online or in local split-screen with full controller support. Game Master Mode: Take your adventures to the next level and craft your own stories with the Game Master Mode. Download fan-made campaigns and mods from Steam Workshop. 4K Support: an Ultimate 4K experience pushing RPGs into a new era!

Name: Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition
Description:
Dragon Age: Origins You are a Grey Warden, one of the last of this legendary order of guardians. With the return of mankind's ancient foe and the kingdom engulfed in civil war, you have been chosen by fate to unite the shattered lands and slay the archdemon once and for all. Explore a stunning world, make complex moral choices, and engage in bone-crushing combat against massive and terrifying creatures. Dragon Age: Origins - Awakening Expansion Pack The story of the Grey Wardens continues as you are named their commander. Fight new enemies, learn new skills and spells, and explore an all-new area of the world, Amaranthine. All Nine Content Packs The Stone Prisoner Warden's Keep Return to Ostagar Feastday Gifts The Darkspawn Chronicles Feastday Pranks Leliana's Song The Golems of Amgarrak Witch Hunt Collect new rewards, gain new party members, and more as you delve deeper into the Dragon Age storyline. (Critically acclaimed winner of more than 50 awards including over 30 'Best of 2009' awards.)

## Forge Your Dynasty: A Grand Strategy Medieval Epic in Crusader Kings III

**Crusader Kings III** is a captivating grand strategy game where you **choose your noble house and guide your dynasty through generations of medieval ambition**. Developed by Paradox Development Studio, this immersive experience masterfully blends **deep, dramatic medieval roleplaying with intricate grand strategy**, offering a unique journey through history.

While warfare is a potent tool for establishing your reign, true mastery of the Middle Ages demands far more. Success hinges on **expert diplomatic skill, a profound understanding of your realm's intricacies, and a healthy dose of cunning**. Crusader Kings III challenges you to navigate a complex web of relationships, political maneuvering, and personal ambition.

Begin your saga in either **867 or 1066**, taking command of your chosen house. **Expand your dynasty by claiming lands, titles, and vassals**, meticulously building a realm worthy of your royal bloodline. Your death is merely a transition; your lineage continues with new playable heirs, whose destinies you will shape, whether through careful planning or unexpected circumstances.

Explore a sprawling, simulated world teeming with a diverse cast of characters. From humble peasants and valiant knights to scheming courtiers, clandestine spies, witty jesters, and those engaged in secret love affairs, **every individual plays a role in your grand narrative**. Engage with this extensive array of historical figures through romance, betrayal, execution, or subtle influence.

Embark on an epic journey across a **vast medieval map** that stretches from the snow-swept Nordic lands to the vibrant Horn of Africa, and from the western British Isles to the exotic riches of Burma in the east. **Claim, conquer, and rule thousands of unique counties, duchies, kingdoms, and empires**, each presenting its own challenges and opportunities.

Every character in Crusader Kings III is larger than life, possessing **unique traits and lifestyle choices** that profoundly influence their actions and schemes. Rule with an iron fist, inspiring fear and dread, or cultivate a reputation for magnanimous deeds to earn the devotion of your subjects.

Genetics play a vital role, with traits like genius or crippling stupidity being passed down through generations. **Carefully groom your heir**, selecting appropriate guardians or undertaking their education yourself. If an heir proves inadequate, you have the option to arrange a strategic marriage or, if necessary, remove them through other means.

**Personalize your ruler and noble house**, from their appearance to their core attributes, crafting a monarch who embodies both inherited virtues and personal vices. Govern an ever-evolving realm, granting titles to those you deem worthy, or boldly usurp your liege to claim their crown for yourself.

Be perpetually wary of rivals, whether they are restless serfs or vengeful concubines. The shadows are alive with intrigue, and danger lurks around every corner. **Recruit agents and other unsavory elements to undermine, blackmail, or even murder** those who stand in your path. Alternatively, embrace the romantic ideal and seduce your way to power and influence.

Prepare for conflict as you assemble **formidable men-at-arms units and powerful knights**. Master battlefield tactics and manage your armies effectively. Raid and plunder nearby lands, or hire mercenaries and Holy Orders for your most significant conflicts.

Embrace piety to invite the support of religious powers, or forge your own unique faith as you navigate the eternal struggle between everlasting fame and eternal damnation. **Drive novel innovations within your culture and construct mighty castles and bastions** to bolster the wealth, prestige, and security of your realm.

The paths to power are as varied as the characters themselves. Experience **thousands of dynamic events and life-altering decisions**, meticulously tailored to every conceivable situation and character. Ultimately, there are countless ways to secure your place in the annals of history.

**HEX: Shards of Fate: A Digital Card Game That Fuses TCG Strategy with RPG Progression**

HEX: Shards of Fate presents a captivating digital card game experience, expertly blending the strategic depth of traditional trading card games (TCGs) with the immersive progression and character development found in online role-playing games (RPGs). Players are invited to explore the rich and vibrant world of Entrath, where they will face challenging dungeons and engage in thrilling player-versus-player combat. This unique fusion offers a fresh take on the digital card game genre, appealing to those who appreciate both tactical card play and engaging RPG elements.

The core gameplay revolves around building powerful decks from an extensive collection of over 1,000 distinct cards. Success in combat is further enhanced by acquiring potent equipment and strategically utilizing socketing gems to customize your cards. Adding another layer of depth, a diverse roster of champions, each boasting unique abilities, allows players to further bolster their card armies and tailor their strategies. The game's dynamic animations and striking visual effects contribute significantly to the immersive gameplay, guiding players toward victory and making each match a visually engaging experience.

**Key Features of HEX: Shards of Fate:**

*   **Innovative TCG/RPG Hybrid:** HEX is a pioneering digital trading card game that seamlessly integrates robust role-playing mechanics, offering a novel gameplay experience.
*   **Deep Champion Customization:** Players can select and customize their champion from a choice of eight distinct races and three unique classes, each offering different strategic advantages.
*   **Compelling Single-Player Campaign:** Embark on an epic adventure through challenging dungeons in the engaging single-player campaign mode.
*   **Intense Multiplayer Battles:** Test and refine your strategic prowess in competitive 1 vs. 1 matches against other players.
*   **Vibrant Player Economy:** Participate in a dynamic player-driven economy where you can freely trade cards with friends and the wider player community.
*   **Exciting Tournament Play:** Compete for substantial prizes in daily tournaments, which can accommodate up to 128 participants, offering a rewarding challenge for skilled players.

Name: Duelyst
Description:
DUELYST is the ultimate collectible tactics game. Head-to-head matches last between five and ten minutes, and focus on thoughtful decision-making and strategic positioning. Players are rewarded with new battle units every monthly season. Assemble your battle deck from over 800 cards across 6 unique Factions and test your mettle against other players online in ranked season ladder and draft mode tournaments. Key Features Infinite Depth : With a tactical battlefield, positioning of your units truly matters. And with over 500 battle units, no battle will ever be the same! Lightning-Fast Matches : Online matches last from five to ten minutes. Get your competitive fix anytime during the day! Competitive : Play against players of equal skill on the monthly Season Ranked Ladder. Or compete in the Gauntlet Draft Mode, where the longer you last, the better the rewards! Classic Pixel Art Aesthetic : Bright and detailed pixel art for all Generals and Cards with full 16-bit spell and effect animations. Immersive Lore : Expansive codex and history spanning 30,000 years to uncover the mysteries of the denizens of Mythron. Jump down the rabbit hole! Competitive head-to-head turn-based battles at its best!

Name: Faeria
Description:
With its unique living board, Faeria will challenge you with truly strategic card battles. Craft your deck, shape the battlefield, and fight for victory! A strategy game like no other. Build exciting decks and shape the battlefield as you fight epic battles. Raise mountains, build forests, fill lakes, or harness the sands of the deserts. You choose your own path to victory. Earn your collection through our simple and affordable DLC-based business model. Experience a card game without expensive micro-transactions. Whether through solo campaigns, draft mode, or PVP, all cards are earned through simply playing the game! Enjoy 100+ hours of solo content, co-operative missions, and puzzles! Explore a vast array of challenges that reward you in return. Journey through the Oversky and defeat devious World Bosses - or even play enemy AI in draft mode! Enter Pandora, Faeria's unique draft mode where your deck-building skills are put to the ultimate test. Choose to play against the AI or put your deck to the ultimate test in PVP. Earn rewards based on how well you do. It’s the perfect way to increase your collection, or just have fun! Become a part of our thriving, supportive, and helpful community by joining our official Discord channel, subreddit, forums - or join The Hub! Years in the making, you’ll be hard-pressed to find a more welcoming group of players. Compete in regular officially-recognized tournaments with great prizes - or watch them live and win in-game loot! Our esports system rewards players for excellent performance and allows everyone else to watch, enjoy, and gain free loot!

**KARDS: The WWII Card Game - A Strategic Blend of CCG and Battlefield Tactics**

KARDS, the World War II card game, merges traditional collectible card game (CCG) gameplay with innovative mechanics inspired by classic strategy games and real battlefield tactics. Engage in grand-scale warfare across land, air, and sea as you challenge other players. KARDS is completely free to play, with all features accessible from the outset. You can acquire all cards through regular gameplay, daily missions, and an extensive achievement system.

**Why Play KARDS?**

KARDS offers a compelling experience by blending familiar trading card gameplay, making it easy to learn, with innovative mechanics that provide strategic depth and tactical diversity.

*   **Innovative Frontline Mechanics:** This feature allows you to better protect your support assets while taking the battle directly to your enemy.
*   **Diverse Strategies:** Employ Blitzkrieg tactics to overwhelm opponents, achieve air superiority, or establish a strong defense to outproduce and outgun them.
*   **Resource Management:** Effectively manage your resources (Kredits) to deploy new units, operate existing ones, and issue orders to support your battle plans.

**Strategy and Deck Building**

Your deck is built around one of the five major powers of WW2, allowing you to compete head-to-head with other players. Each deck can include one ally nation for added support and an edge against the opposition. Players craft their decks based on a combination of units and supporting orders, depending on their chosen winning strategy.

*   **Infantry:** Overrun opponents with lighter, often less costly units.
*   **Tanks:** Blitz your opponent with heavily armored units.
*   **Artillery:** Blast opponents from the safety of your support line.
*   **Aircraft:** Achieve air superiority and wreak havoc from the sky.

Advance through the ranks from Private to Field Marshal via gameplay, earning your place in the officer's club and monthly rewards.

**Authentic Atmosphere**

All cards are beautifully illustrated in a unique WW2 style. Weapons and units are meticulously researched, behaving as expected based on official documentation, specifications, and operational history.

**Regular Updates and Events**

With a vibrant player community and active developers, KARDS consistently receives exciting new gameplay features and improvements. The first expansion, released on December 10th, introduced two new ally nations and 150 cards. Since then, several more expansions and updates with new cards, game mechanics, and visuals have been released. The World Championship, hosted by 1939 Games in Iceland, took place in December 2019 and 2021, bringing the four finalists to compete for the title.

**About 1939 Games**

1939 Games is a creative indie studio based in Iceland. Founded by ex-CCP veterans known for creating EVE Online, 1939 Games aims to make a significant impact on the market with KARDS, their unique and groundbreaking WWII CCG.

GWENT: The Witcher Card Game offers a free-to-play experience within the beloved Witcher universe. This game blends collectible card game (CCG) and trading card game (TCG) elements. Players engage in quick online PvP duels, requiring bluffing, real-time decision-making, and strategic deck building.

Key features of GWENT include:

*   **Iconic Characters and Abilities:** Collect and command heroes like Geralt and Yennefer. Enhance your arsenal with spells and special abilities to dramatically shift the course of battles.
*   **Strategic Depth:** Employ deception and clever tactics to win in various modes. GWENT’s unique round-based gameplay emphasizes skill over luck, offering numerous strategic possibilities.
*   **Multiple Game Modes:** Enjoy quick online matches with friends, engage in competitive PvP challenges, or explore adventurous modes like the Arena.
*   **Accessible Yet Challenging Gameplay:** Sling cards from your deck across two tactical rows: melee and ranged. The goal is to accumulate more points than your opponent in a round. Winning two out of three rounds secures victory. While accessible, mastering GWENT requires strategic thinking.
*   **Fair Progression:** A rewarding progression system allows you to build a competitive card collection simply by playing. No hidden costs or restrictions apply.
*   **Stunning Presentation:** Beautiful, hand-drawn art and mesmerizing visual effects bring every card, battle, and battlefield to life, making each duel visually engaging.
*   **Immediate Action:** Start with 10 cards in hand, allowing you to play your strongest units early or save them for later. Your initial choices and overall strategy are crucial.

Play GWENT: The Witcher Card Game for free today!

Name: Card Hunter
Description:
Welcome, bold adventurer! Card Hunter is an online collectible card game which blends together card play, deck building, tactical combat and fantasy role-playing in a way you've never seen before. Grab your cards, miniatures, dice and snacks, then journey to a new world of adventure on the tabletop of your Game Master, Gary. Build your party and set forth on a grand adventure in the massive single-player campaign. Each adventure will challenge your deck-building skills and tactical prowess as you battle horrifying Black Oozes, savage War Monkeys and more. Amass a collection of fantastical swords, shields and other adventuring gear. In Card Hunter's unique deck building system, equipping your party with these items builds your deck for you. Enter the fray on a grid based battlefield. Prepare for turn-based strategy where you must play your cards right to defeat your foes and be rewarded with experience and loot. When you’re ready, challenge other players in casual games, ranked matches or regularly scheduled leagues. Can you rise to the top of this month’s season? Can you and your undead minions triumph in the Graveyard Gambol league? Multiplayer Card Hunter is a never-ending challenge. Don't want to face the monsters alone? Adventure co-operatively with one or two friends and share the dangers of Cardhuntria as well as the rewards. When you're done with the huge core campaign, try out the adventures of Omin, Binwin and Jim from Acquisitions Incorporated with an exclusive story written by Penny Arcade's Jerry Holkins. Then get ready for when robots and insane computers invade in the all new Expedition to the Sky Citadel set. Or, if you prefer your monsters from the murky mists of time, brave the challenge of prehistoric monsters and intelligent weapons in the fiendish Attack of the Artifacts .

**Etherlords II: A New Chapter in the Ether Saga**

Embark on an epic adventure in Etherlords II, returning to the captivating world of Ether. This installment plunges you into a realm brimming with extraordinary beauty and perilous challenges. Guide your hero through an unforgettable quest to unravel a profound mystery.

Etherlords II masterfully blends role-playing elements with strategic, turn-based combat, drawing inspiration from the rich traditions of fantasy trading card games. Experience thrilling co-op battles online, including the unique "Round Table" mode – a round-robin elimination tournament featuring a randomized card set.

**Key Features of Etherlords II:**

*   **Expansive Campaigns:** Explore five distinct campaigns set within a magnificent fantasy world.
*   **Unlimited Tactical Depth:** Hundreds of spells and creatures offer nearly endless tactical combinations.
*   **New Threats and Powers:** Discover new monsters and magic accessible to all four races.
*   **Hero Progression:** Enhance your hero's skills with new spells, creatures, and abilities throughout each campaign.
*   **Non-Linear Missions:** Navigate missions with multiple paths, allowing for diverse approaches to completion.
*   **Comprehensive Tutorial:** A thorough tutorial system guides you through both basic and advanced dueling tactics.
*   **Robust Multiplayer:** Engage in four distinct multiplayer modes.
*   **Master Server:** A dedicated master server tracks and maintains your statistics and ratings.

Name: Magic: The Gathering - Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013
Description:
Face a greater challenge with Magic: The Gathering — Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013! In the latest version of this hit franchise, play with friends or the AI as you travel across fantastic planes, take on new encounters and opponents, solve challenging puzzles, and face up to three other players in the Planechase multiplayer format. After honing your skills, pit yourself against the ultimate villain of the Multiverse, the dragon Planeswalker Nicol Bolas. Featuring ten customizable decks, Magic 2013 offers new features including individual records for your game play, new game items to unlock, and, for those already skilled in slinging spells, the option to choose what lands to tap when you cast your spells. Key features: Bigger and better in every way: Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013 adds to the hit franchise with updated graphics and music, the latest cards and decks, and additional features, challenges, and an updated multiplayer game mode! Multiplayer Mayhem: In the Planechase multiplayer format, you and up to 3 other (players or AI) will face strange phenomenon as you battle across the Multiverse in an ever-shifting environment in local and online play. Decks using some of the latest cards: Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013 features ten distinct decks using cards from the latest Magic: The Gathering expansions, including your first chance to play with cards from the Magic 2013 Core Set before their official release. Each deck also offers 30 additional cards that can be unlocked through gameplay as well. Challenging Encounters: Experience encounters, a unique type of puzzle available in Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013, where your opponent plays a stacked deck that represents a particular type of Magic strategy. Play Your Way: In addition to being able to modify your decks to play the way you want you will also be able to choose what lands to tap when you cast your spells. Built for all experience levels: With an expanded tutorial and deep game play, Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013 offers content for all Magic fans from “new to the game” all the way to “expert Planeswalker”.

Name: Magic: The Gathering - Duels of the Planeswalkers 2012
Description:
All-new and redesigned, Magic: The Gathering — Duels of the Planeswalkers 2012 takes last year’s massive hit game to even greater heights with better graphics, more options, and new challenges! Face off against the AI, or gather your allies for the new multiplayer format: Archenemy, where you team up to take down a boss opponent. And if one of your fellow Planeswalkers drops out, no problem–the AI will drop in for uninterrupted action! Featuring ten unique decks, Duels of the Planeswalkers 2012 also lets you customize those decks. As you progress in the game, you can enhance your deck by swapping in new, unlockable cards! Gather your allies. A challenge awaits.

Name: Slay the Spire
Description:
We fused card games and roguelikes together to make the best single player deckbuilder we could. Craft a unique deck, encounter bizarre creatures, discover relics of immense power, and Slay the Spire! Features Dynamic Deck Building : Choose your cards wisely! Discover hundreds of cards to add to your deck with each attempt at climbing the Spire. Select cards that work together to efficiently dispatch foes and reach the top. An Ever-changing Spire : Whenever you embark on a journey up the Spire, the layout differs each time. Choose a risky or safe path, face different enemies, choose different cards, discover different relics, and even fight different bosses! Powerful Relics to Discover : Powerful items known as relics can be found throughout the Spire. The effects of these relics can greatly enhance your deck through powerful interactions. But beware, obtaining a relic may cost you more than just gold... Slay the Spire left Early Access and comes with: Four characters that each have their own unique set of cards. 350+ fully implemented cards. 200+ different items to be found. 50+ unique combat encounters. 50+ mysterious events that can help or harm you. Daily Climbs allow you to compare yourself with every other player in the world. Custom mode that allows mixing and matching various crazy run modifiers.

Name: Monster Slayers
Description:
Developed by Nerdook (Reverse Crawl, Vertical Drop Heroes), Monster Slayers is a complete reimagining of the free web-based hit of the same name, which has been played over 4 million times on gaming portal, Kongregate. A rogue-like deck-building RPG adventure, Monster Slayers uses an innovative card-based battle system and lets you customize a deck to suit your play style. Create a new hero to join the Monster Slayers Guild and choose your path through the perilous Northern Valley as you follow your quest to defeat the legendary Harbinger and become a true Monster Slayer. Features Battle undead goblins, lion outlaws, mighty dragons and other monstrous foes using a unique card-based combat system Strategically shape your deck as you acquire new cards from merchants, treasure chests, and allies Collect fame from each run to unlock new abilities that can be used by future heroes Every playthrough is different: levels, enemy encounters and loot are randomly generated Choose from six different classes: Rogue, Ranger, Knight, Barbarian, Cleric, Wizard Recruit companions to join you on your quest and make use of their special abilities Equip your hero with stat-boosting loot to improve the chances of victory Fight for your place at the top of the Monster Slayers leaderboards Inspired by the much-loved deck-building RPG, Dream Quest, created by Peter Whalen (Hearthstone)

Hell has frozen over, and only you can defend the last burning pyre from the forces of heaven to restore the inferno. Monster Train offers a fresh strategic approach to roguelike deck building, featuring three vertical playfields to protect.

To reclaim hell, you must empower yourself by visiting powerful locations. Carefully choose your path, as different locations provide distinct advantages:

*   **Upgrade your champion:** Enhance your hero's abilities.
*   **Recruit powerful units:** Add new allies to your cause.
*   **Upgrade cards:** Improve your deck's effectiveness.
*   **Gain passive bonuses:** Acquire persistent advantages.
*   **Duplicate cards:** Secure your favorite cards for future use.

**Strategize to Fit Your Playstyle**

With five distinct clans, each offering unique and surprising gameplay, you can tailor your strategy. Select a primary and supporting clan to access cards from both. During your journey, you can refine your cards by combining upgrades, unlocking new paths to victory. Special map nodes even allow you to duplicate your most potent cards before facing the final boss.

**No Two Playthroughs Are Alike**

You'll never build the same deck twice! The game boasts:

*   Over 220 cards.
*   10 different starter decks to build from.
*   5 monster clans, each with vastly different gameplay.
*   10 unlockable levels per clan, introducing new cards.
*   Multiple upgrades for your clan-specific champion.
*   Mod support via Steam Workshop.
*   The ability to upgrade any card twice.
*   More than 21 unique random events.
*   25 covenant (difficulty) levels.

**Multiplayer Modes**

*   **HELL RUSH:** Eight players engage in a fast-paced, real-time contest. All players start with identical resources and opponents, ensuring a fair playing field. The clock is ticking, testing who can make the best decisions under pressure. Only the swiftest can remain undefeated.
*   **DAILY CHALLENGE:** Tackle a new, heavily modified run each day with unique gameplay mutators. Compete globally and against friends, climbing leaderboards with a skill-based scoring system.
*   **CUSTOM CHALLENGE:** Design and share your own unique challenges with friends. Each custom challenge features its own leaderboard, allowing you to send your friends straight to hell.

**Content Updates**

*   **FRIENDS & FOES UPDATE:** Exiled champions return to battle heaven's forces. This major update introduces new champions, bosses, cards, and artifacts, significantly expanding strategic options and replayability. It also adds player-requested features like a personal run records page, an enemy wave counter, and previews of upcoming bosses.
*   **WILD MUTATIONS UPDATE:** This update adds 35 new mutators, new difficulty settings for experienced players, and simpler ways to challenge friends and the community.
*   **HERZAL'S WORKSHOP UPDATE:** Mod support is now available!

Name: Astrea: Six-Sided Oracles
Description:
Astrea is a DICE-deck-building roguelike that flips the script on deckbuilders by using dice instead of cards and an unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption. Build a dice pool strong enough to purify Astrea's out-of-control corruption and save the Star System. • Unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption - In Astrea there is a new type of “damage” system. Purification can be used to damage enemies or heal yourself. On the other hand, corruption can be used to damage yourself or heal the enemies. Pacify enemies through Purification, or Corrupt yourself to unleash abilities that help tip the scales. • Dynamic Health Bar system - With skills attached to your health bar, you can take Corruption to enable these skills and unleash powerful abilities. But be careful, if you take too much Corruption you will be consumed by it. • Not cards, but dice! - Build a dice pool that fits your playstyle. Choose from over 350 dice and three dice types; reliably safe, perfectly balanced, or powerfully risky. A dice type system designed with high-risk, high-reward in its core. • Customize your dice - Forge your fate by editing die faces with new actions, tipping the odds of powerful results into your favor. • Choose from Six Brave Oracles - Each possessing their own unique dice sets, abilities, and playstyles. From ingenious spellcasters to brutish berserkers, whether you like beating the opponent into submission or outsmarting them with clever plays, there’s an oracle for you. • 20 Upgradeable Support Sentinels - Enchanted constructs that offer supportive dice rolls making them reliable companions in the heat of battle. • Uncover Over 170 Modifying Blessings - Imbue your Oracle with unique passives yielding potent effects that change up your fundamental tactics. Choose between Star Blessings, passive effects with lower power, or Black Hole Blessings, powerful passive effects with a drawback. • More than 20 random events - Find mysterious locations that can change the course of your run. • Manipulate your enemies and control your fate - Enemies attack using their own die, making it possible for you to manipulate their die to change their intent. • 16 Difficulty Levels - Customize your experience using difficulty levels to test all your abilities. Long ago - when ancient ruins were once flourishing civilizations and their populace lived in idyllic bliss - a mystical star governed all. Loyal disciples, called Six-Sided Oracles, were blessed by their star, granting them the strength to seal away the gift of heavenly bodies within mystic relics. All was perfect and harmonious, until that one fateful day - The Crimson Dawn Cataclysm. A ferocious inferno sundered down from the sky, engulfing the entirety of the star system, crumbling the foundations of their society and corrupting the souls of the weak-willed. The disciples of the star were lost to the chaos - their creations scattered across a vast world of ruin. Could there still exist those who were capable of wielding their power? Eons later, descendants of the Six-Sided Oracles embark on a journey to finish the failed battle that their predecessors started and save their star system.

Embark on an epic journey in **Gordian Quest**, a deckbuilding RPG that plunges you into a world consumed by a sinister curse. Darkness has fallen, monsters roam freely, and scoundrels exploit the chaos while cowards flee. It is in this fallen world that heroes must rise. Your mission is to lead these brave souls on an adventure to reclaim what remains and eradicate the pervasive evil. Will you succumb to the claws of your enemies, or will the consequences of your own poor decisions prove your undoing? Your Gordian Quest is about to commence.

Inspired by classic titles like Ultima and D&D, Gordian Quest blends old-school charm with modern gaming innovations, including roguelite elements and strategic turn-based combat. You will assemble and manage parties of heroes, guiding them through perilous missions. Foster their bonds, help them discover new skills, and lead them with unwavering courage as you strive to unravel the curses plaguing the land and confront the ultimate evil at its core.

### **Key Features of Gordian Quest:**

*   **Campaign Mode:** Embark on a grand adventure across 4 acts, journeying from the troubled lands of Westmire to the enigmatic Sky Imperium, all in a quest to save the realm of Wrendia.
*   **Realm Mode:** Experience a fast-paced roguelite challenge where the game world constantly shifts. Face unpredictable threats and reap unique rewards as you conquer 5 distinct realms, or test your endurance in an endless mode.
*   **Adventure Mode:** Dive into an end-game experience featuring procedurally generated areas and challenging solo quests.
*   **Skirmish Mode:** Engage in thrilling 1v1 battles, pitting your carefully crafted party of three against a friend.

**Gordian Quest** offers a rich roster of **ten unique heroes**, each boasting their own distinct class, skills, and playstyle. Choose from the Swordhand, Cleric, Ranger, Scoundrel, Spellbinder, Druid, Bard, Warlock, Golemancer, or the Monk to form your party of three.

Unleash a vast arsenal of **hundreds of skills**, with nearly 800 passive and active abilities at your disposal during turn-based battles. Discover potent combos and develop your favorite strategies. **Train and equip your heroes** with a wide array of weapons, armor, and enchanted trinkets to significantly enhance their capabilities.

Experience **high replayability** thanks to procedurally generated maps and dungeons, coupled with randomized hero skills that ensure every playthrough feels fresh and distinct. Choose your challenge with **various difficulty levels**, from a hardcore permadeath experience to a more forgiving casual mode where death is merely a temporary setback. **Loot galore** awaits as you gather items and relics to empower your heroes. Be aware, however, as you may also encounter mysterious items that can bestow blessings or inflict crippling curses. A **carryover rewards and progression system** through an Artifacts system ensures you are rewarded the more you play, benefiting Realm Mode, Campaigns, or Adventure Mode. Finally, **shape the course of your adventure** through critical decisions and the unpredictable nature of dice rolls.

Griftlands is a compelling deck-building rogue-like set in a gritty sci-fi world. Your decisions matter greatly, from the jobs you take and the allies you make to the cards you collect. This challenging game quickly penalizes mistakes, but each playthrough offers new situations and strategies, making for a dynamic experience.

### Playable Characters

You can play as three distinct characters, each with their own campaign:

*   **Sal:** An adventurer seeking both profit and revenge.
*   **Rook:** A spy with a secret mission.
*   **Smith:** A seemingly lazy person who might save the world.

Each character starts their story in a unique area with different factions and places to explore.

### Core Gameplay Mechanics

*   **Boss Battles:** Fight tough enemies with unique abilities using your custom combat decks.
*   **Build Your Team:** Recruit mercenaries, find pets, or get help from allies to reach your goals.
*   **Master Your Cards:** Each character has unique negotiation and combat decks. You can find powerful item cards from defeated enemies or as quest rewards.
*   **Consequences Matter:** Killing enemies can anger their friends. Showing mercy might leave a threat alive. Your actions have lasting effects.
*   **Explore Havaria:** Discover beautiful, hand-drawn environments filled with dangers in this harsh sci-fi setting.
*   **Political Intrigue:** Each character belongs to a faction and has opinions about you. Carefully manage rivalries to gain advantages and avoid betrayal.
*   **Choose Your Approach:** Overcome challenges with force or clever talk. You'll need smart card play and strategy to survive. You must manage two different decks, balancing their strengths and weaknesses.

Griftlands rewards learning. Every attempt at its stories brings new enemies, quests, and events. Your fate is shaped by your choices and luck.

Name: Floppy Knights
Description:
Hello there, humans. It is me, Carlton! Phoebe’s most trusted friend and super cool robot arm. I am here to tell you just a little bit more about Phoebe and her latest invention: Floppy Knights! Who is Phoebe, you ask? She is a talented inventor with a mission: save up enough cash to finally move out of her parents’ place. There are plenty of odd jobs all over town but only one Phoebe - and that is where the Floppy Knights come in! There are a bunch of Floppy Knights you can pick from to determine your own style. It will be up to you to mix and match snazzy card combos to make a winning strategy. Turn-based tactics meet card-game strategy. A fresh take on two familiar genres! Lead your Knights to victory across the battlefield using decks you have crafted with care. Enter a vibrant world filled with retro tech and magic. Jump into a fantastical land with hand-drawn visuals by Marlowe Dobbe (Dicey Dungeons), featuring lush vegetation, treacherous volcanoes, icy caves, and foggy forests. Find your Floppy fighting style! Every unit has a unique playstyle and ability to generate special cards during battle, creating endless possibilities. Each deck of Floppy Knights represents a different faction and strategy: Plants Deck - Upgrade your abilities, heal allies, and gain terrain advantages. Monsters Deck - Add armor and trade HP for buffs. Hooligans Deck - Three words: sneaky, poisonous, fast. Plan the perfect draw. Whether you’re a tactics veteran or playing for the first time - snappy battles and numerous card combinations will keep you on your toes to find the perfect strategy. Take advantage of cards that add and flip complementary cards so you can execute seamless combos. Jam out to some toe-tapping tunes. Listen to the energetic and refreshingly retro soundtrack by Grahm Nesbitt (Garden Story) that will have you dancing across the battlefield!

Name: One Step From Eden
Description:
Eden is the last shining beacon of hope in a bleak post-war world. One Step from Eden combines strategic deck-building and real-time action with rogue-like elements, giving you the chance to carve a path of mercy or destruction. Fight alone or with a friend in co-op as you cast powerful spells on the fly, battle evolving enemies, and collect game-changing artifacts. Can you make it to Eden or will your destruction be imminent? Genre-Bending. Experience a blend of strategy and real-time action. Build your deck and fight through bullet hell as you make your way to Eden. Comprehensive Deckbuilding. Customize your deck and play style with 200+ spells and 100+ game-changing items. Varied Gameplay. A cast of 9 playable characters across procedurally generated levels with alternate runs ensures you’ll never experience the same situation or outcome twice. Play with Friends. Fight your way to Eden in local co-op or in PvP. The Game Keeps Going. Full Steam Workshop and mod support!

Name: Ratropolis
Description:
Ratropolis combines roguelite, deck building, and tower defense with real time strategy gameplay. Lead your small rat outpost to safety and defend your rat citizens from predators and monstrous creatures. Build the largest 'Ratropolis!' and etch your name into rat history! Choose from over 500 cards of economy, building, military, and skill types to execute your strategic command. All leaders begin their journey with a deck of 8 basic cards. Building an efficient deck is key for protecting your rats from waves of rat-thirsty enemies. Add, remove and upgrade your cards to create a deck worthy of a true leader! Defending your rats in the city will be a challenge. Get aid from advisers with talents in finance, defense, or leadership. They will provide you with better options when chaos arises. When the city falls your campaign will end, but with every end a new beginning is born. Unlock new cards to expand your options and make each defense a new experience. Now lead Ratropolis to victory and save your Ratizens from destruction! Features Unique Gameplay: Real-time deck building card game combined with roguelite and tower defense elements! Have you ever played anything like that before? Very Addictive: Highly engaging and rapid gameplay that requires quick judgment and response Replayability: Easy to play but difficult to master. 100+ Events: Random decision events give you a new experience every time you play 500+ Cards: Unlock new features and cards to become stronger after every game. 6 Possible Endings: Choose your own adventure! 6 Leaders! Each with their own play style and traits. Lead Cute Rats, not Feral Cats!

**The Knight Witch: A Spellbinding Metroidvania Adventure**

Prepare for an exhilarating blend of spellcasting and sorcery in *The Knight Witch*, a unique Metroidvania experience where you'll confront formidable evil foes. You'll have the critical choice of whether to unleash your potent magic or rely on your sharp weapons and keen intellect to overcome them. The Knight Witches, possessing extraordinary flight capabilities, formidable combat prowess, and reality-bending magical abilities, exert absolute dominion over the battlefield.

### Body and Mind: The Knight Witch Duality

*The Knight Witch* presents a compelling duality, allowing you to seamlessly integrate shooting mechanics with spell card usage. You can forge your own distinctive playstyle by upgrading your Knight skills for a more rapid-paced shmup experience, or by strengthening your magical prowess and delving into diverse deckbuilding strategies, featuring over 30 unique spell cards to discover and utilize.

### Build Trust & Make Lasting Bonds

As you traverse the expansive world of Dungeonidas, your heroic actions and dedicated efforts will be observed and discussed by its inhabitants. Knight Witches grow more powerful through the gratitude and trust they earn, which can be acquired through various means. However, not all paths to popularity are honorable. The game challenges you to decide: will you resort to any measure to gain favor, or will you strive to maintain your integrity? The ultimate choice rests entirely with you.

### Forward-Thinking Accessibility

*The Knight Witch* has been meticulously crafted as a Metroidvania experience designed without barriers. It features an intuitive 'auto-aim' system that can be toggled on or off, world-altering 'cheats' to customize your gameplay, and a focused main story navigation system, ensuring you never feel lost. These features allow you to tailor the game precisely to your preferred level of challenge and engagement.

### Super Mega Team

This captivating title is brought to you by a seasoned team of developers with extensive experience on acclaimed games such as *RiME*, *Moonlighter*, and *Plants VS Zombies*.

Experience the unparalleled freedom of **Grand Theft Auto V on PC**, immersing yourself in the sprawling, vibrant metropolis of Los Santos and the rugged landscapes of Blaine County. This definitive PC version delivers breathtaking visual fidelity, supporting resolutions up to **4K and beyond**, all while maintaining a silky-smooth **60 frames per second** gameplay experience. Beyond its stunning presentation, the PC edition offers an **extensive array of customization options**, empowering you to meticulously fine-tune every aspect of your adventure to your exact preferences.

At the heart of Grand Theft Auto V's compelling narrative are three vastly different protagonists: a **young street hustler**, a **retired bank robber**, and a **terrifying psychopath**. Their lives converge as they become deeply entangled with the perilous criminal underworld, the shadowy machinations of the U.S. government, and the glitz and glamour of the entertainment industry. To navigate this treacherous environment where trust is a rare commodity, they must meticulously plan and execute a series of **audacious heists**.

The PC version elevates your gameplay with a suite of exclusive features designed for maximum immersion and control. **Graphics and Performance** are pushed to new heights with resolutions up to 4K and beyond, coupled with a fluid 60 frames per second frame rate. You can further personalize your visual experience with **over 25 configurable settings**, allowing adjustments to texture quality, shaders, tessellation, and anti-aliasing. For **Controls**, enjoy extensive mouse and keyboard customization, alongside seamless plug-and-play controller support. **World Immersion** is enhanced through a population density slider to adjust traffic and pedestrian flow, dual and triple monitor support, and 3D compatibility.

Grand Theft Auto V for PC also seamlessly integrates **Grand Theft Auto Online**, a dynamic multiplayer world supporting up to 30 players and two spectators. This robust online component encompasses all existing gameplay updates and content released by Rockstar Games, including the highly acclaimed **Heists and Adversary modes**, ensuring endless opportunities for cooperative and competitive play.

A groundbreaking addition to the PC experience is the introduction of **First Person Mode**, offering an entirely new and deeply immersive perspective on the meticulously detailed world of Los Santos and Blaine County. This mode fundamentally changes how you interact with the environment and its inhabitants.

Furthermore, the PC release proudly presents the **Rockstar Editor**, a powerful and intuitive toolset that allows you to capture, edit, and share your most memorable gameplay moments. Key features of the Rockstar Editor include **Director Mode**, enabling you to stage custom scenes using story characters, pedestrians, and animals; **Advanced Editing** capabilities with camera manipulation, speed adjustments (fast/slow motion), and a variety of camera filters; **Soundtrack Integration**, allowing you to incorporate music from GTAV's radio stations or dynamically control the game's score; and **Easy Sharing** options to upload your completed videos directly to YouTube and the Rockstar Games Social Club.

The game's audio landscape is further enriched by a brand-new radio station, **The Lab FM**, expertly hosted by The Alchemist and Oh No. This station features exclusive new music inspired by the game's soundtrack, with contributions from acclaimed artists such as Earl Sweatshirt, Freddie Gibbs, and Little Dragon. Additionally, players can personalize their in-game audio experience through **Self Radio**, a dedicated station for custom soundtracks.
