Please note that access to certain special content requires a Rockstar Games Social Club account. Visit for more detailed information.

Name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
Description:
EPIC FANTASY REBORN The next chapter in the highly anticipated Elder Scrolls saga arrives from the makers of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Bethesda Game Studios. Skyrim reimagines and revolutionizes the open-world fantasy epic, bringing to life a complete virtual world open for you to explore any way you choose. LIVE ANOTHER LIFE, IN ANOTHER WORLD Play any type of character you can imagine, and do whatever you want; the legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure of The Elder Scrolls is realized like never before. ALL NEW GRAPHICS AND GAMEPLAY ENGINE Skyrim’s new game engine brings to life a complete virtual world with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons. YOU ARE WHAT YOU PLAY Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities. The new character system allows you to play any way you want and define yourself through your actions. DRAGON RETURN Battle ancient dragons like you’ve never seen. As Dragonborn, learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

## Experience the Epic World of The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe

The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe offers an unparalleled role-playing experience, presenting one of the greatest RPGs ever created in a stunning new light. Immerse yourself in a richly detailed and vibrant game world, brought to life with unprecedented graphics and a powerful combination of freeform gameplay. You have the freedom to pursue the main quest at your own pace or venture out to explore the vast, open world and discover your own unique challenges.

### Expansive Content and Unforgettable Adventures

This definitive Game of the Year edition includes two major expansions: Knights of the Nine and the Shivering Isles. These additions introduce a wealth of new and unique quests, along with extensive content that further enriches the already massive world of Oblivion. Discover why critics lauded Oblivion as the Best Game of 2006.

### Key Features That Define Oblivion

*   **Live Another Life in Another World:** Forge your own destiny by creating and playing any character imaginable. Whether you aspire to be a noble warrior, a cunning assassin, or a wise sorcerer, the choice is yours.
*   **First-Person Melee and Magic:** Engage in combat with an all-new system that elevates first-person role-playing to new heights of intensity, allowing you to truly feel every blow and spell.
*   **Radiant AI:** Witness a groundbreaking AI system that grants Oblivion's characters dynamic 24/7 schedules and the autonomy to make their own decisions based on their surroundings. These non-player characters eat, sleep, and pursue their own goals independently.

### Explore New Realms and Face Formidable Foes

*   **New Lands to Explore:** Journey into the Shivering Isles, an expansion that presents a world crafted in the image of the Daedric Prince Sheogorath. This realm is dramatically divided between Mania and Dementia, offering an experience unlike anything you've encountered before in Oblivion.
*   **Challenging New Foes:** Prepare to battle the unique inhabitants of the Shivering Isles. This land teems with terrifying creatures, including hideous insects, formidable Flesh Atronachs, shambling skeletal horrors, and amphibious Grummites, among many others.

### Forge Your Legend with New Factions and Quests

*   **Begin a New Faction:** The legendary Knights of the Nine have long been disbanded. Embark on an epic quest line that spans the far reaches of Cyrodiil, as you strive to reclaim their former glory and restore their honor.

### Deluxe Edition: Exclusive Downloadable Content

This English-only Deluxe version of The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition includes the following highly sought-after Downloadable Content (DLC):

*   **Fighter's Stronghold Expansion:** Live the life of a noble warrior within an expansive castle, complete with private quarters, a grand dining hall, and a well-stocked wine cellar.
*   **Knights of the Nine Quest:** Vanquish the evil that has been unleashed upon the land. New dungeons, characters, quests, and mysteries await your discovery.
*   **Spell Tome Treasures:** Acquire these valuable books to find a variety of low and high-level spells, including new, powerful spells with multiple effects.
*   **Vile Lair:** Discover an underwater, multi-level hideout designed for evil players seeking refuge, offering a safe haven for your character.
*   **Mehrune's Razor:** Conquer one of the deepest and most challenging dungeons in all of Cyrodiil to claim this fearsome and legendary weapon.
*   **The Thieves Den:** Uncover a famous pirate's lost ship and claim it as your own. This content is specifically designed for characters who favor stealth-based gameplay.
*   **Wizard's Tower:** In the frozen mountains of Cyrodiil stands Frostcrag Spire, a tower filled with wonders for your magic-oriented character.
*   **Orrery:** Harness the power of the stars. Rebuild the Orrery to unlock the profound secrets of this Mages Guild Inner Sanctum.
*   **Horse Armor Pack:** Tamriel is a perilous place. Protect your loyal steed from danger with this beautifully handcrafted armor.

**The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition: Your Epic RPG Adventure Awaits**

Dive into the expansive and immersive world of The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition. This celebrated role-playing game (RPG) grants you incredible freedom. You can follow the main story at your own speed or carve out your unique journey across its vast, detailed landscapes.

### Expansive Content Included

The Game of the Year Edition comes packed with two major expansions, significantly expanding your adventure:

#### Knights of the Nine

In this expansion, you'll rebuild a forgotten order of knights. Embark on a grand quest across the land of Cyrodiil to restore their honor and face new threats.

#### Shivering Isles

Venture into a bizarre and captivating new realm. This land is the creation of the Daedric Prince Sheogorath. It's split into two distinct regions: Mania, a land of vibrant madness, and Dementia, a place of dark shadows. This expansion offers a truly unique and memorable experience.

### Core Gameplay Highlights

Experience the depth and freedom that made Oblivion a landmark title:

#### Create Your Legend

Design and play as any character you can envision. Become a mighty warrior, a stealthy assassin, or a powerful sorcerer. Your choices shape your destiny.

#### Immersive First-Person Combat

Engage in thrilling battles with an innovative combat and magic system. Every strike and spell feels impactful, drawing you deeper into the action.

#### Dynamic World with Radiant AI

Witness a groundbreaking AI system. Non-player characters live out their days with 24/7 schedules. They eat, sleep, and pursue their own objectives, making the world feel incredibly alive and responsive.

#### New Realms and Dangers

Explore the striking environments of the Shivering Isles. Prepare to face formidable new enemies, such as the monstrous Flesh Atronachs and the amphibious Grummites.

Oblivion was honored as the Best Game of 2006, celebrated for its revolutionary gameplay and breathtaking visuals.

## Grand Theft Auto: Vice City: Your 1980s Criminal Empire Awaits

Step into the neon-drenched, excess-filled world of Grand Theft Auto: Vice City. This classic game plunges you into the unforgettable atmosphere of the 1980s. You'll follow the rise of one man to the top of the criminal underworld. The game features a sprawling, dynamic city that feels truly alive. Vice City is a detailed digital metropolis. It boasts everything from sunny beaches and murky swamps to gleaming skyscrapers and rough ghettos. This variety creates an unparalleled sense of place.

### Tommy Vercetti's Rough Start

The game expertly combines vast open-world exploration with a gripping story. You play as Tommy Vercetti, a recently released convict. His boss, Sonny Forelli, sent him to Vice City. This was a strategic move to get Tommy away from their home territory. However, Tommy's arrival in this glamorous, hedonistic city quickly goes south. He is betrayed, losing all his money and cargo. This leaves him in a dangerous situation.

### Facing Down the Opposition

Sonny wants his money back. To get it, Tommy must face many dangerous enemies. These include:

*   **Ruthless biker gangs:** These tough groups won't back down easily.
*   **Cunning Cuban gangsters:** They are skilled and dangerous players in the city's criminal scene.
*   **Corrupt politicians:** Even those in power are against Tommy.

It becomes clear that many people in Vice City want Tommy gone. With so many enemies, Tommy's only option is to fight back. He must use any means necessary to take control of the city for himself. This quest for power and survival is the heart of the Vice City experience.

**Red Dead Redemption 2: An Epic Western Adventure**

Step into America in 1899, a land on the brink of change. You play as Arthur Morgan, a member of the notorious Van der Linde gang. These outlaws are on the run, pursued by federal agents and the nation's most skilled bounty hunters. To survive, the gang must resort to robbing, stealing, and fighting their way across the American heartland.

As internal conflicts grow and threaten to shatter the gang, Arthur faces a difficult choice. He must decide between his personal ideals and his loyalty to the only family he's ever known.

**Experience the Wild West Like Never Before:**

Red Dead Redemption 2 offers a rich and immersive experience, enhanced with new features:

*   **Additional Story Mode Content:** Dive deeper into Arthur's journey with new missions and challenges.
*   **Fully-Featured Photo Mode:** Capture stunning moments and create your own visual stories from the game world.
*   **Red Dead Online:** Join a vibrant, shared world where you can forge your own path on the frontier.

**Your Role in Red Dead Online:**

In Red Dead Online, you can choose from various roles to define your frontier life:

*   **Bounty Hunter:** Track down wanted criminals.
*   **Trader:** Establish and manage your own business.
*   **Collector:** Unearth rare and exotic treasures.
*   **Moonshiner:** Run an underground distillery.
*   And many more opportunities await!

**PC Enhancements for Unrivaled Immersion:**

Red Dead Redemption 2 for PC boasts significant graphical and technical upgrades for deeper immersion:

*   **Increased Draw Distances:** See farther into the vast, detailed world.
*   **Enhanced Lighting:** Experience improved day and night lighting with higher quality global illumination and ambient occlusion.
*   **Superior Reflections and Shadows:** Enjoy deeper, higher-resolution shadows at all distances and more realistic reflections.
*   **Realistic Textures:** Marvel at tessellated tree textures and improved grass and fur for lifelike plants and animals.

**Advanced Display Options:**

The PC version also supports:

*   HDR for vibrant visuals.
*   4K resolution and beyond for high-end displays.
*   Multi-monitor and widescreen configurations.
*   Faster frame rates for smoother gameplay.

Name: The Witcher® 3: Wild Hunt
Description:
The Witcher: Wild Hunt is a story-driven open world RPG set in a visually stunning fantasy universe full of meaningful choices and impactful consequences. In The Witcher, you play as professional monster hunter Geralt of Rivia tasked with finding a child of prophecy in a vast open world rich with merchant cities, pirate islands, dangerous mountain passes, and forgotten caverns to explore. KEY FEATURES PLAY AS A HIGHLY TRAINED MONSTER SLAYER FOR HIRE Trained from early childhood and mutated to gain superhuman skills, strength and reflexes, witchers are a counterbalance to the monster-infested world in which they live. Gruesomely destroy foes as a professional monster hunter armed with a range of upgradeable weapons, mutating potions and combat magic. Hunt down a wide range of exotic monsters — from savage beasts prowling the mountain passes, to cunning supernatural predators lurking in the shadows of densely populated towns. Invest your rewards to upgrade your weaponry and buy custom armour, or spend them away in horse races, card games, fist fighting, and other pleasures the night brings. EXPLORE A MORALLY INDIFFERENT FANTASY OPEN WORLD Built for endless adventure, the massive open world of The Witcher sets new standards in terms of size, depth and complexity. Traverse a fantastical open world: explore forgotten ruins, caves and shipwrecks, trade with merchants and dwarven smiths in cities, and hunt across the open plains, mountains and seas. Deal with treasonous generals, devious witches and corrupt royalty to provide dark and dangerous services. Make choices that go beyond good & evil, and face their far-reaching consequences. CHASE DOWN THE CHILD OF PROPHECY Take on the most important contract to track down the child of prophecy, a key to save or destroy this world. In times of war, chase down the child of prophecy, a living weapon foretold by ancient elven legends. Struggle against ferocious rulers, spirits of the wilds and even a threat from beyond the veil – all hell-bent on controlling this world. Define your destiny in a world that may not be worth saving. FULLY REALIZED NEXT GENERATION Built exclusively for next generation hardware, the REDengine 3 renders the world of The Witcher visually nuanced and organic, a real true to life fantasy. Dynamic weather systems and day/night cycles affect how the citizens of the towns and the monsters of the wilds behave. Rich with storyline choices in both main and subplots, this grand open world is influenced by the player unlike ever before.

Prepare yourself for Dwarf Fortress, a game renowned for its unparalleled depth and intricate world simulation, offering an experience that transcends mere generated geometry to encompass an entire simulated world. This simulation includes the rise and fall of civilizations, the development of unique personalities, the evolution of creatures, and the creation of distinct cultures, promising infinite hours of engaging gameplay. Now, this legendary title arrives on Steam with beautiful pixel graphics, making it more accessible than ever.

Dwarf Fortress invites you to generate your own unique world and meticulously manage a bustling colony of dwarves. Your primary objective is to guide them as they mine for riches, all while navigating the constant threat of their eventual demise. This game presents a new, endless hobby tailored just for you.

Key features and gameplay elements include:

*   **Survival Challenges:** Build a fortress and strive to keep your dwarves alive against formidable threats such as starvation, fearsome dragons, and encroaching madness.
*   **Complex Simulation:** Engage in a sophisticated construction, management, and roguelike simulation where each generated world presents a distinct challenge. This complexity stems from factors like dwarves with individually simulated personalities and the unpredictable nature of aquifers.
*   **Learning from Failure:** Observe the intricate factors that lead to your civilization's decline and learn valuable lessons for your next playthrough, understanding that inevitably, something else will go wrong.
*   **Detailed Combat Model:** The combat system is remarkably detailed, incorporating elements like skills, specific body parts, material properties, aimed attacks, wrestling mechanics, pain, nausea, and a variety of poison effects, among many other nuances.
*   **Unprecedented Generation Depth:** The extent of the world generation is difficult to fully convey. It features hundreds of animals and monsters, many of which are randomly created for each individual world. Furthermore, the game generates original poetry, musical forms, instruments, and dances for your dwarves to practice and perform.
*   **Dynamic Weather System:** A sophisticated weather model tracks wind, humidity, and air masses to accurately simulate weather phenomena, including fronts, clouds, storms, and blizzards.
*   **Geological Realism:** Over two hundred distinct rock and mineral types can appear within their appropriate geological environments, adding a layer of realism to the world.

Remember the core philosophy: "Losing is fun!" While the underlying simulation remains the same, the Steam edition introduces graphical support and music by default, enhancing the classic Dwarf Fortress experience. The familiar tile sets, previously developed by community artists like Michał “Mayday” Madej and Jacob 'Ironhand' Bowman, have been reimagined with brand-new pixel art by Carolyn Jong and Neoriceisgood. The Dwarf Fortress Steam edition also boasts a 15-track soundtrack composed by Dabu, Simon Swerwer, and Águeda Macias, featuring music in the Dwarvish language.

Getting started has never been easier. The new player experience has been significantly improved with the inclusion of in-game tutorials designed to guide you through building your first fort and ensuring your dwarves remain content.

Direct your dwarves as they embark on quests to discover wealth within their generated mountain homes. Your dwarves will require a consistent supply of food and beer, but more importantly, they will need your strategic guidance to survive attacks from hostile civilizations, the perils of the wilderness, and even the undead.

Further gameplay elements include:

*   **Crafting:** Create treasures and furniture from a wide array of materials.
*   **Nobility:** Establish a barony and cater to the increasingly demanding needs of your nobility.
*   **Dwarf Morale:** Monitor your dwarves' thoughts to maintain their happiness.
*   **Water Management:** Construct floodgates to divert water for farming or to prevent dangerous magma mishaps.
*   **Cultural Development:** Build structures and observe your dwarves as they discover and develop their own culture, leading to the creation of taverns, libraries, temples, and the production of goods like honey, wax, and pottery, alongside activities such as animal training, bookbinding, and more.

Dwarf Fortress served as the original inspiration for influential games such as RimWorld, Prison Architect, and Minecraft. It holds the distinction of being one of the first video games acquired by the Museum of Modern Art in New York. This enduring project has been updated for over 16 years by its creators, brothers Tarn “Toady One” and Zach “Threetoe” Adams. With the ambitious goal of simulating all of existence, Bay 12 Games estimates they are currently only about 44% complete.

Name: Grand Theft Auto III
Description:
The sprawling crime epic that changed open-world games forever. Welcome to Liberty City. Where it all began. The critically acclaimed blockbuster Grand Theft Auto III brings to life the dark and seedy underworld of Liberty City. With a massive and diverse open world, a wild cast of characters from every walk of life and the freedom to explore at will, Grand Theft Auto III puts the dark, intriguing and ruthless world of crime at your fingertips. With stellar voice acting, a darkly comic storyline, a stunning soundtrack and revolutionary open-world gameplay, Grand Theft Auto III is the game that defined the open world genre for a generation.

**Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas** plunges players into the turbulent world of Los Santos, a city ravaged by gang warfare, rampant drug use, and pervasive corruption. This sprawling metropolis, where the affluent strive to remain detached from the harsh realities of street life, serves as the backdrop for an epic narrative.

The story unfolds in the early 1990s, five years after protagonist Carl "CJ" Johnson fled the city's oppressive atmosphere. CJ is compelled to return home upon learning of his mother's tragic murder. He discovers his family is fractured, and his former friends are spiraling towards ruin.

Upon his arrival back in his old neighborhood, CJ is **unjustly framed for homicide by a pair of corrupt police officers**. This devastating betrayal forces CJ onto a perilous odyssey that spans the entirety of the state of San Andreas. His mission is twofold: to **reunite and protect his family** and to **reclaim dominance over the city's treacherous streets**.

**Beat Saber: An Unparalleled Immersive Rhythm Adventure**

Prepare for an electrifying rhythm experience unlike anything you've encountered before with Beat Saber. This groundbreaking game transports you to a vibrant, futuristic world where you'll slash your way through meticulously crafted levels, perfectly synchronized to pulsing musical beats. Your mission is to wield your sabers with precision, striking incoming beats according to their designated color and required direction, transforming you into a dancing superhero.

Beat Saber offers a truly unique gameplay experience that masterfully blends the smoothest combination of music and captivating visual effects, allowing you to truly feel the rhythm. Unlike many other rhythm games that rely on procedurally generated content, Beat Saber's music and levels are meticulously handcrafted to elevate your auditory and visual engagement.

The game provides several exciting ways to play:

*   **Compete in Multiplayer:** Test your skills against friends or players from across the globe in thrilling multiplayer matches.
*   **Conquer the Challenging Campaign:** Continuously improve your abilities by completing a variety of objectives and challenges within the engaging Campaign mode.
*   **Ascend the Global Leaderboards:** Vie for supremacy against fellow Beat Saberists worldwide across multiple difficulty levels.

Beat Saber is designed for immediate enjoyment, featuring mechanics that are exceptionally easy to learn, yet offer immense depth for those who aspire to master them. Its intuitive controls ensure that anyone can pick up and play, making it accessible to all. Beyond the exhilarating gameplay, Beat Saber also serves as an excellent form of exercise, encouraging you to move and dance as you slash the beats.

Name: Half-Life: Alyx
Description:
Half-Life: Alyx is Valve’s VR return to the Half-Life series. It’s the story of an impossible fight against a vicious alien race known as the Combine, set between the events of Half-Life and Half-Life 2. Playing as Alyx Vance, you are humanity’s only chance for survival. The Combine’s control of the planet since the Black Mesa incident has only strengthened as they corral the remaining population in cities. Among them are some of Earth’s greatest scientists: you and your father, Dr. Eli Vance. As founders of a fledgling resistance, you’ve continued your clandestine scientific activity—performing critical research, and building invaluable tools for the few humans brave enough to defy the Combine. Every day, you learn more about your enemy, and every day you work toward finding a weakness. ABOUT GAMEPLAY IN VR: Valve’s return to the Half-Life universe that started it all was built from the ground up for virtual reality. VR was built to enable the gameplay that sits at the heart of Half-Life. Immerse yourself in deep environmental interactions, puzzle solving, world exploration, and visceral combat. Lean to aim around a broken wall and under a Barnacle to make an impossible shot. Rummage through shelves to find a healing syringe and some shotgun shells. Manipulate tools to hack alien interfaces. Toss a bottle through a window to distract an enemy. Rip a Headcrab off your face and throw it out the window. COMMUNITY-BUILT ENVIRONMENTS A set of Source 2 tools for building new levels is included with the game, enabling any player to build and contribute new environments for the community to enjoy through Half-Life: Alyx's Steam Workshop . Hammer, Valve’s level authoring tool, has been updated with all of the game's virtual reality gameplay tools and components.

**Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition**

Embark on an epic space strategy journey with **Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition**. This comprehensive package includes the acclaimed PC strategy game of the year, **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords**, the award-winning expansion **Dark Avatar**, and the latest addition, **Twilight of the Arnor**.

**Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords**

Step into the role of a space-faring civilization's leader in this sequel to the 2003 hit. Navigate a hostile galaxy, balancing economic, technological, diplomatic, cultural, and military might. Forge alliances, wage wars, and strive for galactic domination. The game offers both randomly generated maps and a multi-mission campaign detailing the struggle against an ancient enemy: the Dread Lords.

**Galactic Civilizations II: Dark Avatar**

This expansion pack significantly enhances the gameplay of **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords**. Discover new opponents, units, and a compelling campaign. Key additions include:

*   **Resource Mining:** Mine asteroid belts for valuable resources.
*   **Unique Planets:** Colonize special planets requiring advanced technologies.
*   **Espionage:** Employ spies for sabotage and defense.
*   **Diplomacy:** Engage in new types of diplomatic treaties.
*   **Enhanced AI:** Experience a more challenging artificial intelligence.

**Galactic Civilizations II: Twilight of the Arnor**

Set in 2227, the galaxy is engulfed in war orchestrated by the Dread Lords. Unite with other factions, led by humanity, to defeat this threat. This expansion introduces:

*   **Terror Stars:** New powerful entities.
*   **Unique Tech Trees:** Develop distinct technologies for each civilization.
*   **Advanced Editors:** Create custom maps, scenarios, and campaigns.
*   **New Content:** Discover new ship types and planetary improvements.

**Key Features of the Ultimate Edition:**

*   **Stunning Visuals:** A beautiful 3D engine brings planets, stars, and ship battles to life.
*   **Custom Ship Design:** Build your own 3D ships piece-by-piece in the Shipyard.
*   **Diverse Civilizations:** Play as one of a dozen unique races or create your own.
*   **Multiple Victory Paths:** Achieve victory through military conquest, cultural domination, political alliances, technological supremacy, or ascension.
*   **Dynamic Galaxies:** Experience endlessly replayable gameplay with galaxies of varying sizes.
*   **Challenging AI:** A superior multi-threaded AI provides a tough challenge without cheating.
*   **Online Competition:** Compete with players worldwide via the Metaverse.
*   **Extensive Modding Support:** Fully moddable design allows for custom opponents, graphics, and scenarios.
*   **Advanced Diplomacy:** Engage in complex trade, treaty, and alliance negotiations.

Name: The Longest Journey
Description:
The Longest Journey is an amazing graphical adventure, where the player controls the protagonist, April Ryan, on her journey between parallel universes. Embark on an exciting and original journey of discovery, where you will explore, solve puzzles, meet new people, face terrifying monsters, learn, grow, and live the adventure of a lifetime! Over 150 locations spanning two distinct and detailed worlds More than 70 speaking characters 40+ hours of gameplay 20+ minutes of high-resolution pre-rendered video footage Cinematic musical score

Name: Deus Ex: Human Revolution - Director's Cut
Description:
You play Adam Jensen, an ex-SWAT specialist who's been handpicked to oversee the defensive needs of one of America's most experimental biotechnology firms. Your job is to safeguard company secrets, but when a black ops team breaks in and kills the very scientists you were hired to protect, everything you thought you knew about your job changes. Key Features: A divided near-future: discover a time of great technological advancement, but also a time of chaos and conspiracy. Mechanical augmentations of the human body have divided society between those who can afford them, and those who can’t. Opposing forces conspire from the shadow to control the destiny of mankind: a human revolution is coming. A perfect mix of action and role-play: the game uniquely combines action-packed close-quarters takedowns with intense shooting, offering a vast array of character augmentations and upgrades for the many weapons at your disposal. Unlock new abilities and increase your stealth, social, hacking or combat skills: the game rewards all styles of play and approaches. Determine how you want your character to evolve, based on how you want to play the game. Choices and consequences: shoot your way through the enemies, sneak up behind them without being traced, hack systems to retrieve crucial information, or use your social skills to extract information from key characters – there are always choices, multiple approaches, multiple paths and multiple tools at your disposal. Choose your playing style and face the consequences of your actions: you decide how the story unfolds in his enhanced storyline featuring the full integration of 'The Missing Link' and 'Tongs Mission'. Find more ways to defeat the new and improved Boss Fights, use the Newgame+ feature to replay the story with your previously acquired augmentations. Learn more about the game with the developers commentaries in ENGLISH ONLY and the original 'Making of'video.

Name: Crysis
Description:
Adapt to Survive  An epic story thrusts players into an ever-changing environment, forcing them to adapt their tactics and approach to conquer battlefields ranging from newly frozen jungle to zero-gravity alien environments. Suit up!  A high-tech Nanosuit allows gamers to augment their abilities in real time on the battlefield. Players can choose to enhance their speed, strength, armor and cloaking abilities to approach situations in creative tactical ways. Customizable Weaponry  A huge arsenal of modular weaponry gives gamers unprecedented control over their play style. Blow the opposition away with experimental weapons, discover alien technology and utilize custom ammunition from incendiary-tipped rounds to tactical munitions that can silently put foes to sleep. Veni Vidi Vici  Lifelike enemy AI challenges players to assess a situation and approach it strategically. It isn't about having the fastest trigger finger  players are challenged to be proactive in the fight, not reactive. Zero-G Gameplay  Battle a horrifying alien species in a true Zero-gravity environment, where physics change everything as players must adapt to moving in Zero-G and contending with the recoil from their weapons and more. Next-Generation Graphics  Built from the ground up using Crytek's proprietary CryENGINE 2™, Crysis' visuals define 'state of the art,' with full DX10 support and scalable options to deliver solid performance on older machines. Open, Physicalized World  Choose your own path through the open world of Crysis, destroying obstacles, driving vehicles from VTOL's to boats and using the environment itself against your enemies. [/b] [/list]

Name: Star Control III
Description:
Deep in space, somewhere in the Kessari Quadrant, you stumble across a catastrophic realization - the universe is on the brink of destruction. Now you must race to save thousands of worlds and billions of lives from total annihilation. An epic adventure of intergalactic strategy and diplomacy begins. Star Control 3 is the last installment of the series. Taking a slightly different track that diverged from the Star Control 2 formula, it got excellent reviews though some of the hardcore Star Control fans weren't entirely thrilled by the innovations. Journalists, new fans of the series, and hardcore fans alike all agreed on one thing, though: this game's story is great. So whether you're an old fan of the series, someone who was put off by a friend's dislike of the game, or someone who's never played the Star Control games at all, here's your chance: pick up the excellent final game in the Star Control series and make up your mind for yourself! Fascinating story rich with unexpected plot twists, interesting characters, and memorable moments Great diplomacy system that equips the player with many interesting options to solve problems Each race has its own unique behavior, goals, and motives

Name: XCOM: Enemy Unknown
Description:
XCOM: Enemy Unknown will place you in control of a secret paramilitary organization called XCOM. As the XCOM commander, you will defend against a terrifying global alien invasion by managing resources, advancing technologies, and overseeing combat strategies and individual unit tactics. The original XCOM is widely regarded as one of the best games ever made and has now been re-imagined by the strategy experts at Firaxis Games. XCOM: Enemy Unknown will expand on that legacy with an entirely new invasion story, enemies and technologies to fight aliens and defend Earth. You will control the fate of the human race through researching alien technologies, creating and managing a fully operational base, planning combat missions and controlling soldier movement in battle. Key Features Strategy Evolved: XCOM: Enemy Unknown couples tactical turn-based gameplay with incredible action sequences and on-the-ground combat. Strategic Base: Recruit, customize and grow unique soldiers and manage your personnel. Detect and intercept the alien threat as you build and expand your XCOM headquarters. Tactical Combat: Direct soldier squads in turn-based ground battles and deploy air units such as the Interceptor and Skyranger. Worldwide Threat: Combat spans the globe as the XCOM team engages in over 70 unique missions, interacting and negotiating with governments around the world.

## XCOM 2: The Fight for Earth's Freedom

XCOM 2 is the exciting sequel to the award-winning strategy game, XCOM: Enemy Unknown. Twenty years have passed since humanity surrendered to alien invaders. The once-powerful XCOM organization is now a scattered resistance.

### The Alien Occupation

Aliens now rule Earth. They have built impressive cities that hide a dark secret: a plan to suppress humanity. True freedom and survival are found in the shadows, where a new resistance is forming. These XCOM forces must rally a global uprising to defeat the alien threat.

### Core Gameplay Features

*   **Mobile Command Center:** Lead your strike team from the Avenger, an alien ship converted into XCOM's mobile base. You'll decide your strategy, build support for the resistance, and counter alien operations.

*   **Build Your Squad:** Recruit soldiers from five unique classes. Each class has its own skill tree, allowing you to create specialized units for any tactical situation.

*   **Guerilla Warfare:** Use new tactical systems for flexible combat. Ambush enemies using concealment, gather valuable loot, and rescue VIPs or fallen allies.

*   **New Alien Threats:** Face a variety of dangerous enemies, including new alien species and the ADVENT, the alien regime's enforcers.

*   **Research and Development:** Construct specialized rooms on the Avenger to unlock new abilities. Your scientists and engineers will research and upgrade weapons and armor to match your fighting style.

*   **Varied Missions:** Undertake missions across diverse locations, from wildlands to alien cities and secret bases. The game offers endless combinations of maps, missions, and objectives for a fresh experience every time.

Name: COCOON
Description:
From Jeppe Carlsen, the lead gameplay designer of LIMBO and INSIDE — COCOON takes you on an adventure across worlds within worlds. Master world-leaping mechanics to unravel a cosmic mystery. Worlds within Worlds COCOON is a unique take on the puzzle adventure genre, where each world exists within an orb that you can carry on your back. Wrap your head around the core mechanic of leaping between worlds—and combine, manipulate, and rearrange them to solve intricate puzzles. Alien Machinery Interact with alien environments and biomechanical devices left behind by an ancient civilization. Journey through unique and diverse biomes, from industrial structures to massive organic caverns, and discover how they are connected to one another. Orb Abilities Each orb has an ability that can be unlocked, thereby turning the orb into a unique tool for you to utilize within other worlds. Use these abilities to uncover hidden pathways and objects, fire projectiles to trigger switches, and more. Monstrous Guardians Mighty guardians protect every world, and you must face them in fierce battles. Each fight is unique and requires you to master new and satisfying mechanics.

Here's a revised version of the Knockout League description, aiming to meet your quality targets:

**Knockout League: Arcade VR Boxing**

Step into the ring with Knockout League, a virtual reality boxing game designed for intense arcade action. This single-player experience offers a unique VR challenge, demanding precise movements for victory. You'll need to master your defense, dodging fiery uppercuts and blocking sweeping tentacle strikes. Your offense is equally crucial, as you pummel opponents with 1:1 tracking of your head and hands.

Prepare for a serious workout with engaging boxing drills. Test your reflexes with the focus mitts or brave the one-of-a-kind Reflex Alley. The game features a memorable roster of adversaries, each with distinct fighting styles and gameplay mechanics. Face off against a mad scientist and a cunning octopus, among others. Conquer them all to claim the title of Knockout League champion!

Experience the exhilarating world of **Pistol Whip**, a groundbreaking fusion of rhythm game intensity and visceral first-person shooter action that empowers you to embody the ultimate action hero. Drawing inspiration from legendary cinematic masterpieces such as *John Wick* and *Equilibrium*, this game thrusts you into a dazzling, bullet-filled spectacle where every movement is synchronized to a relentless, driving soundtrack. Prepare to transform into an unstoppable force as you navigate through a series of meticulously crafted scenarios.

**Pistol Whip** boasts an impressive collection of **30 hand-crafted scenes**, each designed to deliver a unique and engaging experience. These diverse environments range from daring bank heists to intense android uprisings, all meticulously synchronized with powerful musical compositions that amplify the action.

Immerse yourself in two distinct and compelling cinematic campaigns. The **Smoke & Thunder** campaign transports you to the rugged Old West, where you assume the role of a notorious gunslinger on a quest to find her missing sister, uncovering a deep conspiracy on the cusp of the industrial revolution. Embrace classic Western tropes with blazing guns, trains, and Tesla technology, facing explosive dangers at every turn. Alternatively, the **2089** campaign catapults you into a grim, robot-infested future. This gritty sci-fi narrative unfolds across five interconnected scenes, casting you as John Asimov. Armed with new weaponry, you must survive an off-world plague of killer machines and unravel the mystery behind their violent uprising, all set to a captivating synth-wave inspired soundtrack.

For those seeking continuous challenges, **CONTRACTS** offers a variety of assignments, from the straightforward **Daily Bounty** to the more demanding **Monthly Ultimatum**, ensuring there's always a mission for every hero.

Engage in friendly competition with the **Party Mode**, where you can challenge friends and see how your scores stack up on local leaderboards, vying for ultimate bragging rights.

The **Styles System** is the key to **endless replayability**, allowing you to tailor your gameplay experience. Select from five distinct weapon types and an ever-expanding array of gameplay modifiers. Each unique combination of modifiers generates a new leaderboard, providing fresh opportunities to challenge friends or compete solo to dominate the rankings for that specific Style.

Designed for **constant momentum and comfort**, **Pistol Whip** ensures a seamless, high-speed experience without the discomfort of motion sickness. The game features an exceptional soundtrack from artists like Magic Sword and Seeking Blue, alongside talent from Kannibalen Records, including HVDES and Black Tiger Sex Machine, further enhancing the immersive atmosphere.

**Crucially, all past campaigns and updates are included for FREE in Pistol Whip!**

**Punch Club: A New Free Expansion and the Brutal Path to Revenge**

To show our appreciation for the incredible fans of Punch Club, we're thrilled to announce a **brand new, free expansion**! This exciting addition brings approximately **3 hours of fresh content** to the game, offering even more opportunities to train, fight, and uncover the truth.

**Punch Club** plunges you into a world of grit and determination. Your father's life was tragically cut short before your very eyes, and now your sole mission is to **train relentlessly, fuel yourself with chicken, and punch your way to the top** of the Punch Club ranks. All the while, you'll be on a quest to discover the identity of your father's killer.

This isn't just a simple boxing game; **Punch Club is a boxing tycoon management simulation** that features **multiple branching storylines**. While your ultimate goal is clear, the path you take is entirely up to you. Will you strive for a **legitimate climb through the rankings**, or will you embrace a more **ridiculous and shady route**?

As you progress, you'll need to **focus your talents strategically**. Will you master the **Way of the Tiger**, the **Way of the Turtle**, or the **Way of the Bear**? Your character's **strength, accuracy, and agility** will be shaped by the path you choose. Do you possess the ferocity of stripes, or the resilience of flippers?

Furthermore, **every decision you make will have consequences**, particularly in your social life. You'll be tasked with **juggling friendships, your love life, work, recreational time, relationships, and the potential for stardom**, all while dedicating yourself to your gym training and even fighting alligators. Life in Punch Club is far from just pumping iron!

**Key Features of Punch Club:**

*   **Fighter Management Sim:** Dive deep into the role of a fighter manager with integrated RPG and tycoon elements.
*   **Unravel the Mystery:** Discover who killed your father and, perhaps, learn more about yourself in the process.
*   **Story-Driven Experience:** Immerse yourself in a heavily story-driven game with **numerous narrative branches and distinct endings** to uncover.
*   **Extensive Skill Trees:** Explore **deep stat customization** and forge your unique path through comprehensive skill trees.
*   **Nostalgic Pixel Art:** Enjoy **gorgeous pixel visuals** infused with a wealth of 80s and 90s references and nostalgic charm.

**Pato Box: A Surreal Boxing Adventure of Revenge**

Pato Box is a surreal boxing game where you play as a determined duck seeking revenge against an evil corporation. The game challenges your reflexes as you battle through the organization's ranks. You'll uncover their deepest secrets by exploring captivating 3D environments. These areas are rendered in a distinctive graphic novel and comic book art style. Your mission is to confront the henchmen who shattered your dreams. This happens through a series of action-packed, fast-paced fights. The goal is to push you to your limits and crown you a true boxing champion. The ultimate question remains: will you falter, or will you learn to DUCK?

Pato Box offers a compelling blend of challenging and surreal 2D fights. These are presented with a striking comic book art style. This style draws inspiration from graphic novels. The game's innovative visual proposal immerses players in a world that feels both familiar and fantastically unique.

**Key features of Pato Box include:**

*   **Story Mode:** A single-player adventure full of surprises. It features exploration of 3D environments and intense 2D boss fights.
*   **Interactive Dialogues:** Talk to members of the Deathflock organization. Learn about them and Patobox. Uncover their dark secrets and their impact on our hero.
*   **Amazing Soundtrack:** Enjoy an adrenaline-fueled soundtrack by Controvol. It perfectly complements the game's high-octane action.
*   **Exploration and Collectibles:** Navigate a world with traps and mini-games. Discover hidden collectibles. These expand the narrative and offer deeper insights into the game's lore.
*   **Uncover Dark Secrets:** Reveal the game's most guarded secrets. Read special documents for background on Deathflock members and Patobox.
*   **Arcade Mode:** Test your skills by fighting all bosses quickly. Play individually or in a continuous sequence. A formidable final boss awaits.
*   **Ducks Galore:** Prepare for an abundance of ducks. This adds to the game's unique and memorable atmosphere.

Name: Kao the Kangaroo (2000 re-release)
Description:
After being kidnapped from his beautiful home, Kao must find his way back to Australia. Armed with comedy-sized boxing gloves, Kao hops, skips, and triple jums his way across magnificently colored landscapes. Legs the size of a professional bodybuilders aren't the only means of locomotion for this furry bundle of fury. Use hang gliders, motorboats, snowboards, and even a space scooter. 5 worlds with more than 45 levels! Many vehicles to ride - snowboard, space scooter, hang glider, alligator, and more! Tons of enemies: pig with a lollipop club, a sailor who would love nothing more than to swab the deck with Kao, an angry Eskimo, a happy Aborigine, and a shark hungry for a kangaroo sandwich and more! Incredible graphics! Three difficulty levels! Bonus & Power-Ups to collect, such as energy, coins, power gloves, checkpoints, freeze, speed-up! Awesome music & sound effects within each level!

Name: Kandidatos
Description:
VOTING BEGINS! Fight in the biggest martial arts tournament among Brazilian politicians. The Kandidatura tournament! Choose your Kandidato and win the best !!! Choose from more than 10 fictional characters, based on Brazilian electoral candidates. 4 game modes, including story mode and Multiplayer Online P2P mode! 3D graphics. Artificial intelligence 'Fuzzy' technology where the machine adapts to whoever is playing, knowing how to make decisions according to the skill of each player. Making the game as challenging as possible. Scenarios based on Brazilian political environments. More than 300 character animations, with audios and unique characteristics of each one. And of course, lots of fun and memes! Attention: As much as this game was developed 1 year ago, it is still subject to constant changes, for updates that can add more characters, scenarios and game modes. Help Brazilian developers!

Name: Big Rumble Boxing: Creed Champions
Description:
Are you ready to become a boxing champion? Step into the ring and show off your boxing skills in a knockout arcade experience. Fight as 20 iconic characters from the Creed and Rocky universe. Take on world-class opponents across a variety of thrilling locations, or challenge your friends and family in intense, head-to-head matches. Pound-for-Pound Boxing for All - Intuitive, pick-up-and-play controls - Robust boxing mechanics - Dynamic boxing styles and combos - Fighter-specific super finishers for cinematic knockouts Ultimate Creed & Rocky Boxing Universe - Legendary tales of 20 iconic and unique characters - Unlockable characters and outfits - Classic Creed and Rocky training moments in thematic mini games - 13 Classic and original boxing arenas Iconic Champs from Creed & Rocky - Adonis Creed - Rocky Balboa - Apollo Creed - Clubber Lang - Ivan Drago - Viktor Drago and more... Pulse-rousing Fun with Friends and Family - Choose your champion and venues - Face off in local player-versus-player mode Developed by the team who brought you Creed: Rise to Glory for VR platforms, Big Rumble Boxing: Creed Champions is the second collaboration between Survios and MGM Studios, that brings the gripping intensity of Creed boxing to consoles and PC for the first time.

Name: Fisticubes - One Button Boxing!
Description:
Fisticubes is a goofy physics-based one-button boxing party game where up to 4 players compete to destroy each other! Enjoy such features as: Single-player tournament mode! 1v1 your way to the championship! Online multiplayer with Steam's Remote Play Together /#together A growing selection of different arenas! Plenty of match-making options! 2-4 player support with customizable controls! Anvils that destroy the very floor beneath you! Bombs that launch you in any and every direction! Vegetables that make you grow bigger than your enemies! Springs that launch you upwards to get the drop on your foes! Colour Blind Accessibility! Bots for offline and friendless play! First-person mode!* Virtual-reality mode!* ** *** Credits: Artwork by Bethany Coyles Music by The Flaming Pike Trailer by Josh Curry-Glasper *First-person mode & virtual-reality mode are only available in the single-player tournament mode. **Please ensure you have enough space around you to avoid hitting objects and/or walls and take all necessary precautions before using VR mode! ***VR mode is limited at this time and still in development.

Name: Real Boxing™
Description:
Lace up your boots and grab your gloves, Real Boxing™ punches its way to PC! Real Boxing™ brings you the most exhilarating, no holds barred boxing experience ever seen on Steam. Featuring ultra-realistic motion capture from real boxers, with amazing graphics built using the powerful Unreal Engine, you’ll be sure to feel every hook, jab, and uppercut. Train your fully customizable boxer and seek glory in career mode, or duke it out with other players in a deep and satisfying local and online multiplayer modes. Whether on a keyboard, or using a controller, Real Boxing plays just as great as it looks, delivering the ultimate boxing experience on Steam. Download Real Boxing Today! INCREDIBLY DEEP GAMEPLAY Compete in a comprehensive career mode with three belt titles to conquer, Battle over 20 opponents, each with their own unique and adaptive fighting style. Then train your boxer using skipping rope, heavy bag and speed bag mini-games to bring your fighter up to scratch and learn new perks to boost your boxer’s abilities. Combined with a huge variety of customisation options, becoming your own boxer has never been easier. REAL-TIME MULTIPLAYER THRILLS Take your skills to the next level and enjoy hundreds of hours more gameplay in the feature-packed online multiplayer, or duke it out with your friends locally, on a single-screen, in your own prizefight. Bet virtual currency on your fights and climb the Steam Leaderboards to rise in the rankings and truly become the world champion. PACKED WITH EXTRA FEATURES & CUSTOMISATION Unlock new equipment, extra opponents and customized clothing, as you progress in the boxing world. Tailor your fighter’s appearance to your liking, including hairstyle, skin color, tattoos and gear. Fight across four distinctive arenas: Las Vegas, Moscow’s Red Square, Rome Colosseum, and New York. IMPRESSIVE 3D GRAPHICS AND SOUND Real Boxing harnesses the immense power of the Unreal Engine to bring you a great looking and sounding game, and create astonishing levels of atmosphere and realism. See and hear the crowd go crazy as you outbox your opponent. Watch sweat and blood fly with every punch and see your opponent’s face take injuries - then relish the slow-motion replay of your greatest KO’s. STEAM EXCLUSIVE CONTENT Play and earn Steam Achievements and Ring Girl Steam Trading Cards for your hard work on the ring. Unlock Steam exclusive gear for your boxers and fight your opponents in style.

Name: Blast Beat
Description:
#What to do when the game cannot launch Get your fist ready and defeat all the opponents in this VR rhythm action game! Immerse yourself in the fantasy world while throwing your fist to the beat. Release your stress and burn those calories through thrilling exercise! New Feature [Update ver.1.1.0] Added two new kinds of notes 'Hard notes' are notes that are harder than usual and need to be destroyed with a lightning-fast punch! 'Guard Notes' is a barrier that appears when you cross your arm in front of your chest. Added option for the new game modes 'Normal mode' will have all the notes, including the new Hard notes and Guard Notes 'Exercise mode' will be the old game mode where there won't be any Hard and Guard Notes Feature 38 original songs in varying difficulties and music genres from Hard rock, Metal, Celtic to EDM. All designed and mapped for each stage setting. Immerse yourself in 7, 6 live with 1 incoming, uniquely designed fantasy setting. Watch your environment gradually change in 3 stages as the songs go! 7 Stage Boss to defeat, each with 2 color variations and unique attack styles. 3 unique counter-attack styles to match your style: punch, squat, or spin your arm. Calorie tracker, track your burned calories according to your height and weight. 4 gauntlet variations. Global Leaderboards, compete with others, and become the top 20 Blast Beater in the world! Stream Blast Beat easily with in-game third-person perspective mode! Function Long-Range Attack Smash standard notes with a punch. Feel free to use straight, hook, uppercut, or any methods you like to smash the notes! Knock down the arrow notes with a punch matching the direction indicated by the arrow. Do your best to maintain your combos and keep those punches coming! Remember to avoid getting hit by various obstacles as it will break off your combo and lower your scores. Short-Range Attack The enemy will get closer into a striking distance and deal direct attacks at you. Getting hit will lower your score and break off your combo, so try your best to avoid it and wait for an opportunity to counter the attack! Counter Attack Now it's your chance to fight back! Punching? Squatting? Spinning your arm? Whatever you like to deal damage and knock the enemy back!

**Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition: Your Gateway to a Classic WWII RTS**

The Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition provides access to the latest updated version of the game, now simply titled 'Company of Heroes,' directly within your Steam library. **For all online multiplayer engagements, please utilize this updated version.** Additionally, you can delve into the vibrant COH1 Steam Community and explore the extensive Modding scene by visiting these dedicated pages:

*   [COH1 Community Hub](link-to-community-hub)
*   [COH1 Steam Workshop](link-to-steam-workshop)

**Immerse Yourself in the Unforgettable World of Company of Heroes**

Company of Heroes offers a profoundly visceral World War II real-time strategy experience, fundamentally changing how players engage with the genre. It vividly portrays the immense sacrifice of its heroic soldiers, the devastation of war-torn landscapes, and the dynamic nature of intense battlefields. Beginning with the pivotal D-Day invasion of Normandy, you will command Allied squads in their relentless struggle against the formidable German war machine, navigating through a series of crucial WWII engagements.

**A Gripping Single-Player Campaign**

Prepare to be captivated by the cinematic intensity and the sheer bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary circumstances. The deeply engaging single-player campaign masterfully captures the profound turmoil of World War II with an unprecedented level of detail and emotional resonance.

**Intelligent Squad AI for Realistic Combat**

Witness the evolution of virtual soldiers brought to life through advanced squad artificial intelligence. Your troops will dynamically interact with their ever-changing surroundings, instinctively seeking cover and executing sophisticated tactical maneuvers to effectively neutralize enemy threats.

**Strategic Depth Through Stunning Visuals and Environmental Interaction**

Engineered with Relic's groundbreaking technology, Company of Heroes delivers exceptional graphical fidelity and a physics-driven world that sets a new standard for real-time strategy games. The integration of real-time physics and a fully destructible environment guarantees that no two battles will ever unfold identically. You possess the power to obliterate virtually any element on the map, thereby reshaping the battlefield to your strategic advantage. Master the use of buildings and terrain for cover and tactical positioning, or strategically deny these vital resources to your adversaries.

**Engaging Multiplayer Battles**

Test your strategic prowess in thrilling multiplayer matches, supporting 2 to 8 players through either LAN or internet connections. Unite with friends online for the ultimate clash between the Axis and Allied forces, where every decision counts.

Name: Company of Heroes
Description:
DISCLAIMER FOR ADDITIONAL USER REVIEWS , please visit the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page. Total conversions available on Steam for COH1 are also listed on the Legacy Edition page. DESCRIPTION Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines real time strategy gaming by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Beginning with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, players lead squads of Allied soldiers into battle against the German war machine through some of the most pivotal battles of WWII. Through a rich single player campaign, players experience the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary events. A Cinematic Single Player Experience that captures the turmoil of WWII as never before. Advanced squad AI brings your soldiers to life as they interact with the changing environment, take cover, and execute advanced squad tactics to eliminate all enemy opposition. Stunning Visuals - Relic's next generation cutting-edge engine provides graphic quality and a physics driven world that is unprecedented in an RTS. Environmental Strategy - Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guarantee no two battles ever play out in the same way. Destroy anything and re-shape the battlefield! Use buildings and terrain to your advantage, or deny them to the enemy. 2-8 Player Multiplayer Competition via LAN or Internet - Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies.

Name: Call of Duty®
Description:
Call of Duty® delivers the gritty realism and cinematic intensity of World War II's epic battlefield moments like never before - through the eyes of citizen soldiers and unsung heroes from an alliance of countries who together helped shape the course of modern history. Play through the chaos of battle as part of a well-trained squad, that lays down covering fire and pulls its wounded to safety. In addition to authentic squad movements and tactics, each soldier's distinct personality and training comes out on the battlefield. No one soldier or nation single-handedly won the war. For the first time, Call of Duty® captures the war from multiple perspectives, through the eyes of American, British and Russian soldiers. Battle through 24 missions spanning 4 interconnected historical campaigns. Take on mission objectives ranging from sabotage and all-out assault to stealth, vehicle combat and rescue. Authentic weapons, locations, vehicles and sounds of war all contribute to the realism, immersing you in the most intense World War II experience yet. © 2003 Activision Publishing, Inc. Activision and Call of Duty are registered trademarks of Activision Publishing, Inc. All rights reserved. All other trademarks and trade names are the properties of their respective owners.

Name: Silent Hunter® III
Description:
The king of submarine simulations returns with an all-new 3D engine, new crew command features, and more realistic WWII naval action than ever before. The movie-like graphics and simple, tension-filled gameplay make this the perfect game for the realism fanatic and the casual gamer. Realistic and immersive environment: The suspense-filled atmosphere includes realistic 3D water modeling, day/night cycles, and historically accurate subs, ships, and aircraft. The detailed U-boat interiors, changing weather effects, and engaging audio represent the ultimate in WWII submarine warfare. A deadly array of U-boats and weapons: Playable U-boats include Type II, VII, IX, and XXI submarines. Take aim against Allied convoys and warships. In recreating the great submarine battles of WWII, players will hide in silence just below threatening escort ships, fire deadly torpedoes, or surface and pound enemies with the deck gun. Dynamic campaign: Create your own realistic naval war story. Your military career will be influenced by successful command decisions in an unscripted and non-linear WWII campaign. Accessible to players of all skill levels: Players will experience a simplified learning curve that will be easier to handle than standard simulations. Use the naval academy tutorial to learn the basics. Customize the realism settings for play that appeals to a variety of WWII combat fans. Command your crew: The crew will take orders and evolve based on the results of each patrol. Multiplayer cooperative play: For up to eight players via LAN.

Name: Return to Castle Wolfenstein
Description:
World War II rages and nations fall. SS head Himmler has Hitler's full backing to twist science and the occult into an army capable of annihilating the Allies once and for all. Battling alone, you're on an intense mission to pierce the black heart of the Third Reich and stop Himmler -- or die trying. Fighting in advanced team-based multiplayer mode, you'll wage your own WWII in an all-out Axis vs. Allies contest for frontline domination. Powered by the Quake III Arena engine, the Wolfenstein universe explodes with the kind of epic environments, A.I., firepower and cinematic effects that only a game created by true masters can deliver. The dark reich's closing in. The time to act is now. Evil prevails when good men do nothing. Epic Environments Intense Story-Driven Action Ferocious A.I. Big Screen Cinematic Effects Team-Based Multiplayer Action

Unity of Command II is a highly anticipated sequel to the cult classic strategy game. It offers polished, fluid gameplay on a new 3D engine while retaining the series' signature art style. This game is designed to be accessible for new players but challenging enough for seasoned veterans.

In Unity of Command II, you'll command Western Allied forces during World War II. Your responsibilities include managing army divisions, along with their crucial supply and logistics. For the first time in the series, you'll contend with Fog of War. To overcome this, you must capture enemy soldiers for intelligence and launch recon missions to discover enemy troop locations. Be aware that enemy panzers will attempt to capture your scattered units, so regroup and counterattack!

Key features of Unity of Command II include:

*   **Dynamic Campaign:** Forge your own path through World War II history with a branching campaign that ensures no two playthroughs are the same.
*   **Headquarters:** A new feature that places army headquarters on the map. From here, you'll direct unit reorganization, bridging operations, and resupply. Headquarters are vital for reinforcing units and recovering lost strength. They also unlock special abilities like Emergency Supply and Motorizing units with HQ trucks.
*   **Theater Assets:** Significantly expanded from the original game, this feature allows you to disrupt enemy operations behind their lines by sabotaging infrastructure. You can also order aircraft for aerial reconnaissance, conduct bombing runs, or use air supply to support units deep in enemy territory.
*   **Bonus Objectives:** Engage in optional, history-altering "what-if" scenarios. Successfully completing these might grant you the opportunity to "Rush for the Apennines" and break through German defenses before they can fortify.
*   **Fog of War:** Discovering your enemy is a primary challenge. Reveal enemy positions by capturing stragglers, upgrading your HQ, and utilizing its special abilities to uncover enemy defense markers.
*   **Deep Operations:** Unity of Command revolutionized turn-based strategy with its signature supply line mechanic. Carefully manage your logistics as you plan deep strikes into enemy territory, sever their supply lines, and encircle their units.
*   **Accessible Scenario Editor:** Unity of Command II includes a full Allied campaign. Additionally, you can experience pivotal WWII battles from the Axis perspective. The game features a built-in scenario editor, enabling players to create and share new battlefields through Steam Workshop integration.

Name: Commandos 2: Men of Courage
Description:
Commandos 2: Men of Courage is a tactical action/strategy game set against the backdrop of World War II. Take control of an elite group of commandos who must venture deep into enemy territory and utilize their combined expertise to complete a series of mission-based objectives. Go covert into new environments based on authentic WWII locations: the heart of the third Reich, a northern European submarine installation, the headquarters of the Japanese army and more. Interact like never before: with the environment: steal enemy uniforms and weapons, climb poles, swing from cables, swim, utilize vehicles, and climb in/out of buildings, ships, planes. Control nine commandos: including a green beret, sniper, demolitions expert, seductress, thief, and even a dog. All new 3D engine: rotate the environment 360 degrees, move seamlessly in/out of buildings, submarines, planes and under water, and zoom in/out on the environment. Innovative camera control: simultaneous control of multiple gameplay windows in real time. Authentic WWII scenarios: 10 missions spanning 9 different environments in night and day with realistic weather effects. Multiplayer: Go to war with others in a cooperative multiplayer mode (Multiplayer available in PC version only!!!). New WWII vehicles and weapons: including jeeps, tanks, trucks, ships, bazookas and flame-throwers.

**Company of Heroes: Opposing Fronts**

Experience the next chapter in the critically acclaimed RTS franchise. Company of Heroes: Opposing Fronts plunges you into a brutal World War II conflict. Command two distinct, battle-hardened armies through intense campaigns. Fight for honor and country across war-torn landscapes.

In this expansion, you'll lead:

*   **The British 2nd Army:** Relive the heroic liberation of Caen, France.
*   **The German Panzer Elite:** Defend against the largest airborne invasion in history.

**Key Features:**

*   **Two New Armies:** Master the unique strengths of the British 2nd Army and the German Panzer Elite. Each army boasts devastating command trees and unit upgrades.
*   **Two Full Campaigns:**
    *   Guide the British 2nd Army to liberate the vital strategic location of Caen, France.
    *   Command the German Panzer Elite to repel the massive Allied airborne invasion during Operation Market Garden.
*   **Enhanced Realism:** Experience "Real War, Real Battlefields, Real War Enhanced." Features like Mission Persistence, Dynamic Weather Effects, and Advanced Vehicle Tactics bring a new level of realism and strategic depth to the battlefield.
*   **Expanded Multiplayer:** Combine Company of Heroes: Opposing Fronts with the original Company of Heroes. This unlocks a total of four playable armies online.
    *   Unleash combined British artillery and American armor to crush the Third Reich.
    *   Employ Wehrmacht and Panzer Elite blitzkrieg tactics to decimate Allied invasions.
*   **DirectX® 10 Support:** Immerse yourself in the most realistic RTS experience. Enjoy enhanced lighting and incredible terrain detail.

Name: Call of Duty: United Offensive
Description:
Award-winning developer Gray Matter Interactive follows up on the success of Infinity Ward's Call of Duty™ - winner of over 80 Game of the Year and 50 Editors' Choice awards worldwide - with Call of Duty™: United Offensive™. Take the role of American, British, and Russian soldiers in some of the most climactic battles of World War II, including the Battle of the Bulge, the invasion of Sicily, and the Battle of Kursk. Fight in tanks, jeeps, motorcycles, even a bomber. Work with your squad through snow and rain, using new weapons including flamethrowers and deployable machine guns, or by calling in artillery strikes. 13 All-New Single Player missions spanning three campaigns. 11 exciting new Multiplayer maps and 3 new multiplayer modes including Domination, Capture the Flag, and Base Assault. © 2006 Activision Publishing, Inc. Activision and Call of Duty are registered trademarks of Activision Publishing, Inc. All rights reserved. All other trademarks and trade names are the properties of their respective owners.

Name: Brothers in Arms: Road to Hill 30™
Description:
Based on a true story. Set during the famous airdrop before the invasion at Normandy, where Sgt. Matt Baker and his squad of 101st Airborne Paratroopers were scattered over the French countryside. As the story unfolds, you must choose between the success of your mission and the lives of your men - your brothers in arms. Brothers In Arms: Road to Hill 30 will immerse players in the historic, eight-day invasion of Normandy - with unparalleled imagery, authenticity, sound, and gameplay. One of a kind: Brothers In Arms Road to Hill 30 is the only first-person tactical shooter set in WWII. Real military tactics: Intuitive and easy-to-use squad controls appeal to both the hardcore and mainstream gaming audience. Real soldiers: Featuring a cast of more than 20 characters, each with a unique personality, appearance, and style. Revolutionary AI system: Allies and enemies use the standard operating procedures of fire and maneuver to flank and kill their foes. Unprecedented authenticity: Historically accurate and detailed battlefields, events, and equipment re-created from Army Signal Corps photos, aerial reconnaissance imagery, and eyewitness accounts. Innovative multiplayer: Players command three-man AI teams in a battle of wits and skill to accomplish exciting objectives. Award-winning team: Gearbox Software, creators of Half-Life Opposing Force and developers of James Bond: Nightfire, Counter-Strike, and Halo (PC).

**Need for Speed: Hot Pursuit**

Get ready for **Need for Speed: Hot Pursuit**, a game that puts you in the driver's seat of the world's fastest and most beautiful cars. Developed by Criterion, the acclaimed studio behind the Burnout series, this title is set to redefine racing games for a new generation. Experience **blistering speeds**, thrilling takedowns, and daring getaways as you compete with friends in the most connected Need for Speed game yet.

The innovative **Need for Speed Autolog** system is at the heart of the game's connected social competition. Autolog links friends directly, allowing them to compare and share their experiences, pictures, and challenges. It **intuitively suggests new challenges** based on your friends' recent gameplay, creating a dynamic and highly competitive social experience that extends beyond the console to the web.

**Hot Pursuit** is packed with action and challenges you to become either Seacrest County's top cop or its most wanted racer. For the first time in the Need for Speed franchise, you can **play a full career from either side of the law**. Whether you're a speed demon or a determined officer, prepare for an unforgettable ride.

**Key Features:**

*   **Dual Careers:** For the first time in Need For Speed history, experience **full careers as both cops and racers**. Earn bounty through online play, friend challenges, or the single-player career to unlock new cars, weapons, and equipment.

*   **Need For Speed™ Autolog:** This system **connects friends directly**, enabling them to compare and share gameplay. Autolog dynamically delivers challenges based on what your friends are doing, fostering a **socially competitive experience**.

*   **Exotic Cars:** Drive the **world's most desirable high-performance cars** at incredible speeds. Bust suspects in supercharged cop interceptors like the Lamborghini Reventon, or evade the law as a racer in supercars like the Pagani Zonda Cinque.

*   **Weapons and Equipment:** Cops can utilize weapons like **spike strips** and call in **roadblocks** to intensify chases. Racers are equipped with evasion tools such as **jammers** to block cop communications and disable their weapons.

*   **Seacrest County:** Explore a vast open world inspired by the **California coastline**, featuring diverse regions like deserts, forests, seaside areas, and mountains. This expansive environment is designed to deliver the most **intense cop pursuit moments** ever.

Name: GRIP: Combat Racing
Description:
WHEELED AND ANTI-GRAV RACING FUSION GRIP is a high octane, hardcore combat racer, packing ferocious speed and an arsenal of heavy weapons. Harness the power of gravity-defying wheeled or airborne vehicles, and smash your way through opponents with a bristling arsenal of outlandish weapons. GRIP delivers one of the fastest and most unique racing experiences ever as you scale walls, ceilings and anything else you can get your ride onto. Master twisting tracks, tricks and perform ridiculous stunts, fighting your way across alien planets to become the ultimate vehicular assailant. Now in VR! Prepare for the most intense, mind-melting racing experience in VR! Inject yourself into the game, feeling every turn, impact and stomach-testing inversion. Can you make it through the race? Only one way to find out… *Sick bag not included. REACH MACH 1 SPEEDS Hit speeds of up to 767mph and beyond on floors, walls, ceilings and anywhere you can get your ride to… just keep that pedal pressed hard. RACE ACROSS THE COSMOS Race your way through 29 tracks across a host of 4 exotic planets; from hostile, icy worlds to foreign, non-terrestrial cities to the outer reaches of space. CREATE THE ULTIMATE RIDE Choose from a roster of 30 armored vehicles to suit your style – some swift and agile, others brutish and heavily armed. Progress your player level and customize your ride with unlocked paint jobs, decals, tires and rims. TEAM MODES Battle it out with online team racing and deathmatch modes. DEVASTATE YOUR OPPONENTS Pick-up an array of 9 power-ups and weapons, from shields and turbos, to rail-guns, missiles and explosive darts - all with alternate fire modes. COMPETE ON THE COUCH Compete with friends in SPLIT-SCREEN multiplayer, with up to four players. TAKE THE RACE ONLINE Build your own tournament, line the grid with up to 10 players and compete online with full matchmaking & lobby support. ENTER THE DEATHMATCH ARENA Duke it out with intense action in 5 Arena battle maps. BECOME ONE WITH THE CAR IN CARKOUR Beat the clock, avoid obstacles and find new pathways in 19 point-to-point Carkour runs. CONQUER THE SINGLE PLAYER CAMPAIGN Be the best, beat in-game rivals and rise to the top in the single player campaign. Gain XP and customize your ride’s appearance with hard-earned upgrades. SICK BEATS Race to a 24 track thumping licensed electronic soundtrack, ranging from techno and trance to our main jam, drum n bass. BUILT WITH UNREAL Built in Unreal Engine 4, GRIP will take you back to your nostalgic past, while simultaneously propelling you into an electrifying future.

Name: FlatOut: Ultimate Carnage
Description:
FlatOut Ultimate Carnage lifts destruction racing to a whole new level of bone-breaking slaughter. FlatOut Ultimate Carnage is arcade destruction racing at its best and most extreme with real world physics, three different game modes and offering players a wide variety of online and offline multiplayer options. Features: Arcade destruction racing at its best: FlatOut's peerless real world physics engine combines vehicles built from 40 plus deformable parts with over 8000 destructible objects per track. Huge number of race styles to suit your mood and preferences: Career racing. Compete in progressively tougher championship wrecking your way through 3 classes to become the ultimate FlatOut champion. Arcade racing. Deathmatch Destruction Derbies, time trials and crash filled challenges. Highly competitive FlatOut racing action: Compete against 11 other drivers in single player modes from a choice of 48 cars on 39 tracks in 6 different environments. Wreck you way across parched deserts, massive storm drains and narrow city streets. Fully supports Games For Windows live: Up to 8 player simultaneous Live play including Races, Derbies and Stunts, plus the all-new Deathmatch Derbies and the excusive Head-On race mode. Hilarious Ragdoll characters catapulted in-race and in 12 crunching mini games: The Ragdoll is a unique to FlatOut - which is catapulted through your windscreen or, even better, the other driver's windscreen as they are wrecked out of the race. Additionally there are the 12 Ragdoll events which take some beating for their sheer body abuse (e.g. High Jump, Stone Skipping, Ring of Fire, Field Goal and Free Kick). Cars look stunning: See every scratch and dent all with real-time environment mapping to create a grittier realistic appearance. flatout features dynamic shadow maps for every 3D object on the track including buildings, scenery and cars making all movement in Ultimate Carnage exceptionally smooth. Improved particle effects e.g. Dust, dirt, smoke, water splashes and bouncing sparks.

Name: Need for Speed™ Most Wanted
Description:
The open-world action in Need for Speed™ Most Wanted gives you the freedom to drive your way. Hit jumps and shortcuts, switch cars, lie low, or head for terrain that plays to your vehicle’s unique strengths. Fight your way past cops and rivals using skill, high-end car tech, and tons of nitrous. It’s all about you, your friends, and a wild selection of cars. Let’s see what you can do. Key features Experience nonstop action — No menus, no lobbies, and no restrictions — just intense competition. Race, battle, crash, and explore at your own pace with a massive variety of things to do (and rewards to collect) throughout the open world. Prove you’re the best — Pick a car & jump into a nonstop playlist of competitive events in online mode. Influence the playlist by voting with your car. Jostle for position on the starting line. Cross the finish line and turn around to take out oncoming rivals. Beat your friends — Autolog records everything you do, broadcasting a feed of your most newsworthy scores, speeds, and times to your friends — and you’ll see there’s too. Whatever you do, there’s someone to beat. Test your urban handling skills — Need for Speed Most Wanted delivers a deep, physical experience that showcases the personalities of awesome licensed cars. Experience insane speeds, spectacular crashes, aggressive driving, and huge drifts.

**Need for Speed™ Rivals: Complete Edition**

Experience the ultimate Need for Speed Rivals adventure with the Complete Edition. This comprehensive package includes the full game along with six exciting downloadable content packs, offering an unparalleled racing experience.

**Unlock Exclusive Content**

The Complete Edition grants you access to six additional packs:

*   Simply Jaguar Complete Pack
*   Ferrari Edizioni Speciali Complete Pack
*   Concept Lamborghini Complete Pack
*   Koenigsegg Agera One
*   Complete Movie Pack
*   Loaded Garage Pack
