In fact, there is a good chance that you won’t like it, precisely because we took too many liberties with the established design. So What Sets The Age of Decadence Apart From Other Games? 1. The Setup Traditionally, many fantasy RPGs are about killing things, clearing up dungeons, and being a hero. There is nothing wrong with mindless fun and wish fulfillment, but we want to offer you something different. To quote Tom Chick (Quarter to Three's game critic): 'But Age of Decadence wants nothing to do with kobolds, just as it wants nothing to do with Doo-dads of Unimaginable Power. The overarching idea is a crumbling society divided among three noble Houses, each fumbling around in its own version of darkness to comprehend what destroyed the world. That’s the central mystery. It plays out like noir in that you are the detective, piecing together what really happened from differing accounts, all vividly written with clear voices and efficient prose. And like a detective in a noir yarn, you can’t help but become part of the central mystery, effecting an outcome you might not have intended.' The Age of Decadence is not a game about killing monsters or exploring mystical lands, but rather, surviving amid the greed and brutality of your fellow humans and carving out a name for yourself. Good and bad are purely relative. It’s a world of scheming and backstabbing in which your words and actions have the potential to forge alliances and sow discord, and your path is never certain. You get to play with seven different factions: three Noble Houses and four 'professional' guilds: merchants, assassins, thieves, and the army, all fighting for power or influence; over 100 named characters, over 750 ‘generic’ characters with unique IDs taking part in violent take-overs, assassinations, and power grabs, and over 600,000 words of dialogue: a well-developed and thought through world, believable characters, realistic motivations, but no elves, dwarves, magic, and wizards in fashionable, pointy hats. 2. Combat difficulty Another design aspect worth mentioning is combat difficulty. It’s a hard game. Combat difficulty is integrated into the setting. You can’t say that the world is harsh and unforgiving and then let the player kill everyone who looks at him or her funny. The game has to be hard, dying should be easy, and you should have reasons to pick your fights. You aren’t a powerful hero who can defeat anyone and save the world and it is the difficulty that reinforces this notion. Make the game easier and we’re back to the powerful hero setup. So unless you’re a natural born killer, watch what you say and think before you act or you’ll end up dead before you can blink. 3. Choices & Consequences Choices are what the game is all about - crafting your own narrative via a variety of choices that alter the story, playing field, and your options down the road. From multiple quest solutions to branching questlines you'll have plenty decisions to make and consequences of said decisions to deal with, which is what makes the game incredibly replayable. Starting the game as a mercenary and joining the Imperial Guards will give a completely different experience, different quests, different content and points of view than, say, playing the game as a merchant (less buying low and selling high, more scheming and plotting to gain advantages for the guild), a praetor serving a Noble House, or an assassin. The questlines are interwoven, forming a large, overarching story, so playing the game only once will be like witnessing events from a single perspective, which is limited by default. You will have to play the game several times to better understand what’s going on, piece everything together, and see the full effect of the choices you make. The Big Question: Should You Buy The Game? Try before you buy. Even if everything I said sounds exactly like your kind of game, try the demo first. That’s what it’s there for. It gives you access to the first Chapter, consisting of 3 locations and about 30 quests split between mutually exclusive questlines and decisions.

Total War: ATTILA thrusts players into the brutal realities of 395 AD, a period of unprecedented famine, disease, and war that heralded the dawn of the Dark Ages. From the Eastern steppes, a formidable new power emerges, threatening the Roman Empire with an overwhelming force of a million horsemen. This installment in the acclaimed PC series presents a stark survival challenge: will you fight to establish your own barbarian or Eastern kingdom, or will you strive to defend the crumbling remnants of Rome against the approaching storm? The "Scourge of God" is nigh, and your world is poised to be consumed by fire.

The game introduces **apocalyptic destruction mechanics**, allowing players to unleash the devastating power of **fire in battle** to set buildings ablaze and sow terror among enemy ranks. Furthermore, the **raze mechanic** enables the complete eradication of entire cities and regions from the campaign map, leaving only desolate ashes in their wake.

A particularly challenging **legendary start position** is the Western Roman Empire. While initially controlling vast territories, players will quickly find their dominance eroded by intense internal political struggles and relentless external threats, transforming the game into a desperate fight for survival.

Total War: ATTILA features **overhauled game mechanics**, including a refined user interface and optimized systems for politics, family trees, civic management, and technological progression. Players will immerse themselves in an **authentic period detail**, with new technologies, weaponry, religions, cultures, and social upheavals specific to the Dark Ages. The game boasts **outstanding visual fidelity**, presenting a chilling vision of impending apocalypse and the fall of civilization. Combined with breathtaking scale and atmosphere, improvements and optimizations to both campaign and battle visuals deliver an enhanced graphical performance, allowing players to truly experience the end of days and the potential rise of a legend.

Name: Expeditions: Rome
Description:
The future of Rome is in your hands: what will your legacy be? Take on the role of a young Legatus whose father was murdered by an unknown political opponent, forcing you to escape Rome and take refuge in the military campaign to subdue a Greek rebellion. Step by step, you increase your military prowess, strengthen yourself in the forge of combat, and become the Legatus everyone learns to both respect, and to fear. In Expeditions: Rome, you exert the will of Rome through your actions across the world stage, from the bright blue coasts of Greece to the deep forests of Gaul. Decide how people will view you, and Rome. Will you strike with an iron fist, or speak with a silver tongue? Will you embrace the political heritage of the Republic, or carve your own path as you navigate the complex politics of the Roman Senate? Every choice matters as you decide the fate of your legion, your close companions, and of Rome itself. Create your own Roman Legatus! Customize your character’s look, gender, class, and skills to match your playstyle and role-playing fantasy Engage in tactical turn-based combat powered by an extensive skill-based action system where every weapon changes your potency on the battlefield Adventure with 5 unique companions discovering their extensive backstories and unique personalities Explore a beautifully realized, colorful world across many different environments, including North Africa, Greece, Gaul, and Rome herself Experience a historically inspired story of political intrigue and personal drama through a fully voiced narrative where choices matter and consequences are far-reaching Level-up each character and select from a variety of skills and passive abilities to explore a wide range of tactical options Loot, Craft, and Equip a variety of weapons, armors, and tactical items to customize your game even further, providing a tremendous range of tactical options for each character Lead your legion on 3 extensive war campaigns across Greece, North Africa, and Gaul. Recruit legionaries, improve your warcamp, conquer regions, exploit resources, and defend your territories as you lead your legion to victory

For dedicated retro gaming enthusiasts, a remarkable gem from 1996 awaits discovery: **Time Commando**. This captivating title plunges players into a desperate struggle against a catastrophic time-warping virus that has infiltrated a top-secret military supercomputer, threatening global technological collapse. To avert this impending disaster, you must embark on an urgent mission through the annals of history, confronting a formidable array of vicious warriors whose lethal intentions demand your immediate and decisive action.

Your journey through time and space in Time Commando promises an unforgettable experience, characterized by:

*   **Diverse Worlds:** Explore nine distinct environments, each meticulously crafted to represent a different era and location, including:
    *   Prehistoric landscapes
    *   Ancient Rome
    *   Feudal Japan
    *   The Medieval period
    *   The era of the Conquistadors
    *   The Wild West
    *   Modern warfare settings
*   **Extensive Arsenal:** Wield an impressive array of weaponry, ranging from traditional Katanas and rifles to mystical spells and the technologically advanced combat yo-yo, ensuring a dynamic combat experience.
*   **Engaging Gameplay:** Immerse yourself in a blend of challenging combat, intriguing puzzle-solving elements, and a compelling original story, all presented with distinctive, stylized visuals that contribute to hours of entertainment.

Time Commando stands out as a truly unique title, offering a gameplay experience that is both entertaining and challenging, making it an essential addition to any serious game collection.

**Important Disclaimers:**

*   This game requires DosBox for operation.
*   This specific version is the European release, featuring an introduction without voice-over.
*   For a more accessible entry point, it is recommended to begin your adventure on the easy mode.

Name: Rome: Total War™ - Alexander
Description:
Rome: Total War - Alexander is the second official expansion pack to Rome: Total War. An entirely new campaign map that stretches from Macedonia to Greece and into the heart of the ancient Persian Empire New campaign game that tasks players with matching the exploits of Alexander the Great as he swept across Central Asia and dominated the Persian Empire Four new factions including the Macedonians, Persians and Indians Over 25 new units, including Alexander's own renowned historical troops Historical Alexander the Great campaign with six new historical battles that unlock sequentially, telling the story of Alexander and providing a historical backdrop to each of the battles All-new movies to support the Alexander campaign, with professional voiceovers by actor Brian Blessed (Alexander, Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace)

Name: Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition
Description:
Europa Universalis Rome Gold combines the epic strategy title Europa Universalis Rome with the expansion pack Vae Victis . Experience one of the most defining periods in world history in an experience crafted by the masters of Grand Strategy. The greatest cultural and military civilizations are brought to life through this epic title rife with great strategic and tactical depth. Set during the golden age of the Roman Republic when the Senate ruled the Empire, Vae Victis features a massive number of additions and improvements to Europa Universalis: Rome, a game that was already one of the most prominent to depict that era in the widest scope. An overview of these key changes begins with government, which has received a lot of attention for the expansion in order to produce more fluid and balanced gameplay. The cast of historical characters of the ancient world have also had a significant overhaul across a variety of areas and with the addition of missions, decisions and laws, Vae Victis is an expansion packed with a huge amount of new content. KEY FEATURES Fully 3D map with integrated graphics and detailed topography Start at any date between 280 B.C. and 27 B.C. Choose between 10 different cultures, including the Roman, Celtic, Greek and Egyptian civilizations, with more than 53 playable factions on a map spanning hundreds of provinces. Watch your characters develop new traits through political intrigue and various interactions with thousands of other characters. Trade, negotiate or fight with your neighbours and advance your technologies to unite the Mediterranean World. Robust multiplayer allows you to challenge up to 32 players either competitively or in co-op mode. NEW KEY FEATURES IN VAE VICTIS Completely revised military AI, particularly in the area of military campaigns Dynamics of the characters that live in the Republic will come to life as the men and women have their own personal goals and agendas As a republic you will now need to take the Senate into the account. Characters will belong to various parties depending on their goals, values, and ambitions Monarchies and Tribes will have their own courts, beware of bootlickers and sycophants who will stop at nothing to replace your divinely appointed ruler

Name: Don Bradman Cricket 17
Description:
Don Bradman Cricket 17 brings a new revolutionary control system delivering the best batting, bowling and fielding experience by providing you an even greater level of variety and precision of play. Bat like a pro with the new helicopter, reverse sweep and scoop shots. Stump your opponent by mixing up your fast deliveries with leg-cutters, off-cutters, cross-seam or go with spin deliveries including the doosra or googly. Enhanced fielding including a new 'reflex catching' system. Fielding also includes slides and tap backs inside the boundaries, plus relay throws. A deeper career mode that gives you the choice between a seasoned pro or a rookie just starting out in club cricket. Motion captured first class cricketers, including female cricketers for the first time in all game modes. A world first stadium and logo creator that allows you to customise and share your play experience. Download and play with thousands of community created players, teams, umpires, stadiums and logos. Note: You must be connected to the internet to boot this game. You may disconnect from the internet once at the main menu.

Name: Cricket Captain 2014
Description:
Cricket Captain is back for the 2014 season, with a beautiful new interface, updated 3D graphics engine, and all the attention to detail that you expect from the series. Cricket Captain has been hailed as the best cricket management simulation every created, and with one of the most exciting cricket seasons for a decade in prospect, it’s about time you took control. Game-play options & features: New Interface: beautifully designed to enhance your playing experience. Improved Highlights: adding atmosphere and excitement. New Stadiums: new stadiums will be added shortly after release. Classic England vs. India scenarios: play one of the classic test series between these nations. Cup Modes: World Cup, Twenty Over Cup and Champions Cup modes. Domestic and International Modes: Captain domestic teams from the English, Australian and Indian leagues, an international team, or both. International and 'All-Time Greats' Series: Play international series with current or all-time-great players. On-Line Play: updated and improved on-line engine. Play domestic and international matches over the internet, including improved detection of edited teams. Match Engine: further refinements to the game engine, giving greater realism in all match-types. Choose the Teams You Want to Captain: twenty over, one-day, first-class (or all three) for domestic and international competitions. Complete statistical update. Statistics: Player statistics for all domestic competitions. Database: Complete player database of over 4000 players, containing every current first-class or limited-over player from around the world. Records: Updated partnership and team records for first-class, one-day and twenty-over matches. Squads: Up-to date county, state and domestic twenty over squads for the new season. Fixtures: Comprehensive domestic and international fixture lists, including updated competition formats and rules.

Name: Cricket Captain 2016
Description:
The number one cricket management game returns for 2016 with the launch of Cricket Captain 2016 .   It’s time for cricket fans from around the world to put their cricketing expertise to the test with the most in-depth Cricket Captain game ever made. Developed in association with Chris Rogers, captain of Somerset County Cricket Club and former Australian opener, Cricket Captain 2016 has more playable teams and more great features than ever before!   Cricket Captain has been hailed as the best cricket management simulation ever created and Cricket Captain 2016 takes the game to the next level – new teams, a beautiful new interface, updated 3D graphics engine and all the attention to detail that you expect from the series. Key features for 2016 include: 79 playable domestic teams across 5 domestic leagues, including 12 new teams from the New Zealand and South African domestic cricket leagues Updated One Day International (ODI) and 20 over (T20) World Cup Tournament modes. Play as any international team that played in the last two World Cups including Afghanistan, Hong Kong, Ireland, Netherlands, Oman, Scotland or the UAE.  Day/Night matches New 3D lighting system Improved One Day and T20 match engine combined with improved player form calculation for One Day and T20 Updated kits for International teams Sri Lanka and Pakistan historical scenarios New database with improved player ability ratings New and improved interface In-Game Help System New Achievements

Name: VR Batting
Description:
'VR Batting' is a virtual reality cricket simulator made for the HTC Vive. Pickup the bat, take guard and play! From smashing the ball out of the park to playing textbook cover drives, play real cricket shots all over the ground in a virtual cricket field. Features: - 360 degree freedom of stroke-play. - Face deliveries of up to 100 miles per hour and challenge your reflexes. - Variations in deliveries: Medium-Fast, Fast, Conventional Swing, Reverse Spin and Spin. - Shred the ball past the fielders and battle against their AI to score runs. - Two game modes: 5 Overs Mode and Survival Mode. - Bat right handed or left handed. - Leaderboards for highest score, survival mode and six distance, to compete against players from around the world. - Immersive look and feel enhanced with haptic and audio feedback. Upcoming features: - Game achievements - Different fielding settings

Name: Cricket 19
Description:
Earn World Glory At The Pinnacle Of Cricket! Lead your team to international glory with Cricket 19. The truly global cricket simulation from Big Ant Studios, the leading name in authentic, realistic cricket action, Cricket 19 allows you to take control of your team, from club through national level, and lead them to T20, ODI, or Test Match glory. Create your own club, stadia, sponsor logos and uniforms via Big Ant’s acclaimed Cricket Academy to recreate your local matches and dramas! Build a rookie player’s career from their junior years at club cricket. Perform well and before you know it, you’ll be leading your nation on to the field. Key features include: Deep player, stadia, logo and scenario creator. Full support for all formats of cricket - T20, ODI and Test Match. Real world AI and tactics. Dozens of teams to choose between.

## Cricket Captain 2017: Your Ultimate Cricket Management Challenge

**Cricket Captain 2017** is the premier cricket management simulation game, offering an **unrivaled challenge** for enthusiasts. This year's installment boasts the **most extensive domestic team expansion in its history**, featuring **130 playable domestic teams** across eight countries. Developed in collaboration with **Jimmy Anderson**, the game introduces exciting new twenty-over leagues in the West Indies, South Africa, Pakistan, and Bangladesh. You can also dive into **complete West Indies and Pakistan domestic leagues**, providing unparalleled depth for simulation fans.

The game elevates the series with an **expanded array of statistics**, including comprehensive ground records and international versus records. Players will experience an **updated interface**, a refined match engine, and improved player generation, all crafted with the series' signature attention to detail.

**Key features for 2017** include:

*   **New Domestic Systems:** Experience three entirely new domestic systems, expanding your managerial reach.
*   **Global 20 Over Leagues:** Compete in all major global 20-over leagues, including those from India, England, Australia, the West Indies, Pakistan, South Africa, Bangladesh, and New Zealand.
*   **Detailed Records:** Access comprehensive individual, team, and partnership records for over 130 grounds and all ten Test-playing nations across various formats.
*   **New and Updated Grounds:** Four new, meticulously modelled grounds—Cardiff, Taunton, Bristol, and Hobart—are introduced, alongside updated models for existing grounds.
*   **Historical Scenarios:** Relive iconic cricketing moments with historical scenarios from England vs. South Africa and England vs. West Indies.
*   **Revamped Database:** A new database enhances player ability and player type accuracy for more realistic gameplay.

**Expanded Domestic Play** allows you to:

*   **Immerse yourself in Pakistan domestic cricket**, managing one of 16 domestic teams and 6 franchise 20-over sides.
*   **Take control of 12 playable teams** across both domestic and franchise systems in the West Indies.
*   **Lead 8 playable 20-over teams** in Bangladesh.
*   Experience a **new 20-over league** debuting in South Africa.

The **Updated Season and Interface** brings:

*   An **updated English domestic season**, featuring 8 teams in Division 1 and reflecting Durham's points deductions.
*   A **refreshed and modern look** for the 2017 edition.
*   Updated tournament modes, including the **prestigious 2017 Champions Trophy**.
*   **New achievements** to unlock as you progress.

Name: JUST BAT (VR CRICKET)
Description:
JUST BAT is a revolutionary new VR CRICKET game that allows you to master the art of batting. An innovative new control system allows unrivalled control of shots in any style and direction. Set high scores and compete with others around the world. Features Include: - Spin and Fast Bowling - Ball Speed Control - Ball Line and Length Control - Helmet View - Feedback on Bat-Ball Collision Position - Force Feedback - Two Game Modes: 5 Over Challenge and Free Play - A Global Leader Board for the 5 Over Challenge - AI Fielders - Pick Gaps and Score Runs - Bowler Animation - Full Freedom with Shot Selection - Separate Field Settings and Bowling Configurations for Left and Right Hand Batsmen

Cricket Captain 2021 propels you into the heart of a thrilling new cricket season, offering an unparalleled management experience that encompasses the sport's most prestigious and innovative competitions. This year's installment introduces the inaugural Test Match Championship and the brand-new ODI World Championship, providing teams with a crucial pathway to qualify for the highly anticipated 2023 World Cup. Furthermore, the game embraces the evolving landscape of cricket by featuring the debut of the 100 Ball competition, a dynamic new short-format game that promises fast-paced action and strategic depth. Cricket Captain 2021 empowers you to participate in these and a multitude of other exciting tournaments and formats, allowing you to guide your chosen team to ultimate glory.

The simulation of 20 Over matches has undergone significant enhancements in Cricket Captain 2021, featuring a meticulously rebalanced match engine and an updated batting aggression bar that grants players finer control over their scoring rate. To further enhance realism, the game now incorporates increased outfield catches when batsmen adopt an aggressive approach. The previous target RPO (T.RPO) indicator has been replaced with an estimated RPO (E.RPO) system during batting, which intelligently accounts for changing bowler tactics to deliver more accurate scoring rate predictions. In 20 Over matches, the introduction of dot ball percentage in place of maidens offers a more granular insight into the bowling strengths and overall performance of your bowlers. The electrifying atmosphere of the Super Over, a thrilling one-over shootout for tied matches, now makes its highly anticipated debut in Cricket Captain.

The game also boasts a comprehensively updated English domestic system, reflecting the latest rules for competitions and overseas player regulations. Similarly, the South African domestic system has been revitalized with the inclusion of 15 new teams, expanding the strategic possibilities for managers. Cricket Captain 2021 presents a complete database update, featuring new statistics for fastest 50s and 100s across team, ground, and versus records, providing ample opportunities to break historical benchmarks. Cricket Captain continues to advance the cricket management simulation genre, offering an unprecedented array of options to steer your team towards championship success.

Key features for Cricket Captain 2021 include:

*   **World Championships:** Compete in the prestigious new ODI World Championship and the inaugural Test Match Championship.
*   **Super Over:** Experience the exhilarating tension of one-over shootouts to decide tied matches.
*   **20 Over Simulation:** Benefit from an improved engine with enhanced controls and new statistical insights.
*   **English Domestic System:** Navigate the latest competitions and overseas player rules within the updated English domestic structure.
*   **English 100 Ball Competition:** Manage updated squads as this exciting new short-format competition commences.
*   **International Team Management:** Receive and consider job offers from national teams worldwide.
*   **South Africa Domestic System:** Experience the updated South African domestic league, now featuring new formats and 15 additional teams.
*   **Fastest 50s and 100s Records:** Pursue thousands of new records for the quickest half-centuries and centuries.
*   **Improved Batting Controls:** Exercise greater control over your scoring with the new batting aggression bar.
*   **Improved Bowling Controls:** Achieve enhanced command over your bowlers, particularly in limited-overs encounters.
*   **New Kits:** Enjoy updated kits for both English domestic and international teams.
*   **Match Engine Enhancements:** A rebalanced runs and wickets engine, improved outfield catches for aggressive batsmen, E.RPO that considers bowler tactics, and a reduced caught-and-bowled chance contribute to a more realistic simulation.
*   **Internet Game:** Experience improved reliability and enhanced cheat detection for online play.
*   **ATGs Online:** Engage in online friendlies featuring All-Time Great teams.
*   **Historical Scenarios:** Relive classic England Test series against India or New Zealand.
*   **Tournament Modes:** Participate in standalone One Day or 20 Over World Cups, and create your own World XIs, All-Time Greats, and Custom Match Series.
*   **Improved Availability Indicator in Contracts:** Gain clearer insights into player availability for domestic team contracts, including participation in 100-ball and 20 over competitions.

The comprehensive stats update for Cricket Captain 2021 encompasses:

*   An updated player database featuring over 7,000 players.
*   Updated versus, ground, and team records.
*   Updated domestic squads for all 150 playable domestic teams.
*   Updated recent series statistics for all players.
*   The new dot ball percentage metric replaces maidens for 20 over statistics, offering a more detailed analysis of bowling performance.

**Ashes Cricket: Experience the Iconic Rivalry**

**Ashes Cricket** is the officially licensed video game that captures the intensity of cricket's most celebrated rivalry. This game delivers the **fast-paced action, powerful hits, and skillful play** that define this legendary competition. Experience the Ashes like never before, with a level of realism and authenticity that puts you right in the heart of the action. Lead your team to glory in the **men's and women's 2017/2018 Ashes tours**.

Leveraging Big Ant's groundbreaking **photogrammetry technology**, Ashes Cricket features **photorealistic likenesses** of all the Australian and English men's and women's teams. You'll feel as though you're actually present at the live matches. Key Test players have been **fully motion-captured**, and you can personalize your gameplay by choosing your own **batting or bowling style**. Big Ant's most advanced cricket engine to date enables **true 360-degree batting**, ensuring that no two players will experience the game identically.

This is the most **in-depth and realistic cricket game** available, offering a range of features:

*   **Deep Career Mode:** Begin as a junior player, hone your skills in club cricket, and work your way up to international level, or step directly into the shoes of a star player.
*   **Complete Customization:** The **Cricket Academy** allows you to create your own players, teams, and even umpires. Share your creations with the online community.
*   **Official Stadiums:** Play in all the **officially licensed stadiums** that hosted the 2017/18 Ashes tour.
*   **Create Your Dream Competition:** Design your own **stadiums and logos** to personalize your gaming experience and make it truly your own.
*   **Online Play:** Compete against players worldwide in what is the **most competitive online cricket game** yet.

Cricket Revolution offers a unique multiplayer cricket sports action experience for PC. This game stands out with its innovative gameplay, diverse game modes, and challenging AI. Prepare for global competition and aim for the top of the online leaderboards.

Key features of Cricket Revolution include:

*   **Authentic Batting Gameplay:** Command shot selection and placement with intuitive, action-oriented controls. Player abilities, level, and status, combined with motion-captured shots, create a powerful batting experience.
*   **Awards and Achievements:** Every significant accomplishment is recognized. From legendary performances and match-winning innings to hat tricks and undefeated streaks, Cricket Revolution offers a comprehensive list of awards.
*   **Comprehensive Statistics Tracking:** Every wicket, century, and run is recorded and analyzed. Review past scorecards, track your batting history, monitor your average, and count your wickets to climb the leaderboards.
*   **Master the 'Bowling Gadget':** Control speed, turn, swing, seam movement, and special deliveries with precision. This system allows bowlers to focus on strategy and mind games with batsmen.
*   **Revolution Servers:** Compete globally with friends and rivals on the Revolution Online leaderboards. The game features a complete in-game community network, including chat rooms, friend lists, tournaments, rankings, and leaderboards.

Name: OMORI
Description:
Explore a strange world full of colorful friends and foes. Navigate through the vibrant and the mundane in order to uncover a forgotten past. When the time comes, the path you’ve chosen will determine your fate... and perhaps the fate of others as well.

Rakuen is a heartwarming adventure game centered on a young boy confined to a hospital. He dreams of visiting the magical world from his favorite storybook to ask the Guardian of the Forest for a special wish. To earn this wish, the Boy must help his fellow hospital patients. He does this by interacting with their fantasy world counterparts and completing challenges.

These challenges involve:

*   **A grumpy old man:** He fiercely protects a broken music box, lamenting his lack of visitors.
*   **A comatose young woman:** Her devoted husband stays by her side constantly.
*   **A little girl:** She grieves for a friend she couldn't say goodbye to before falling ill.

The Boy soon discovers that his neighbors' struggles and secrets are strangely connected to the mysterious hospital.

**Key Features:**

*   **Rich Narrative:** Experience a touching story filled with memorable characters.
*   **Unique Gameplay:** This non-combat adventure blends whimsical dungeons, challenging room escape puzzles, and dialogue-driven mysteries.
*   **Empathy and Connection:** Step into each character's life to understand their unfinished business and help them find peace.
*   **Original Soundtrack:** Enjoy an original score with multiple vocal songs, each linked to a specific character.
*   **Community Building:** Collect items and forge friendships to transform the hospital into a more welcoming place.
*   **Fantasy Quests:** Embark on humorous adventures with peculiar creatures in the fantasy realm.

Name: Jimmy and the Pulsating Mass
Description:
Jimmy and the Pulsating Mass is a Japanese-style RPG made by a guy from Texas. It was very much influenced by SNES-era jRPGs, particularly Earthbound , Final Fantasy 5 , and the Breath of Fire series, among others. It was also heavily influenced by Yume Nikki . The game takes place in the dream of an eight-year-old boy. When an alien entity appears and threatens his family and the stability of the dream world itself, Jimmy sets out on an adventure to save his family and eradicate the threat of the Pulsating Mass. Along the way, Jimmy will have to work with his family, confront his own shortcomings, and brave the creeping nightmares of his subconscious. Features: -Full-length Japanese-style RPG. -Classic turn-based combat with some modern sensibilities. -A big emphasis on exploration. -As an empathetic kid, Jimmy gains the ability to imagine himself as several of the monsters he meets, allowing him to interact with the world in new ways. -These different transformations can also be leveled up, granting Jimmy higher stats and new abilities. -A story for adults delivered from the perspective of a child. -Jokes. -Unspeakable horrors. Note: for some versions of Mac, the game may not be able to save if you've placed the game in the root '/Applications' folder. Instead, put it somewhere in your home folder, such as '~/Documents.'​​

**To the Moon: Fulfilling Lifelong Dreams Through Memory**

Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts offer a unique service: a chance to relive your life from the beginning, entirely within your mind. This profound procedure is for those on their deathbeds, allowing them to fulfill lifelong dreams they never had the chance to realize. The constructed life becomes their final memory, making it a deeply personal experience.

This story follows the doctors as they help an elderly man named Johnny fulfill his dying wish. They journey through his past in reverse, uncovering fragments of his life and piecing together the reasons behind his ultimate desire. Johnny's poignant wish is to **go to the moon**.

"To the Moon" is a story-driven adventure that prioritizes emotion and thought over combat. It blends adventure game mechanics with classic RPG aesthetics for a distinctive playstyle. The acclaimed original soundtrack enhances the emotional journey, and the experience is expertly crafted with no filler, ensuring a focused and impactful narrative.

Name: Finding Paradise
Description:
Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts have peculiar jobs: They give people another chance to live, all the way from the very beginning... but only in their patients' heads. Due to the severity of the operation, the new life becomes the last thing the patients remember before drawing their last breath. Thus, the operation is only done to people on their deathbeds, to fulfill what they wish they had done with their lives, but didn’t. Finding Paradise is the 2nd full episode of To the Moon 's series. It follows the life of the doctors' new patient, Colin, as they attempt to unravel a life that is split down the middle, and fulfill a wish that appears to be self-contradictory by nature. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *Like To the Moon , this is a standalone full game that does not require having played any previous games in the series.

Name: Impostor Factory
Description:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Impostor Factory is a narrative-driven adventure game that is categorically out of its mind. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Dr. Watts and Dr. Rosalene have peculiar jobs: They give people another chance to live their lives, all the way from the very beginning. But this isn't their story. Probably. Instead, it's about Quincy . Let me tell you a story about him. One day, Quincy was invited to a fancy parteh at a suspiciously secluded mansion. So, he accepted and went; because even though the mansion was suspicious and secluded, it was also fancy and had a parteh. In fact, it turned out to be so fancy that there was a time machine in its bathroom. Quincy could wash his hands and time-travel while he was at it. Talk about a time-saver! But of course, then people start dying, because that's what they do. And somewhere along the way, things get a little Lovecraftian and tentacles are involved. Anyway, that's around 1/3 of what the game is really about. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Key Features A story that will make you curse at the screen A cozy mix between adventure game elements and classic RPG aesthetics Dialogues that read so wrong but feel so right An espresso execution with zero filler and no time drains long cat ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- F.A.Q.: Q: Is playing To the Moon & Finding Paradise necessary before playing this game? A: Impostor Factory can be played independently, just like the games before it. Q: Is Impostor Factory the sequel to To the Moon & Finding Paradise ? A: Maybe not. Maybe it's a sequel. Maybe it's a prequel. Maybe it's both. But again, there is no prerequisite to playing Impostor Factory.

Name: OneShot
Description:
www.oneshot-game.com A surreal puzzle adventure game with unique mechanics / capabilitie s . You are t o guide a child through a mysterious world on a mission to restore its l ong-dead sun. ...Of cour s e, things are never tha t simple. The world knows you ex i st. The c onsequences are real. Saving the world may b e impossible. You only have one shot. FEATURES Gameplay mechanics that go beyond the game window. A haunting original soundtrack and artwork designed to match. A unique relationship between a game and its player. A lingering feeling that you're not getting the full story unless you know where to look. CONTENT WARNING Although OneShot is not a horror game in the traditional sense, parts of the game may induce some paranoia. Please proceed with caution. CLOSING THE GAME WINDOW Do not worry, it is safe to do so. It only saves your progress.

Name: The Chronicles of Nyanya
Description:
Thrilling like a payday, a story of cats in funny costumes that do RPGish things. It is full of many unexpected and incredible twists, the tragedies of an individual lured into the trap of an adventourist internship, and friendly pastry, which is very sensitive to nihilism. The game also contains many thrilling conversations, walking around the map with some logical puzzles sprinkled in here and there – but don’t worry, even a liberal arts student should be able to solve them – raising pastry, and deliberations about important moral and existential issues, the majority of which will affect the ending you get. The ending will sum up the fates of the most important characters, in-game achievements, your proficiency in fighting the ultimate bad guy, your finesse in raising pastry and the degree of faith in friendship. This results in dozens of possible ending combinations. After completing the game, you can try NewGame+ to unlock additional, normally unavailable skills for the main character. The world of Nyanya Nyanya is an enormous cat world that can take up to 20 hours to fully explore. The main plotline itself is good for more than 8 hours of fun, but the game also includes many side quests found on numerous maps, hundreds of interactions with NPCs and over a thousand descriptions of nearly everything. You can also find dozens of exciting items such as the legendary Excalipurr and the frightening Berserker Catnip. The role of the majority of animals is played by various kinds of rolls, which, together with cats, pidgins, and sneks, constitute the entirety of Nyanya’s fauna. Kibble is found in mines and on can triis, almost all buildings are boxes (because cardboard boxes are cats’ natural habitat) and cleaning fur is a matter of importance to the state. The sense and logic of this world are therefore highly debatable... But don’t worry about its coherence. We made sure that it is top-notch. All this mess is watched over by cat gods, such as the mysterious Great Bowl of Goodness – a giant stone leg, whose calf disappears in the clouds, Meowrida the Brave – goddess of shooting, and Overcat – the creator of everything that's feline. The game is produced in a retro jRPG style. Party The protagonist of the game is Catair, a meowsassin, who is as optimistic and sweet as sandpaper. When she sets out on her amazing journey, she has the chance to discover friendship, love, and revenge and to travel through many wonderful lands that she does not want to visit... And yet, she has no choice. She will join the party led by the veteran of the war in Furajevo – Francat the clericat. Their adventourist paths will cross with Purrgli, a yes-cat and an outstanding purrior, Catniss – a fighter for friendship and even more friendship, as well as meowmage Meowdledore, whose parents bought him gifts instead of giving him some attention. You can meet them here . Combat The game features tons of epic turn-based jRPG fights, where you will have an opportunity to use dozens of such unique cat techniques as Boot to the Head, Slipper Comet or a Hairball of Darkness. The characters represent traditional classes such as meowsassin, meowmage and purrior. With their powers combined, they are able to face adversities such as student internships and unpaid overtime. Among the dozens of opponents, you will find monstrosities such as orcats, aggressive cat fetuses enchanted in slime, or Purrevar, Prince of the Underpurr. What is more, The Chronicles of Nyanya is probably the only game in which you can charge Nazi furniture on your rollicorn or fight their mysterious Wundermöbelwaffe. Parody and pop culture The game is filled with familiar-sounding places and names. If you love comic books, memes or just pop culture in general, you will feel right at home in Nyanya. You will meet Cateris, talk with Granny Weathercat, Furry Catter and Nyoda and listen to the moving stories of Catmerian guards, who always wanted to be adventourists like you, but they took an arrow to their knees. In other games, references are Easter eggs, in Nyanya they are the main course. Creators The game was created by hamstercube studio, made up of Ilona, author of chatolandia and Adrian. The graphics were created mainly by Revv, known from her Tak bardzo źle blog; Ilona also had something to do with it. The moving music, which tickles your aesthetic sense was composed by Marcin Maślanka, an experienced composer of soundtracks for games and films.

Name: Echoes of Aetheria
Description:
From the creators of the hit game, Skyborn , comes their latest RPG epic: Echoes of Aetheria . Echoes of Aetheria has a humble, perhaps even classic, beginning. A wedding interrupted, a bride kidnapped; our heroes give chase. Though their motives are different, they soon find themselves thrown together as their simple quest to recover the bride spirals into an epic saga of war, love, and betrayal. Treason, defection, rebellion, and even the creation of a new nation are all parts in which you’ll have a role to play. As you progress further, the scope of the story will grow with your heroes. By the end, you’ll have to weigh your decisions and their consequences against the fate of entire nations. FEATURES Characters Make the Story – Echoes of Aetheria is more than just a story; it’s a tale about people. Every character has fully fleshed out dreams, goals, motivations, and flaws. These characters exist in a world with its own legends, intrigue, and drama. In turn, this sets the stage for our story, which begins as a whimsical light-hearted adventure and ends as an epic campaign of unprecedented size and scope. There's No Place Like Home – As you travel around the world, you’ll always have a home base to return to. This home is more than just a place to hang your hat; it’s the hub on which the wheel of the story spins. Shop, craft, and converse with members of your party to progress story elements. Participate in the Battle Arena combat challenges for fun, loot, and xp! Explore Like Magellan – Finding loot from exploration is only one reward; you gain experience from these hidden caches as well. Take the time to explore the world and be rewarded in full! Get Busy Crafting – THOUSANDS of items can be crafted, salvaged, or augmented. A fully integrated crafting system lets you create, purchase, or sell the materials you need. Those who fully explore the system will be rewarded in combat! Random Encounters? Not Here! – Enemies all have their own map AI. Will you brute force through encounters or stealthily sneak by to save resources? You can sneak up behind an enemy to gain the advantage of surprise. But be wary, because they can also sneak up on you! A New Battle System – Tired of JRPGs that still rely on outdated RPG mechanics? Echoes of Aetheria features a new 15 tile combat system using both sides of the battlefield. Character position and formations are just as important as the skills and spells you’ll use. Sweeping Orchestral Sound – Our epic soundtrack will keep you enjoying every last note.

**Actual Sunlight: A Haunting Indie Game Experience**

Actual Sunlight is a critically acclaimed indie game that plunges players into the bleak reality of Evan Winter, a lonely, depressed young professional. The game directly confronts the question: "Why keep getting up, day in and day out, even though your life is going nowhere?"

This text-based adventure is renowned for its sharp observations and dark humor. It offers a deeply affecting narrative that begins provocatively and concludes with a shattering impact. Actual Sunlight is an unforgettable journey, promising one of the most challenging, haunting, and beautiful experiences you'll have as a gamer.

**Key Features:**

*   **Heartbreaking Story:** Explores themes of video game addiction, unfulfilling work, and profound solitude.
*   **Evocative Artwork:** Features original pixel and CG art that brings the streets, offices, and sanctuaries of Toronto, Canada, to life.
*   **Moody Soundtrack:** Original music perfectly complements the game's tone, reflecting the brutal indifference of real life.

**Important Notice:**

Actual Sunlight contains explicit language and deals with extremely mature themes, including depression and suicidal thoughts. It is not suitable for players under 18.

Like other powerful artistic works that address these issues, Actual Sunlight can be an intensely emotional experience. Before downloading, please consider your potential reaction to similar books, films, or music.

For the latest updates on the game, follow Will O'Neill on Twitter.

Football Manager 2019 (FM19) lets you become a football manager. You build your team's story. Every choice you make affects your team's future. While players score goals, your strategy makes it happen. FM19 offers new features and better gameplay. This lets you manage your squad in fresh, realistic ways. It creates a dynamic story as you play.

### Key FM19 Features

**Tactics Module Revamped**
Develop unique team tactics. New styles and phases reflect modern football trends. You can also use pre-made tactical presets for quick strategies.

**Training Overhaul**
Control player development closely. Create custom training sessions and schedules. These mimic professional preparation. You can also let your staff handle training.

**New Manager Induction**
A new guide helps new managers grow. Your Assistant Manager teaches you football management basics. This sets you on the path to success.

**Welcome to the Bundesliga**
For the first time, manage in Germany's top two leagues. The Bundesliga and 2. Bundesliga are fully licensed. They feature official crests, kits, and player likenesses.

**Freshened User Interface**
FM19 has a modern, restyled look. It's the most visually appealing and easy-to-use version yet.

### Other Improvements

FM19 also includes major match enhancements. These include VAR and goal-line technology. You'll get better agent feedback during transfers. Manager environments are more dynamic. Pre-match briefings are more detailed. There are also general UI refinements and new Steam achievements.

Rocket League stands out as a truly unique sports game, masterfully blending the fast-paced excitement of arcade-style soccer with thrilling vehicular action, creating an experience that is both easy to pick up and incredibly deep for competitive play. The game's intuitive controls and its reliance on physics-driven gameplay contribute to a remarkably fluid and engaging competitive environment that has captivated millions of players worldwide.

The game offers a diverse array of modes to suit every playstyle, from the thrill of **online matches** that encompass both casual and highly competitive playlists, to the immersive **Season Mode** providing a complete offline experience. For those seeking a change of pace, **Extra Modes** offer unique twists inspired by sports like hockey and basketball, while the innovative **Mutators** feature allows players to completely customize game rules, opening up a universe of unique and often hilarious challenges.

Beyond its core gameplay, Rocket League boasts an astonishing level of cosmetic customization, presenting players with over **500 trillion possible combinations** for their vehicles, ensuring that no two cars are ever quite the same. This depth of content and engaging gameplay has earned the game widespread critical acclaim, evidenced by its impressive haul of over **150 "Game of the Year" awards and nominations**, firmly cementing its status as one of the most celebrated sports titles in gaming history. With a thriving player community that has surpassed **57 million**, Rocket League remains a dynamic and evolving experience, consistently receiving substantial updates that introduce new **DLCs, content packs, features, modes, and arenas**.

Recent updates have further enhanced the player experience, notably with the introduction of **Rocket Pass**, which offers a premium option providing an immediate **50% XP bonus** and the opportunity to unlock up to **70 unique rewards**, including a brand-new Battle-Car, a spectacular Goal Explosion, and valuable Keys. Complementing this is the **Challenge System**, allowing players to complete **Weekly Challenges** within Online Matches to earn exclusive Rocket Pass rewards. Furthermore, the **Esports Shop** provides a direct way for fans to support their favorite Rocket League Esports teams, with a pilot program currently featuring Decals, Wheels, and Player Banners representing top professional organizations.

In line with technological advancements, Rocket League has undergone significant platform support changes. As the game evolves to incorporate new technologies such as **DirectX 11** and a **64-bit client**, support for **macOS and Linux (SteamOS)** has unfortunately been discontinued. The final patch for these platforms was released on **March 10, 2020**, which disabled online features like Casual and Competitive Playlists for affected users. While offline modes, including Local Matches and splitscreen play, remain accessible, players on SteamOS and macOS should be aware that the game may encounter bugs and stability issues not present in the Windows version, and these are unlikely to be addressed in future updates.

Additionally, due to agreements with its online service provider, Rocket League's online multiplayer functionality is subject to regional restrictions. Players located in **China, Crimea, Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Sudan, and Syria** are unable to connect to the game's online services. The developers apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. All software and online features are governed by the game's license, terms of use, and privacy policy, which are readily available for review at rocketleague.com/eula, rocketleague.com/tou, and rocketleague.com/privacy.

Name: Football Manager 2020
Description:
Run your football club, your way. Every decision counts in Football Manager 2020 with new features and polished game mechanics rewarding planning and progression like never before, empowering managers to develop and refine both your club’s and your own unique identity. Walk down the tunnel to a living, breathing football world with you at the very heart of it. Around here, your opinion matters! This is a world that rewards planning and knowledge but, unlike other games, there’s no pre-defined ending or script to follow – just endless possibilities and opportunities. Every club has a story to tell and it’s down to you to create it. They say football is a game of dreams. Well, managers are a special breed of dreamers. They don’t see problems, only opportunities: the chance to prove themselves against the best in the world, to develop and instil a new footballing philosophy, to nurture talent through the ranks, to lift the club to greater heights and end the wait for silverware. How you get to the top is up to you… you’ll own your decisions, and the consequences they bring… Base yourself in 50 of the biggest footballing countries worldwide Oversee a new era of success at one of 2,500 clubs at every level Sign the best and mould the future – scout more than 500,000 real players and staff Create your tactical vision and bring it to life on the training pitch Kick every ball with our most immersive and smartest match engine to date DEVELOPMENT CENTRE Take full control of your youth team operations in a new all-encompassing hub. Nurture your young stars from the moment they arrive at your club and through the youth ranks until they’re ready for first-team action. CLUB VISION Develop a culture, work with the board to achieve ongoing objectives and plot a course for your club to progress in seasons to come. Club vision goes far beyond the boardroom; impacting on transfers, playing style and competition expectations as you look to strengthen your club’s identity and meet the multi-year milestones. PLAYING TIME PATHWAY A whole new way to define a player’s standing in your squad. Build in current and future playing time across the length of a contract, defining a clear pathway from Fringe Player to Star Player and everything in between. BACKROOM STAFF New roles, advice and interaction make your staff more involved and important than ever. More collaboration across more areas brings the game closer to the structure of a real-life backroom team. GRAPHIC IMPROVEMENTS Redesigned player and manager models, improved lighting and overhauled pitch visuals combine to create the most realistic and best-looking match experience to date.

## PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER 2018: FC Barcelona Edition Bundle

This special edition of PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER 2018 is designed for FC Barcelona and PES fans. It includes exclusive content for myClub, tailored to the club.

### Exclusive FC Barcelona Content

The FC Barcelona Edition Bundle comes with:

*   1x FCB Special Agent
*   1x FCB Legend Special Agent

### Bonus myClub Content

In addition to the FC Barcelona items, you'll receive:

*   1,000 myClub coins
*   4x Start Up Agents
*   1x Partner Club Agent
*   10,000 GP (for 10 weeks)

### New Features in PES 2018

PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER 2018 introduces several exciting new features:

#### Enhanced Gameplay

Experience a "Gameplay Masterclass" with:

*   **Strategic Dribbling:** More control and precision.
*   **Real Touch+:** Realistic ball control.
*   **New Set Pieces:** Improved free kicks and corners.

#### Presentation Overhaul

The game features:

*   **New Menus:** A fresh and intuitive interface.
*   **Real Player Images:** Authentic player likenesses.

#### PES League Integration

Compete in new modes within PES League, including:

*   **myClub:** Test your skills against others.

#### Online Co-op Mode

A new mode dedicated to playing with friends.

#### Random Selection Match

This fan-favorite mode returns with:

*   New presentation.
*   Updated features.

#### Master League Upgrade

The Master League has been enhanced with:

*   New pre-season tournaments.
*   An improved transfer system.
*   Updated presentations and functionality.

#### Enhanced Visual Reality

Enjoy a more lifelike experience with:

*   New lighting effects.
*   Reworked player models and animations.
*   Detailed facial expressions and body movements.

Name: PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER 2019
Description:
Also get these bonus PES 2019 myClub items below: Standard Edition • David Beckham 2018 - 10 match loan • Philippe Coutinho - 10 match loan • Premium Agent (3 Players) x 10 weeks • 3 Player Contracts x 10 weeks David Beckham Edition • David Beckham 2018 • Philippe Coutinho 10 match loan • Premium Agent (3 Players) x 20 weeks • 3 Player Contracts x 20 weeks Legend Edition • PES Legend Player • David Beckham 2018 • Philippe Coutinho 10 match loan • Premium Agent (3 Players) x 30 weeks • 3 Player Contracts x 30 weeks PES 2019 new features: •• AUTHENTIC LEAGUES – Huge addition of licensed leagues • MAGIC MOMENTS – Player individuality has been taken to the next level with 11 new skill traits. Score great goals with improved shooting motion & animation, and see stamina have an impact with Visible Fatigue • NEW MYCLUB - Every element has been redone, from how you sign players, to special versions of players released throughout the year • THE BEAUTIFUL GAME – Experience photo-realism with stunning animation flow, supporting 4K HDR • ML REAL SEASON – Experience life as a real manager with 3 significant changes: ICC pre-season, in-depth transfer system and new league licenses The Legend Edition includes a special 3D scanned version of David Beckham from 2018, and PES Legend Player for myClub!

Name: Altitude
Description:
Blast your way across the cartoon skies in this fast-paced game of aerial combat. Nimbly Games has crafted an instantly accessible, rewardingly deep, and ravishingly fun multiplayer action game. The sirens have sounded, bogies are coming in hot… Jump into the fast and agile Loopy and drop your enemies from the sky with a tactical EMP blast - but hit your afterburners before your Biplane support tears them to pieces with 20mm cannons blazing! Barrel roll through the enemy minefield and arm your nuke as you enter the drop zone. There it is - the enemy base - but two Mirandas just warped in with lasers hot and an Explodet is lumbering into position over their hangar decks — will you carry your team to victory? Multiplayer Done Right: Altitude combines Call-of-Duty style perks with the gameplay variety of Team Fortress 2 in a fresh multiplayer experience. Carefully refined controls, netcode, and balance make for hundreds of hours of deep, rewarding gameplay. Seven Engaging Game Modes: Plane Ball's constant action makes it a favorite among new and casual players while team-based tactical maneuvers like passing and blocking provide a fun challenge for veterans. Team Base Destruction offers an intense, competitive experience where coordinated pushes and strategic loadout decisions turn the tide. Try a friendly pickup game or join a clan and play in the 'Altitude ProLeague' - a competitive tournament scene run by hardcore gamers from the Starcraft and Counter-Strike communities. For the ultimate test of dogfighting skills try 1-life Deathmatch or compete in Demolition for a more tactical, objective-based experience. Or enjoy classic game modes like Free For All and Team Deathmatch.

Name: NBA 2K19
Description:
TAKE CONTROL WITH TAKEOVER Harness your MyPLAYER’s full basketball potential with the new Takeover feature. Unlock special moves and abilities never before seen on the court, or activate Team Takeover and unleash the power of your full squad. RUN THE NEIGHBORHOOD (ONLINE SERVICE DISCONTINUED FOR NBA 2K19) You won’t want to miss a single day in the updated Neighborhood. Make a name for yourself on the court, at the Under Armour Cages, and during live events on the block. Ball until dawn with new day to night transitions, walk on at the Jordan Rec Center, or get the old Crew back together for exciting 3 on 3 streetball action. MyTEAM (ONLINE SERVICE DISCONTINUED FOR NBA 2K19) Create your very first MyPLAYER card, and ball with LeBron, Kobe, and the rest of your collection in a variety of competitive modes. Introducing the new Unlimited mode, allowing you to pick any five cards from your deck without restrictions and battle against other players online. MyCAREER From neighborhood legend to global phenomenon. The original career story mode returns with an all-new, immersive narrative charting your journey from China to the G League and eventually the NBA. Featuring an all-star cast, endorsements tied to your popularity, and new team chemistry elements that allow you to dominate the hardwood

**Captain Tsubasa: Rise of New Champions: An Arcade Football Experience**

Captain Tsubasa: Rise of New Champions injects arcade-style excitement into the football genre. This game offers exhilarating action and over-the-top shots, setting it apart from typical football simulations.

Key features include:

*   **Build Your Dream Eleven:** Create custom characters with unique skills and abilities. Assemble your ultimate team for both offline and online play.
*   **4-Player Versus:** Determine who reigns supreme among your friends with offline matches supporting up to four players.
*   **Online Competition:** Engage in various online modes to earn trophies and valuable rewards.
*   **Two Story Modes:** Relive the events of the anime or immerse yourself directly in the world of Captain Tsubasa.

## Football Drama: A Unique Football Management Experience

Step into the shoes of Rocco Galliano, the new manager of Calchester Assembled Football Club. After a seven-year hiatus from coaching, your career gets a second chance thanks to billionaire president Boris Aluminovitch. Calchester FC's poor performance has led to the dismissal of the previous manager, and you're now tasked with turning the team's fate around.

### Your Choices Shape the Game

Will your passionate shouts from the sidelines inspire the team? Can you find wisdom and karmic leadership through the ancient "Book of Changes"? Or will your past actions catch up to you? Surviving a full season will be a challenge. Corruption, crime, drugs, and romance are all potential paths you might encounter, with consequences for better or worse.

In Football Drama, you can lose the championship but still win the game. This unique football experience offers:

*   **Interactive Narrative:** Make meaningful choices that impact the game's direction.
*   **Karma or Chaos:** Your life and game decisions influence the outcome.
*   **Turn-Based Matches:** Experience matches with live-action animations.
*   **Procedural Championship:** Navigate 18 dramatic weeks where you can be fired at any time.
*   **Deck-Building Mechanics:** Your life choices and game results determine your card deck.
*   **Ridiculous Cards:** Encounter humorous cards reflecting the absurdities of modern football.
*   **Illustrated Match Log:** Review each of your matches with detailed illustrations.
*   **Silly Commentator:** Enjoy a humorous main commentator and his colorful sidekick.
*   **High Replayability:** Each championship is unique, leading to multiple different endings.
*   **Stunning Art:** Features a beautifully designed user interface by Pino Panzarella and illustrated cards and characters by Daniele Giardini ('Demigiant').

### The Inspiration Behind Football Drama

The creation of Football Drama was inspired by the rich literary tradition surrounding football. Authors and poets like Pasolini, Galeano, Soriano, Hornby, Saba, Handke, and Wenders have explored the evocative and poetic power of the sport. Films such as "The Lost World Cup" and Wenders' "The Goalie's Anxiety at the Penalty Kick" also served as inspirations. Additionally, Adam Hurrey's book "Football Clichés" fueled the question: why is football so beloved? This led to the development of a unique game designed to leverage games as a powerful medium for storytelling.

### A Passionate, Small Team

Football Drama is the product of a small, passionate team of three. We are self-funded, working on customer projects in parallel. This is not a blockbuster game with hundreds of hours of content. We understand there might be a price difference between Steam and mobile versions. We believe the Steam price is the most accurate reflection of the game's value, but market forces have influenced our pricing strategy. The Steam version offers additional content, including more in-depth information, integrated achievements, and full-screen illustrations.

Name: Behold the Kickmen
Description:
BEHOLD THE KICKMEN started as a silly Twitter joke, and evolved like a beautiful flower into the year's least-exciting and mostly-incorrect Football Simulation. It's football, as seen through the eyes of someone with no understanding of, or interest in, the Laws of Football. Start at the bottom of the Big Boring British Football Spreadsheet system and grind your way up, gruelling match after gruelling match, to become the best at the football that anyone's ever seen, and win the World Cup for your mantelpiece. FEATURES: Kicking, Passing, Tackling, Squad Management and Doing Goals over and over. There's even a full Story mode, crammed with overblown melodrama and inane decisions to be made. TWO WAYS TO PLAY! Hate football? No problem! The entire game can be re-skinned at the flip of a switch into a Dystopian Future Bloodsport! PLEASE NOTE: Kickmen has NO ONLINE MULTIPLAYER and NO LOCAL MULTIPLAYER, it's Single Player ONLY. Please don't buy it thinking it's at all sociable, because it isn't. Why, you ask? Because I wanted to make a Single Player game, I didn't want to make a Multiplayer game.

**BattleBlock Theater®: A Hilarious and Treacherous Journey of Feline Domination**

Get ready for **BattleBlock Theater®**, a game where you're shipwrecked and forced to perform for insatiable cats. This bizarre tale of treachery plunges you into a quest to rescue over 300 companions. You'll face evil, technologically advanced felines in a truly unique and engaging gameplay experience.

Navigate the treacherous landscape with an impressive arsenal of weapon-tools. Conquer hundreds of meticulously crafted levels. Unravel the perplexing truth behind this bizarre theatrical enterprise. For collaborative fun, the game offers robust online multiplayer and local co-op. Embark on a quest with a friend or dive into competitive arenas. An integrated level editor lets you design your own challenging trials.

**Key Features of BattleBlock Theater®:**

*   **Co-Optional Gameplay:** Play Story mode with up to two players. Team up with up to four players in Arena modes. You can choose to work together or against each other. Experience online play and couch co-op.
*   **Dynamic Arenas:** BattleBlock Theater boasts eight distinct arena modes. These modes are designed to instill stage fright in your adversaries.
*   **Insane Mode Challenge:** Test your gaming prowess in the ultimate campaign challenge. You'll face a single life to live, mirroring high-stakes stage performances.
*   **Unique Animations:** The Steam version features exclusive new artwork. This includes the memorable introduction of the cat guard.
*   **Vast Level Selection:** With over 450 levels across all modes, BattleBlock Theater offers staggering content.
*   **Rescue Over 300 Prisoners:** Captured by felines, you must liberate your friends. Earn gems in deadly plays to secure their freedom.
*   **Theatrical Weaponry and Combat:** Master jumping, pushing, pulling, and punching. Use unconventional methods like exploding, freezing, poisoning, or digesting foes. Equip and swap between two weapons for strategic combat.
*   **Create and Share Levels:** Use the intuitive Level Editor to construct your own masterpieces. Use over 20 interactive block types. Share your creations with friends and the community.

Prepare for a chaotic arcade-simulation experience with Russian Subway Dogs, a game inspired by the remarkable resilience of stray dogs navigating Moscow's intricate subway system. This unique title, developed by the creators of They Bleed Pixels, plunges you into the gritty reality of scavenging for sustenance amidst the bustling crowds of Russian commuters. Your survival hinges on your ability to skillfully evade a host of unpredictable hazards, including volatile vodka bottles, aggressive rival dogs, and the surprisingly formidable Subway Bear.

Russian Subway Dogs offers a wealth of engaging gameplay through its distinct modes:

*   **Campaign Mode:** Embark on a journey through dozens of meticulously crafted levels, facing over 100 unique challenges orchestrated by your demanding boss, The Proletaricat. These missions will test your ingenuity, presenting scenarios such as maintaining a vegetarian diet while simultaneously protecting a bear, or preventing pigeons from engaging in cannibalism. Successfully completing these trials will ultimately lead you to the game's secret final station.
*   **Endless Mode:** For those seeking a competitive edge, Endless Mode provides a highly replayable experience. Compete for top spots on the online leaderboards, where a dynamic score-driven difficulty algorithm ensures that each playthrough presents a fresh and escalating challenge. This mode is further enhanced by random mini-challenges from The Proletaricat and their mischievous Kittens, keeping you on your toes.

The game boasts visually stunning, detailed pixel art that faithfully recreates the ornate grandeur of Moscow's world-famous subway stations. Beyond the core gameplay, Russian Subway Dogs features a rich tapestry of simulated systems that players can discover and exploit to their advantage. These systems allow for a high degree of player freedom in how they achieve their objectives and interact with the game's environment and inhabitants.

Discover emergent strategies such as:

*   **Culinary Exploitation:** Will you risk consuming the tempting but toxic chocolate for a significant point boost, or perhaps use it to sabotage a rival dog's meal?
*   **Power-Up Potions:** Consider drinking hot sauce to unleash powerful fire barks, or strategically feed it to a pigeon to gain aerial support in the form of fiery droppings.

The game also allows you to play as a diverse cast of unlockable characters, including beloved animals from other indie games and comics. Among the special guests are:

*   Question Hound from KC Green's Gunshow
*   Fidel from Fidel Dungeon Rescue
*   Nacho & Rad Shiba from VA-11 HALL-A
*   Ratcoon from Ruin of the Reckless
*   Uay Chivo from Guacamelee!
*   Nidhogg from Nidhogg 2
*   Clawed Kitty, inspired by They Bleed Pixels

Russian Subway Dogs is designed to be accessible, with simple controls that even a novice can grasp, yet it offers a depth of challenge that will satisfy seasoned players. Core mechanics involve running and jumping along subway platforms, barking at commuters to startle them into dropping food, and strategically bouncing vodka bottles around the stage. As you progress, you'll uncover advanced tactics, including the ability to cook and consume rival wildlife, often amplified by explosive vodka interactions. Ultimately, the game empowers you to utilize your acquired knowledge and unique abilities to fill your canine stomach and create as much delightful pandemonium as possible.

Complementing the engaging gameplay is an original soundtrack by Peter Chapman, also known as COINS, whose previous work includes acclaimed titles like Guacamelee!, LittleBigPlanet Karting, and Modnation Racers. This soundtrack masterfully blends Slavic sounds and Baltic beats with electronic dance music, creating an immersive auditory experience that perfectly complements the game's chaotic charm. Whether you're a devoted dog person or lean more towards feline companionship, Russian Subway Dogs offers an engaging and entertaining experience for all.

## Sakuna: Of Rice and Ruin: A Goddess's Journey of Cultivation and Combat

Spoiled harvest goddess Sakuna is banished from her celestial home to an island teeming with demons. In this wild land, she must embrace her destiny as the daughter of a warrior god and harvest goddess. Sakuna will face the elements, battle monsters, and cultivate rice, the very source of her power.

### Companions on Hinoe Island

By Sakuna's side is her guardian, Tama, and a group of outcast humans. Together, these unlikely companions must tame both the land and the demons of Hinoe Island. Developed by Edelweiss, the indie team behind Astebreed, Sakuna: Of Rice and Ruin blends side-scrolling action with deep crafting and rice cultivation. It tells a powerful story about finding one's place in the world.

### Refined Side-Scrolling Action

Master farm tools as weapons, chaining quick, heavy, and special attacks to defeat demonic beasts. The magical "divine raiment" is key to grappling distant platforms, evading danger, and overcoming powerful foes.

### Deep Simulation-Style Gameplay

Learn the ancient art of agriculture through detailed steps, from planting to harvesting, to cultivate the perfect crop. As a harvest goddess, Sakuna's strength grows with each rice crop. Attributes like aesthetic and flavor directly impact her combat abilities.

### Building a Home in the Wilderness

Sakuna's mortal companions craft weapons, armor, and meals using materials she gathers. Completing their quests unlocks new options for survival and advancement.

### A Unique Take on Japanese Mythology

The heroine belongs to a pantheon of gods and demons inspired by traditional Japanese mythology. The game offers a fresh perspective with many unique twists. The story and world are rich with lovingly rendered details, blending familiar elements with original creations.

**Chicken Police - Paint it RED!** is a **narrative-driven noir adventure** that plunges players into a world of mystery and complex detective gameplay. At its core, the game features a **thrilling, rich storyline** infused with a classic film-noir twist, offering a truly unique experience.

This **cinematic film-noir experience** is brought to life with **professional voiceover**, boasting **more than 8 hours of spoken dialogue**. The game presents a **carefully crafted, unique, and 'colorful' world** populated by **30 fully voiced characters**. Players will uncover **lots of clues, information, and collectibles** while immersing themselves in a **beautiful original soundtrack**. The premise is set by a mysterious Dame, a strange case, and the wildest cops of the Wilderness.

### Meet the Chicken Police

**Sonny Featherland and Marty MacChicken** were once a legendary detective duo, known as the Chicken Police. However, nearly a decade has passed, and their glory days are behind them. Sonny is now a **semi-alcoholic wreck on paid leave**, while Marty clings to the image of a star detective. Their last case nearly tore them apart, and they haven't spoken since. Now, Sonny and Marty are **forced to work together** on a case that is **weirder and wilder** than anything they've ever encountered.

### Narrative-Driven, Detective Gameplay

Chicken Police is a **story-rich, dialogue-heavy adventure** that masterfully blends elements of visual novels and classic adventure games. The game features **more than 30 characters** to interact with, some of whom require serious interrogation. Players will **collect tons of clues, evidence, and highly sensitive personal information** from the shady characters of Clawville, which can be used ruthlessly against them.

### Explore the City of Clawville

The city of Clawville offers **more than 30 distinct locations** to visit, many of which evolve throughout the story. Players can **return to previous locations** multiple times to discover hidden secrets, encounter new characters, or gather crucial information about the world and its inhabitants.

### A Cinematic Experience

Chicken Police boasts a **weirdly-stunning visual style**, utilizing real photos and photo-realistic 3D backgrounds. This aesthetic is heavily inspired by classic film-noir movies such as *The Big Sleep*, *Double Indemnity*, and *Gilda*, as well as games like *Grim Fandango*, *Policenauts*, *Snatcher*, *L.A. Noire*, *Aviary Attorney*, and the *Tex Murphy* series. The game also draws inspiration from animated features like *Porco Rosso*, *Fantastic Mr. Fox*, and the series *BoJack Horseman*. The pervasive noir mood is further enhanced by an **original musical score** and **professional voice acting** from the studio behind voices for *The Wolf Among Us*, *Horizon Zero Dawn*, and *Warhammer: End Times - Vermintide 2*. The game is **100% voice-acted**, featuring over 8 hours of spoken dialogue.

### Clawville Never Sleeps

The saying "This city never sleeps" rings true for Clawville, a city that was once envisioned as an Edenic paradise where predators and prey could coexist peacefully. However, this dream faded as Clawville slowly devolved into the **darkest corner of the Wilderness**. Chicken Police serves as a **satire**, evoking the mood and atmosphere of 1940s film-noir classics. Like the best noir and hardboiled detective stories, it is **gritty and hopeless**, yet delivered with a healthy dose of **cynical humor**.

### Quotes About Us

*   **FORBES:** "It's also clear from the trailer that its dark story will be pretty funny, with plenty of scope to establish it as one of the more unique releases in its genre. Needless to say, there'll be absolutely nothing like it released during 2020, and hopefully, it'll be as brilliant as it is different."
*   **DESTRUCTOID:** "I know I mostly cover animal-based games, but few have ever stopped me dead in my tracks like this one. I mean, did you hear that song in the trailer? That's original music, baby! I'm a sucker for games with quirky themes and original music, so of course, I took notice to this one straight away. Mix that with the animals-as-people motif and spot-on detective visuals, and yeah I didn't really stand a chance."
*   **ROCK PAPER SHOTGUN:** "Fortunately I’m batting my jet-lagged eyes at Chicken Police, an upcoming noir detective adventure with grizzled chickens and a very good raccoon.
