It’s a point and clicker, which means I’ll almost certainly never play it. But I’d still like you to revel in this trailer with me. It’s a cinematographic masterpiece."
*   **ALPHA BETA GAMER:** "It really nails the film noir vibe it’s going for. Meanwhile, the voice acting is excellent throughout, the story is interesting and the writing is very witty, packed full of cynical humor and animal-based puns. A ridiculous and riveting hardboiled detective adventure that will give you a clucking good time."

**The Cat Lady** is a **suspenseful psychological horror game** that follows Susan Ashworth, a lonely 40-year-old on the brink of suicide. With no family, no friends, and no hope for the future, her life is about to change dramatically.

Five strangers will enter her life and alter its course forever. This game, by author Remigiusz Michalski of Harvester Games, features **stylized artwork** and **simple keyboard controls**.

It also includes **English voice acting**. The **compelling, atmospheric 70-minute soundtrack** by micAmic is now included free with every copy. Featured artists on the soundtrack include Warmer, 5iah, and Tears Of Mars.

**The Cat Lady contains strong adult themes** and is **recommended only for players over 18**. You may also be interested in other games in this series or titles coming soon from this developer.

Name: Gato Roboto
Description:
Pounce inside of your cozy armored mech and set off on a dangerous trek through an alien underworld full of irritable creatures and treacherous obstacles in a valiant effort to save your stranded captain and his crashed spaceship. Tiptoe outside the friendly confines of your technological marvel and follow your feline instincts through tight tunnels and mysterious waterways to scavenge for new weapons and gear. Adventure awaits the most curious of cats in Gato Roboto! * Explore the underground labyrinth of a deep space outpost and uncover the dastardly deeds that unfolded before your arrival. * Blast and dash your way through enemies and obstacles in an agile mech suit to face the guardians stationed precariously throughout the base. * Cautiously venture outside the mech and risk all nine lives to explore areas inaccessible to your bulky, mechanical armor. * Discover secrets abound and gather new weapons and items to help open up new areas on your journey through dozens of handcrafted environments.

## Cat Quest: An Open-World RPG Adventure

Embark on a grand adventure in the purrfectly pawsome world of cats with Cat Quest, an open-world RPG designed for players seeking thrilling quests and engaging combat. Your mission: to pursue the evil Drakoth and rescue your catnapped sister.

### Explore the Vast World of Felingard

Cat Quest invites you to explore Felingard's expansive overworld map, a land brimming with opportunities for discovery. Delve into dangerous dungeons, risking life and limb to unearth epic loot and valuable treasures. Along your journey, you'll encounter a charming cast of feline characters, each with their own unique stories and side quests that add depth and variety to your experience.

### Engage in Real-Time Combat

The combat system in Cat Quest is dynamic and unfolds entirely in real time. Get up close and personal with your enemies using swift blade attacks, master the art of the dodge roll to evade devastating counter-attacks, and unleash powerful magic to finish them off. Wield ancient spells such as Lightnyan, Flamepurr, and Healpaw to vanquish your foes and prove your mettle.

### Customize Your Catventurer

Personalize your feline hero with a wide array of equipment options. If you prefer to focus on spellcasting, equip an arcane hood, robes, and a staff to significantly boost your mana reserves. For those who prioritize defense, outfit your catventurer with chainmail armor to enhance health and provide an additional layer of protection against enemy assaults. The ability to mix and match weapons, armor, and spells allows you to craft the ideal combinations to suit your unique playstyle.

### Discover a World of Intrigue

The world of Felingard is rich with intriguing locations and memorable characters. You might stumble upon a possessed town whose inhabitants have an insatiable craving for meat, or perhaps you'll assist the mages Mewlin and Meowgan in their quest to break a powerful magic seal. Locating a missing delivery of 'House of Parchments' and 'The Pouncing Dead' is just another example of the diverse tasks awaiting you. Exploration is a core element of Cat Quest, with captivating areas like Bermewda's Triangle, the Furbidden Fields, and Pawt City beckoning you to explore their secrets.

### Immerse Yourself in an Enchanting Soundtrack

Complementing the vibrant world and engaging gameplay is an enchanting orchestral score, meticulously crafted to evoke the spirit of classic RPGs. This captivating soundtrack will further immerse you in the magical realm of Cat Quest.

In Atomicrops, you'll embark on a unique farming adventure where the goal is to sow and harvest an abundance of fast-growing crops before the day concludes, aiming to secure a substantial profit. Your journey will take you to the furthest reaches of diverse biomes, where you can discover valuable relics from forgotten farms of yesteryear. The powerful loot you acquire will significantly enhance your farming capabilities and provide crucial assistance in combating enemies.

A significant aspect of Atomicrops involves defending your precious crops from nightly attackers who are determined to consume your harvest, leaving you to face starvation or worse. You'll engage in combat against challenging bosses that appear each season, progressing through to the ultimate challenge of the Nuclear Winter. At the conclusion of each day, you can visit the town to purchase essential weapons and items. The end of each season is marked by special shops offering unique rewards and opportunities.

To streamline your farming operations, you can befriend a loyal entourage of animal companions, including pig pals, chicken chums, and cow colleagues, who will automate various farming tasks. Furthermore, you have the opportunity to woo and marry a kindred spirit from the local town, who will then join you in both farming and combat.

Atomicrops features a robust system of permanent upgrades for both your farming and fighting abilities. Each playthrough awards a special currency that can be invested in lasting improvements and unlocks. Be prepared for a challenging experience, as even the easiest difficulty setting will rigorously test your skills. Achieving victory is a hard-earned and deeply rewarding accomplishment.

As you progress, you will unlock new characters, spouses, difficulty levels, and permanent upgrades. Most notably, you can unlock a multitude of cats that will permanently roam your homestead, and yes, you can indeed pet them. Atomicrops is meticulously designed for high replayability, ensuring that new surprises and item synergies are discovered with every single run.

Feeling disillusioned with modern city life? Imagine inheriting your late uncle's farm and deciding to pack your bags for a fresh start in the tranquil countryside. What could possibly go wrong? The answer, it turns out, is a nuclear apocalypse. You now find yourself in a hellscape wasteland, tasked with defending the last remaining source of sustenance – your crops – against a horde of mutants eager to claim their share. As any self-respecting farmer would do in such dire circumstances, your mission is clear: Farm. Marry. Kill.

Name: The Chronicles of Nyanya
Description:
Thrilling like a payday, a story of cats in funny costumes that do RPGish things. It is full of many unexpected and incredible twists, the tragedies of an individual lured into the trap of an adventourist internship, and friendly pastry, which is very sensitive to nihilism. The game also contains many thrilling conversations, walking around the map with some logical puzzles sprinkled in here and there – but don’t worry, even a liberal arts student should be able to solve them – raising pastry, and deliberations about important moral and existential issues, the majority of which will affect the ending you get. The ending will sum up the fates of the most important characters, in-game achievements, your proficiency in fighting the ultimate bad guy, your finesse in raising pastry and the degree of faith in friendship. This results in dozens of possible ending combinations. After completing the game, you can try NewGame+ to unlock additional, normally unavailable skills for the main character. The world of Nyanya Nyanya is an enormous cat world that can take up to 20 hours to fully explore. The main plotline itself is good for more than 8 hours of fun, but the game also includes many side quests found on numerous maps, hundreds of interactions with NPCs and over a thousand descriptions of nearly everything. You can also find dozens of exciting items such as the legendary Excalipurr and the frightening Berserker Catnip. The role of the majority of animals is played by various kinds of rolls, which, together with cats, pidgins, and sneks, constitute the entirety of Nyanya’s fauna. Kibble is found in mines and on can triis, almost all buildings are boxes (because cardboard boxes are cats’ natural habitat) and cleaning fur is a matter of importance to the state. The sense and logic of this world are therefore highly debatable... But don’t worry about its coherence. We made sure that it is top-notch. All this mess is watched over by cat gods, such as the mysterious Great Bowl of Goodness – a giant stone leg, whose calf disappears in the clouds, Meowrida the Brave – goddess of shooting, and Overcat – the creator of everything that's feline. The game is produced in a retro jRPG style. Party The protagonist of the game is Catair, a meowsassin, who is as optimistic and sweet as sandpaper. When she sets out on her amazing journey, she has the chance to discover friendship, love, and revenge and to travel through many wonderful lands that she does not want to visit... And yet, she has no choice. She will join the party led by the veteran of the war in Furajevo – Francat the clericat. Their adventourist paths will cross with Purrgli, a yes-cat and an outstanding purrior, Catniss – a fighter for friendship and even more friendship, as well as meowmage Meowdledore, whose parents bought him gifts instead of giving him some attention. You can meet them here . Combat The game features tons of epic turn-based jRPG fights, where you will have an opportunity to use dozens of such unique cat techniques as Boot to the Head, Slipper Comet or a Hairball of Darkness. The characters represent traditional classes such as meowsassin, meowmage and purrior. With their powers combined, they are able to face adversities such as student internships and unpaid overtime. Among the dozens of opponents, you will find monstrosities such as orcats, aggressive cat fetuses enchanted in slime, or Purrevar, Prince of the Underpurr. What is more, The Chronicles of Nyanya is probably the only game in which you can charge Nazi furniture on your rollicorn or fight their mysterious Wundermöbelwaffe. Parody and pop culture The game is filled with familiar-sounding places and names. If you love comic books, memes or just pop culture in general, you will feel right at home in Nyanya. You will meet Cateris, talk with Granny Weathercat, Furry Catter and Nyoda and listen to the moving stories of Catmerian guards, who always wanted to be adventourists like you, but they took an arrow to their knees. In other games, references are Easter eggs, in Nyanya they are the main course. Creators The game was created by hamstercube studio, made up of Ilona, author of chatolandia and Adrian. The graphics were created mainly by Revv, known from her Tak bardzo źle blog; Ilona also had something to do with it. The moving music, which tickles your aesthetic sense was composed by Marcin Maślanka, an experienced composer of soundtracks for games and films.

**Pix the Cat: An Intense Arcade Challenge**

Step into the paws of **Pix**, the world's first feline gamer, in this critically acclaimed arcade experience! Developed by the talented team at Pastagames, renowned for their work on Rayman Jungle Run, Pix the Cat is designed to **test your reflexes and sharpen your wits**. Prepare for an exhilarating race to achieve the highest score, challenging both yourself and players worldwide.

The game unfolds within the **Grid of Infinity**, a progressively challenging environment with deeply nested levels. Your primary objective is to **hatch eggs to gather ducklings**, which you then guide to target circles to set them free. However, **avoiding walls and obstacles is paramount** to your success.

Pix the Cat offers a variety of engaging modes:

*   **Arcade Mode:** Navigate through vibrant, digital levels that pulse with an infectious, galvanizing groove, guaranteed to get your heart racing.
*   **Nostalgia Mode:** Immerse yourself in an adventure brimming with surprises, featuring art that evokes a charming, vintage aesthetic. Each of the **70 unique levels** presents a fresh skill challenge, pushing your abilities to the limit.
*   **Laboratory Mode:** Here, success is measured by your efficiency. Your goal is to **minimize your moves** while skillfully dodging dangers to collect the coveted bonus stamp.
*   **Battle Mode:** Engage in local multiplayer action, where up to four PixBots can **joust against each other** in head-to-head competition.

Synth Ninja offers a distinctive virtual reality experience, blending the iconic aesthetics of 1980s Synthwave with the thrilling world of ninjas. This casual VR game challenges players to master the art of shuriken throwing.

The core gameplay revolves around accurately hitting targets that randomly display either blue or red colors. To succeed, players must precisely match the color of their thrown shuriken to the color of the target. This engaging mechanic is enhanced by an **immersive shuriken throwing system**, designed to provide a truly unique VR experience.

Synth Ninja also features a robust **Power-Up system**, introducing exciting gameplay modifiers such as Multi Shuriken, Slow-Mo, and Shatter abilities. Furthermore, players can personalize their gaming sessions by adding their own music to the game. Simply place your .mp3 files into the SynthNinja/SynthNinja_Data/Music/ folder. You can then create a custom playlist to enjoy your favorite tracks in your preferred order. It's important to note that **Synth Ninja is not currently a rhythm game**, though the development team is actively planning to implement a beat detection system in the future.

Name: Quest Of Graal
Description:
Overview QUEST OF GRAAL is a multiplayer platform racing game ! The goal is to reach the end of the level and grab the golden cup first! You can play alone against AI or with up to 4 players in split screen. You can cooperate with other players to make it through the treacherous monsters and deadly traps that stand in your way, but you'll have to betray them to win! You will use not only weapons and magic items to make it through the mayhem, but also the power of golden statues which unleash their special abilities! Explore more than 20 levels , including the royal Camelot castle, the verdant forest of Brocelia , the teeming depths of the Lake , and more. Discover the history of Arthur and Merlin's quest for the Graal by unlocking storybook chapters as you play. Features More than 20 LEVELS over 4 WORLDS Play in TOURNAMENT MODE against AIs or with other players to unlock content Try CUSTOM MODE to play the game with different options offering replayability Learn the basics of the game in the TUTORIAL by following Merlin's advice Discover the storybook in the GALLERY and other secrets Run in GHOST MODE to face the creators' best times in each level Vary the pleasures in DODGEBALL MODE in throwing ball clashes Golden statues The golden statues each offer a unique skill that can make the difference during the race but be careful, at the slightest damage received it will be lost!

Name: Super Star Shooter 16
Description:
Battle your way through the audio-verse. On-Rail Shooter Super Star Shooter 16 takes its cues from early arcade and 3d games. This means that player follows along a fixed course and is responsible for dodging obstacles and eliminating enemy targets. This results in a much more accessible game. Retro Graphics Super Star Shooter 16 achieves a unique graphics style by combining an extremely limited color palette with Unity's powerful 3d graphics engine. This game was inspired by MS-DOS gaming as well as the the 16 and 32-bit console eras. Psychedelic Audio-Visualization Super Star Shooter 16 synchronizes the audio and visual experience. The enemies and scenery in Super Star Shooter 16 all move to the beat of the music. This often creates a sensation of calm focus or feeling 'in the zone' during gameplay. Fun, Simplistic Gameplay and Controls Super Star Shooter 16 is intended for casual gamers. This game is intended to be very easy to get into, but difficult to master. The control scheme is very simple and does not take long to learn (or relearn). Story Discover a strange reality while flying through psychedelic simulation.

Serious Scramblers is a **fast-paced vertical platformer** where the core mechanic is **falling, not jumping**. Your objective is to descend through a perilous pit, overcoming hazardous obstacles and ultimately confronting a **massive monster** lurking in the depths. This game offers a **small but unabashedly tough experience** designed to test your reflexes and strategic thinking.

Prepare for **super intense arcade action** as you fall your way through procedurally generated levels. The **randomized level generation** ensures that each playthrough presents a fresh challenge, forcing you to adapt to new obstacles and enemy placements. As you progress, you'll have the opportunity to **unlock new characters**, each possessing **game-changing abilities** that fundamentally alter your approach to the game.

The ultimate goal is to reach the finale: a **MASSIVE BOSS FIGHT** that will push your skills to the limit. Prove your mastery by marking your victory on the **leaderboard**. All of this is set to a backdrop of **real sweet chip-tune music**, enhancing the retro arcade feel.

Serious Scramblers boasts a **colorful cast of unlockable characters**, each offering unique gameplay mechanics:

*   **Motoko - Time Jumper:** Similar to a certain innovative FPS, time only advances when Motoko moves. However, the level scrolls significantly faster when time is not paused. This means you must make every move count to avoid being impaled by ceiling spikes.
*   **Silhouette - Gotta Go Fast:** Silhouette moves at top speed constantly, making it easier to dodge spike traps. The trade-off is that you'll collect significantly fewer gold coins.
*   **Mummy - Gold Grabber:** If your goal is to amass coins for unlocking more characters, Mummy is the ideal choice. Be aware, though, that Mummy is one of the slowest characters in the game.

Originally released on iOS, Serious Scramblers is a **highly challenging yet simple game**. Despite a modest number of downloads on its original platform, **less than 1 percent of players have managed to beat the final boss**. This statistic sparked curiosity about how PC gamers would fare.

Consequently, Serious Scramblers has been ported to PC. This port also provided an opportunity to **touch up various graphical aspects** of the game. While it is a tiny and simple game, it was developed with **immense passion**. If you enjoy a true challenge, this game is highly recommended. Feedback is welcomed on the Steam forums, Discord, and Twitter.

Name: Mira's Brush
Description:
🖌️Features +100 STEAM ACHIEVEMENTS +30+ Hours of gameplay, with optional speedrun setting for an extra challenge. +Over 60 stages with unique platform action, puzzles, and original enemies. +Listen to 100 original chiptunes +Explore alternate routes, filled with colourful secrets and extra challenges. 🖌️🎨What's Mira's Brush Anywho? Capture colour and shape! Mira's Brush is a cute, colour-based puzzle platformer brimming with bizarre enemies, lateral thinking puzzles, and intriguing gameplay experiments. ❔Who is Mira?? Mira is an ordinary school-aged girl doing a dozen odd-jobs, from electrical engineering to the occasional crocodile wrestle. As a house painter, Mira uses her magic brush to steal colour from a host of enemies, and use those colours to jump, dash, and figure her way through Chromaland. 🌈Fun Bosses! 📖Story Mira is up against a little evil, of course. Colonel Blump and his cohort of artistic villains have stolen the colour from RainbowCastle, and Empress Kitty needs your help. Well, I mean, if she could speak, she'd totally ask for your help. Frankly, she kinda sits there. Mira has been tasked with restoring colour to Chromaland across all 8 art-style based worlds, returning the 8 colour crystals, and squaring off against the villainous Blump. I mean, what does he want a bunch of rainbows for anyway? He's such a sour sea-lion. 🎈Collect Power-Ups! When Mira defeats an enemy, she can also steal it's 'shape' in the form of magic stencils. These stencils transform Mira's brush into a wide-range of unique powerups, from shooting stars to balloons, to mirror-Miras, fresh fruit and more.

Name: Nox Archaist
Description:
An 8-bit RPG modeled after the iconic games of the 1980s. You control a party of adventurers who travel the Realm, talk to NPCs in towns and castles, explore dungeons, and fight monsters as you seek to save the world from a terrible danger. Key Features 60+ hours of gameplay Complex storyline and open world Fast character creation and in-game tutorial Hundreds of non-player characters to talk to Quick Combat or Tactical Combat Created on an Apple II computer, for faithful reproduction of 8-bit graphics 8-bit sounds and in-game music Included with the Game DRM-free application for Mac and PC Apple II hard drive and floppy disk images PDF and eBook manual Quick reference guide High-resolution map Custom soundtrack Digital wallpapers

Name: S.P.I.K.E: ARENA
Description:
If there are two cubes left in the world, one of them will want to kill another. Main features: -entertaining 2d arcade; -different maps; -A.I. (artificial intellegence) of new generation; -multiplayer support; Challenge your friends in this new game!

**Rhythium: A Combo-Focused Rhythm Game for Everyone**

Are you tired of the frustration that comes with missing a perfect score in rhythm games due to a single inaccurate note? **Rhythium** offers a refreshing alternative, prioritizing a **combo-based gameplay experience**. This means that even if pinpoint accuracy isn't your strongest suit, you can still achieve great results by consistently hitting the notes. Rhythium is designed to provide a more **relaxed yet engaging challenge**, ensuring that players of all skill levels can enjoy the game.

**Unlock Bonus Points with Strategic Play**

For those seeking to maximize their scores, Rhythium introduces the **Bonus Points Mode**. By charging your bonus bar, you can activate a temporary boost that grants extra points. However, this rewarding feature comes with a significant risk: failing to utilize your boost effectively could lead to the **loss of your entire combo**. This adds a layer of strategic depth, encouraging players to time their boosts wisely for maximum impact.

**Extensive Game Features for an Unforgettable Experience**

Rhythium boasts an impressive array of features designed to keep players entertained and engaged. At launch, the game includes **18 unique indie songs**, spanning genres from electronic to synthpunk. Furthermore, Rhythium offers robust **custom song support**, including the ability to convert **OSU! 4k songs** into playable custom tracks. Each song map has been **handcrafted** to deliver an exciting and immersive experience.

Players can personalize their gameplay with **unlockable skins**, allowing them to express their individual style. To foster a competitive spirit, Rhythium features **global leaderboards and profiles**, enabling players to showcase their achievements to the world. The game also includes **Steam Achievements**, adding another layer of accomplishment. The developers are committed to **continued support**, with plans to introduce more content in the future.

**Exciting Collaborations Await**

Rhythium is proud to feature collaborations with talented artists. The **Rhythium x Nyarons** pack includes four songs: "HARUKAKANATA," "LOVE Zukkyun," "Sailor Liebe," and "Look at me god." Additionally, the **Rhythium x Falconite** collaboration currently offers one song, "Digital Baptism," with plans to add two more in the future: "Sucker Punch" and "Viridian."

Join the **Discord community** to stay updated on all things Rhythium!

Name: Drone Crash Course
Description:
Drone crash course - Being a pilot of a controlled drone is not easy. Having decided to master this profession, you human made professional robot sign up for training and attend classes for a whole year .. and now the day of the final exam has come! It will be possible to get the coveted certificate and your own drone only after passing all the difficult tests in this drone control simulator. Avoid collisions with obstacles and everyone suspicious - your drone is very fragile and can be destroyed! Follow the navigation markers through difficult levels and dash to victory. Drone crash course is an unforgettable adventure as a robot that tries to protect the world using dexterity and superpowers. Peculiarities: - Nice graphics - Nice soundtrack by Niole Marie T -an unforgettable adventure

Name: JACK 'N' HAT
Description:
Prepare for an exhilarating platformer adventure across the world of Ririland! The evil Dr. Voo Doom has abducted Princess Riri, instigating a civil war that has plunged the Kingdom into chaos! Is there anyone strong enough to save the distraught royal? Jack, the famous 'jack-of-all-trades' repairman is ready to bring peace to the land. Armed with the latest invention of the brilliant Dr. Expo Zicion, a hat that can be thrown like a boomerang , Jack has to travel the planet searching for Energy Crystals, the only power source that will allow him to travel to the moon and put an end to Dr. Voo Doom's plans for world domination! Help Jack jump and slide his way through deserts, jungles, volcanoes and battle devious enemies and dangerous bosses! Can you save Ririland? Features - 20 huge levels with secret ones to unlock! - Collect Crystals, Gems and Stars. Can you get them all? - Intense Boss Battles - Unlockable abilities - Catchy chiptune soundtrack - Retro & Modern modes - 7-8 hours gameplay

Name: Mission: It's Complicated
Description:
Mission: It’s Compli­cated is a visual novel about getting superheroes to fall in love, and the shenanigans that happen along the way. Send your heroes out on ridiculous missions at night, and try to keep them from getting hurt -- or they won't be able to go on dates during the day! Grow your favorite pair's bond so they can go on more dates. Help them pick the right thing to say. Get them to fall in love… and save the world. Super sweet features of this narrative-based, visual novel include: Heart and humor! The puns are terrible and the feels are real. Choose your OTP! Any hero (there's 5) can be paired with any other to win the game. Friend dates! Friendship is just as important as romance. Win the game with romantic or platonic love depending on which pair you pick! No bummers! Every pair has a happy ending. But can you get the ULTIMATE happy ending? A serious lack of beds! Oh no, there's only one! :O Super cute art! Look at it! It's cute as heck. So much reading! Over 100k words! That's an entire novel! Wow! It'll probably help you on your SATs or something! Are those still a thing? NO voice acting! Cast your favorite voice actor for each character using the power of your imagination. LGBTQ+ friendly Want to breeze through the game to see all the endings? Skip any mission you've done before and still get credit... so you can get to those juicy dates! Free! Not secretly-designed-for-microtransactions-free, but actually free. So that's cool. In case you missed it, Mission: It’s Compli­cated is free. Completely FREE! To let someone know you care, share one of these special Valen­tine’s Day cards with them. Sharing is caring! Fun gifs!

Name: Street Fighter® IV
Description:
Street Fighter® IV brings the legendary fighting series back to its roots by taking the beloved fighting moves and techniques of the original Street Fighter® II, and infusing them with Capcom's latest advancements in next generation technology to create a truly extraordinary experience that will re-introduce the world to the time-honored art of virtual martial arts. Everything that made the legendary Street Fighter II a hit in the arcades, living rooms and dormitories across the globe has been brought back in Street Fighter IV. Players can play their favorite classic characters, such as Ryu, Ken, Chun-Li and Guile, along with new characters, including Crimson Viper, Abel, El Fuerte, and Rufus. Characters and environments are rendered in stylized 3D, while the game is played in the classic Street Fighter 2D perspective with additional 3D camera flourishes. Six-button controls for the game return, with a host of new special moves and features integrated into the gameplay system. Street Fighter IV brings a brand new fighting game to fans the world over. Key Features: High Definition stylized 3D environments and characters Traditional '2D' Street Fighter six-button gameplay 25 Fighters including: Classic Street Fighter characters re-imagined for a new generation of gamers, including the original cast of Street Fighter II New brawlers: female super-spy Crimson Viper, lucha libre wrestler El Fuerte, mixed martial artist Abel and more! New special moves that go beyond any Street Fighter fan's wildest imagination, including Focus Attacks, Super Combos, and the revenge-fueled Ultra Combo system New gameplay elements provide challenges for both newcomers as well as the most seasoned Street Fighter pro Global Online gameplay Exclusive to the PC version of the game, three visual shaders based on the 'artistic' trailers give a new look to the gameplay: Watercolor, Poster, and Sumi-E ink styles

Name: Tumblestone
Description:
Tumblestone is the first original action-puzzle game of the past fifteen years. Race your friends in multiplayer or challenge yourself in story mode. Solve progressively more difficult and creative puzzles, help a sausage make friends, and find out what happened to the Tumblecrown. Key Features Competitive multiplayer : Tumblestone's intense puzzle-solving action will turn playing 'just a few more rounds' with friends into a late-night Tumblestone marathon. Local multiplayer : Up to four players on a single computer. Online multiplayer : Play online against your friends or make new ones using Tumblestone's ranked matchmaking system. Bots : Have an open slot? Play against the computer. But can anyone withstand the punishing Nightmare bot? Story mode : The 40+ hour story campaign will test your puzzle-solving prowess. Featuring 10+ gameplay modifiers, challenge puzzles, and boss battles. Arcade modes : Kick back and relax with the casual Marathon mode, scratch an intellectual itch with the Infinipuzzle mode, or get your blood pumping with the fast-paced Heartbeat mode. Leaderboards : Online leaderboards let your friends know you're better than them. Quests : Hundreds of unique quests to complete. Stats : Rank up, then compare how you stack up against your friends. Personalization : Choose from a dozen unique characters and environments.

N++ (NPLUSPLUS) is a fast-paced platformer where you dart around obstacles, evade enemies, and collect gold in a minimalist sci-fi world. This game, the first N title on PC since 2004, focuses on using momentum to complete levels and achieve high scores. You'll face inadvertently homicidal robots determined to stop you.

The game features:

*   **4,340 hand-made levels:** Experience intense platforming in meticulously crafted challenges, not procedurally generated ones.
*   **Custom Levels:** Create your own levels with the Level Editor and share them globally.
*   **Leaderboards and Replays:** Track your progress and watch replays for every level, including custom ones.
*   **Local Multiplayer:** Enjoy a Local Co-op Mode and a Local Competitive Mode, both supporting up to 4 players.
*   **Hardcore Mode:** A single-player challenge designed for the most skilled ninjas.
*   **Secret Challenges:** Discover hidden, intense challenges.
*   **Music and Customization:** Features 63 tracks by top electronic artists and 119 color palettes to personalize your game's look.

N++ offers bite-sized gameplay that can last a lifetime, with no skill ceiling to limit your improvement.

**Tadpole Treble: A Harmonious Adventure Praised for its Music and Charm**

The musical adventure game Tadpole Treble, from the creators of the popular webcomic Brawl in the Family, has garnered significant acclaim for its innovative gameplay and captivating soundtrack. Reviewers consistently highlight the game's exceptional audio design and endearing personality.

Here's what critics and players are saying:

*   **Nintendo Enthusiast** awarded Tadpole Treble a 9/10, stating, "In a word — amazing," regarding the game's core musical element.
*   **Destructoid** described the game as "charming" in their 8/10 review.
*   **The Inner Circle Games Network** enthusiastically declared it a "must-have" with a score of 9.4/10, praising its seamless synchronization, abundant charm, and personality.
*   **TinyCartridge** noted that Tadpole Treble is "one of the sweetest games I’ve ever played," despite the challenges faced by the protagonist.
*   Steam reviewer **Mo05eman** lauded it as "the epitome of what an aesthetic and music-focused game should be," emphasizing how simple gameplay is elevated by excellent game design and an outstanding soundtrack.

In Tadpole Treble, players embody Baton, a character who actively "plays along" with the game's music. The gameplay involves navigating through levels, dodging predators and obstacles that are synchronized with the rhythm of each song. To succeed, players must avoid enemies and strike percussive notes precisely on the beat. Successfully doing so not only accumulates points but also fills Baton's Treble Charge, enabling them to blast through obstacles.

The game boasts an impressive array of content:

*   **30 original music compositions**
*   **13 distinct levels**
*   **5 challenging boss battles**

Beyond the main story mode, Tadpole Treble offers a wealth of bonus features, including:

*   Unlockable music tracks
*   An extensive bestiary
*   In-game commentaries
*   Online leaderboards for every level

A standout feature is the robust **Composition Mode**, which empowers players to design and share their own original levels and musical compositions, further extending the game's creative possibilities.

Name: Inertial Drift
Description:
Set in a 90's retro future, Inertial Drift is an Arcade Racer with a devastatingly unique handling model and unbelievably satisfying twin-stick drift mechanics. Inertial Drift offers a whole new level of accessibility and challenge to the arcade racing genre - for a driving experience genuinely unlike anything you've played before. The left stick is used for steering, while the right hand Drift Stick gives you independent control over your drift. Intuitive for new players and uniquely challenging for pros. Each one of the 16 cars is a totally different beast, with unique characteristics to master. Get behind the wheel of Sport hatchbacks, Coupe's, Supercars & more! Tear through neon city streets, race around rural temple complexes and hurtle down winding mountain passes. Each racetrack is set within a bold and distinctive environment. Including vibrant cityscapes, coastal sunsets, gorgeous starry skies and snow-capped peaks. With 7 race event types there is plenty of opportunity to perfect your craft! Get competitive in a mix of races, head-to-heads, time trials and style showdowns! Think you've mastered the perfect drift? What better way to prove it. Take on other racers via local co-op and online multiplayer.

Dive into the electrifying world of Street Fighter V, a game that brings intense head-to-head combat to your fingertips. This iconic fighting game offers a roster of 16 distinct characters, each boasting their own compelling personal story and unique training challenges to master. Whether you prefer to clash with friends online or offline, Street Fighter V provides a rich variety of match options to suit every playstyle.

Here's how you can engage with the action:

*   **Ranked Matches:** Compete to earn valuable Fight Money, the in-game currency.
*   **Casual Matches:** Jump into quick, fun games without the pressure of rankings.
*   **Battle Lounge:** Create private lobbies to challenge your friends and determine who reigns supreme.

For an even broader experience, PlayStation 4 and Steam players can enjoy seamless battles against each other thanks to cross-play compatibility. This iteration of Street Fighter V proudly features the "Arcade Edition" title screen and includes engaging modes such as Arcade Mode, Team Battle Mode, and the online-enabled Extra Battle Mode. Within Extra Battle Mode, you can earn exciting rewards, experience points (XP), and more Fight Money. This earned Fight Money can then be strategically used to acquire additional characters, stylish costumes, new stages, and other desirable content.

Don't miss out on the FREE cinematic story, "A Shadow Falls," where the malevolent M. Bison unleashes seven Black Moons into orbit, plunging the earth into darkness and bestowing upon him unimaginable power.

**Street Fighter V: Champion Edition** represents the ultimate collection, bundling all content from the original release and Street Fighter V: Arcade Edition, with the exception of Fighting Chance costumes, brand collaboration costumes, and Capcom Pro Tour DLC. This comprehensive package also includes every character, stage, and costume released after the Arcade Edition, bringing the total to an impressive 40 characters, 34 stages, and over 200 costumes.

Mastering the unique mechanics of Street Fighter V is key to victory. Explore these powerful systems:

*   **V-Trigger 1 and 2:** Unleash devastating techniques and exclusive moves by activating your character's V-Trigger. Achieve massive damage bursts or secure a crucial comeback by pressing hard punch and hard kick simultaneously when your V-Gauge is full.
*   **V-Skill 1 and 2:** These are the fundamental building blocks of victory. Each V-Skill grants your character a distinct move or ability that helps replenish your V-Gauge, essential for activating V-Triggers.
*   **V-Reversal:** Disrupt your opponent's offensive onslaught by utilizing a V-Reversal. While it consumes one V-Gauge stock, it can provide much-needed breathing room to initiate your own attacks.
*   **Special Attacks and EX Special Attacks:** A cornerstone of Street Fighter strategy, Special Attacks allow you to control space, dictate the flow of battle, and build your Critical Gauge for amplified damage. EX Special Attacks are enhanced versions of Special Attacks, costing one bar of the Critical Gauge.
*   **Critical Art:** The most powerful attack in Street Fighter V: Champion Edition is the Critical Art, which can be unleashed once your Critical Gauge is completely filled.

**Pinball FX3: A New Era of Digital Pinball**

Zen Studios proudly presents **Pinball FX3**, a revolutionary digital pinball experience that brings classic tables and exciting new features to players worldwide. As a special introductory offer, **Fish Tales™** is yours absolutely FREE, allowing you to dive into the action immediately. This latest installment is designed to be the most community-focused pinball game ever, fostering endless opportunities for competition through **multiplayer matchups, user-generated tournaments, and league play**.

Furthermore, Pinball FX3 offers **free backwards compatibility**, ensuring that your cherished Pinball FX2 purchases seamlessly transfer to the new platform without any additional cost. For those looking to hone their skills, the game introduces **innovative single-player modes** specifically designed to elevate your flipper proficiency. Every table has undergone a significant **graphics update**, boasting stunning **real-time lighting and shadow projection** for an immersive visual experience. Zen Studios is committed to the ongoing evolution of Pinball FX3, with **frequent content releases and new features** planned to keep the excitement alive.

Psychonauts 2 is a platform-adventure game where you play as Razputin "Raz" Aquato, a trained acrobat and powerful young psychic. Raz has finally achieved his dream of joining the Psychonauts, an international psychic espionage organization. However, this elite group of psychic super spies is facing serious problems.

Here's what's happening in Psychonauts 2:

*   **A Troubled Leader:** The Psychonauts' leader has been acting strangely since being rescued from a kidnapping.
*   **A Hidden Mole:** There's a mole lurking within the Psychonauts' headquarters, creating suspicion and distrust.

The game blends quirky missions with mysterious conspiracies, offering a cinematic platform-adventure experience. Players will guide Raz through a journey filled with danger, excitement, and humor. His quest involves diving into the minds of both friends and foes to defeat a murderous psychic villain.

You'll experience an imaginative story, crafted by legendary game designer Tim Schafer, known for titles like Grim Fandango and Brütal Legend. Explore unique mental landscapes where Raz uses his psychic abilities to:

*   Battle inner demons.
*   Unlock hidden memories.
*   Resolve emotional baggage.

The gameplay features acrobatic leaps, tightrope walks, and trapeze swings, providing a varied and joyful platforming challenge. Raz also wields a powerful arsenal of psychic powers, allowing him to blast, burn, and levitate objects, or even manipulate time to solve puzzles and fight enemies.

Name: Super Hexagon
Description:
Super Hexagon is a minimal action game by Terry Cavanagh, with music by Chipzel. Important facts about Hexagons: Hexagons are third order permutohedrons: The vertices of a hexagon can be formed by permuting the coordinates of the vector (1, 2, 3). The north pole of the planet Saturn has a hexagonal storm cloud pattern with 8,600 mile long sides, larger than the diameter of Earth. Though hexagon may appear to be a difficult word to rhyme, there are actually dozens of words that rhyme with it. For example: Autobahn, decagon, decathlon, electron, Kyrgzstan, Lebanon, leprechaun and marathon.

Name: IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946
Description:
Il-2 1946 includes all of the original IL-2 series content: IL-2 Sturmovik™: Forgotten Battles, Ace Expansion Pack, Pacific Fighters™ and alternate histry campaigns of year 1946. What was years ago began as a one-aircraft study sim is now an astonishing anthology, with a whopping 229 flyable aircraft and over 300 aircraft total! The game has been updated to the latest version 4.12.2. This community made update includes widescreen support with correct FOV, many new planes, maps and scenarios. New Aircraft: 32 new flyable fighters and bombers, and four new AI aircraft! New Maps: Large new historical maps of the Kiev region; a map of Manchuria focusing on a border region between USSR, China and Japanese-occupied Korea; a large bonus Burma map; and an online Khalkin Gol / Nomonhan map. New Campaigns: Nine new campaigns with nearly 200 missions add incredible realism and attention to detail. There are detailed careers for fighter and bomber pilots, for the German, Soviet, and Japanese air forces, offering such varied objectives as flying jet bombers over occupied Europe, to intercepting American B-29 Super fortresses over Iwo Jima and Japanese home islands! Alternate History: Three of the nine campaigns are a departure into alternate history, focusing on hypothetical battles between the Soviet Union and Germany in the year 1946, while WWII still rages on. Nearly 1,000 new Paint schemes: The new planes, as well as many of the other ones in the series, come with a host of historical paint schemes, showing many of the individual aircraft or squadrons that served in WWII.

Name: Ace Combat Assault Horizon - Enhanced Edition
Description:
Developed by the Project Aces team, ACE COMBAT™ ASSAULT HORIZON intensifies the franchise, escalating combat to the next level with aircraft that are literally torn apart, spewing oil and debris across the sky. Players will engage in combat across the globe, dodging skyscrapers, and turning their enemies into fiery supersonic debris in both single player and online multiplayer. Never before has combat been so fast in-your-face. Key Features Exclusive for PC : Improved graphics (resolution up to 1900x1200p) ; online play up to 16 players and a huge bonus content pack (8 aircraft, 2 maps, 27 skins, 9 skills upgrades). Dramatic realistic story line – Written by New York Times Best Seller and military author Jim DeFelice, players will experience an engaging war drama spanning real-world locations across the globe. Steel carnage destruction – Incredible detail and visual reaction for every explosive attack (aircraft are shredded to pieces, enemy troops annihilated, buildings shattered, machines bleed) Entirely new aircraft to pilot – Experience split-second maneuvering and positioning, pinpoint targeting, hovering attacks and other gameplay diversity through the introduction of the Attack Helicopter, Door Gunner and more Revolutionary Close-range Assault system – Delivering high-speed acrobatics, dizzying one-on-one encounters, satisfying visceral low-attitude and high-flying death from above ACE COMBAT™ online reinvented – Take to the skies and engage hostile forces in a variety of modes including Capital Conquest (challenge opposing teams and fight to protect or take control of famous capitals around the world)

Name: Rise of Flight United
Description:
Rise of Flight is the most realistic WWI PC flight simulation ever created. Take to the skies of war torn Europe and experience daring air combat at the dawn of aviation. Re-enact famous air battles fought by legendary aces such as Manfred von Richtofen, James McCudden, Georges Guynemer and Eddie Rickenbacker. Rise of Flight transports you to a time when courageous pilots fought each other for control of the sky high above the bloody trenches. In aircraft made of canvas and wood they battled to the death. While some survived to become legends, most met a fiery fate. Do you have the skills and the courage to become an Ace? The free-to-play Rise of Flight United is just the beginning of your adventure. There are 35 additional flyable aircraft available for purchase along with additional content from the Steam store in the form of content packs. These packs include not only airplanes and additional theaters of war, but other helpful items such as Field Modifications and Weapon Modifications for your aircraft which can help you be a more effective combat pilot. The sky knows no limit. The free-to-play Rise of Flight United allows you to: Pilot three fighter planes (Spad 13, Albatros D.Va and Nieuport 17 by Dux plant) with all their modifications included against any planes in the game. Access Training campaign, Quick Mission Builder, Career mode and pilot the aircraft you have in multiplayer. Enjoy advanced graphics featuring High Dynamic Range (HDR) lighting, blinding sun glare, beautiful sunrises and sunsets, dark moonlit nights with stars and realistic looking raindrops and oil splatter on pilot goggles. Experience a cutting edge flight-sim with advanced flight-models, adjustable difficulty settings, a complex physics engine and an industry leading progressive damage model. Practice teamwork with your friends by manning additional gunner positions. You get unlimited access as a gunner to multi-crew airplanes in Multiplayer matches. Protect your plane’s six o’clock! Endure G-effects with blackout, red out and wounded pilot effects featuring blood splatter, ringing ears and control difficulty. Explore huge maps of Western and Eastern fronts of World War I.

Project Wingman is a **fast-paced combat flight action game**. It offers a **polished and refined gameplay experience** that draws inspiration from classic titles. This game is perfect for players seeking an **engaging single-player campaign** without the complexity of a simulator. You can easily pick it up and play, or dive into challenging, high-octane dogfights.

Experience **intense aerial combat** across diverse battlefields set in an alternate history of Earth. You'll fly over the cold Bering Strait, attack tanks in the Yellowstone magma fields, and dive through the Redwoods of the Pacific Northwest. The war will take you from one exotic location to another, facing overwhelming odds.

Prepare for **exotic weaponry** like railguns and geothermal-powered armaments designed to take you down. Whether you pilot an attack aircraft with gatling guns and rockets or an interceptor with long-range missiles, you'll need to prove yourself as an **Ace pilot**.

**Conquest Mode** offers a unique challenge. Engage in an uphill battle against bosses and ace squadrons in a territory-capture game that blends roguelike and RPG elements. Earn money to purchase new aircraft and build your own mercenary army. Face increasingly difficult waves of opposition and a variety of changing missions.

For ultimate immersion, Project Wingman supports **Virtual Reality headsets**. Step into the cockpit and experience head-swiveling combat. The game also offers full compatibility with **HOTAS peripherals** and custom axis curves, allowing you to play with any DirectInput supported device.

**Key Features:**

*   Fly in **varied and exciting scenarios** across unique locations.
*   Enjoy an **engaging single-player campaign**.
*   Access **over 20 different aircraft** and **over 40 unique weapons**.
*   Battle diverse adversaries, including **giant mechanized fortresses** and **railgun cannons**.
*   Test your skills in **Conquest mode** against hordes of enemies.
*   Customize your Conquest experience with **modifiers**.
*   Experience **beautiful 3D volumetric clouds** rendered with TrueSKY.
*   Benefit from **fully rebindable controls** and **HOTAS compatibility** with DirectInput support.
*   Enjoy **VR Support** for an immersive experience.

Name: Aerofly FS 2 Flight Simulator
Description:
Aerofly FS 2 lets you explore the world of flying in a quality never seen before. Fly a large selection of highly detailed aircraft or a helicopter with fully animated and interactive 3D cockpits. Aerofly FS 2 is a next generation flight simulator open for add-ons and sets a high value on realistic flight physics, highly detailed aircraft and a stunning, photo realistic scenery. World wide coverage of elevation data and aerial images is included with Aerofly FS 2. At the same time, Aerofly FS 2 features an intuitive user interface and requires virtually no training time. Take your seat in the cockpit and enjoy flying over the famous Golden Gate Bridge or visit Alcatraz Island. Learn the basics of flying at our flight school or jump right into the captain's seat and land the majestic 747 at one of the busiest airports of the world. FEATURES 22 aircraft included: - A320 - B737-500 - B747-400 - B777-300ER - C172, Baron 58 - EC135 and Robinson R22 Beta II helicopters - F-15, F-18, Aermacchi MB-339 - King Air C90 GTx, Learjet 45 - Extra 330, Pitts S-2B biplane, Bücker Jungmeister - Corsair F4U, P-38 Lightning, Sopwith Camel - ASG 29 and Swift S1 gliders - Dash-8 Q400 (available as free DLC) Highly detailed and interactive 3D cockpits Adjustable cockpit lighting at night time Realistic flight physics Interactive Flight school for learning the basics of flying High resolution aerial images and over 200 airports for the South West of the United States World wide elevation and aerial images Display terrain features like mountains, lakes and cities for easy VFR navigation Route editor for easy flight planning Adjustable time of day Adjustable wind, clouds, visibility, thermal activity and turbulence Replay system Different view modes Support for multiple joysticks, throttle units, rudder pedals and more TrackIR support Full Oculus Rift VR support and full Oculus Touch controller support HTC Vive VR support and full Vive Controller support Support for Saitek Multi Panel, Radio Panel, Switch Panel and Saitek TPM

X-Plane 10 Global is a highly realistic flight simulator, now in its latest 64-bit version. It offers PC, Mac, and Linux users enhanced performance through multi-core support. Developed over nearly 20 years, X-Plane is designed for maximum flexibility. Its open structure allows enthusiasts to customize every aspect.

With thousands of available add-ons, X-Plane simulates virtually any aircraft. You can explore a vast world rendered with incredible detail. The simulator features:

*   **Realistic Flight Modeling:** A virtual wind tunnel creates accurate flight characteristics for all aircraft, from gliders to the Space Shuttle.
*   **Immersive World:** Incredible cloudscapes and detailed ground features like roads and cities enhance realism.
*   **Advanced Rendering:** A new engine with global illumination makes lights behave realistically.
*   **Dynamic Air Traffic:** Air Traffic Control guides you and manages other aircraft. These AI planes interact realistically with the environment, facing the same challenges as you.

X-Plane 10 Global is built to leverage modern hardware. Faster machines can simulate more aircraft and display greater detail. Even on moderate systems, it handles a large number of objects smoothly.

**Key Features:**

*   Super accurate flight characteristics via a virtual wind tunnel.
*   Includes 30 aircraft, from gliders to the Space Shuttle.
*   Online flying with other virtual pilots.
*   Realistic Air Traffic Control managing other aircraft.
*   Accurate terrain, roads, and more.
*   Global ‘Plausible World’ auto-generated scenery.
*   New rendering engine with innovative global lighting.
*   64-bit optimized.
*   Totally flexible and extendable with thousands of add-ons.
*   Includes super-detailed scenery for Nice (LFMN), Paderborn-Lippstadt (EDLP), and Faro (LPFR).
*   A printed “Quick Start Guide” is included.

**Default Scenery:** After installation via Steam, you receive the main simulator and the Seattle region. Additional scenery is available through free and optional DLCs, which are easy and quick to install.

**I am an Air Traffic Controller 4: Mastering Aviation Simulation**

"I am an Air Traffic Controller 4," a simulation game that debuted in 1998, has cultivated a devoted following within and outside the aviation sphere. This title immerses players in the crucial role of air traffic controllers, emphasizing their responsibility for ensuring aircraft safety. By stepping into these professionals' shoes, players navigate engaging scenarios to manage complex flight operations.

The core gameplay revolves around guiding aircraft safely and efficiently as a tower controller to successfully clear each stage. While the controls are designed for ease of learning—simply select an aircraft and click instruction buttons—true mastery demands precise judgment and impeccable timing. The game's dynamic nature means the state constantly evolves based on player decisions, presenting a significant challenge. A convenient feature allows players to resume from mid-game replays, even after experiencing a game over.

"I am an Air Traffic Controller 4" offers a diverse range of playable content to maintain player engagement. This includes standard game stages, an "Extra Stage" that introduces unique conditions for a more dynamic experience, and an "Original Stage" where players can customize their gameplay by selecting the time, wind direction, and specific airport sections.

The game prominently features **Haneda Airport**, Tokyo's bustling aviation hub. This airport is renowned for its capacity and prestige, boasting four runways, accommodating over 80 million annual passengers (both domestic and international), and handling more than 400,000 flight slots.

Name: Aero Battle
Description:
Aero Battle - indie simulator of air battles, executed in 2D hand-drawn graphics. In the game, you need to control an aircraft and defeat enemy fighters, which over time will become stronger and increase in numbers, so you should always be on your guard. To simplify your task, you can pick up one of these boosters: Also, earn coins to buy cooler planes. Good luck in battle!

Name: Space Battle SVF
Description:
This game is a 3D space flight shooter. Arcade type game. Features of the game Player will be on board the SVF -97 to fight enemy fleets in space. An arcade game where you select levels to complete. Five levels. Completing a level allows you to select the next level. Missions include supporting the ally space battleship, fighting enemy fleets and destroying the enemy space fortress, etc. The description of the mission appears in the main menu text. There are two types of weapons as follows: A rapid fire missile pod with a 100 shot charge. A missile pod that shoots out 20 missiles in one go. Controls Move(Horizontal axis): A, D, Mouse Move(Vertical axis): Mouse When you move the mouse up, the spacecraft faces down. When you move the mouse down, the spacecraft faces up. Speed: W, S Use weapon: Left Mouse Button Change weapon: Right Mouse Button Pause: ESC Options: Press ESC on the main menu. Partial Xbox controller support Select button: A, Left stick(in menu screen) Move: Right stick, Left stick Use weapon: LB, A Change weapon: RB, B This game is not a flight simulator. Not supported: mouse inversion, mouse sensitivity setting, etc. If you have a problem with the translation, please press the language button first. This game does not use music composed by Sonic-Alpha. You can freely distribute videos.

Name: Airship Killer
Description:
airplane killer - We only dream of peace - the enemies are preparing a treacherous attack on your homeland, which you simply cannot forgive them. In this sidescroll shooter, you board your plane and go to the enemy's lair to destroy it once and for all! Use all possible tricks and tactics in order not to lose in this dishonest battle, collect bonuses and first-aid kits and blow them all up! Can you overcome all the incredible levels and get to the very end? Peculiarities: - Nice graphics - Nice soundtrack by Ozzed

**Dota 2: A Deep and Evolving Battlefield with Infinite Possibilities**

Dota 2 stands as the **most-played game on Steam**, attracting millions of players daily who engage in epic battles as one of over a hundred unique Dota heroes. Whether you're a seasoned veteran with thousands of hours logged or a newcomer just starting your journey, Dota 2 consistently offers **new discoveries and challenges**. The game's gameplay, features, and heroes are in a state of **constant evolution** thanks to regular updates, giving Dota 2 a dynamic and ever-changing life of its own.

The core appeal of Dota 2 lies in its **unparalleled diversity of heroes, abilities, and powerful items**, ensuring that no two matches are ever the same. Each hero possesses the flexibility to fulfill multiple roles, and a vast array of items allows players to adapt and meet the specific demands of any given game. Dota 2 **doesn't impose limitations on how you play; instead, it empowers you to express your unique style and strategic approach**.

Crucially, **all heroes in Dota 2 are completely free to play**. The game's commitment to **competitive balance is paramount**, and to ensure a fair playing field for everyone, the essential game content, including the extensive roster of heroes, is accessible to all players from the outset. While players can acquire cosmetic items for their heroes and decorative add-ons for the game world, **everything necessary to participate and enjoy the core gameplay is included before you even join your first match**.

Dota 2 offers a welcoming environment for new players, encouraging you to **bring your friends and party up**. Despite its depth and continuous evolution, it is **never too late to join the Dota 2 community**. You can begin by learning the fundamentals through cooperative matches against bots, or hone your skills in the dedicated hero demo mode. The game's sophisticated **behavior- and skill-based matchmaking system** is designed to ensure that you are consistently paired with players of similar aptitude, creating enjoyable and balanced matches every time.

Orcs Must Die! Unchained significantly elevates the beloved action tower defense series with its introduction of thrilling 3-player team-based gameplay. This evolution pushes the boundaries of strategic combat and trap-laying mayhem, promising an experience that is "Orcs Must Die! 3 and much, much more," as noted by Polygon. PCGames N further emphasizes this progression, stating, "Unfortunately for orcs, it’s better than ever." Hardcore Gamer confirms the game's authentic feel, asserting, "Unchained undeniably felt like an Orcs Must Die! game." Prepare for a considerably heightened challenge, as the stakes are higher, the traps are more gruesome, and the relentless invaders are even more insatiable, demanding your absolute best and the aid of your most formidable allies.

Set within the familiar, humorously depicted fantasy universe, Orcs Must Die! Unchained unfolds years after the conclusion of Orcs Must Die! 2. Heroes emerge from all corners of existence to contend for dominion over newly discovered rifts and the worlds beyond them. In the intervening years, Maximillian and Gabriella have worked to re-establish the once-powerful Order. However, their new adversaries, the Unchained, are no longer the unthinking masses of the past; they represent a meticulously organized army spearheaded by their own formidable heroes.

The core gameplay masterfully blends intense action with strategic planning, allowing players to collaborate with friends to decimate millions of monstrous invaders. The primary objective is to construct an unbreachable network of traps designed to dismember, pulverize, and incinerate enemies before they can breach the sanctity of the rift.

**Key gameplay features and modes include:**

*   **Trap Customization and Upgrades:** The thrill of devising ingenious traps is amplified by the ability to unlock new ones and enhance existing ones for devastating effectiveness. Players will meticulously fortify their strongholds with a variety of diabolical contraptions, engineering hilariously violent fates for the encroaching hordes. Each encounter necessitates a unique strategic approach, as the combined forces of elemental powers and physics provide potent tools against the relentless waves of enemies.
*   **Diverse Hero Roster:** The game challenges players to prove their mettle as mages capable of defending the rifts. A wide array of distinct and potent heroes, each offering deep gameplay mechanics, presents an abundance of creatively brutal methods for halting the advance of orcs. Familiar faces like Max and Gabriella return to join forces with new heroes such as Blackpaw, Hogarth, Stinkeye, and Bloodspike. Whether players favor brute strength or cunning, there is a hero perfectly suited for every orc-slaying disposition.
*   **Varied Game Modes:**
    *   **Survival Mode:** This mode allows players to ascend the ranks of orc-slayers through cooperative 3-player defense gameplay, a feature sure to delight every dedicated Orcs Must Die! enthusiast.
    *   **Weekly Challenges and Daily Quests:** These provide opportunities for players to acquire additional traps and upgrade components.
    *   **Endless Mode:** The perennial favorite, Endless mode, makes a triumphant return, now enhanced with 3-player cooperative play.
    *   **Sabotage Mode:** This entirely new mode pits two teams of three players against each other in a competitive race to achieve the highest score, employing spells and bosses to disrupt their opponents.

Orcs Must Die! Unchained introduces the exhilarating new Sabotage mode, offering a fresh and dynamic way to engage with the game's mechanics. In this fast-paced mode, players form a team to defend their rift while simultaneously, on the same map but in a parallel dimension, another team actively works against them. These opposing players can deploy spells, minions, and colossal bosses to distract and impede your team, thereby depleting your rift points. Players can retaliate in kind, employing their own disruptive tactics. The team that accumulates the most rift points by the match's conclusion emerges victorious.

Name: Plants vs. Zombies GOTY Edition
Description:
Zombies are invading your home, and the only defense is your arsenal of plants! Armed with an alien nursery-worth of zombie-zapping plants like peashooters and cherry bombs, you'll need to think fast and plant faster to stop dozens of types of zombies dead in their tracks. Obstacles like a setting sun, creeping fog and a swimming pool add to the challenge, and with five game modes to dig into, the fun never dies! Features Play five game modes: Adventure, Mini-Games, Puzzle, Survival, plus the stress-free Zen Garden Conquer all 50 levels of Adventure mode  through day, night, and fog, in a swimming pool and on the rooftop Battle 26 types of zombies including pole-vaulters, snorkelers and Zomboni drivers Earn 49 powerful perennials and collect coins to buy a pet snail, power-ups and more! Open the Almanac to see all the plants and zombies, plus amusing facts and quotes Browse Crazy Daves shop for special plants and tools to stem any zombie assault Amazing graphics and soundtrack, plus a bonus music video Infinite replayability: the game is never the same experience twice! Unlock all the Steam Achievements

Name: The Last Friend
Description:
In a world that has become yet another post-apocalyptic future where humanity is distracted by chaos, destruction, rampant mutants and a thing called surviving, something even more sinister is afoot... The World's doggos are disappearing! Now enters Alpha (you) who at an early age lost his man's best friend... While traveling the wastelands he comes across some mutants up to no good dognapping a lost puppy! During this battle he discovers has the ability to understand what the pup can say and his name is T. Juan! Now T. Juan joins Alpha on this grand adventure looking for answers about what truly has happened to all the doggos. It’s time to join them and put dem paws to the pavement! Woof! Got to Pet them All From the warm and fluffy Newfoundland who has a healing passive, the Tibetan Mastiff with a beast mode unlocked, and to the ever charismatic Beagle, it's up to you to rescue these fearless pups and then set them loose on the bad guys! Welcome to the World, Pup The world has changed and some could even say it’s gone to the dog house…WOOF!!! Get ready to explore deserted badlands, ruined cities, a military base or two and not to mention forgotten jungles teeming with challenges as you set out in an upgradable RV! Who let the ‘Brawl’ out It’s a dog eat dog world out there so best bring your best when it comes to going all paws with the various bad guys you’ll be sure to face! A Unique Bark on Tower Defense Your bite isn’t your only defense when dealing with overly tanned mutants, electrifying enemies, and one or two tofu aficionados! From super soakers, steel walls, and wire traps you’ll have your pick of the litter when it comes to offensive and defensive options to protect your yard!

**Forge Your Path on a Hostile Alien World in The Riftbreaker**

Embark on an extraordinary mission as Captain Ashley S. Nowak, the formidable Riftbreaker, an elite scientist and commando encased in a powerful Mecha-Suit. Your one-way journey takes you through a portal to Galatea 37, a distant planet in the far reaches of the Milky Way Galaxy. Your primary objective is to establish a base capable of facilitating your return to Earth and paving the way for future colonization efforts. Ashley's advanced Mecha-suit, affectionately named 'Mr. Riggs', is engineered to withstand the most extreme environmental conditions and is equipped with a comprehensive suite of tools for base construction, resource extraction, specimen gathering, and, of course, combat. This remarkable suit also possesses the capability to traverse rifts, enabling instantaneous travel across vast interstellar distances.

The core gameplay of The Riftbreaker revolves around several key pillars:

*   **Base Building:** Your ultimate goal is to construct a stable, two-way rift back to Earth. This ambitious undertaking is a highly complex endeavor, demanding immense power reserves. Conventional solar collectors and modest quantities of steel will prove insufficient. Instead, you must meticulously develop an intricate network of mines, refineries, power plants, and research facilities to achieve this critical mission objective.
*   **Defense:** Your presence on Galatea 37 will inevitably attract attention. As your industrial operations expand and disrupt the planet's natural equilibrium, you will be perceived as a significant threat. Consequently, **fortifying your base is paramount**. Erect robust walls, deploy strategic barriers, and construct formidable defense towers to repel increasingly aggressive assaults that escalate with each passing day. Prepare to confront thousands of hostile creatures intent on eradicating your presence from their world.
*   **Exploration:** Galatea 37, situated within the Sycorax belt of the Milky Way galaxy, remains largely uncharted territory. Initial long-distance surveys indicated its habitability and suitability for colonization. The planet is teeming with rare minerals and unique substances, discoverable across its diverse landscapes. Encounter varied biomes that may surprise you with exotic fauna and flora, alongside challenging weather phenomena. Establish localized outposts in resource-rich zones, utilizing rift technology to efficiently transport essential materials back to your main base.
*   **Campaign:** Undertake an epic narrative journey that traverses all the distinct biomes of Galatea 37. You will establish multiple persistent bases strategically positioned across the planet, serving as the economic backbone of your operations. Dedicate time to researching alien substances and indigenous lifeforms, while simultaneously engaging in intense combat against swarms of alien creatures who clearly resent your intrusion into their natural habitat. The campaign offers a substantial playtime and provides a remarkable degree of player agency within a meticulously detailed, procedurally generated world. You possess the autonomy to dictate your priorities and select the technologies you wish to develop, as you are the sole human inhabitant of this alien frontier.
*   **Survival:** Your mission in this mode is to endure for a predetermined duration, fending off progressively challenging waves of enemy creatures. Each survival mission is procedurally generated, offering an almost limitless potential for replayability and unique challenges.
*   **Sandbox:** For those who prefer a less intense experience, the Sandbox mode offers complete control over the game's parameters. You can manipulate resource availability, enemy spawn rates, weather conditions, and numerous other settings to craft your ideal gameplay scenario.

**Customize Your Experience:**

The Riftbreaker™ offers extensive customization options to tailor the gameplay precisely to your preferred playstyle. You have the ability to adjust the frequency, strength, and numbers of enemy attacks, as well as resource abundance, weather events, enemy damage output, and a multitude of other settings. Furthermore, multiple difficulty presets are available, catering to both seasoned strategy enthusiasts seeking a demanding challenge and players who desire a more relaxed base-building experience.

**Community-Driven Development:**

If you've reached this point and are intrigued by our vision, we invite you to actively participate in shaping the future of The Riftbreaker. Engage with us on our forums, join our official Discord server, or connect through any of our social media channels. We will be sharing exclusive insights into our development progress and eagerly await your valuable feedback. Your input is crucial in helping us create the ultimate Riftbreaker game that you, our players, truly want to experience.

Name: Orcs Must Die! 2
Description:
You’ve tossed, burned and sliced them by the thousands – now orcs must die more than ever before! Grab a friend and slay orcs in untold numbers in this sequel to the 2011 AIAS Strategy Game of the Year from Robot Entertainment. Leap back into the fray as a powerful War Mage or crafty Sorceress. Defend new fortresses and dwarven mines, laying waste to thousands of orcs and other monsters with a dizzying array of weapons, spells, guardians, traps, and trinkets. Play co-op with a friend and continue the battle in a brand new campaign mode, or fight to stay alive in the challenging new Endless Mode! Unlock new defenses and old favorites, upgrade them like never before, and unleash them on the nearest pile of slobbering orcs! Key Features: Co-Op! - Play as the War Mage, the headstrong hero who charges into danger, or play as the more strategic Sorceress who keeps the mob at bay with mind-control and magic. Story-based Campaign – Pick up where the original game left off with a brand new story-based campaign that you can play in Single-Player or Co-Op! New Endless Mode - Play alone or join a friend to put your skills to the test against endless waves of increasingly difficult enemies. Classic Mode - Steam players who own the original Orcs Must Die! will automatically unlock co-op versions of 10 levels from the original game featuring new enemies! Over 20 Deadly Enemies - Face an army of vile new creatures like Earth Elementals, Trolls, and Bile Bats. And they’ve brought all of your favorite trap-fodder from the original Orcs Must Die! along with them! More than 50 Traps, Weapons, and Guardians – Choose from an enormous armory of new and classic defenses, including an all new assortment of magical trinkets. Massive Upgrade System – With more than 225 persistent trap and weapon upgrades to unlock, you can build an arsenal perfectly suited to your slaying style. Extensive Replayability – Multiple game modes, “Nightmare” difficulty, and an enormous skull-ranking system provide hours of replayability Scoring System and Leaderboard – Compete with your friends for supremacy on single-player and co-op leaderboards!

**Orcs Must Die!**

In this fantasy action-strategy game from Robot Entertainment, you'll need to defeat hordes of orcs using any means necessary. As a powerful War Mage, you have access to a variety of weapons, spells, and traps. Your mission is to defend twenty-four fortresses from waves of enemies, including ogres, hellbats, and numerous orcs.

**Gameplay Highlights:**

*   **Defend 24 Fortresses:** Protect diverse locations, from narrow passages to open chambers.
*   **Master 6 Weapons and Spells:** Utilize tools like crossbows, bladestaffs, and elemental magic.
*   **Deploy 19 Traps and Minions:** Choose from traps like arrow walls, spike traps, and spinning blades, or summon allies to aid you.
*   **Face 11 Unique Enemies:** Battle a variety of foes, including ogres and hellbats, alongside the main orc threat.
*   **Engage in a Story Campaign:** Progress through three acts to uncover the reason behind the orc invasion.
*   **Unlock Persistent Upgrades:** Improve your traps as you advance through the game.
*   **Enjoy High Replayability:** Challenge yourself with "Nightmare Mode" and a skull ranking system.
*   **Compete on Leaderboards:** Aim for the top spot as the "Best Orc Killer" and challenge your friends.

The game offers multiple difficulty levels, including the challenging "Nightmare Mode." You can choose to roast orcs in lava, crush them with ceiling traps, or freeze and shatter them. The strategic choices you make with your weapons and traps will ensure an exciting orc-slaying experience.

Monday Night Combat is a **thrilling class-based, third-person shooter** that redefines the future of competitive gaming. It's not just a game; it's the most popular lethal sport of the future, masterfully blending **intense combat, brutal finishing moves, and exciting gameshow-like challenges** to deliver an unparalleled action experience. Forget fighting for abstract concepts like "honor" or "duty." In Monday Night Combat, the ultimate prize is the **real American dream: cash, fame, and lucrative endorsements!**

**Key Features of Monday Night Combat:**

Prepare for the **Throwback Throwdown** in Monday Night Combat! Uncle Tully’s Funland has been revamped with exciting new gameplay features. First, meet **Chickey Cantor**, who now spawns in Uncle Tully’s Funland. Your objective is to make Chickey fly away by shooting him, earning your entire team a **powerful single-life buff**. Alternatively, wait for Chickey to slam the ground, then **grapple him and ride him for eight seconds to earn substantial cash rewards**. However, be warned: riders become **easy targets for enemy Pros**.

Secondly, Monday Night Combat introduces **new bot spawners**. These specialized spawners feature buttons for precisely deploying **Jackbots, Black Jacks, Slims, Scramblers, Gremlins, Gapshots, and Bouncers**. The **Co-op Blitz mode** allows players to defend their precious Money Ball against relentless robot armies, either solo or with up to four players via Steam. During various Blitz challenges, the money you earn from destroying bots can be strategically spent on **building defensive turrets** around the Moneyball, **upgrading one of six unique character classes**, or activating **devastating robot-crushing environmental hazards**.

The challenges within Co-op Blitz mode are diverse, ranging from a **ten-round Exhibition Blitz** to surviving endless waves of robots with ever-increasing difficulty in the **Super Sudden Death Blitz**. All money earned from each Challenge contributes to your **persistent Lifetime Earnings**. This cumulative wealth unlocks **over 370 ProTags**, allows you to **create custom classes**, and secures your position on the **global Leaderboards**.

In **Competitive Multiplayer Crossfire mode**, teams of players clash head-to-head via Steam. Each team is bolstered by an endless stream of robots fighting on their behalf. To achieve victory, you must **overwhelm your opponent’s robot stream, strategically upgrade your Pros, and fortify your base defenses**.

**Customizable Characters and Persistent Progression:**

Every Pro in Monday Night Combat is meticulously designed to cater to a **unique playstyle**, complete with their own set of **upgradeable skills**. You can further refine these skills and abilities through a wide array of unlockable items within the **Custom Class feature**.
