SUPERHOT VR stands apart as a truly original hybrid puzzle-shooter title, unlike anything you've experienced before. The game intentionally blurs the lines of reality, prompting players to question what is real as they become immersed in its unique mechanics. This innovative approach has earned it numerous accolades, including decisive wins for VR Game of the Year from prestigious award ceremonies.

### Reimagined and Redesigned for VR

This acclaimed title has been meticulously reimagined and redesigned from the ground up specifically for VR and hand-tracking controllers. The result of over three years of close collaboration between the critically acclaimed SUPERHOT Team and Oculus, SUPERHOT VR delivers the intensely visceral action of the original SUPERHOT directly into your virtual world, immersing you completely.

### Award-Winning Recognition

SUPERHOT VR's excellence has been recognized with a multitude of prestigious awards, solidifying its position as a leader in virtual reality gaming. Notable accolades include:

*   GDCA Best VR Game 2018 Winner
*   SXSW Best VR Game 2018 Winner
*   DICE Awards Immersive Reality Game of The Year 2017 Winner
*   New York Game Awards Best Virtual Reality Game 2017 Winner
*   Unity Vision Summit Virtual Reality Game 2017 Winner
*   Pixel.Awards Best Virtual Reality Game 2017 Winner
*   Digital Dragons Best Virtual Reality Game 2017 Winner

The game also received nominations, such as GDCA Best VR Game 2017 nominee and SXSW Trending Game of the Year 2017 nominee, further underscoring its impact.

### The SUPERHOT FOREVER Update

SUPERHOT VR now includes the massive SUPERHOT FOREVER update, significantly expanding the game's replayability with hours of new challenges, achievements, and hardcore endless levels. This update enhances the core time-bending gameplay with exciting new modes:

*   **Headshot Challenge:** Test your precision where only headshots can eliminate enemies.
*   **Score Attack:** Race against your personal best scores in both bullet-time and real-time.
*   **No Shooting Mode:** Attempt to complete the game without firing a single shot.
*   **Hardcore Mode:** Face faster enemies and reduced reaction times for an intensified experience.

### Embrace the System

This game is designed to test your limits and push you to your absolute best, delivering a challenging yet rewarding experience. As you overcome its trials, you will become one with the system, transcending your previous limitations. SUPERHOT VR transforms you, making you "ONE OF US," independent and unbound by conventional gameplay. "MIND CONTROL DELETE" will ultimately set you free.

Monday Night Combat is a thrilling third-person shooter where players compete in a popular, lethal sport. This game uniquely blends intense combat, satisfying finishing moves, and engaging gameshow challenges. Instead of fighting for abstract ideals, players battle for cash, fame, and endorsements, embodying the American dream.

### New Content and Gameplay

**The Throwback Throwdown in Uncle Tully's Funland**

Uncle Tully's Funland, now part of the Crossfire map, introduces exciting new gameplay. A new character, Chickey Cantor, spawns here. Shooting Chickey makes him fly away, granting your team a significant single-life buff. After Chickey lands, players can grapple and ride him for eight seconds to earn in-game currency. However, riders are vulnerable to enemy Pros.

**New Bot Spawners**

Specialized bot spawners allow players to summon various enemy types, including Jackbots, Black Jacks, Slims, Scramblers, Gremlins, Gapshots, and Bouncers.

### Game Modes

**Co-op Blitz Mode**

Defend your Money Ball against waves of robots in this cooperative mode. Play solo or with up to four players via Steam. Earned money can be spent on defensive turrets, character class enhancements, or environmental hazards. Challenges range from the ten-round Exhibition Blitz to the Super Sudden Death Blitz with endless, escalating robot waves.

**Competitive Multiplayer Crossfire Mode**

Teams battle each other on Steam, supported by endless streams of robots. Success depends on overwhelming enemy robot forces, upgrading Pros, and fortifying base defenses.

### Progression and Customization

**Persistent Progression**

Money earned from challenges contributes to your Lifetime Earnings. This unlocks over 370 ProTags, allows custom class creation, and helps you achieve high Leaderboard rankings.

**Customizable Characters**

Each Pro character has a unique playstyle and upgradeable skills. Players can further refine these abilities with unlockable items through the Custom Class feature.

**Persistent Stats and ProTags**

Every match awards money that accumulates towards Lifetime Earnings. This currency unlocks custom classes and earned ProTags. Your total Lifetime Earnings also determines your player level. The game meticulously tracks persistent statistics. Over 370 'ProTags' are available to display to other players.

**Dedicated Servers**

The game supports hosting multiple instances of Monday Night Combat on dedicated servers, with a full standalone client for robust online play.

Name: Plants vs. Zombies™ Garden Warfare 2: Deluxe Edition
Description:
Ready the Peashooters and prepare for the craziest, funniest shooter in the universe: Plants vs. Zombies Garden Warfare 2. Dr. Zomboss has conquered Suburbia and transformed it into a zombie-filled, plant-free paradise. Help the plants reclaim their turf in the new 24-player Herbal Assault, or choose your side in 4-player co-op or solo play. With new modes, classes and loads of humor, Plants vs. Zombies Garden Warfare 2 lets you wage war on seriousness (and your friends!) however you want. Plants vs. Zombies Garden Warfare 2 also introduces the Backyard Battleground, your very own interactive hub where you and up to 3 friends can take on daily quests and challenges and interact with your favorite PvZ characters. Deluxe Edition includes: Grass Effect Z7 Imp and Mech Character Variant Exclusive Plant Class Custom Accessories Pack Exclusive Zombie Class Custom Accessories Pack Phenomenal Character Variant Pack 200,000 Coins Starter Pack Emoji Pack Key Features: Plants attack. This time, bring the fight to the zombies. Go on the offensive as the plants to reclaim Suburbia, or stop the botanical invasion and preserve Zomburbia in all-new game modes. More characters, classes, and skins. 6 new classes join the cast, making for 14 playable character classes. Choose from more than 100 playable plants and zombies from the past, present and future and stand out as you fight. Play your way. Plants vs. Zombies Garden Warfare 2 delivers tons of lawn-inspiring game modes so you can play together or by yourself. Need some company? Play in the new Herbal Assault mode and join 24-players online to duke it out all over Suburbia. Or join the plants or the zombies and team up in 4-player co-op mode. And if you want, you can even play solo! A living PvZ world. The struggle for Suburbia is in full bloom across 12 maps bursting with personality and humor. Fight your way through Zombossified cityscapes and crowded airspaces, all layered with hidden secrets waiting to be discovered.

Name: Gears 5
Description:
From one of gaming’s most acclaimed sagas, Gears 5 relaunches with brand new features. Campaign: With all-out war descending, Kait Diaz breaks away to uncover her connection to the enemy and discovers the true danger to Sera – herself. New campaign features let you take your character and weapon skins into new playthroughs and enjoy bonus difficulties and modifiers. PvP: May the best team win! With new modes and content since Launch, Versus rewards every competitive style, from casual to pro. PvE: Co-operatively battle to survive. Pick your character, pick your class, and hunker down in Horde or push through in Escape. Three-player Campaign Co-op: Battle alongside your friends in three-player online or split-screen co-op. Accessibility: Customize your gaming experience with updated accessibility features, including full controller remapping, single stick movement, Adaptive Controller support, narrated UI and menus, improved subtitles and more. Xbox Profile Required. Sign in with your existing profile or create one for free.

Name: Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville™
Description:
Welcome to Neighborville, where all is well. Except that a crazy, new, coniferous conflict between brain-less and botanicals is brewing! What are you gonna do, call the crops? Soil your plants? Prepare to kick some grass in a plant-on-zombie conflict that will take you to the outer edges of Neighborville and back again. KEY FEATURES Go All Out in Online Multiplayer - Jump into the fray with up to 24 players in online multiplayer across a gigantic suburban skirmish. Bring the unique abilities of each character class to 6 PvP modes–including the new Battle Arena–and experience the unbeleafable thrills of combat. Venture to the Outer Edges of Neighborville - The tension across the terra has expanded with free-roam regions that extend beyond the town of Neighborville. Squad up with up to 3 friends in the Giddy Park social region and take back Weirding Woods, Mount Steep and Neighborville Town Centre. It’s grow time! Customize Every Character for Battle - Join the newest bloom in the age-old battle between plants and zombies with 20 fully customizable classes at launch, including a Team Play class for each faction. Deck every character out with ludicrous looks and wacky weapons that show off your unique personality. NOTE: SPLIT SCREEN COUCH CO-OP NOT AVAILABLE ON PC VERSION. The Deluxe Edition includes the base game and outrageous exclusive content. Rock out with the Judge Z costume for 80s Action Hero, peck your battles with Peashooter’s Chickpea costume, express yourself with 5 explosive emojis, and learn about Battle for Neighborville in a special digital comic. Deluxe Edition exclusive content includes: Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville Standard Edition Legendary Chickpea costume for Peashooter Legendary Judge Z costume for 80s Action Hero Digital comic 5 emojis

Name: Super Meat Boy
Description:
Super Meat Boy is a tough as nails platformer where you play as an animated cube of meat who's trying to save his girlfriend (who happens to be made of bandages) from an evil fetus in a jar wearing a tux. Our meaty hero will leap from walls, over seas of buzz saws, through crumbling caves and pools of old needles. Sacrificing his own well being to save his damsel in distress. Super Meat Boy brings the old school difficulty of classic NES titles like Mega Man 2, Ghost and Goblins and Super Mario Bros. 2 (The Japanese one) and stream lines them down to the essential no BS straight forward twitch reflex platforming. Ramping up in difficulty from hard to soul crushing SMB will drag Meat boy though haunted hospitals, salt factories and even hell itself. And if 300+ single player levels weren't enough SMB also throws in epic boss fights, a level editor and tons of unlock able secrets, warp zones and hidden characters. Story mode, featuring over 300 levels spanning 5+ chapters Play as a Head Crab! (Steam Exclusive) 33 legitimate Achievements Warp zones that will warp you into other games Over 16 unlockable able and playable characters from popular indie titles such as, Minecraft, Bit.Trip, VVVVVV and Machinarium Epic Boss fights Full Level Editor and Level Portal (January 2011) A story so moving you will cry yourself to sleep for the rest of your life

**Octahedron: Transfixed Edition - A Psychedelic Action Platformer**

Dive into the vibrant, underground world of Octahedron: Transfixed Edition, a challenging psychedelic action platformer where you'll defy gravity and surf on dynamically appearing platforms, all synchronized to a pumping beat. This unique game invites players to explore a subterranean realm, scaling colorful summits and escaping the clutches of Veetragoul.

The core gameplay revolves around **platforms that materialize from thin air**, allowing you to spawn them at your feet with a simple button press and surf them until their energy depletes. As you ascend, you'll encounter **neon-powered upgrades** that enhance your platforming abilities, enabling you to fry enemies with laser beams, crumble walls, and solve intricate puzzles. The game features **hand-crafted delight** across 50 unique levels, where collecting shards of the Octahedron unlocks new worlds, bonus levels, and earns you special medals. Mastering the **tight controls** is essential for pixel-perfect platforming, as you navigate obstacles and enemies that move in perfect sync with the **thumping tunes**. Immerse yourself in an atmospheric soundtrack featuring music by renowned artists like Chipzel (known for Super Hexagon), Andre Sobota, and Monomirror.

**Star Drift Evolution: Master the Art of Powersliding**

Experience **Star Drift Evolution**, a minimalistic racing game that puts your driving skills to the ultimate test. This game is all about **precision and mastery**, where powersliding through corners is not just an option, but the **fastest way to drive**. Success hinges on your ability to **pick the right car for the right track** and execute each turn with flawless perfection. Are you ready to prove your mettle?

**Physics with a Satisfying Sense of Weight**

Dive into a driving experience defined by **refined physics** that deliver both style and challenge. Feel the **weight of the car** as you throw it into tight corners, mastering the art of the slide like a true champion.

**Conquer 75 Diverse Tracks**

Explore a vast array of tracks, from **simple dirt ovals** to intricate, **challenging point-to-point courses**. Each offers a unique test of your drifting prowess.

**Choose Your Perfect Ride from Over 50 Cars**

With **more than 50 cars**, each boasting distinct stats, you'll need to find the ideal vehicle for every track. Strategize by considering attributes like **top speed, acceleration, grip, and downforce**.

**Compete in Multiple Modes**

*   **Single Player Career:** Race against AI opponents and conquer **450 Star Challenges**.
*   **Online Multiplayer:** Engage in 'Trackmania Style' races for up to 20 players, featuring **no car collisions** so everyone can focus on perfecting their lines.
*   **Split Screen Multiplayer:** Challenge up to 4 friends in local split-screen races. You can even tackle Career Star Challenges together in **co-op mode**.

**Customize Your Play Style**

Select your preferred viewpoint with **classic top-down cameras** or immersive **arcade chase cams**. You can even **customize your own camera settings** to race your way.

**Easy to Learn, Difficult to Master**

Star Drift Evolution features **simple controls, no grind, and a clean UI**, allowing you to jump into the action quickly and become competitive immediately. The focus is squarely on the **core gameplay: mastering the art of drifting**.

**Climb the Leaderboards**

Utilize the **automatic ghost replay system** to challenge your opponents' best times. Constantly face the ghost of the next player on the leaderboard as you ascend the ranks.

**Immerse Yourself in the Soundtrack**

Enjoy a curated selection of **over 25 retro and synthwave tracks** from talented artists like Kenobit, Electroshark, and Luke McQueen II.

**Full Controller and Wheel Support**

The game offers **full controller support** with the ability to manually remap buttons in-game. While wheel support has been reported by testers (e.g., Thrustmaster T150 with manual mapping), it cannot be guaranteed for all wheels.

Name: TrackMania² Canyon
Description:
TrackMania² Canyon will let you experience the fun and adrenaline of racing stunning cars on sensational tracks in a major enhanced sequel to Nadeo Studio’s online racing phenomenon TrackMania, already enjoyed by millions of players. TrackMania² Canyon goes far beyond traditional driving games with racing in a fully customizable world of tracks generated and powered by players themselves! With loops, wall rides, ramps and a multitude of other stunts, you’re in for the ride of your life. Key Features INCREDIBLE NEW GRAPHICS: Race in a stunning Canyon environment with infinite possibilities and optimized to run on most PC’s UNIQUE THRILLING RACING EXPERIENCE: The car feels more realistic and the handling is more precise than ever. INTUITIVE AND ACCESSIBLE GAMEPLAY in both solo and multiplayer modes. TrackMania² Canyon brings back the ease in gameplay that was seen in the TrackMania series and intuitive creative instruments. ENHANCED CREATIVE FREEDOM on tracks, cars and scripts. More design elements and programmable parameters than ever before. EMBEDDED COMMUNITY INSTRUMENTS: Share amazing creations and video highlights with people from all over the world. IN-GAME VIDEO STUDIO: Edit TV-quality highlights of your best races. A VERY ACTIVE COMMUNITY which provides incredibly numerous and diverse user generated activities. TrackMania² Canyon offers in-depth customization and distribution system. FUN AND CRAZY MULTIPLAYER: 100+ players can challenge each other at once on the same track! OFFICIAL RANKINGS in both solo and multiplayer modes. A VERY SOLID INFRASTRUCTURE, robust dedicated servers which enable more than 200,000 players to play daily. Thanks to this, TrackMania is still the most played online racing game worldwide as well as at E-Sports level.

In a city where information is strictly controlled, agile couriers called Runners carry sensitive data, evading constant surveillance. You play as Faith, a skilled Runner, in this first-person action-adventure game. Your sister has been framed for a crime in this seemingly perfect city, and now you are being relentlessly pursued.

Mirror's Edge™ puts you in Faith's shoes. You'll navigate a stunning, vertigo-inducing urban landscape, engaging in thrilling combat and high-speed chases. The game offers an unparalleled sense of movement and perspective, immersing you in Faith's dangerous world. Survival is your only option. Will you rise above or fall? Mastering the art of running is essential for your survival. Developed by the creators of the Battlefield franchise, Mirror's Edge is a unique action-adventure experience.

### Master Your Movement

Combine acrobatic moves like wall-runs, leaps, and vaults to navigate the city. Use every part of the cityscape to your advantage and escape.

### Experience True Immersion

The first-person view makes every action intense. Feel the dizzying heights, natural movements, and the fear of collisions and bullet impacts.

### Embrace the Challenge

Choose to fight or flee. Your speed and agility let you escape pursuers and disarm enemies. The game blends chase sequences, puzzles, and combat.

### Discover Runner Vision

Unlock Runner Vision to see the city like a Runner. Rooftops become pathways and escape routes. Understanding the city's flow keeps you moving and alive.

Name: Trackmania United Forever
Description:
TrackMania is the most entertaining car racing game ever. Millions of players play it in single or multiplayer modes. TrackMania United Forever is the ultimate TrackMania edition thanks to the numerous additions and innovations it has to offer. This version brings together all the environments of the series and comes with a huge, enriched single-player campaign including 4 different modes and 420 progressively difficult tracks. Drive at mind-blowing speed on today's most spectacular tracks. Soaring jumps, loops, hairpin bends, turbo boosts, track-breakers, rails and ramps...every track delivers a new and intense experience, offering sensational gaming across single and multiplayer modes. Features: 4 single player modes (Race, Platform, Stunt and Puzzle) on 420 spectacular progressively challenging tracks. 7 types of vehicles offering different gameplay and driving experiences in 7 TrackMania environments - of which one, Stadium, is compatible with the free game, TrackMania Nations Forever Solo and team based multiplayer modes. Join millions of players online on the TrackMania servers. A spectacular graphics update for the three historic environments (Desert, Snow and Rally. Integrated peer-to-peer sharing system to showcase all of your customizations with your opponents (modified vehicles, avatar...). Earn 'Coppers', the virtual currency of TrackMania players, by winning medals in solo mode or by trading your TrackMania creations with other players (cars, skins, tracks, videos...) Official rankings in solo and multiplayer. In solo play, along with earning medals for great racing, you can participate in official rankings by recording your best times on the game's tracks. Create your own tracks, vehicles and videos with the TrackMania editors, paint shop and movie studio! Continue with all your data from TrackMania Nations Forever, including medals, ladder positions, scores, and friends.

Name: Nimbus
Description:
Nimbus is a unique combination of racing & puzzling. The player controls a craft with no means of directly propelling itself and needs to use whatever is scattered around the levels to acquire thrust and reach the goal. Traverse a world map with several distinct islands in order to recover your lost love. Light on story, but heavy on gameplay Nimbus offers several hours of increasingly harder challenges. Key features: Over 50 levels available on the main campaign Unique game play that is easy to understand, but hard to master A varied blend of levels that requires a combination of skill & puzzle solving Plenty of opportunity for optimizing how you approach each level in order to beat the best times Several trails, levels and ships to unlock Loads of secrets & tricks

Name: Dustforce DX
Description:
Clean up the world with style! As an acrobatic janitor, you are an adept force against dust and disorder. Leap and dash off walls and ceilings, and deftly traverse precarious environments. Cleanse each level swiftly and thoroughly to achieve mastery in this 2D sweep-'em-up platformer. Key Features: Over 75 levels varying in difficulty from elegant exploration levels to intense challenges for hardcore players. Over 100 community-made levels included in their own area of the game. Compete on the online leaderboard and instantly watch replays of every players' best attempts. Play against your friends with local multiplayer matches. Roam through a myriad of beautiful environments accompanied by an original soundtrack. Make your own worlds with the level editor, and seamlessly share and play them with the rest of the community.

TrackMania² Valley represents the third distinct environment within TrackMania², the highly anticipated successor to Nadeo Studio's immensely popular online racing series, which has captivated millions of players worldwide. This new installment offers a fresh perspective on the beloved arcade rally racing genre, artfully blending arcade thrills with simulation depth, thereby marking a significant evolution in the landscape of racing games. As is characteristic of all TrackMania² titles, Valley provides a comprehensive solo campaign, an engaging deep multiplayer experience, and an expansive universe of user-generated content possibilities, all powered by the advanced ManiaPlanet system.

Key features of TrackMania² Valley include:

*   **Stunning Visuals:** Immerse yourself in a breathtaking Valley environment, offering limitless creative potential and optimized performance for a wide range of PCs.
*   **Unparalleled Racing Dynamics:** Experience a more realistic car feel and exceptionally precise handling, delivering a truly thrilling racing sensation.
*   **Accessible Gameplay:** Enjoy intuitive and accessible gameplay across both solo and multiplayer modes, recapturing the signature ease of the TrackMania series while introducing sophisticated creative tools.
*   **Expanded Creative Control:** Benefit from enhanced creative freedom in designing tracks, vehicles, and game scripts, with an unprecedented array of design elements and programmable parameters at your disposal.
*   **Integrated Community Tools:** Seamlessly share your remarkable creations and video highlights with a global community of players.
*   **In-Game Video Editing Suite:** Craft professional, TV-quality highlight reels of your most impressive races directly within the game.
*   **Vibrant Player Base:** Engage with an exceptionally active community that consistently generates a vast and diverse range of user-created content and activities. TrackMania 2 Valley facilitates in-depth customization and content distribution.
*   **Exhilarating Multiplayer:** Participate in exhilarating multiplayer sessions where over 100 players can compete simultaneously on the same track, fostering intense competition.
*   **Official Leaderboards:** Track your progress and achievements with official rankings available for both solo and multiplayer modes.

Name: Offspring Fling!
Description:
Offspring Fling is a game about a poor forest creature that has misplaced all of her children. She'll have to fight her way through over 100 levels of action puzzle platforming to get them all back home. There's danger around every corner, but she won't rest until her family is safe again. Key Features: An intense number of levels (Over 100!) Awesome puzzles, and rad platforming action Ghost replays to help you beat your best time Replay sharing that lets you race against others A lot of secret unlockables if you're cool enough! A beautiful soundtrack by Alec Holowka Throwing babies and watching them bounce off stuff! Cute and cuddly looking things to look at! Immense satisfaction

Name: EVE Online
Description:
THE #1 SPACE MMO EVE Online is the largest single shard space MMO of all time. With over 7,000 solar systems and nearly 20 years of rich player-created history, join this storied universe and play free to experience everything from immense PvP or PvE battles to mining, exploration, and industry. Seize your destiny as an immortal, a Capsuleer capable of piloting over 350 fully customizable starships from small, nimble Frigates to formidable Battleships and massive Freighters. Embark on a solo adventure through the twisting nexus of wormhole space, form a mighty industrial empire to transform athe building blocks of the universe, or take up arms with likeminded players to conquer vast frontiers together. Who will you be in New Eden? PLAY FREE Experience this vast spaceship MMO for free as an Alpha Clone with access to Frigates, Destroyers, Cruisers, Battlecruisers, and Battleships of any faction. Enterprising Capsuleers may also choose to upgrade to Omega Clone for unlimited Ship access and double training speed. SINGLE SHARD, SINGLE SERVER SANDBOX As a single sharded MMO, all players of EVE Online play on the same server across all timezones. Jump in and join thousands of players in the greatest space sandbox there is. Every decision you make, battle you win, and system you claim becomes a part of the long, rich history of New Eden. Where will you leave your mark? GAMING'S BIGGEST BATTLES There's no limit on what you can accomplish as a Capsuleer. EVE currently holds the Guinness World Record for the largest multiplayer video game PvP battle - 8,825 players in a single conflict. Take part in massive spaceship battles from day one or train up and command those fleets yourself. PLAYER DRIVEN ECONOMY EVE's player economy is one of unprecedented scale. The single shard nature of the universe makes for a single economy spread across thousands of space stations. Whether you want to trade on the local markets, produce new ships and equipment, or make cunning investments based on knowledge of player politics, it's all possible. LIMITLESS CHOICES Pursue a life of exploration, warfare, prosperity, or all of the above! Pilot over 350 different vessels and customize it to your liking with thousands of unique modules. Modify your ship as a fast and nimble fighter or design it from the ground up as a heavily shielded brawler to go toe to toe with others. Feeling lucky? Take a chance and modify your equipment further using alien technology found deep in Abyssal Deadspace. CONTINUOUS DEVELOPMENT With over 17 years of active development and free expansions, EVE is one of the longest running space MMOs out there. Join a thrilling universe filled with the unrelenting activity and combined history of millions of other players!

**STAR WARS™: Squadrons: Master the Art of Space Combat**

Prepare to **master the art of starfighter combat** in the authentic piloting experience that is STAR WARS™: Squadrons. This game plunges you into the heart of **first-person, multiplayer space dogfights**, allowing you to feel the adrenaline rush as you fight alongside your squadron. Enlist as a pilot and step into the cockpits of iconic starfighters from both the New Republic and Imperial fleets, engaging in **strategic 5v5 space battles**.

To truly dominate, you'll need to **modify your starfighter** and carefully adjust the composition of your squadron to perfectly suit varying playstyles and crush the opposition. Success hinges on teamwork; pilots will triumph together by completing tactical objectives across both familiar and **never-before-seen battlefields**. These include the awe-inspiring gas giant of Yavin Prime and the desolate, shattered moon of Galitan. Take command of legendary starfighters such as the nimble X-wing and the formidable TIE fighter.

**Customize your loadouts and cosmetics** to personalize your experience. A crucial element of gameplay involves **diverting power between weapons, shields, and engines**, immersing you deeply in the cockpit as you manage your ship's vital systems. For an unparalleled level of immersion, the **entire game can be played in virtual reality (VR)**, allowing you to truly live your STAR WARS pilot fantasy.

**The cockpit is your domain.** Utilize its intricate dashboards to your advantage. With only a thin hull of metal and glass separating you from the vast perils of space, you will **feel the raw intensity of combat from a visceral first-person perspective**. Embark on thrilling multiplayer modes and experience a unique single-player STAR WARS story that will draw you into the pilot's seat completely.

**STAR WARS™ Single-Player Story:**
Uncover the true meaning of being a pilot in the aftermath of Return of the Jedi. This compelling narrative unfolds from alternating perspectives between two distinct factions, featuring both iconic and emerging leaders locked in a desperate battle for control of the galaxy. The New Republic champions freedom, while the Empire enforces order. **Your skills are needed to join the galaxy's finest.**

**All Wings Report In:**
Strategize and plan your skirmishes with your squadron in the briefing room before launching into the evolving battlefields scattered across the galaxy. Compete in **intense 5v5 multiplayer dogfights**, or unite with your squadron to decisively tip the scales in monumental fleet battles. Together, you represent the galaxy's finest pilots.

**Master Legendary Starfighters:**
Take control of diverse classes of starfighters from both the New Republic and Imperial fleets, including the agile A-wing and the devastating TIE bomber. **Modify your ship, strategically divert power between its core systems**, and obliterate your opponents in thrilling, strategic space dogfights.

**The Mission is Clear:**
STAR WARS: Squadrons offers a **fully self-contained experience from day one**, where you earn rewards exclusively through gameplay. Climb the ranks and unlock new components such as advanced weapons, resilient hulls, powerful engines, enhanced shields, and unique cosmetic items. This clear path for progression ensures that the gameplay remains **fresh and engaging** throughout your journey.

Nexus - The Jupiter Incident plunges players into a 22nd-century space opera where mega-corporations vie for control of the solar system. This delicate balance is shattered by a discovery at the solar system's edge, igniting a new conflict known as 'The Jupiter Incident'.

This real-time, mission-based tactical space game delivers:

*   **Spectacular Battles:** Engage in breathtaking, motion picture-quality real-time combat.
*   **Strategic Gameplay:** Master tactics and action as you command up to a dozen battleships.
*   **Diverse Encounters:** Face off against aliens, explore unknown solar systems, and navigate astrophysical phenomena.
*   **Epic Campaign:** Embark on a grand adventure with 6 episodes and over 26 thrilling missions.
*   **Varied Mission Objectives:** Undertake missions including espionage, combat, stealth, sabotage, rescue, and scientific exploration.
*   **Customizable Fleet:** Control up to 10 highly detailed, customizable spaceships, offering a range from basic to simulation-level control.
*   **Challenging Adversaries:** Confront 6 distinct alien species, each with unique tactics and a fleet of 30 alien spaceships.
*   **Rich Universe:** Interact with over 50 unique characters and utilize more than 90 different weapons and devices.
*   **Dynamic Starmap:** Navigate a flexible starmap system featuring animated objects and light flares.
*   **Immersive Exploration:** Zoom in on over 350 planets, moons, and comets within a fully 3D environment, where celestial bodies move according to real physics.

Are you prepared to defend Earth and rise to the challenge?

**Chorus: A Space Combat Shooter Evolved**

Prepare for an **evolution of the space-combat shooter genre** with Chorus, a thrilling new title where you play as Nara, a former elite warrior of the Circle. Now a fugitive, Nara is driven by a singular mission: to dismantle the dark cult that created her and seek redemption across the galaxy.

**A Quest for Redemption and Resistance**

Pilot Nara, an ace pilot haunted by her past, alongside Forsaken, her sentient starfighter, on a deeply personal quest. Their mission is to **unite resistance forces** against the oppressive Circle and their enigmatic leader, the Great Prophet. This journey will take them across the galaxy and beyond, confronting the darkness that has shaped Nara's life.

**Explore a Universe of Mystery and Conflict**

Venture into a **dark new universe** brimming with intrigue and intense battles. Explore vast, awe-inspiring space stations and venture into otherworldly planes, engaging in exhilarating zero-g combat. From sweeping cosmic vistas to the claustrophobic confines of crystalline passages, Chorus masterfully blends grand space exploration with **fast-paced, exhilarating action**.

**Master Your Arsenal and Abilities**

Chorus delivers a unique gameplay experience centered around its dual protagonists and evolved combat mechanics. You'll **play as both Nara and her sentient starfighter, Forsaken**, on their intertwined quest. Experience **fast-paced action** that pays homage to classic space shooters while introducing innovative elements. Your mission is to **fight to rally forces** against the formidable Circle and the Great Prophet. Prepare to confront a **diverse array of enemies**, from swarms of agile starfighters and colossal battleships to the mysterious and terrifying Void entities.

To overcome these threats, you will **acquire and upgrade powerful weapons and mind-bending abilities**. Master Forsaken's unique drift mechanic and unlock devastating powers such as extra-sensory perception, teleportation, and telekinesis. The ability to **combine these powers** is key to becoming an unstoppable force. All of this unfolds within a **stunning sci-fi world**, a dark and mysterious universe brought to life with breathtaking next-gen visuals in 4K.

**Sable: A Journey of Self-Discovery in a Vast Desert World**

Embark on an unforgettable journey with Sable, a young woman undertaking her Gliding. This rite of passage will lead her across vast deserts and mesmerizing landscapes. She'll explore the remnants of spaceships and ancient wonders.

**Explore the Open World**

Traverse the dunes on your hoverbike. Scale monumental ruins and encounter other nomads. Unearth long-forgotten mysteries. Discover Sable's true identity beyond her mask. The world is rich with remnants of past civilizations, waiting to be explored.

**Master Movement and Customization**

Climb, leap, hover, and glide. Use every ability at your disposal to discover every inch of the world. Customize your hoverbike by finding or earning new parts.

**Connect with Others and Collectibles**

Help other clans and nomads you meet on your travels. Lose yourself in the adventure and find yourself through masks, outfits, and other collectibles. These items allow you to express who you are to those around you.

**Forge Your Path**

Complete puzzles to earn rewards. Forge your path through unforgiving terrain. Sable's unique art style and original soundtrack by Japanese Breakfast create an immersive experience. Explore everything at your own pace. There is much to discover. Take the leap.

## Star Conflict: Dominate the Cosmos in Epic Space Warfare

**Star Conflict** is a thrilling, massively multiplayer space combat game where you step into the boots of an elite pilot embroiled in a vast interplanetary conflict. This immersive experience offers **intense Player versus Player (PVP) battles** and **cooperative Player versus Environment (PVE) missions** across a multitude of breathtaking space locations.

Dive into **diverse combat scenarios**, from **dogfights against other players** in dozens of unique arenas to challenging PVE quests designed for both solo adventurers and coordinated squadrons. Beyond structured combat, Star Conflict features a **dynamic sandbox mode** that fuels emergent gameplay and player-driven conflicts. You can also **form or join corporations** to engage in large-scale territorial wars, adding a deep strategic layer to the interstellar struggle.

Your arsenal is vast, featuring **over a hundred distinct ships**, each with unique roles and capabilities. From nimble scouts to formidable frigates, your fleet awaits. With **nine tactical roles**, hundreds of modules, and extensive customization options, you can **tailor every vessel to your playstyle**. The ability to **craft modules and ships** further enhances this deep personalization.

Venture into **invaded space colonies** overrun by an ancient alien race. Embark on quests, gather valuable loot, and craft essential upgrades. You'll encounter other pilots, offering opportunities to **forge alliances**, team up against pirates, or confront the menacing alien threat. Each ship can be adapted for various missions, whether it's **reconnaissance, stealthy ambushes, or crucial support**. An impressive array of weapons and gadgets, combined with your crafting prowess, empowers you to **execute your chosen tactics effectively**.

**Forge powerful alliances** with friends to create formidable squadrons and participate in thrilling PVP and PVE engagements. Establish your own corporation and **vie for control of territories**, aiming to leave your mark on the universe's history. **Continuously develop your skills**, establish specialized abilities, and refine your combat tactics. Whether you prefer a **direct assault, stealthy long-range engagements, or a surprise attack**, the ultimate strategy is yours to command.

The galaxy is a fractured landscape, divided between militant star empires and independent mercenary factions. In a desolate corner known as **Sector 1337**, lies the "area of the dead"—a world left behind where the remnants of a once-great alien civilization have been discovered. Vast factories and sprawling cities now lie in decay, and the debris of colossal ship battles litter the landscape. A mysterious Cataclysm eradicated all life within its reach, yet humanity presses onward. Mercenaries and adventurers are drawn to Sector 1337, eager to scavenge its ruins and claim abandoned artifacts, often disregarding the inherent dangers. Those who return speak of unprecedented riches, drawing more looters to the sector, leading to **fierce battles to secure lost alien treasures**.

Name: Space Pirates and Zombies
Description:
At its core, Space Pirates and Zombies is an action based, skill oriented, top down space combat game. It’s similar to the ones we knew and loved in years past, but now using full physics simulation and modern graphics for those oh so pretty explosions. But as you dig deeper, SPAZ becomes much more. Instead of flying a single ship, you are in charge of an ever growing and evolving fleet, unlocking the rich tactical elements of SPAZ, all accessed at the touch of a button. Issue orders, change ships, apply fleet AI settings, all on the fly. At any moment the battle can change, and the Tactics Panel gives you the tools to make the battle turn in your favor. As a layer on top of the action and tactics, we have a detailed technology and levelup system akin to what you would expect from an RPG. Learn to build new ships by destroying your enemies. Explore the galaxy to find components, use your hard earned research points to unlock their potential, and then customize every aspect of your new fleet. Finally, there is the universe in which all this strife and adventure takes place. SPAZ features a persistent randomly generated Galaxy populated with story elements, factions, enemies, missions, items, to provide you with a unique experience each time you play. While you are struggling to survive, uncover the secret of an ever expanding Zombie infestation that spreads by establishing its own real time multi-tiered ecosystem. Key features: 33 ships to research, build, outfit and pilot. 70 unique components to discover and customize your fleet’s performance. Totally physics based combat system. Fight Zombie infestations, battling a full zombie ecosystem comprising four stages of un-life. Explore a persistent randomly generated galaxy containing hundreds of star systems. Freedom to explore the galaxy and take on challenges at your own pace. Aid, flee, or exploit the warring factions in each star system. The unique event system lets the player change the balance of power in any star system Carefully spend your hard earned research points on hundreds of upgrades across 15 categories.

Name: Starpoint Gemini Warlords
Description:
Starpoint Gemini Warlords is a space sim coupled with role-playing and strategy elements. Send your mighty war fleets into combat or lead them yourself. The choice is yours. Be the Warlord! Control your ship directly to show off your battle prowess. Aim and fire manually or command your gunners to do the job for you while you execute unique skills. Choose your companions to follow you into battle and if you need an extra hand, have your fleets join you in glorious combat. Battles in Warlords can vary from duels and small skirmishes to clashes of massive fleets in planetary orbits. Construct ships and assemble your mighty war fleets to pitch them against the other war-mongering factions of Gemini, but be mindful of the situation you're sending them into. A seemingly weaker fleet can be accompanied by warmasters, well-trained specialists that can sway the battle in their favor, but fear not, you can have your fleet follow you so you can lead them to victory! Upgrade your headquarters with additional modules to produce more advanced weapons and enhancements, develop new ships leading up to the station-size Proxima, unlock new structures and activate various bonuses that influence all of your territory. You are the leader of your people and a powerful leader deserves a stronghold. Spread your influence and increase your resources by expanding your territory, but don't stretch your defenses too thin or your enemies might take advantage. Territory can be fortified and improved by building various resource and defense structures. Expand the T-Gate network to make your fleets travel across your ever-growing empire faster. A timely arrival can make all the difference. Begin your adventure on a small, agile gunship and work your way up to a massive carrier class capable of deploying numerous fighter wings. Upgrade your chosen vessel of destruction with a plethora of weapons and enhancements. And to finish it all off, throw a coat of paint on it to get that perfect vessel you always wanted. KEY FEATURES: Massive game world, populated by over 60 diverse factions, ready to face your war fleets. Campaign mode – Play through the story of the “exiles”, who settled on the barren planet of Phaeneros on the outskirts of Gemini, after escaping the alien invasion of the Sol system. Five free roam scenarios with distinct start setup. Choose among nearly 90 different ships, from gunships and corvettes to bulky carriers. Build your own personal headquarters to boost your economic and military power. Procedurally generated freelance jobs offer a great way to earn Credits that you can use to pump upgrades into your ship. Procedurally generated encounters can creep up on you when you least expect them. Choose one of three unique character classes or whip up a hybrid class of your own. Conduct research on a multitude of different tech that affects everything from your own ship to the global scheme of things. Construct ships, assemble war fleets and send them in all directions to conquer for the glory of the Solari Concord. Build and upgrade infrastructure across the star system to improve resource gathering and strengthen your dominion. Engage in diplomatic relations and sign trade deals to get that boost you need. Mod support that greatly surpasses that of its predecessor, Starpoint Gemini 2. For more information, check out the official Starpoint Gemini Wiki on Gamepedia .

Name: Gratuitous Space Battles
Description:
Who needs backstory? Who needs resource-gathering? Diplomacy is so last year. Gratuitous Space Battles cuts right to the chase of sci-fi strategy games, and deals with large, completely unjustified space battles between huge opposing space fleets. Gratuitous Space Battles combines the visual appeal of an RTS, with the addictive unit-placement and design gameplay from tower defense games. In GSB, the player does not control individual ships at all during battle. The ships fight to a pre-determined set of orders and formations given to them by you before the battles. GSB casts you as supreme space admiral, tasked with the design of individual spaceships, and the composition of your fleet, as well as general orders of engagement. This is not a twitch-based real time arcade game like many an RTS, but a game of careful thought, planning and big-picture strategy. Huge space battles can be won or lost depending on just how cleverly you balanced the needs of defensive shielding and armor against the expensive punch of laser cannons and plasma torpedoes. GSB also features an innovative multiplayer challenge system. You can upload your ultimate fleet to serve as the enemy to other players, and keep track of how many other players have won and lost against your challenge. That way, you will never run out of cunningly designed enemies to battle against! 4 different unlockable player races Over 40 different ship hulls Over 120 spaceship modules Choice of skirmish vs AI, never-ending survival mode or play against other player’s fleets with the online challenge system Play with different rules as each battle has different spatial anomalies to deal with.

Name: Darkstar One
Description:
Darkstar One offers a fantastic amount of freedom of choice. The story-based missions gradually lead you deeper into the galaxy to new races, new technologies and ever stronger opponents. Explore a vast array of solar systems in search of hidden artifacts of ancient races, essential objects for upgrading your ship--the Darkstar One. In addition to artifacts, acquire credits to purchase better equipment, such as weapons and shields. Earn credits in a myriad of ways: by taking on assignments, bounty hunting, piracy, smuggling, trading, escorting, transporting, rewards and more. A vast, simulated universe with many unique races, space ships and battle tactics. Elaborate story, related by more than fifty minutes of video sequences. Configure and upgrade your ship, Darkstar One, any way you choose--build a fast attack ship with many light weapons or a near-invincible cruiser with heavy weaponry. Over two hundred different weapons, shields and equipment items. Rockets, torpedoes and mines feature special tactical uses: mines can fire at opponents or distract approaching missiles. The 'Spell Weapon': a special weapon with a powerful effect similar to certain spells in role-playing games. This weapon becomes increasingly versatile throughout the game and greatly increases tactical options. Acquire weapons from other races - Mount distinctive weapons from other races on 'Darkstar One,' each featuring unique functions that require different battle tactics. Embark on special missions - explore canyons or even underground on unknown worlds. Freedom of choice - earn credits in many ways: fighting, piracy, assignments, smuggling, trading, escorting, transporting, rewards, and more. Play as the 'good' or the 'bad' guy and take advantage of political disputes.

Name: Grand Theft Auto: Vice City
Description:
Welcome to Vice City. Welcome to the 1980s. From the decade of big hair, excess and pastel suits comes a story of one man's rise to the top of the criminal pile. Vice City, a huge urban sprawl ranging from the beach to the swamps and the glitz to the ghetto, was one of the most varied, complete and alive digital cities ever created. Combining open-world gameplay with a character driven narrative, you arrive in a town brimming with delights and degradation and given the opportunity to take it over as you choose. Having just made it back onto the streets of Liberty City after a long stretch in maximum security, Tommy Vercetti is sent to Vice City by his old boss, Sonny Forelli. They were understandably nervous about his re-appearance in Liberty City, so a trip down south seemed like a good idea. But all does not go smoothly upon his arrival in the glamorous, hedonistic metropolis of Vice City. He's set up and is left with no money and no merchandise. Sonny wants his money back, but the biker gangs, Cuban gangsters, and corrupt politicians stand in his way. Most of Vice City seems to want Tommy dead. His only answer is to fight back and take over the city himself.

Name: The Making of Karateka
Description:
Prince of Persia creator Jordan Mechner was a college student when he created one of the biggest-selling games of 1984: Karateka. Now, in a new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse, the story of how a teenager with an Apple II created one of the most groundbreaking, influential games of all time. THE ORIGIN STORY OF A LEGENDARY GAME CREATOR Discover how Karateka was made through an exhaustive archive of design documents, playable prototypes, and all-new video features. Like walking through a museum, you can explore the interactive timelines at your own pace. PLAY THE ACCLAIMED ORIGINALS Enjoy pixel-perfect versions of the original Karateka games and a variety of never-before-seen early prototypes, with rich quality-of-life features like save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and director's commentary. TWO REMASTERED GAMES Karateka Remastered is an all-new version of the original game featuring cutting-room-floor content, commentary, achievements, and more. Deathbounce: Rebounded is a fast and frantic twin-stick shooter based on Jordan's unpublished prototype. A GROUNDBREAKING MASTERPIECE Discover how Karateka became one of the first games to include cinematic scenes, a moving original soundtrack, rotoscoped animation, and a Hollywood-style love story, influencing the decades of games that followed. THE GOLD MASTER SERIES New from Digital Eclipse (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection, Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration), the Gold Master Series presents iconic games in an innovative 'interactive documentary' format, putting the shared history of games and their creators into one comprehensive package.

Name: Pinball FX3
Description:
Williams™ Pinball classics are now available -- and Fish Tales™ is yours for FREE! Zen is proud to bring these amazing games to players around the world. Enjoy! Pinball FX3 is the biggest, most community focused pinball game ever created. Multiplayer matchups, user generated tournaments and league play create endless opportunity for pinball competition. FREE backwards compatibility! Bring your previous Pinball FX2 purchases with you to Pinball FX3 at no charge! Not so hot with the flippers? Pinball FX3 features new single player modes that will help you become a better player! All tables have received graphics updates including real-time lighting and shadow projection. Zen Studios will continue to support Pinball FX3 with frequent content releases and new features!

Name: Counter-Strike
Description:
Play the world's number 1 online action game. Engage in an incredibly realistic brand of terrorist warfare in this wildly popular team-based game. Ally with teammates to complete strategic missions. Take out enemy sites. Rescue hostages. Your role affects your team's success. Your team's success affects your role.

**The Gallery - Episode 2: Heart of the Emberstone**

Step into the **sci-fi epic** that defined modern VR. The Gallery series set new standards for **roomscale movement and interaction**, earning over **30 awards**, including 'VR Game of the Year'. This premier adventure series is a **puzzle exploration game** built for virtual reality, drawing inspiration from **dark 80s fantasy adventure films**.

In **Heart of the Emberstone**, you follow your sister Elsie to the world of Ember. Here, you'll uncover the ruins of a civilization shattered by two siblings' quests for power. You'll also meet a **mountainous ally** searching for their own missing half.

Your mission is to use the **Gauntlet**, a mysterious device that manipulates energy, to **unravel the history of this forgotten world**. You must also **reveal the true intentions** of the dark figure who sent you on this journey.

Continue your epic adventure through the Starseed to the distant planet of Ember. This highly-anticipated sequel builds upon the VR adventure that started it all.

**Key Features:**

*   **Unravel a dark past:** Explore a forgotten world inspired by classic 80s fantasy, like *Labyrinth* and *The Dark Crystal*.
*   **Master impossible technologies:** Control the Gauntlet, a mysterious relic with **telekinetic power**.
*   **Engage with new puzzles:** Experience puzzles designed for VR's **physicality and precision hand-tracking**.
*   **Encounter unique characters:** Meet a **mountainous ally** and **bizarre alien creatures** in stunning roomscale.
*   **Immerse yourself in sound:** Enjoy captivating **spatial audio** and a new soundtrack by **award-winning composer Jeremy Soule**.
*   **Experience hours of gameplay:** Dive into a lovingly polished fantasy world with **multiple hours of story and wonder**.
*   **Tailor your journey:** **Experimental locomotion modes** allow you to customize your VR experience.

Available for Arcades on SpringboardVR.

**Hotline Miami: A Brutal Descent into 1989 Miami's Underworld**

Hotline Miami is a fast-paced action game known for its intense violence, gunplay, and close-quarters combat. The game is set in an alternate 1989 Miami. You play as a mysterious antihero carrying out a violent spree against the criminal underworld. These missions are prompted by cryptic messages on your answering machine.

As the story unfolds, you'll struggle to understand the events and your own violent tendencies. You must use your intelligence to navigate challenging scenarios. Enemies will constantly outnumber you. The action is relentless, and every bullet is fatal. Quick, decisive movements are essential for survival and uncovering the dark forces behind the bloodshed.

Hotline Miami features a distinctive visual style, a captivating soundtrack, and a surreal narrative. These elements will make you question your own enjoyment of the violence. The game offers a brutally challenging experience that pushes players to their limits.

**HUNTDOWN: Become the Ultimate Bounty Hunter in a Lawless Future**

In the chaotic streets of a future ruled by criminal gangs, where law enforcement is outmatched, only **bounty hunters** can restore order. **HUNTDOWN** throws you into a hard-boiled action-comedy arcade shooter where you'll dismantle the criminal underworld and make a fortune.

**Experience Kick-Ass Co-Op, Near and Far**

Team up with a friend to take on the mayhem. Whether you're in the same room or across the globe, you can **run, jump, and take cover** together. Enjoy **couch co-op** or utilize **Steam Remote Play** to wreak havoc as a duo.

**New Action-Packed Arcade Mode**

Test your skills against players worldwide in a **brutal battle** to climb the leaderboards. Discover innovative ways to defeat your enemies and rack up points. Utilize **combo-kills**, **quickdraw weapon-swap bonuses**, or even **hurl criminals off rooftops**. This is a **nail-biting race against the clock** to collect as many bounties as possible and prove you're the **apex bounty hunter**.

**Play as Three Legendary Bounty Hunters**

*   **Anna Conda:** An ex-commando and firearms expert, Anna is a **loose-cannon** who eliminates targets without question, regardless of collateral damage.
*   **John Sawyer:** A former Special Forces cop, this **scarred veteran** has lost so many limbs he's practically half robot.
*   **Mow Man:** A modified recon droid empowered with banned software, Mow Man **trades bodies for cold, hard cash**. Don't expect to survive if Mow Man is on your tail.

**Old School Charm, Modernized Gameplay**

**HUNTDOWN** features **hand-painted 16-bit pixel art graphics** and hand-drawn animations. This classic aesthetic is combined with **fluid 60-FPS gameplay** and an **epic synthesized soundtrack**, creating a unique retro-futuristic experience.

**Explore 20 Levels Across Gritty Cityscapes**

Venture through **gritty, neon-soaked, graffiti-strewn 80s cityscapes**. Each level presents a new challenge with an **infamous gang boss to terminate** and a bounty to collect.

**Dismantle Four Unique Gangs**

*   **Hoodlum Dolls:** These **violent feral punks** are winning the gang war against toothless authorities.
*   **Misconducts:** **Organized hockey hooligans** specializing in robbery and extortion, with a dangerous penchant for explosives.
*   **The Heatseekers:** A **murderous motorcycle club** whose rockabilly villains style themselves after Ancient Roman centurions.
*   **NO.1 Suspects:** **Masters of discipline and organized crime**, these martial arts experts control the night through their casinos and nightclubs.

**Choose Your Weapon and Unleash Havoc**

Confiscate a variety of weapons, including **machine guns, laser weapons, katanas, and grenades**, and turn them against their former owners. **Stab, shoot, and explode** your way through hordes of gangs and bosses to collect your bounty.

The **Mega Man Legacy Collection** offers a definitive way to experience the **iconic 8-bit adventures** of Capcom's legendary Blue Bomber. This compilation faithfully resurrects the **first six Mega Man games**, providing a deeply nostalgic journey for long-time enthusiasts and an ideal entry point for those discovering the series for the first time. It's a chance to understand precisely what has cemented Mega Man's status as an **enduring video game icon**.

Beyond simply presenting the original titles, the Mega Man Legacy Collection introduces **innovative features** that enhance the gameplay experience. A standout addition is the **Challenge Mode**, which remixes gameplay segments from all six games. This mode features a tiered difficulty system, presenting **demanding objectives** for veteran players while simultaneously serving as an excellent training ground for newcomers to the series. Complementing this is the **Museum Mode**, a veritable treasure trove for fans. Here, you can **explore the rich history** of Mega Man, immersing yourself in high-resolution artwork, original concept pieces, and a vast amount of historical information, making it an indispensable resource for any admirer of Mega Man or video game history.

Key features of the Mega Man Legacy Collection include:

*   **Six Classic Games:** Relive the foundational titles that launched a legendary franchise.
*   **Retro Style, HD Polish:** Experience the beloved 8-bit aesthetic, now enhanced with crisp, clean HD visuals.
*   **Engaging Challenge Mode:** Master remixed gameplay challenges crafted for players of all skill levels.
*   **Extensive Museum:** Delve into the series' development with a comprehensive collection of art, concept sketches, and historical data.
*   **New Eclipse Engine:** These classic games are faithfully recreated using the modern Eclipse Engine for an authentic yet polished experience.
*   **Leaderboards and Replays:** Compete with others by watching top players conquer challenges and showcasing your own Mega Man prowess.

**Darwinia: A Retro-Inspired Indie Classic Reimagined**

Experience **Darwinia**, a unique blend of **fast-paced action** and **strategic battle planning**. This game stands out with its **novel and intuitive control mechanism**. Its distinctive graphical style is a direct homage to **80s retro classics** like Tron and Defender. The narrative centers on a tribe of nomadic sprites trapped within a modern 3D world.

Originally released, Darwinia has been **fully re-mastered in 2022** to commemorate its 10,000th anniversary. This updated version ensures the **undisputed indie classic** is brought bang up to date. It now runs **seamlessly on all modern systems**, proving the game has not aged. Darwinia remains as **fresh and relevant today** as it was upon its initial release.

The game's critical acclaim is undeniable. Darwinia **won 3 out of 5 prizes at the IGF**, including the prestigious **Seamus McNally Grand Prize for Best Independent Video Game**. It also garnered **multiple editor's choice awards**. Now is the perfect time to play one of the **most critically acclaimed indie games of all time**.

**TRY THE LATEST GAME FROM INTROVERSION SOFTWARE.**

Name: Astalon: Tears of the Earth
Description:
Story Three heroic explorers wander the post-apocalyptic desert on a mission to save their village from despair. They soon find a dark, twisted tower that has risen from the depths of the planet and seemingly holds the key to their survival. In order to ensure their victory, one of them has made a secret pact with the Titan of Death, Epimetheus, allowing them to reincarnate until they have accomplished their mission. But what fate lies in store for the heroes and their village? Death is Only the Beginning Astalon: Tears Of The Earth is an action-platformer set in a dying world where life is cruel, but death can be a stepping stone to victory! Use the unique skills and weapons of Arias the fighter, Kyuli the rogue, and Algus the wizard, to surmount the mysterious tower and find the answers to their survival. Slay terrible monsters, discover powerful artifacts, and solve fiendish puzzles, reaching new heights in the tower with the aid of a Titan. Follow a story about friendship and sacrifice, building up the courage to take down giants to protect the weak and powerless. Strengthen your party and change their fate by embracing death. Discover the countless secrets of the Tower of Serpents! Features Relive the glory days of 8-bit action-adventure through beautifully detailed, authentic pixel art set in a dark, fantastic world! Astalon features the progressive exploration of an interconnected world with the swiftness and quick rhythm of a room-by-room action platformer. Original character design by Ryusuke Mita, creator of world-famous manga Dragon Half! Play at your own pace -- explore thoroughly and build your characters strengths, or use risky methods to slice your way up the tower furiously! Switch between your heroes and utilize the unique abilities of a warrior, archer and wizard to progress through the game. Battle against a large assortment of different enemies, giant monsters, and epic bosses! Choose the right hero to find the weaknesses of the creatures that stand in your way! Upgrade your characters’ abilities and change the course of destiny by making deals with Epimetheus -- the Titan of Death. Collect a variety of incredible artifacts such as the “Sword of Mirrors” that will bestow your characters with new abilities and open new possibilities. Use campfires to save your progress, change characters, and discover details about the heroes’ pasts. Hundreds of rooms to discover -- hours of challenging exploration with a plethora of unlockables and secrets to reward the most inquisitive players! Experience an exciting soundtrack of chiptune music composed by Matt Kap, spanning over 30 pieces of music!

Name: Mini Motorways
Description:
Have you ever been stuck in traffic and wished you could do something to fix it? In Mini Motorways, the city’s traffic problems are in your hands. From the makers of Mini Metro, Mini Motorways is a game about drawing the roads that drive a growing city. Build a road network, one road at a time, to create a bustling metropolis. Redesign your city to keep the traffic flowing, and carefully manage upgrades to meet the changing demands. How long can you keep the cities of the world moving? Key Features Draw roads in dynamic cities that grow and change - every game is unique! Explore stunning maps inspired by cities all around the world. Choose from a variety of upgrades to meet the demands of your ever-expanding road network: highways, roundabouts, and more! Select different colour palettes on every map including colourblind and night modes. Relax to a responsive soundtrack from Disasterpeace that grows along with your city. Unlock new maps and achievements as you achieve mastery Export GIFs of your city layouts to share with your friends. Compete against other players in Daily and Weekly Challenges.

Become the **king of the road** in Euro Truck Simulator 2, a game where you'll deliver crucial cargo across vast European landscapes. You'll test your **endurance, skill, and speed** as you navigate dozens of cities spanning the UK, Belgium, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, and many more. If you possess the drive to join an **elite trucking force**, get behind the wheel and prove your mettle!

Euro Truck Simulator 2 offers an immersive trucking experience with a wealth of features designed to challenge and engage you. You'll transport a **vast variety of cargo** to over 60 European cities, all while building and growing your own **successful trucking business**. This includes expanding your fleet by purchasing trucks, acquiring garages, and hiring skilled drivers to maximize your company's profits.

The game also boasts extensive customization options for your vehicles. You can fine-tune your trucks with a **varied amount of tuning**, ranging from performance enhancements to cosmetic upgrades. Personalize your vehicles further with optional accessories like lights, bars, horns, beacons, and unique smoke exhausts, allowing you to create a truly **one-of-a-kind rig**. Explore thousands of miles of **real road networks**, dotted with hundreds of famous landmarks and structures that bring the European continent to life.

Enhance your Euro Truck Simulator 2 experience by joining the **World of Trucks** online community. This central hub connects virtual truckers worldwide, offering additional features and a platform to share your passion for the game and future SCS Software titles. Utilize the **in-game Photo Mode** to capture your most memorable moments and share them with a global audience. You can favorite and revisit images you admire, and engage in discussions about screenshots with fellow enthusiasts. Keep an eye out for the **Editor's Pick**, showcasing exceptional images curated by the game creators almost daily, and strive to have your own screenshot featured! You can also upload and use a **custom avatar and license plate** within the game. More exciting features are planned for the future! Joining World of Trucks is simple: just sign up using your Steam account. Please note that World of Trucks is an **optional service**, and registration is not required to enjoy the core gameplay of Euro Truck Simulator 2.

Name: RAILGRADE
Description:
Construct intricate railway networks and use the power of trains to connect vital industries with the resources they require. Manage inputs and outputs to optimise production, and create efficient supply chains using multi-level tracks and a variety of unique engine types. • Customise your trains using different engines and freight types, with hundreds of unique engine and cargo combinations. • Create efficient supply chains by connecting industrial sources and placing dozens of busy trains on the map. Combine strategic decision-making with creative construction in order to rebuild a thriving industrial colony. Succeed, and you might just impress your corporate overlords enough to be allowed back home to earth. • Help restore prosperity to an industrial colony across a single player campaign with over 50 missions. • Spend tokens awarded by each mission and use them to unlock new industries, upgrades and options. • Use effortless construction tools to instantly build and manage a busy railway network packed by trains. • Optimise your train set-up and place tracks strategically to navigate challenging environmental terrain and create the most effective delivery route possible. • Control the flow of resource production through careful management of inputs and outputs. Watch out for bottlenecks to keep trains and their precious cargo moving. • Admire your fleet of trains with the cinematic view mode. • Challenge yourself in bonus side missions. Explore arid deserts in search of oil supplies, or develop a rocket launch program. • Show off your most impressive railway setups with a photo mode that includes a variety of filters and visual options. • Invest in the growth of your cities, or use zeppelins to export goods for extra profit.

In **Mini Metro**, you are tasked with the crucial role of designing the subway layout for a city that is experiencing rapid expansion. Your urban landscape begins with just three stations, and your primary objective is to draw efficient routes between these initial points, establishing subway lines to connect them. Commuters will then utilize these lines to navigate the city as swiftly as possible.

However, each station has a limited capacity for waiting commuters, meaning your subway network must be meticulously designed to prevent any delays. As the city continues to grow, more stations will open, and commuters will appear at an accelerated rate, placing ever-increasing demands on your network. This necessitates a constant process of redesigning your lines to achieve maximum efficiency. The new assets you acquire weekly will prove immensely helpful, provided they are utilized wisely. Ultimately, your network will face challenges; stations may open too quickly, and platforms will become crowded with commuters. The longevity of the city's transit system rests entirely on your strategic decisions.

**Key Features of Mini Metro:**

*   **Compelling Gameplay:** Experience a unique blend of hectic and relaxed gameplay that is both constructive and engaging.
*   **Diverse Game Modes:** Choose from **Normal** for quick, scored games; **Endless** for a stress-free sandbox experience; and **Extreme** for the ultimate challenge.
*   **Creative Mode:** Design your metro system precisely to your vision with the all-new **Creative mode**.
*   **Global Cities:** Plan and build subways for over two dozen real-world cities, including **London, Paris, New York City, Osaka, Saint Petersburg, São Paulo, Istanbul, and Auckland**, each offering a distinct color theme, unique obstacles, and a specific pace.
*   **Dynamic City Growth:** Enjoy a different gameplay experience every time thanks to **random city growth**, ensuring that strategies successful in one game may not be effective in the next.
*   **Artistic Design:** Each game's map becomes a work of art, constructed by you in the classic abstract subway style reminiscent of Harry Beck. You can **save, share, or use your creations** as desktop backgrounds.
*   **Responsive Soundtrack:** Immerse yourself in a soundtrack by Disasterpeace that is dynamically generated by your metro system's activity.
*   **Accessibility Options:** Benefit from **colorblind and night modes**.
*   **Trains!** The core of the experience, these essential vehicles are central to the gameplay.
*   **Steam Workshop:** Explore a vast library of **player-created maps** for endless variety.

**More from Dinosaur Polo Club:**

Discover more from the developers on social media platforms like **Facebook and Twitter**. If you enjoyed **Mini Metro**, consider exploring their highway-planning follow-up, **Mini Motorways**.

**IGN Review Snippet:**

"Mini Metro’s clean, stylish interface encourages me over and over again to make the trains run on time, and there’s a deeper amount of strategy to growing a sprawling metro system than meets the eye. I wasn’t just hypnotized by the rhythmic movement of trains from station to station, I was completely absorbed in making them perfect." - IGN

**Demo Available:**

You can **try Mini Metro for yourself** by playing a game on the London map in the available demo.

## Embark on an Epic American Trucking Adventure

**American Truck Simulator** invites you to experience the thrill of driving legendary American trucks and delivering a diverse range of cargoes across the iconic landscapes of sunny California, the arid expanses of Nevada, and the majestic Grand Canyon State of Arizona. This immersive simulation game transports you on a captivating journey, showcasing breathtaking scenery and widely recognized landmarks throughout the United States. Building upon the highly successful mechanics of Euro Truck Simulator 2, American Truck Simulator introduces expanded features to deliver the most engaging gaming experience yet from SCS Software.

### Your Journey from Driver to Tycoon

In American Truck Simulator, you begin as a driver for hire, entering the competitive local freight market. Your ultimate goal is to work your way up, becoming a successful owner-operator and eventually establishing one of the largest and most prosperous transportation companies in the entire United States.

### Features That Define the Experience

#### Authentic Trucking Realism

*   **Officially Licensed Trucks:** Drive highly detailed truck models, officially licensed from iconic manufacturers, offering an unparalleled sense of authenticity.
*   **Your Truck, Your Sanctuary:** Your truck becomes your new home. Personalize it extensively by customizing cabins, chassis, paint jobs, and by adding powerful engines or a wide array of tuning accessories.

#### Diverse Cargo and Challenging Hauls

*   **Varied Cargo Selection:** Transport a vast array of cargoes, from essential food supplies and heavy machinery to hazardous materials, each presenting unique challenges.
*   **Multiple Trailer Types:** Master the art of hauling with various trailer types, including reefers, flatbeds, dumpers, lowboys, and goosenecks.
*   **The Ultimate Test:** The longest trailers, extending up to 53 feet, will truly test your driving skills and patience during both hauling and intricate parking maneuvers.

#### Immersive Environments and Locations

*   **Deliver to Iconic Destinations:** Deliver your valuable cargoes to a rich variety of companies and locations, including bustling refineries, expansive oil storage facilities, busy gas stations, advanced car factories, and active roadworks sites.

#### Advanced Simulation Settings

*   **True-to-Life Mechanics:** Experience a deep level of simulation with features like air brake simulation, multiple brake types (retarder, Jake brake, trailer brake), and various transmission options directly inspired by real trucks. Fine-tune brake intensity and other parameters for ultimate control.
*   **In-Cabin Immersion:** Get a true feel for being inside a real truck cabin. Adjust your seat, mirrors, and position your head to achieve the optimal view of the road ahead.

### Navigating the Road and the Law

*   **Drive Safely and Legally:** Adhere to traffic rules and speed limits diligently. Failure to do so will result in fines from the police.
*   **Weight Restrictions:** Ensure your cargo is not overweight, as you may be subject to checks at weigh scales.
*   **Your Trusted Co-Pilot:** Utilize the route adviser, your personal assistant, to guide you seamlessly through your travels.

### Building Your Transportation Empire

*   **From Driver to Owner:** Embrace the life of a truck driver for hire. By safely delivering cargoes and continuously improving your skills, you can become the proud owner of your own successful company.
*   **Expand Your Fleet:** Build your dream fleet of trucks, acquire garages, hire skilled drivers, and meticulously manage your company operations to maximize profits.

### Enhancing Your Trucking Experience

*   **Personalized Entertainment:** Make your trucking time more enjoyable by listening to your favorite songs via the built-in music player or streaming your preferred radio stations.
*   **Capture Your Best Moments:** Preserve your favorite trucking moments with the integrated photo mode, offering a comprehensive suite of editing options.
*   **Superior Input Support:** Enjoy excellent support for steering wheels, gamepads, and a wide range of other input devices for a truly personalized control experience.
*   **Ongoing Development:** Benefit from long-term support for the game, with continuous updates introducing new features and improvements.
*   **Achievement Hunter:** Earn challenging Steam achievements and collect all the beautifully hand-painted Steam trading cards.

## Join the World of Trucks Community

**World of Trucks** offers additional features and a vibrant online community for virtual truckers worldwide who are passionate about American Truck Simulator, Euro Truck Simulator 2, and future SCS Software truck simulators.

### Share Your Trucking Journey

*   **Capture and Share:** Utilize the in-game Photo Mode to capture your most memorable trucking moments and share them with thousands of fellow truck enthusiasts.
*   **Curate Your Favorites:** Favorite the images you admire most and revisit them anytime. Engage in discussions about screenshots with the World of Trucks community.
*   **Editor's Pick:** Aspire to have your own screenshot featured in the Editor's Pick section, curated by the game creators and updated almost daily.
*   **Personalize Your Profile:** Upload and use your custom avatar and license plate within the game. More exciting features are planned for the future!

### Getting Started with World of Trucks

To join World of Trucks, simply sign up using your Steam account on the join page. Owning either American Truck Simulator or Euro Truck Simulator 2 is required to participate. Please note that World of Trucks is an optional service, and registration is not mandatory to play the game.

Name: Transport Fever 2
Description:
The classic transport simulation genre has a new gold standard with Transport Fever 2. Discover a whole new world by navigating transport routes through land, water and air.
