Furthermore, the iconic Sniper Rifle from the original Unreal Tournament makes a triumphant return, completely redesigned for enhanced gameplay. The game also introduces **thirty-two new characters** organized into four distinct new teams: the human team **Thunder Crash**, led by Malcolm; the robotic team **Corrupt**, under the command of Xan Kriegor; the formidable Skaarj warrior team, **Iron Skull**; and the mercenary human team, **Hellions**, who revel in combat. Finally, Unreal Tournament 2004 showcases **significant technological advancements** over its predecessor, resulting in a demonstrably **faster, smoother, and more immersive gameplay experience**.

Name: Tetris® Effect: Connected
Description:
Tetris® Effect: Connected is Tetris like you've never seen it, or heard it, or felt it before—an incredibly addictive, unique, and breathtakingly gorgeous reinvention of one of the most popular puzzle games of all time. In all of the 30+ gorgeous single-player stages and 10+ modes, and in both cooperative or competitive online and local multiplayer modes, everything in Tetris® Effect: Connected—music, backgrounds, sounds, special effects—everything, down to the Tetriminos themselves, pulse, dance, shimmer, and explode in perfect sync with how you're playing and the award-winning soundtrack, taking Tetris’s already fiendishly-addictive replayability to new heights. FEATURES Includes the all-new “Zone” mechanic, where players can stop time (and Tetriminos falling) by entering “the Zone” and either get out of a sticky situation that could otherwise lead to “Game Over,” or rack up extra Line Clears for bonus rewards. Tailored for Steam, capable of running at resolutions of 4K or more with an uncapped framerate (with Vsync disabled) and includes ultra-wide monitor support as well as other expanded game and graphical options not found in the console release for both 2D and VR play (including adjustable particle volume and size, texture filtering, and more). 'Connected' co-op mode, where up to three players can literally connect their Tetris playfields together and play as one. 10+ single-player Effect modes with varying twists on the classic Tetris formula, designed to evoke different moods the player might be in (or want to be in -- i.e. chill out with “Relax,” concentrate with “Focus,” enjoy the familiarity/nostalgia of “Classic” modes or try something unique with “Adventurous.”), as well as appeal to varying skill levels. Nostalgic stages based on old-school Tetris games, as well as Classic Score Attack multiplayer mode with the rules and appearance of 8-bit Tetris. Fully featured multiplayer, including cross-platform play with all other platforms, matchmaking for Ranked play, robust options for Friend matches, player progression for unlockable avatars, and more!

Name: Beat Saber
Description:
Beat Saber is an immersive rhythm experience you have never seen before! Enjoy tons of handcrafted levels and swing your way through the pulsing music beats, surrounded by a futuristic world. Use your sabers to slash the beats as they come flying at you – every beat indicates which saber you need to use and the direction you need to match. With Beat Saber you become a dancing superhero! Features Feel the Rhythm: Immerse yourself in the smoothest combination of music beats and visual effects in Beat Saber’s truly unique gameplay. Handcrafted Levels & Music: Unlike other rhythm games with generated content, music and levels in Beat Saber are drawn precisely by hand to enhance the music experience. Compete in Multiplayer: Challenge your friends or random opponents around the world. Challenging Campaign: Get better every day while completing objectives and challenges in the Campaign. Rise Up the Global Leaderboards: Compete against other Beat Saberists around the world in various difficulties. Easy to Learn, Fun to Master: Everyone can understand the basic game mechanics. It's easy for anyone to pick up and play. Great Exercise: Exercise while dancing and slashing the beats, Beat Saber gets you moving.

Name: Mission: It's Complicated
Description:
Mission: It’s Compli­cated is a visual novel about getting superheroes to fall in love, and the shenanigans that happen along the way. Send your heroes out on ridiculous missions at night, and try to keep them from getting hurt -- or they won't be able to go on dates during the day! Grow your favorite pair's bond so they can go on more dates. Help them pick the right thing to say. Get them to fall in love… and save the world. Super sweet features of this narrative-based, visual novel include: Heart and humor! The puns are terrible and the feels are real. Choose your OTP! Any hero (there's 5) can be paired with any other to win the game. Friend dates! Friendship is just as important as romance. Win the game with romantic or platonic love depending on which pair you pick! No bummers! Every pair has a happy ending. But can you get the ULTIMATE happy ending? A serious lack of beds! Oh no, there's only one! :O Super cute art! Look at it! It's cute as heck. So much reading! Over 100k words! That's an entire novel! Wow! It'll probably help you on your SATs or something! Are those still a thing? NO voice acting! Cast your favorite voice actor for each character using the power of your imagination. LGBTQ+ friendly Want to breeze through the game to see all the endings? Skip any mission you've done before and still get credit... so you can get to those juicy dates! Free! Not secretly-designed-for-microtransactions-free, but actually free. So that's cool. In case you missed it, Mission: It’s Compli­cated is free. Completely FREE! To let someone know you care, share one of these special Valen­tine’s Day cards with them. Sharing is caring! Fun gifs!

Name: FEZ
Description:
Gomez is a 2D creature living in a 2D world. Or is he? When the existence of a mysterious 3rd dimension is revealed to him, Gomez is sent out on a journey that will take him to the very end of time and space. Use your ability to navigate 3D structures from 4 distinct classic 2D perspectives. Explore a serene and beautiful open-ended world full of secrets, puzzles and hidden treasures. Unearth the mysteries of the past and discover the truth about reality and perception. Change your perspective and look at the world in a different way.

Name: Tumblestone
Description:
Tumblestone is the first original action-puzzle game of the past fifteen years. Race your friends in multiplayer or challenge yourself in story mode. Solve progressively more difficult and creative puzzles, help a sausage make friends, and find out what happened to the Tumblecrown. Key Features Competitive multiplayer : Tumblestone's intense puzzle-solving action will turn playing 'just a few more rounds' with friends into a late-night Tumblestone marathon. Local multiplayer : Up to four players on a single computer. Online multiplayer : Play online against your friends or make new ones using Tumblestone's ranked matchmaking system. Bots : Have an open slot? Play against the computer. But can anyone withstand the punishing Nightmare bot? Story mode : The 40+ hour story campaign will test your puzzle-solving prowess. Featuring 10+ gameplay modifiers, challenge puzzles, and boss battles. Arcade modes : Kick back and relax with the casual Marathon mode, scratch an intellectual itch with the Infinipuzzle mode, or get your blood pumping with the fast-paced Heartbeat mode. Leaderboards : Online leaderboards let your friends know you're better than them. Quests : Hundreds of unique quests to complete. Stats : Rank up, then compare how you stack up against your friends. Personalization : Choose from a dozen unique characters and environments.

Name: Opus Magnum
Description:
“It is not an exaggeration to say that without alchemical engineering, civilization would not exist.” Hailed as the most promising alchemist of his generation, Anataeus Vaya has just accepted a position as Head Alchemist of House Van Tassen, the oldest and richest of the city’s ancient Houses. But dangers lurk behind the family’s opulent facade, and alchemy alone may not solve every problem. Opus Magnum is the latest open-ended puzzle game from Zachtronics, the creators of SpaceChem, Infinifactory, TIS-100, and SHENZHEN I/O. Master the intricate, physical machinery of the transmutation engine— the alchemical engineer’s most advanced tool— and use it to create vital remedies, precious gemstones, deadly weapons, and more. Design Machines - Design and build machines that carry out alchemical processes using a variety of components including programmable arms, customizable tracks, and more esoteric devices like Van Berlo’s wheel and the Glyph of Animismus. Open-Ended Puzzles - Compete against your friends and the world to build the simplest, fastest, and most compact solutions to the game’s challenges. Export animated GIFs of your elegant designs to show them off. Steam Workshop - Make and share your own puzzles with full Steam Workshop integration and an easy-to-use puzzle editor. Play the top user-submitted puzzles in the prestigious Journal of Alchemical Engineering , curated by Zachtronics! Rich Story - Intrigues and dark plots swirl around the city’s ancient Houses. Alchemists, who hold the power to create almost anything known to science, are highly sought— and highly dangerous. Solitaire Minigame - Alchemical engineering takes focus and concentration. Take a break with Sigmar’s Garden , an original alchemy-based solitaire game. Every game is winnable, but not every game will be won…

Name: Linelight
Description:
Linelight is a refreshingly inventive, minimalist puzzle-adventure game. It takes the wildly simple premise of 'What if everything takes place on a line?' and rockets it into outer space. Each mechanic is immediately understandable, then gradually combined with familiar elements, leading to an exponentially large array bursting with puzzles, each with a one-of-a-kind solution. There’s no jump button. There’s no shoot button. The way you move creates a universe of possibilities and one mind-bending experience. Guide Dash across the game’s rich, clean, and relaxing worlds; Linelight simulates the experience of getting an A+ on an exceptionally hard test while receiving a back massage. The gameplay is simultaneously unique and intuitive enough that gamers, non-gamers, your technology-illiterate relatives, tweens, rocket scientists, a potato with googly eyes and toothpicks for arms, and even line connoisseurs are all on the same playing field of challenge.* Welcome to the world of Linelight. *Okay, maybe not the potato. Key Features Bask in the soft glow of a world made out of straight lines. Experience 6 hours of pure, unadulterated gameplay. Solve more than 250 unique puzzles across 6 unique worlds. Enjoy a Zen-like, ethereal soundtrack, and enter a state of flow. Explore the intricacies of each world to uncover secret challenges.

Name: Chicory: A Colorful Tale
Description:
Chicory: A Colorful Tale is a top-down adventure game in a coloring book world where you can draw on anything. Use your painting powers to explore new places, solve puzzles, help your friends, and change the world! Something terrible happened. Chicory, superstar artist and wielder of the Brush , is missing, and all the color in the land vanished with her. It’s up to you, Chicory’s number one fan, to pick up the Brush and fill in for her. It’s a big job… but you’re ready for it! Probably! Explore the Picnic Province, and paint on anything! Solve puzzles and manipulate the environment with paint. Unlock new paint abilities and use them to reach new places. Dress up how you want with collectible clothes, plants, and furniture. Discover a world full of 100+ animal characters. Experience 10+ hours of gameplay and dozens of side quests including mail delivery, art classes, photo taking, and more. Play with your friends and paint together in local co-op! Featuring audio design by Em Halberstadt and A Shell in the Pit (Untitled Goose Game, Night in the Woods) And an original soundtrack by Lena Raine ! (Celeste, Minecraft)

Braid is a unique puzzle-platformer that immerses you in a painterly world where time itself is your playground. The core mechanic revolves around manipulating the flow of time in fascinating and unconventional ways. Your journey begins in a city house, from which you'll venture to various worlds, solving intricate puzzles to rescue a princess.

Each world introduces a distinct time-bending power, and it's the peculiar nature of time in these worlds that forms the basis of the challenges. These time mechanics include:

*   **Rewinding:** The ability to reverse time.
*   **Time-Immune Objects:** Certain elements that are unaffected by rewinding.
*   **Time Tied to Space:** Time's behavior is intrinsically linked to spatial elements.
*   **Parallel Realities:** The creation and interaction with alternate timelines.
*   **Time Dilation:** Slowing down or speeding up time.

Braid respects your time and attention, offering a game devoid of filler. Every puzzle presents a novel and engaging insight into the game's world.

**Key Features:**

*   **Steam Cloud Support:** Save your game progress to the cloud and seamlessly continue playing on any Steam-enabled computer.
*   **Forgiving Yet Challenging Gameplay:** Braid is a 2-D platformer where death and failure are impossible. The challenge lies in the clever puzzle design, not in overcoming difficult platforming sections.
*   **Rich Puzzle Environment:** Explore diverse worlds to collect puzzle pieces and solve challenges by manipulating time through rewinding, creating parallel universes, and utilizing time dilation. The gameplay is designed to feel fresh and encourage innovative thinking.
*   **Aesthetic Design:** A beautiful, painterly art style and a rich, organic soundtrack perfectly complement the distinctive gameplay.
*   **Nonlinear Story:** A fragmented narrative connects the different worlds, offering real-world metaphors for your time manipulations. These manipulations, in turn, serve as playful explorations of real-world themes and their potential consequences.
*   **Nonlinear Gameplay:** The game allows you to progress without necessarily solving every puzzle immediately. If you encounter a roadblock, you can move on and return to it later.

**World of Goo: A Unique Physics Puzzle Game**

**World of Goo** is a highly acclaimed physics-based puzzle and construction game. Developed by a small team of two, it challenges players to use **living, squirming goo balls** to build various structures. You'll create everything from simple bridges and cannonballs to ambitious zeppelins and even giant tongues. Millions of these **eager goo balls** inhabit the colorful world, ready for their journey.

The game features **mysterious levels** with unique environments and puzzles. As you progress, you'll encounter **different types of goo balls**, each with special abilities. These goo balls work together to navigate compelling narratives involving discovery, romance, intrigue, beauty, electricity, and the mysteries of the third dimension.

An **enigmatic Sign Painter** watches your progress, while the **World of Goo Corporation** proudly claims to be the Global Leader in Goo and Goo-Related Products. Their offerings include a trademark soft drink and a "succulent" facial exfoliating lotion.

Additionally, World of Goo hosts a **massive online competition**. Players worldwide compete to build the tallest goo towers in the corporation's sandbox environment. The corporation is contractually obligated to declare **every participant a winner**, celebrating all tower-building efforts. Good luck with your goo construction!

Name: F.E.A.R.
Description:
Be the hero in your own cinematic epic of action, tension and terror. A mysterious paramilitary force infiltrates a multi-billion dollar aerospace compound, taking hostages but issuing no demands. The government responds by sending in a Special Forces team only to have them obliterated. Live footage of the massacre shows an inexplicable wave of destruction tearing the soldiers apart. With no other recourse, the elite F.E.A.R. (First Encounter Assault Recon) team is assembled to deal with the extraordinary circumstances. They are given one simple mission: Evaluate the threat and eliminate the intruders at any cost. F.E.A.R. Extraction Point Extraction Point kicks off where the original game ended – with a bang. As the helicopter which the F.E.A.R. team is on attempts to leave the vicinity, it instead winds up crashing. The F.E.A.R. team is thus forced to seek out an alternate extraction point, all the way battling the now free Alma and her paranormal minions across a destroyed city. F.E.A.R. Perseus Mandate As the first F.E.A.R. team and Delta Force fight for control of the situation, a second F.E.A.R. team is sent in to shed some light on Armacham Technology Corporation's (ATC) dark past. As a member of a secondary F.E.A.R. team, you are brought in to discover more information regarding the secret project at the ATC facilities. The multiplayer component for this expansion is no longer available.

Name: Blind Drive
Description:
Blind Drive is an audio-based, black comedy action arcade game. The entire game is experienced through your ears. You're blindfolded and going against traffic. Cars rushing past, angry drivers yelling at you. Cops on your tail. And a sadistic madman on the phone. Can you do it? Play as Donnie, trying to make a quick buck in a scientific study but quickly finding himself in over his head, cuffed to the wheel and driving blindfolded against traffic. Plus he's late for dinner with Grandma. ** Headphones required ** FEATURES Hyper-immersive 1st-person audio - so good you can play with your eyes closed Fast-paced, 2-button arcade gameplay 27 levels of mayhem including boss fights, secret areas and a very rude G.P.S. Hilarious crime-comedy story with mobsters, dolphins and your angry Grandmother, performed by a full cast of voice actors Minimalistic, jazzy visuals Gamepad support including extra-fine haptics (rumble) Full text-to-speech accessibility - supports NVDA and Windows TTS. Press SHIFT+A to enable

Name: STEINS;GATE
Description:
-Decide The Fate Of All Mankind- CAN YOU CHANGE THE COURSE OF FATE? AND SAVE THE ONES CLOSEST TO YOU? STEINS;GATE is the award-winning time travel science-fiction interactive visual novel developed by 5pb. and Nitroplus. It is widely considered to be one of the finest Visual Novels ever made. STEINS;GATE follows a rag-tag band of tech-savvy young students who discover the means of changing the past via mail, using a modified microwave. Their experiments into how far they can go with their discovery begin to spiral out of control as they become entangled in a conspiracy surrounding SERN, the organisation behind the Large Hadron Collider, and John Titor who claims to be from a dystopian future. Interaction with the game takes place through the “phone trigger” system, where the player can receive calls and text messages and decide whether to reply to them or not, changing the outcome of the game’s plot. Features: Non-Linear Visual Novel - Discover multiple different endings depending on your choices in-game. HD 1080P - Enjoy the game with HD graphics and illustrations. Phone Trigger System - Interact via Rintaro’s cellphone to answer or ignore calls, and send and recieve emails. Your everday choices in life steer the story! 30-50 hours of reading time 8/10`EXEMPLARY` -DESTRUCTOID- `A REMARKABLE WORK` -US GAMER- `A MODERN CLASSIC` -KOTAKU- `UNFORGETTABLE` -GAMEMASTER- ★★★★★5/5 -EUROGAMER- 34/40 -Famitsu-

Name: Lacuna – A Sci-Fi Noir Adventure
Description:
/ The Save the World Edition includes Lacuna and the game’s atmospheric soundtrack that lets you dive deep into the sci-fi noir world of Lacuna . In addition, Assemble Entertainment donates 10% of the revenues of this edition to Go Give One ; a WHO initiative that provides COVID-19 vaccines amongst others for everyone, everywhere – prioritizing those who need them the most in countries that cannot afford them. On top of this, it’s the best option for all those who would like to support the work of the developer of Lacuna even more and do something good at the same time. Another cigarette tumbles into the abyss. The sun is slowly coming up, glistening in the sea of buildings below. I look up at the stars one last time before they disappear. They don't provide any guidance. They don't give a f*ck. I have to make this decision on my own, and very soon. Problem is, I don't know how. I've never been able to figure out why I do what I do. Not really. No more time to think. I have to go. Here's the deal You are Neil Conrad, CDI agent. Awoken by the news of a murder, you rush into a case that will soon turn your life and the whole solar system upside down. Ask questions, collect evidence, and put the pieces together until the ugly truth reveals itself... or not. No takebacks The story branches and ends based on your actions. There's no going back. Sure, you can rush your way to the end – if you don't mind paying the price. Play your cards right, and you might make it out alive. How far will you go? Some questions don't have a right answer. Will you sell out a friend to protect your family? Will you endanger a loved one in exchange for public safety? Will you keep the peace or reveal the horrible, world-shattering truth? Hungry for Point & Click Adventure? While the classics were great in their time, Lacuna does away with the baggage of many adventure game tropes: Pointing & clicking Platformer movement controls (WASD / controller) Selecting all dialog options one by one anyway Non-repeating conversations and choices Inventory management and counter-intuitive puzzles Immersive, story-driven mysteries Pixel hunting Optional outlines on anything interactable Story grinds to a halt at every puzzle can always be driven forward 'x will remember this' Real choices and multiple endings

Name: Her Story
Description:
A Video Game About a Woman Talking to the Police Her Story is the award winning video game from Sam Barlow, creator of Silent Hill: Shattered Memories and Aisle. A crime fiction game with non-linear storytelling, Her Story revolves around a police database full of live action video footage. It stars Viva Seifert, actress and one half of the band Joe Gideon and the Shark. How does it work? Her Story sits you in front of a mothballed desktop computer that’s logged into a police database of video footage. The footage covers seven interviews from 1994 in which a British woman is interviewed about her missing husband. Explore the database by typing search terms, watch the clips where she speaks those words and piece together her story. Unlike anything you've played before, Her Story is an involving and moving experience. A game that asks you to listen.

Name: Telling Lies
Description:
A Video Game About Private Conversations Telling Lies is the new video game from Sam Barlow, creator of Her Story and Silent Hill: Shattered Memories. An investigative thriller game with non-linear storytelling, Telling Lies revolves around a cache of secretly recorded video conversations. It stars Logan Marshall-Green , Alexandra Shipp , Kerry Bishé and Angela Sarafyan . How does it work? Telling Lies sits you in front of an anonymous laptop loaded with a stolen NSA database full of footage. The footage covers two years in the intimate lives of four people whose stories are linked by a shocking incident. Explore the database by typing search terms, watch the clips where those words are spoken and piece together your story. Unlike anything you've played before, Telling Lies is an intimate and intense experience. A game where you decide the truth.

Name: L.A. Noire
Description:
Using groundbreaking new animation technology, MotionScan, that captures every nuance of an actor's facial performance in astonishing detail, L.A. Noire is a violent crime thriller that blends breathtaking action with true detective work to deliver an unprecedented interactive experience. Search for clues, chase down suspects and interrogate witnesses as you struggle to find the truth in a city where everyone has something to hide. Amid the post-war boom of Hollywood's Golden Age, Cole Phelps is an LAPD detective thrown headfirst into a city drowning in its own success. Corruption is rampant, the drug trade is exploding, and murder rates are at an all-time high. In his fight to climb the ranks and do what's right, Phelps must unravel the truth behind a string of arson attacks, racketeering conspiracies and brutal murders, battling the L.A. underworld and even members of his own department to uncover a secret that could shake the city to its rotten core. This complete edition of L.A. Noire includes the complete original game and all previously released downloadable content including the 'Nicolson Electroplating' Arson case, the 'Reefer Madness' Vice case, 'The Consul's Car' Traffic case, 'The Naked City' Vice case and 'A Slip of the Tongue' Traffic case.

Name: Little Nightmares II
Description:
Return to a world of charming horror in Little Nightmares II, a suspense adventure game in which you play as Mono, a young boy trapped in a world that has been distorted by the humming transmission of a distant tower. With Six, the girl in the yellow raincoat, as his guide, Mono sets out to discover the dark secrets of The Signal Tower. Their journey won't be easy; Mono and Six will face a host of new threats from the terrible residents of this world. Will you dare to face this collection of new, little nightmares?

Name: Detention
Description:
Greenwood high school, located in a remote mountainous area, two students found themselves trapped and vulnerable. The place they once knew has changed in unsettling ways, haunted by evil creatures. To escape, they must explore the mysterious campus filled with ominous objects and puzzles. How will they survive in this ever threatening environment? Could they return to safety in one piece? Set in a fictitious world in the 1960s Taiwan under martial law, Detention, the story-driven atmospheric horror incorporated East Asian elements rarely used in games. Taoism, Buddhism, Chinese mythology, the game draws on local Taiwanese cultural references to tell an unique and terrifying story. In this 2D atmospheric horror side-scroller, players navigate the main characters in a classic point and click fashion to explore a high school where evil encroaches. While hiding from the rampaging monsters, you are to find items to interact with in the otherworldly rooms. And as more mysteries unveiled, the dark past of a cursed school will finally surface. 2D atmospheric horror with spine-chilling atmosphere. Immersive gameplay and puzzle solving experience Unique Taiwanese/Eastern cultural references. Original sound tracks, fusing Electronic, Lo-Fi, and Rock with traditional Asian instruments. Unique and appealing graphics. Multiple language support. (Including English, Chinese and Japanese) Mac, Windows and Linux support

**Alan Wake: A Thrilling Descent into Darkness**

When best-selling author Alan Wake's wife vanishes during their vacation, his desperate search uncovers pages from a thriller he has no memory of writing. A malevolent Dark Presence haunts the quiet town of Bright Falls, pushing Wake to the edge of sanity as he battles to solve the mystery and rescue his wife.

Presented in a television series format, Alan Wake showcases Remedy's signature storytelling and intense action. Players will confront daunting challenges, unexpected plot twists, and gripping cliffhangers as they delve deeper into the enigma. To survive the encroaching darkness, mastering the unique "Fight With Light" combat mechanic is essential.

Alan Wake masterfully blends the mechanics of an action game with the psychological depth of a thriller. Its gripping atmosphere, intricate narrative, and exceptionally tense combat offer players a truly original and captivating gaming experience.

**Enhanced for PC:**

*   **Expanded Content:** Includes the Alan Wake Special Episodes, "The Signal" and "The Writer."
*   **Visual Fidelity:** Experience Alan Wake's Pacific Northwest in higher resolutions and with greater detail than the Xbox 360 version.
*   **Flexible Controls:** Enjoy fully customizable mouse and keyboard support, or opt for your Steam or Microsoft gamepad.
*   **Customizable Graphics:** A wide array of graphics settings and support for 4:3, 16:9, and 16:10 aspect ratios.
*   **Performance Optimization:** Features a multithreaded engine that leverages quad-core CPUs.
*   **Fan-Requested Features:** Includes options for field of view adjustment and HUD hiding.
*   **Multi-Monitor Support:** Compatible with AMD Eyefinity 3D for a 3-screen setup.

Guild Wars 2 offers a rich open-world experience focused on discovery and exploration. As you embark on your adventures, your content guide can offer suggestions, and your compass will point you toward interesting landmarks. Alternatively, simply choose a direction and let adventure find you.

### Exploring Tyria's World

Tyria is populated by characters with their own unique stories and objectives. You'll be rewarded for assisting them or disrupting their plans by completing renown hearts and engaging in dynamic events. For additional tips, consult our new player guide. When you encounter other players in the open world, you can freely help them without needing to join a party. This includes assisting with secret jumping puzzles or teaming up to face formidable world bosses. The game encourages playing your way, rather than grinding.

### Character Progression and Customization

Earning experience points is a natural part of gameplay, whether you're reviving fallen players, defending soldiers from a Risen attack, or gathering resources. As you play, you can arm your character with a diverse arsenal of new weapons. Each profession utilizes these weapons differently, and every weapon type offers a distinct playstyle. You can further refine and customize your character's abilities by unlocking and equipping hundreds of skills and traits.

### Player vs. Player and Fashion

If you prefer structured PvP, Guild Wars 2 offers an accessible experience where all players compete on an equal footing. You'll have access to max-level gear and build options necessary to make your mark. For those who enjoy expressing themselves through character design, the game provides ample opportunities. Equipping new weapons and armor unlocks their skins in your wardrobe, allowing for thousands of combinations. You can personalize your look further with a vast selection of collectible dyes.

### Expanding Your Experience with Expansions

Upgrade your free account with a Guild Wars 2 expansion to gain access to valuable benefits. These include login rewards, additional character and bag slots, and enhanced chat features. You can purchase expansions and upgrade your account using your Steam Wallet via the in-game Black Lion Trading Company.

Expansions and Living World seasons introduce unique rewards and new Masteries that expand your character's capabilities. In *Guild Wars 2: Heart of Thorns*, you can unlock and upgrade your glider. *Guild Wars 2: Path of Fire* allows you to befriend a stable of mounts with powerful movement skills. *Guild Wars 2: End of Dragons* introduces fishing and the ability to pilot a skiff. Each expansion also grants access to nine elite specializations, unlocking new weapon choices, skills, and abilities for your profession. Furthermore, you can select the Revenant profession at character creation, channeling legendary heroes and villains from Tyria's history.

Living World seasons continue the Guild Wars 2 narrative between expansions. These must be purchased separately through your Story Journal or as Gem Store bundles. Playing Living World episodes unlocks new explorable zones, rewards, and Masteries.

*Living World episodes are playable at level 80. A game relaunch may be necessary for upgrades to take effect.*
**Existing Guild Wars 2 player accounts cannot be accessed via Steam.**

Name: Slay the Spire
Description:
We fused card games and roguelikes together to make the best single player deckbuilder we could. Craft a unique deck, encounter bizarre creatures, discover relics of immense power, and Slay the Spire! Features Dynamic Deck Building : Choose your cards wisely! Discover hundreds of cards to add to your deck with each attempt at climbing the Spire. Select cards that work together to efficiently dispatch foes and reach the top. An Ever-changing Spire : Whenever you embark on a journey up the Spire, the layout differs each time. Choose a risky or safe path, face different enemies, choose different cards, discover different relics, and even fight different bosses! Powerful Relics to Discover : Powerful items known as relics can be found throughout the Spire. The effects of these relics can greatly enhance your deck through powerful interactions. But beware, obtaining a relic may cost you more than just gold... Slay the Spire left Early Access and comes with: Four characters that each have their own unique set of cards. 350+ fully implemented cards. 200+ different items to be found. 50+ unique combat encounters. 50+ mysterious events that can help or harm you. Daily Climbs allow you to compare yourself with every other player in the world. Custom mode that allows mixing and matching various crazy run modifiers.

《魔物讨伐团》是一款融合了卡牌对战和RPG元素的Roguelike冒险游戏，它是经典传奇卡牌游戏《Monster Slayers》的官方中文强化版本。这款游戏不仅提供了**全文官方汉化**，还**收录了全部DLC**，并对原有系统进行了**大幅强化**。

玩家将有机会操作多达**14种独特的职业**，包括盗贼、游侠、骑士、牧师、野蛮人、法师、刺客、武僧、兽王、狂战士、亡灵巫师、药剂师、飞龙和商人。通过与各种**离奇魔物的战斗**以及经历**随机事件**，玩家可以逐步构建属于自己的传奇牌组。游戏拥有**完善的卡牌设计**和**独特的天赋系统**，这为玩家提供了**近乎无限的牌组搭配和出牌可能性**。

《魔物讨伐团》官方讨论QQ群为791224753，欢迎各位卡牌爱好者加入讨论！职业卡牌选手和知名UP主也在等你哦！

### 游戏特色

*   **多达14名职业**：游戏包含6名基础职业、6名进阶职业以及2名特殊风格职业。每个职业解锁后都拥有其**独有的牌组**。
*   **超爽的出牌手感**：出牌动作与攻击招式**紧密结合**，一套连招下来，你将体验到无与伦比的畅快感。
*   **个性化角色系统**：游戏采用**纸娃娃系统**，角色拥有丰富的表情并支持换装，配合**真人配音**，带来了强烈的代入感。
*   **声望与装备体系**：即使在战斗中失败，玩家也能通过积累**装备与声望**来不断强化下一次的战斗体验。通过声望和装备换取的天赋，将成为你**永远的希望**。
*   **丰富的克制设定**：游戏内充斥着**相生相克的元素**，例如火与水、光明与黑暗。牧师能够有效压制不死亡灵，而燃烧则是对付畏惧火焰敌人的最佳方式。

### 独一无二的组牌过程

你的最终牌组效果将是**职业卡组、战斗获取、商人购买、随机事件、随从技能、天赋树解锁以及装备提供**等多种因素共同作用的结果。

### 更加讲究策略的探索式地图

游戏结合了**可见的地图选择**和**职业互克**，将运气与策略有机地融合在一起。面对丰富多样的怪物，穿越无数的地牢，勇敢地去战斗吧！正如俗语所说，“那些杀不死你的，只会让你变得更加强大！”

### 传奇模式与无尽模式

通关仅仅是游戏的开始。新职业的解锁和新玩法的出现，将带来**更多卡牌组合、更多武器装备以及更多的游戏乐趣**！

Name: Monster Slayers
Description:
Developed by Nerdook (Reverse Crawl, Vertical Drop Heroes), Monster Slayers is a complete reimagining of the free web-based hit of the same name, which has been played over 4 million times on gaming portal, Kongregate. A rogue-like deck-building RPG adventure, Monster Slayers uses an innovative card-based battle system and lets you customize a deck to suit your play style. Create a new hero to join the Monster Slayers Guild and choose your path through the perilous Northern Valley as you follow your quest to defeat the legendary Harbinger and become a true Monster Slayer. Features Battle undead goblins, lion outlaws, mighty dragons and other monstrous foes using a unique card-based combat system Strategically shape your deck as you acquire new cards from merchants, treasure chests, and allies Collect fame from each run to unlock new abilities that can be used by future heroes Every playthrough is different: levels, enemy encounters and loot are randomly generated Choose from six different classes: Rogue, Ranger, Knight, Barbarian, Cleric, Wizard Recruit companions to join you on your quest and make use of their special abilities Equip your hero with stat-boosting loot to improve the chances of victory Fight for your place at the top of the Monster Slayers leaderboards Inspired by the much-loved deck-building RPG, Dream Quest, created by Peter Whalen (Hearthstone)

Name: Monster Train
Description:
Hell has frozen over. Only you can protect the final burning pyre from the forces of heaven and restore the inferno. Monster Train brings a new strategic layer to roguelike deck building, with three vertical play fields to defend. Visit powerful locations To take back hell, you’ll need to power up. Choose your route carefully, different locations give different benefits; upgrade your champion, recruit powerful units, upgrade cards, gain passive bonuses or duplicate any card in your deck. Strategize to fit your playstyle With five clans to choose from, each has its own unique and surprising gameplay. Pick your primary and supporting clan to gain access to all cards from both. During your run you will be able to improve cards by mixing and matching upgrades to open up new roads to victory. You can even duplicate your favourite card at special map nodes before facing off against the final boss. No playthrough is ever the same You’ll never play the same deck twice! Over 220 cards, build up your deck from 10 different starterdecks 5 monster clans with each very different gameplay Each clan has 10 levels to unlock, bringing new cards to your deck Upgrade your clan specific champion multiple times Mod support through Steam Workshop Upgrade any card twice More than 21 unique random events 25 covenant (difficulty) levels Multiplayer HELL RUSH In the Hell Rush multiplayer mode, eight players compete in a frantic real time contest. Each player has the same resources and opponents to create a level playing field. With the clock ticking it’s a test of who can make the best decisions under pressure. Only a true speed demon can remain undefeated. DAILY CHALLENGE Take on a new challenge every day with a hugely modified run due to gameplay mutators. Compete globally and against friends, and climb the leaderboards with a skill-focused scoring system. CUSTOM CHALLENGE Design your own unique challenge and share it with friends. Each custom challenge has its own leaderboard so you can send your friends straight to hell. Content updates FRIENDS & FOES UPDATE The exiled champions have returned to the fold to battle the forces of heaven. This second major update for Monster Train adds new champions, new bosses, new cards, and new artifacts, which combine together to add a significant amount of new strategic options and replayability. We’ve also added a number of frequently requested player features like a personal run records page in the Logbook, an enemy wave counter in battle, and a preview of the ring 3 and ring 6 bosses at the start of a run. WILD MUTATIONS UPDATE This content updates the train tracks with 35 new mutators, new difficulty settings for experienced players and new simple ways to challenge friends and community. HERZAL'S WORKSHOP UPDATE Mod support!

Astrea: Six-Sided Oracles is a unique DICE-deck-building roguelike that reimagines the genre by replacing cards with dice and introducing an innovative dual "damage" system: Purification versus Corruption. Your mission is to assemble a powerful dice pool capable of cleansing Astrea's rampant corruption and ultimately saving the Star System.

This game offers several distinct features:

*   **Unique Dual "Damage" System:** Astrea introduces a novel approach to combat. Purification can be used offensively against enemies or defensively to heal yourself. Conversely, Corruption allows you to inflict damage upon yourself or provide healing to your foes. You can pacify enemies through Purification or strategically Corrupt yourself to unleash potent abilities that shift the tide of battle.
*   **Dynamic Health Bar System:** Your health bar is not merely a measure of your well-being; it's a strategic element. Skills are attached to your health bar, and by taking Corruption, you can activate these skills to unleash powerful abilities. However, excessive Corruption can lead to your character being consumed by its influence.
*   **Dice, Not Cards:** Forget traditional card decks; Astrea centers around building a dice pool that perfectly complements your individual playstyle. With over 350 dice to choose from, categorized into three distinct types—reliably safe, perfectly balanced, and powerfully risky—you can craft a strategy built on high-risk, high-reward mechanics.
*   **Dice Customization:** Take control of your destiny by forging your own fate. You can edit die faces, assigning new actions to them and thereby increasing the odds of achieving powerful results in your favor.
*   **Six Brave Oracles:** Select from six distinct Oracles, each boasting their own unique dice sets, abilities, and playstyles. Whether you prefer the strategic finesse of spellcasters or the direct assault of berserkers, or enjoy overwhelming opponents through brute force or clever tactical plays, there is an Oracle tailored to your preferences.
*   **Upgradeable Support Sentinels:** Recruit over 20 upgradeable Support Sentinels, enchanted constructs that provide beneficial dice rolls, serving as invaluable allies during intense combat encounters.
*   **Modifying Blessings:** Discover more than 170 Modifying Blessings to imbue your Oracle with unique passive effects. These blessings can fundamentally alter your tactics, offering either Star Blessings (passive effects with lower power) or Black Hole Blessings (powerful passive effects that come with a drawback).
*   **Random Events:** Encounter over 20 random events scattered throughout mysterious locations, each with the potential to significantly alter the course of your run.
*   **Enemy Manipulation:** Gain control over your enemies and your fate. Enemies attack using their own dice, and you possess the ability to manipulate their dice rolls, thereby altering their intended actions.
*   **Difficulty Levels:** Tailor your gameplay experience with 16 distinct difficulty levels, designed to thoroughly test your skills and strategic prowess.

The lore of Astrea unfolds in a distant past when ancient ruins were once thriving civilizations, and their inhabitants lived in perfect harmony under the governance of a mystical star. Loyal disciples, known as the Six-Sided Oracles, were divinely blessed by this star, granting them the power to seal away celestial energies within mystic relics. This era of peace was shattered by the Crimson Dawn Cataclysm, a cataclysmic event where a ferocious inferno descended from the sky, engulfing the entire star system. This catastrophe crumbled societal foundations and corrupted the souls of the less resilient. The original disciples were lost to the ensuing chaos, their creations scattered across a desolate world. The question remains: do any capable of wielding their power still exist? Eons later, descendants of the Six-Sided Oracles embark on a perilous journey to complete the unfinished battle of their predecessors and ultimately save their star system.

Embark on an epic deckbuilding RPG adventure in Gordian Quest. A sinister curse has plunged the land into darkness, unleashing roaming monsters and opportunistic scoundrels. Fearful citizens flee as heroes rise to save what remains. Will you succumb to your enemies or your own missteps? Your Gordian Quest begins now.

Gordian Quest blends old-school charm with modern innovations like roguelite elements and strategic turn-based combat. Assemble and manage parties of heroes, guiding them through arduous missions. Fostering bonds between heroes is key, enabling them to discover and develop new skills collaboratively. Unravel the curses plaguing the land and confront the ultimate evil.

### Game Modes

Gordian Quest offers a rich variety of modes for an engaging and replayable experience.

#### Campaign Mode

Embark on a grand narrative spanning four acts. Journey from Westmire to the Sky Imperium to rescue the realm of Wrendia.

#### Realm Mode

Experience a dynamic roguelite where the world constantly shifts. Conquer five distinct realms or test your endurance in an endless mode.

#### Adventure Mode

Explore procedurally generated environments and engage in solo challenges in this end-game content.

#### Skirmish Mode

Engage in competitive 1v1 battles. Pit your curated party of three heroes against a friend.

### Hero and Skill System

#### Ten Unique Heroes

Choose from ten heroes, each with a distinct class, unique skills, and individual playstyle. These include the Swordhand, Cleric, Ranger, Scoundrel, Spellbinder, Druid, Bard, Warlock, Golemancer, and Monk.

#### Hundreds of Skills

With nearly 800 passive and active skills across all heroes, experiment to discover effective combat combinations in turn-based battles.

#### Hero Progression

Enhance heroes through training and equip them with weapons, armor, and enchanted trinkets to augment their capabilities.

### Replayability and Customization

#### High Replayability

Procedurally generated maps and dungeons, along with randomized hero skills, ensure each playthrough is fresh.

#### Varied Difficulty Levels

Choose hardcore mode for a permadeath experience or a casual approach where defeat is a temporary setback.

#### Abundant Loot

Collect items and relics to bolster your heroes' strengths. Future updates will add items that bestow blessings or curses.

#### Carryover Rewards

The Artifacts system provides persistent rewards that enhance subsequent playthroughs in Realm Mode, Campaigns, and Adventure Mode.

#### Meaningful Decisions

Your adventure's narrative and progression are shaped by critical decisions and unpredictable dice roll outcomes.

Name: Griftlands
Description:
Griftlands is a deck-building rogue-like where you fight and negotiate your way through a broken-down sci-fi world. Every decision is important, be it the jobs you take, the friends you make, or the cards you collect. Death comes quickly, but each play offers new situations and strategies to explore. Play as Sal, Rook, or Smith. Three unique character campaigns with their own specialized decks, abilities and maps to explore. Sal is an adventurer out for profit and revenge. Rook is an aging spy working his own agenda. Smith is an idle loafer who might just save the world. Each playable character's story takes place in a unique environment, with different factions and locations to explore and exploit. Battle Challenging Bosses Test your combat decks against powerful foes with unique mechanics and attacks. Build a Team - or Buy One! Hire mercenaries, find pets, or impose upon your friends to accomplish your goals. Master Hundreds of Cards Each character has unique negotiation and combat decks to draft from. Get powerful item cards from fallen foes, or as rewards. Decisions Matter Killing foes may incur the wrath of their friends, but sparing them leaves a dangerous piece on the board. Choose wisely, everyone remembers everything you do! Welcome to Havaria Each playable character's story takes place in a unique environment, with different factions and locations to explore and exploit. Explore A Broken-Down Sci-Fi World The world of Havaria is a harsh place, full of harsher denizens. Explore lush, hand-illustrated environments full of people who want to kill you. Playing Politics For Keeps Each character has a factional allegiance and an opinion of you. Play politics between rivals, and try to capture the most powerful social boons. But watch out -- doublecross the wrong person, and you'll be subject to their bane! Outwit or Overpower Overcome obstacles with the power of your fists - or your words. You'll need to pick your cards and play them right if you're going to survive. Build two decks simultaneously, balancing the tradeoffs of each. Learn from each attempted run through the various stories of the Griftlands. Encounter different combinations of enemies, quests, and events every time you play. Your fate is determined by your choices, and by fate.

**Floppy Knights: A Strategic Blend of Turn-Based Tactics and Card-Game Mastery**

Prepare to embark on an exciting adventure with **Floppy Knights**, the innovative new game that masterfully fuses turn-based tactics with deep card-game strategy. This fresh take on two beloved genres invites you to lead your customizable Knights to victory across a vibrant, hand-drawn battlefield.

**Discover Your Unique Fighting Style**

Within the world of Floppy Knights, you'll encounter a diverse array of units, each boasting a unique playstyle and the ability to generate special cards during combat. This dynamic system ensures **endless strategic possibilities** and allows you to truly find your own fighting style. As you progress, you'll discover that each deck of Floppy Knights represents a distinct faction, offering a different strategic approach:

*   **Plants Deck:** Focus on upgrading your abilities, healing allies, and securing crucial terrain advantages.
*   **Monsters Deck:** Enhance your defenses with added armor and strategically trade HP for powerful buffs.
*   **Hooligans Deck:** Embrace a swift and deadly approach, characterized by being **sneaky, poisonous, and fast**.

**Craft Your Winning Strategy**

The core of Floppy Knights lies in your ability to **mix and match snazzy card combos** to forge a winning strategy. Whether you're a seasoned tactics veteran or new to the genre, the game's snappy battles and numerous card combinations will constantly challenge you to discover the perfect approach. Master the art of planning the perfect draw, taking advantage of cards that add and flip complementary cards to execute **seamless, devastating combos**.

**Immerse Yourself in a Retro-Futuristic World**

Floppy Knights transports you to a fantastical land brimming with **retro tech and magic**, brought to life by the stunning hand-drawn visuals of Marlowe Dobbe (Dicey Dungeons). Explore a world rich with lush vegetation, treacherous volcanoes, icy caves, and mysterious foggy forests. Complementing this visual feast is an energetic and refreshingly retro soundtrack by Grahm Nesbitt (Garden Story), guaranteed to have you tapping your feet as you conquer the battlefield.

**Meet Phoebe and Her Incredible Invention**

This exciting journey is brought to you by Phoebe, a talented inventor with a singular mission: to save enough money to finally move out of her parents' place. While numerous odd jobs exist throughout the town, there's only one Phoebe, and her latest creation, **Floppy Knights**, is her ticket to success! You'll be guided by Carlton, Phoebe’s most trusted friend and a super cool robot arm, who is eager to share the wonders of this unique game.

Name: One Step From Eden
Description:
Eden is the last shining beacon of hope in a bleak post-war world. One Step from Eden combines strategic deck-building and real-time action with rogue-like elements, giving you the chance to carve a path of mercy or destruction. Fight alone or with a friend in co-op as you cast powerful spells on the fly, battle evolving enemies, and collect game-changing artifacts. Can you make it to Eden or will your destruction be imminent? Genre-Bending. Experience a blend of strategy and real-time action. Build your deck and fight through bullet hell as you make your way to Eden. Comprehensive Deckbuilding. Customize your deck and play style with 200+ spells and 100+ game-changing items. Varied Gameplay. A cast of 9 playable characters across procedurally generated levels with alternate runs ensures you’ll never experience the same situation or outcome twice. Play with Friends. Fight your way to Eden in local co-op or in PvP. The Game Keeps Going. Full Steam Workshop and mod support!

## Sid Meier's Civilization IV: A New Era of Strategy

Sid Meier's Civilization IV is a landmark title in the acclaimed PC game franchise, celebrated by millions worldwide. With over 6 million units sold and widespread critical praise, it stands as one of the greatest strategy games ever created.

### Enhanced Gameplay and Features

Firaxis Games, led by Sid Meier, has elevated this addictive experience with innovative gameplay mechanics. Civilization IV introduces fresh ways to play and achieve victory, alongside powerful new tools for managing and growing your empire.

### A Living, Breathing World

Experience your civilization like never before in a stunningly detailed, dynamic 3D environment. This immersive world significantly enhances the overall gameplay experience, bringing your strategic decisions to life.

### Modding and Multiplayer

Civilization IV also boasts all-new, user-friendly modding capabilities, allowing for extensive customization. Intense multiplayer modes and options are available, offering new challenges and competitive play.

### Critical Acclaim

Already recognized as a top ten game of 2005, Civilization IV is a must-have for gamers globally.

*Note: Online Multiplayer is no longer supported for the Mac version.*

**Civilization IV: Revolutionizing Strategy Gaming**

Sid Meier's Civilization IV represents a significant evolution in the acclaimed strategy genre, building upon the franchise's legacy of deeply engaging gameplay and widespread critical praise. This installment introduces a wealth of innovative mechanics designed to offer players entirely new avenues for strategic development and ultimate victory, complemented by sophisticated tools that empower players to meticulously manage and expand their burgeoning empires.

The core advancements in Civilization IV are multifaceted, encompassing **expanded gameplay mechanics** that unlock novel strategic approaches and diverse victory conditions, alongside **advanced management tools** that streamline the complex process of civilization development. Furthermore, the game boasts **user-friendly modding capabilities**, providing accessible tools for extensive customization, and **intense multiplayer modes** that offer robust online and LAN options for thrilling competitive experiences. Players will find themselves immersed in a **vibrant, living 3D world**, a testament to the game's groundbreaking presentation that elevates the player's connection to the unfolding gameplay. Recognized as a standout title of 2005, Civilization IV continues to be an essential acquisition for strategy game aficionados globally. It is important to note that online multiplayer functionality is not available for the Mac version of the game.

Name: Factorio
Description:
Factorio is a game in which you build and maintain factories. You will be mining resources, researching technologies, building infrastructure, automating production and fighting enemies. In the beginning you will find yourself chopping trees, mining ores and crafting mechanical arms and transport belts by hand, but in short time you can become an industrial powerhouse, with huge solar fields, oil refining and cracking, manufacture and deployment of construction and logistic robots, all for your resource needs. However this heavy exploitation of the planet's resources does not sit nicely with the locals, so you will have to be prepared to defend yourself and your machine empire. Join forces with other players in cooperative Multiplayer , create huge factories, collaborate and delegate tasks between you and your friends. Add mods to increase your enjoyment, from small tweak and helper mods to complete game overhauls, Factorio's ground-up Modding support has allowed content creators from around the world to design interesting and innovative features. While the core gameplay is in the form of the freeplay scenario, there are a range of interesting challenges in the form of Scenarios . If you don't find any maps or scenarios you enjoy, you can create your own with the in-game Map Editor , place down entities, enemies, and terrain in any way you like, and even add your own custom script to make for interesting gameplay. Discount Disclaimer: We don't have any plans to take part in a sale or to reduce the price for the foreseeable future. What people say about Factorio No other game in the history of gaming handles the logistics side of management simulator so perfectly. - Reddit I see conveyor belts when I close my eyes. I may have been binging Factorio lately. - Notch, Mojang Factorio is a super duper awesome game where we use conveyor belts to shoot aliens. - Zisteau, Youtube

Name: Mini Motorways
Description:
Have you ever been stuck in traffic and wished you could do something to fix it? In Mini Motorways, the city’s traffic problems are in your hands. From the makers of Mini Metro, Mini Motorways is a game about drawing the roads that drive a growing city. Build a road network, one road at a time, to create a bustling metropolis. Redesign your city to keep the traffic flowing, and carefully manage upgrades to meet the changing demands. How long can you keep the cities of the world moving? Key Features Draw roads in dynamic cities that grow and change - every game is unique! Explore stunning maps inspired by cities all around the world. Choose from a variety of upgrades to meet the demands of your ever-expanding road network: highways, roundabouts, and more! Select different colour palettes on every map including colourblind and night modes. Relax to a responsive soundtrack from Disasterpeace that grows along with your city. Unlock new maps and achievements as you achieve mastery Export GIFs of your city layouts to share with your friends. Compete against other players in Daily and Weekly Challenges.

Name: Europa Universalis IV
Description:
Paradox Development Studio is back with the fourth installment of the award-winning Europa Universalis series. This classic grand strategy game gives you control of a nation through four dramatic centuries. Rule your land and dominate the world with unparalleled freedom, depth and historical accuracy. Write a new history of the world and build an empire for the ages. Start before the Renaissance on a map of the world as it was then. Choose from any of hundreds of nations and then rule up to the Age of Revolutions. Or, if you wish, start your game at any date in the span, with historical monarchs and other leaders. Hundreds of dynamic historical events are yours to experience, from merely troubling civil wars to world changing moments like the Protestant Reformation. Discover and settle the New World, or resist European conquest. Control the flow of trade by developing your trade power in key provinces, using ships and governmental policy to bring the wealth of the world to your own ports. Build alliances into iron bonds, cemented by royal marriage or play a flexible hand, keeping your options open. Strike when your enemies are weak, using your armies to grab new land and new potential riches. Your nation’s pace of development will be heavily influenced by the person on the throne. Experience rapid development under a skilled monarch only to see things slow down when a less competent heir takes over. Plan for the future by spending monarch power wisely. Four hundred years of research into new ways of war, administration and trade are available. Unlock new weapons, new buildings and new ship types. Over time, you can embrace national ideas that represent both your historic legacy and your ambitions for the future. From grand voyages of discovery to religious wars to revolutionary governments, the entire history of the early modern world waits for you to rewrite it in Europa Universalis IV.

## Six Ages: Ride Like the Wind: A Mythic Strategy Saga

Step into a world where myth and reality intertwine in **Six Ages: Ride the Wind**. This captivating storybook strategy game invites you to lead your clan through an epic, multi-generational tale of survival, alliances, and legend. Set in the same rich world as the acclaimed *King of Dragon Pass*, *Six Ages* transports you thousands of years earlier to the Bronze Age land of Glorantha, a realm where ancient gods and potent magic shape destiny.

### Forge Your Clan's Legacy

In *Six Ages*, you are not merely a player; you are the architect of your clan's future. This game masterfully blends role-playing elements with deep resource management, ensuring every decision carries significant, long-term consequences. Design your unique clan, navigate the complex relationships with the gods, strive for respect, and even engage in daring raids against your neighbors. The game boasts over 400 interactive story scenes, each driven by intricate simulation systems that influence their appearance and outcomes, offering a truly dynamic experience.

### Explore the World of Glorantha

Glorantha is a meticulously crafted Bronze Age world, echoing our own in many ways, yet existing within a magical universe. Here, the laws of physics bend to the will of gods and spirits, and the Sun itself is a living deity. You will play as a Riders clan, deeply connected to their own mythology, revering figures like Gamari the Horse Mother and their culture hero, Hyalor. However, beware the ever-present Trickster, Raven, who has not forgotten you.

### A Spiritual Successor to a Beloved Classic

*Six Ages: Ride the Wind* is the spiritual successor to the highly praised *King of Dragon Pass*. While sharing the same universe, it introduces a new clan, the Riders, with their own distinct myths and an expanded world to explore. Discover, appease, and forge pacts with the spirits inhabiting your territory. The game offers multiple difficulty levels, including an option for "Iron Willed" players to limit reloading for an even greater challenge. All of this unfolds through gorgeous, hand-painted high-resolution illustrations.

### More Than Just a Game

Glorantha serves as the backdrop for numerous other rich narrative experiences, including *King of Dragon Pass*, *HeroQuest*, *RuneQuest*, and *God Wars*. *Six Ages* invites you to immerse yourself in this legendary world and carve out your clan's place in history.

**Please note:** The minimum system requirements for Windows is Windows 10.

For even more in-depth information, consult the official manual!

Name: Oxygen Not Included
Description:
In the space-colony simulation game Oxygen Not Included you’ll find that scarcities of oxygen, warmth and sustenance are constant threats to your colony's survival. Guide colonists through the perils of subterranean asteroid living and watch as their population grows until they're not simply surviving, but thriving... Just make sure you don't forget to breathe. Build Extensive Bases and Discover What it Takes to Survive: Everything in your space colony is under your control, from excavation and resource allocation right down to plumbing and power systems. Resources will begin depleting with your first breath, however, so be sure to dig fast if you want to live. It’s Mind Over Matter with Stress Simulations: Keep the psychological impact of survival at bay with fun leisure activities, great accommodations and even better food for your colony. Duplicants each have different and potentially destructive ways of reacting to stress, so be sure to always keep them happy. Whatever the cost. Avoid Boiling with Thermodynamics: Temperature control is a constant concern in space; too cold and you'll freeze, too hot and you'll fry. Keep tabs on ambient environmental temperatures and your colony's heat production to maintain a nice, cozy atmosphere for your colonists. Enhance Efficiency through Complex Gas and Liquid Simulations: Create interlocking pipe systems to swiftly deliver fuel and liquid to critical areas of your base. Plan well and be rewarded as your colony transforms into an imperishable, well-oiled machine. Take Charge with Power Grid Simulations: Choose from a multitude of power sources including coal, hydrogen, natural gas or just plain old elbow grease. Manage power runoff, circuit overloads and meltdowns to keep your colony running smoothly. Always Keep Yourself Breathing: Enter the Oxygen Overlay and watch air moving through your base in real time. Monitor carbon dioxide accumulation and oversee oxygen generation processes to mold your colony into a veritable deep-space oasis. Waste Nothing through Extreme Recycling: Make use of every last resource for a base that truly exemplifies efficiency. Recycle waste into precious fuel, process unbreathable gas into air or harness the natural bodily processes of wild creatures for food. If you’re clever, you might even be able to run a base off colonist farts. Explore Diverse, Procedurally Generated New Worlds: Summon new worlds with a push of a button. Experience tons of untamed space rocks, then suffocate to death in them!

Name: Cook-Out
Description:
Get your aprons ready… things are about to get messy in this award-winning multiplayer VR cooking game from Resolution Games! Set within the cook’s cabin of a fairytale forest, Cook-Out: A Sandwich Tale is a wacky and whimsical adventure - brought to you by the creators of Angry Birds VR: Isle of Pigs, Bait! and Blaston - that challenges up to four players to work together to keep the orders coming for a hungry cast of enchanted creatures in this multiplayer VR game. As players progress through increasingly hectic levels, they not only prepare meals but also need to fight off a number of nasty customers who seem absolutely set on making trouble -- like jesters who will hide parts of orders, or thieves who will keep pilfering ingredients. With some of the game’s most recent updates, players can add to the fun by upgrading their chef’s look with the “Make it Your Way feature” and join the “House Party” update for new skins, customizations and more! While the game is focused on cooperative play, solo players can also enjoy the experience with the help of a simulated partner, making sure there’s always a team to tackle tough orders and restore the calm to this wild kitchen.

**Cities: Skylines** is a modern city simulation game that captures the excitement and challenges of building and managing a real city. It expands on traditional city-building elements, offering new gameplay features. Your imagination is the only limit as you strive for urban greatness.

This game presents a **multi-tiered and challenging simulation**. While easy to learn, mastering the art of city construction is difficult. As mayor, you must balance crucial needs like education, water, electricity, police, and healthcare with your city's economy. Citizens react realistically to various gameplay scenarios, adding an authentic touch.

A key feature is the **extensive local traffic simulation**, drawing on Colossal Order's expertise from the Cities in Motion series. This ensures a well-crafted and detailed traffic system.

You can go beyond simple administration by designating **Districts and Policies**. This allows you to implement specific rules for different city areas, truly embodying the role of mayor.

The **Day and Night Cycle** significantly impacts your city. Observe how traffic slows down at night, and certain zones operate less efficiently. Cities: Skylines puts you in charge of managing these dynamic cycles.

Furthermore, the game boasts **extensive modding support**. You can create and improve maps and structures, then share your creations or download those from other players via the Steam Workshop.

**Giants: Citizen Kabuto**

Embark on an extraordinary journey to **the Island**, a colossal fragment of a forgotten planet adrift in the vastness of space. This ancient paradise is home to **Kabuto**, a colossal being unaware of the Island's prior inhabitants. Deep within its oceans resides the **Sea Reapers**, a matriarchal race who originally created Kabuto as a guardian against external threats. However, Kabuto's burgeoning consciousness, coupled with feelings of loneliness and pain, led him to a destructive rampage.

Meanwhile, **the Meccs**, a group of spacefaring castaways, find themselves stranded on the Island while searching for lost companions. Facing an unexpected delay on their journey to Planet Majorca, the Meccs attempt to make the most of their temporary refuge. Unfortunately, their arrival coincides with an ongoing conflict between the Island's native factions, making them unwelcome intruders.

The core of **Giants: Citizen Kabuto** lies in the **irreconcilable conflict** between three distinct races: the technologically advanced **Meccaryns**, the formidable **Sea Reapers**, and the colossal **Kabuto**. This unique premise sets the stage for an unforgettable gaming experience, offering **three entirely different gameplay styles** that cater to diverse player preferences. Prepare for a narrative filled with **bawdy humor** that promises to keep you entertained throughout your adventure, solidifying its status as **one of the most original games ever created**. This is the original version from 2000.

## F.E.A.R.: An Elite Tactical Response to Unexplained Terror

Step into the role of a hero within your own intensely cinematic experience, brimming with action, suspense, and sheer terror. The narrative begins with a perplexing infiltration of a multi-billion dollar aerospace compound by a shadowy paramilitary force, who seize hostages without articulating any demands. In response, the government dispatches a Special Forces unit, only for them to be utterly annihilated. Disturbing live footage of this massacre reveals an unfathomable wave of destruction that systematically tears the soldiers apart. Faced with such extraordinary circumstances and no other viable options, the elite F.E.A.R. (First Encounter Assault Recon) team is meticulously assembled to confront this unprecedented threat. Their singular, critical mission is to thoroughly evaluate the nature of the danger and decisively eliminate the intruders, regardless of the ultimate cost.

### F.E.A.R. Extraction Point: A Perilous Escape

The gripping saga of *F.E.A.R. Extraction Point* commences precisely where the original game's dramatic conclusion left off, igniting with an explosive event. As the F.E.A.R. team attempts to egress the volatile vicinity via helicopter, their escape is violently thwarted, resulting in a catastrophic crash. This unforeseen disaster compels the F.E.A.R. team to embark on a desperate search for an alternative extraction point, all while relentlessly battling the now unleashed Alma and her spectral legion of paranormal minions amidst the ruins of a devastated city.

### F.E.A.R. Perseus Mandate: Uncovering Armacham's Secrets

While the initial F.E.A.R. team and Delta Force engage in a desperate struggle to regain control of the escalating situation, a secondary F.E.A.R. team is deployed with the crucial objective of illuminating the deeply buried and sinister past of the Armacham Technology Corporation (ATC). Assuming the role of a member within this secondary F.E.A.R. unit, your primary directive is to meticulously uncover vital information pertaining to a clandestine project concealed within the ATC facilities. It is important to note that the multiplayer component for this particular expansion is no longer accessible.

**Year Walk: Unraveling a Supernatural Swedish Tradition**

Embark on a unique first-person adventure with "Year Walk," a game that immerses you in the eerie 19th-century Swedish tradition of year walking. This experience masterfully blends reality with the supernatural, drawing you into a world steeped in mystery and ancient folklore.

**The Vision Quest**

In Year Walk, you undertake a perilous vision quest deep within dark, mysterious woods. Your ultimate objective is to glimpse the future and discover if your affections will be returned by a loved one. To achieve this, you must engage with the game's core mechanics:

### **Solving Cryptic Puzzles**
Decipher intricate clues and unravel the enigmatic mysteries surrounding this ancient practice.

### **Heeding Subtle Hints**
Pay close attention to the ambient sounds and whispered guidance that illuminate your path forward.

### **Discovering Folklore Creatures**
Learn about Sweden's rich tapestry of myths and legends through an integrated encyclopedia.

The game delivers a captivating narrative that artfully weaves together fact and fiction. To fully comprehend the chilling events of a pivotal New Year's Eve, deep immersion in the story is essential.

**Enhanced Features in This Edition**

This updated version of Year Walk introduces several exciting enhancements for an even richer experience:

*   **New Locations:** Explore previously uncharted areas.
*   **In-Game Map:** Navigate the mysterious woods with ease.
*   **Updated Art and Visuals:** Experience a visually stunning world.
*   **Additional Puzzles:** Challenge your mind with new enigmas.
*   **Integrated Encyclopedia:** Delve deeper into the myths and creatures of Swedish folklore.
*   **Helpful Hint System:** Receive guidance when you need it most.
*   **Steam Achievements:** Track your progress and unlock accolades.

## F.E.A.R. 2: Project Origin - A Descent into Terror

**F.E.A.R. 2: Project Origin** thrusts you into the role of Special Forces Sergeant Michael Becket, a soldier whose routine mission rapidly devolves into a desperate struggle for survival. Deployed mere minutes before the catastrophic blast initiated by the original F.E.A.R. team, you find yourself facing the unleashed fury of Alma Wade. As Alma's terrifying psychic powers spiral beyond control, your squad is compelled to navigate a landscape ravaged by apocalyptic events, all while desperately seeking a means to vanquish her.

### Strategic Combat and Enhanced Abilities

The game offers dynamic combat scenarios where both you and your adversaries can exploit the environment for tactical advantage. Harness your character's enhanced reflexes to manipulate time, allowing for strategic slowdowns that can turn the tide of battle. Prepare for intense, in-your-face close-quarters action that unfolds across a diverse array of indoor and outdoor settings.

### New Threats and Unraveling the Mystery

You will confront an array of entirely new enemies, each employing sophisticated combat tactics to overwhelm you. This installment challenges your courage as you face these new adversaries and delve deeper into a terrifying mystery. The game's world interaction enhancements empower you to create instant cover or clear obstacles, further enriching the strategic depth of gameplay.

### Multiplayer Mayhem and Visual Fidelity

F.E.A.R. 2: Project Origin also features robust multiplayer modes, allowing you to compete with and against friends. The enhanced graphics engine elevates the action-horror experience to new heights, delivering breathtaking visuals and immersive effects. Enemies exhibit remarkably realistic behavior, utilizing the environment against you through vastly improved Artificial Intelligence. Crucially, the game maintains the authenticity of the Alma storyline, providing the definitive continuation of her saga for dedicated players.

### Toy Soldier Update: A New Perspective on Multiplayer

**Toy Soldier Update (April 16, 2009)** introduced a novel perspective to F.E.A.R. 2 multiplayer, shrinking players down to mere inches in height as they battle within miniature environments.

#### FullTilt: Pinball Pandemonium

Experience intense battles within a retro 1970s-era pinball machine, aptly named 'Snake Fist.' The game's flippers, targets, spinners, and pop-bumpers serve as dynamic cover for fast-paced action. Multi-level playfields and authentic sound effects contribute to the chaotic atmosphere of destruction.

#### Cockroach: Hospital Horror

This update plunges players into a blood-soaked hospital room, where heart-pounding action awaits. Navigate a tightly interconnected environment by climbing electrical cords, laboratory equipment, and pill bottles.

#### Recess: Sandbox Warfare

Engage in mayhem from the towering heights of a giant sandcastle to the confines of a toy bulldozer's cockpit. Embrace the commando spirit and blend in with an army of plastic soldiers in this unique playground battleground.

Welcome to your new summer job at Freddy Fazbear's Pizza, a place renowned for its lively entertainment and abundant food, drawing in both children and their parents. The star of the show is undoubtedly Freddy Fazbear, accompanied by his two animatronic companions, programmed to captivate audiences. However, these robotic performers exhibit increasingly erratic behavior after closing hours, making your role as a night security guard a more cost-effective solution than hiring a repair technician.

From your confined office, you are tasked with diligently monitoring the security camera feeds. Your nightly allowance of electricity is strictly limited due to corporate budget constraints, meaning a depletion of power will disable essential security features like doors and lights. It is imperative to remain vigilant for any anomalies, particularly if Freddy Fazbear or his associates are not in their designated positions. Locating them on the monitors is crucial for your safety and survival. Can you endure the challenges of five nights at Freddy's?

Despite its straightforward controls and premise, Five Nights at Freddy's delivers a genuinely frightening experience. It stands as a remarkable testament to how ingenious design and subtle execution can cultivate terror. The game's success hinges on its simple yet effective still images and compelling character designs, showcasing creator Scott Cawthon's profound understanding of the primal fears evoked by unsettling dolls and toys. This game masterfully cultivates dread and is an essential acquisition for enthusiasts of the horror genre.

Key aspects of the game include:

*   **Animatronic Characters:** Freddy Fazbear and his friends are the central figures, designed to entertain but exhibiting unpredictable nocturnal behavior.
*   **Security Guard Role:** Your primary responsibility is to monitor security cameras from a central office.
*   **Resource Management:** A limited electricity supply dictates the availability of crucial security measures like doors and lights.
*   **Survival Objective:** The goal is to survive five consecutive nights by managing resources and tracking the animatronics' movements.

This game was developed using Clickteam Fusion.

**Five Nights at Freddy's 3: A New Horror Attraction**

Thirty years have passed since Freddy Fazbear's Pizza shut down. The terrifying events that occurred there are now just whispers and faded memories. However, the creators of "Fazbear's Fright: The Horror Attraction" aim to resurrect the legend. They are committed to delivering an authentic experience for visitors. To achieve this, they've scoured for any remnants that survived years of decay.

Initially, their findings were limited to:

*   Empty shells
*   A detached hand
*   A hook
*   An old paper-plate doll

But then, a significant discovery was made. The attraction now features a single, chilling animatronic.

Name: Slender: The Arrival
Description:
You're on your own. No one to come for you. No one to help you. No one to hear you scream. Slender: The Arrival is the official videogame adaption of Slender Man, developed in collaboration with Eric 'Victor Surge' Knudson, creator of the paranormal phenomenon that has been terrifying the curious-minded around the world since its inception, with Mark Hadley and Blue Isle Studios. Back in 2012, Mark Hadley ( AgentParsec ) created a game that captivated gamers around the world. Slender: The Eight Pages was a short, experimental first-person game that helped breathe new life into the horror genre through its use of unadulterated tension and fear. Experience the horror all over again. Slender: The Arrival is the official re-imagining and expansion of the original game created by Mark Hadley, teamed up with the writers behind the Marble Hornets series and the development team at Blue Isle Studios .
