### Audiovisual Masterpiece

*   **Original Soundtrack:** Enjoy an album's worth of original music by the acclaimed composer Jim Guthrie.
*   **Artistic Vision:** Experience artwork and designs from Superbrothers Inc., brought to life by the skilled developers at Capy in Toronto, Canada.

### Enhanced Edition

The new edition of Superbrothers: Sword & Sworcery EP has been remastered for public display. It features:

*   **Sharp Visuals:** Razor-sharp pixels enhance the game's aesthetic.
*   **Refined Audio:** An improved audio mix is ideal for home theatre or cinema projection.
*   **Mouse Support:** The game has been re-engineered by Capy to support two-button mouse input.

### Cooperative Play

*   **Twitter Integration:** Optionally cooperate with friends via Twitter. Share clues and insights as you delve deeper into the game's esoteric mysteries.

### Soundtrack Details

Jim Guthrie's "Sword & Sworcery LP: The Ballad of the Space Babies" is a landmark prog rock concept album. Kotaku named Jim's compositions the Best Videogame Music of 2011. Double Fine's Tim Schafer praised the music, stating, "The music is amazing. I want Jim Guthrie to score my life."

**Track List:**

*   Dark Flute (02:40)
*   Lone Star (02:35)
*   Doom Sock (02:35)
*   The Prettiest Weed (02:19)
*   The Cloud (03:50)
*   Under A Tree (05:03)
*   The Maelstrom (01:56)
*   The Ballad Of The Space Babies (03:06)
*   Unknowable Geometry (04:02)
*   Bones McCoy (02:06)
*   Ode To A Room (01:43)
*   The Prettiest Remix (00:56)
*   The Whirling Infinite (02:30)
*   Little Furnace (03:25)

**Bonus Tracks:**

*   Intro (00:01)
*   Cabin Music (02:39)
*   Battles 1 (00:48)
*   Battles 2 (00:35)
*   Com64 (01:21)
*   Mushrooms (02:15)
*   Death To Everyone (01:13)
*   Confronting The Wolf (01:20)
*   Up A Mountain (01:28)
*   Activating Trigons (01:23)
*   How We Get Old (05:21)
*   And We Got Older (04:47)
*   Bonus Track Outro (00:02)

**Soundtrack Location:**

Songs will be located in your Superbrothers: Sword and Sworcery EP Folder within the Steam Directory: `...Steam\steamapps\common\superbrothers sword & sworcery ep\soundtrack`

Name: Puzzle Quest 2
Description:
Escape to a puzzle game fantasy world filled with amazing creatures, powerful weapons, and challenging minigames! Addicting Match 3 gameplay is blended seamlessly with immersive role playing in this sequel to the award-winning Puzzle Quest! Jump right into the action and customize your character with any one of four classes, each with different skills and abilities. Gain experience and earn treasure as you progress through the adventure, unlocking new spells and harder Match 3 challenges! Are you a brave enough hero to reclaim the once peaceful village of Verloren from the evil clutches of the demon Gorgon? Key Features Learn to use new mana gems, spells, weapons and much more. Customize your characters with 4 classes in both genders. Explore an immense and immersive fantasy world in story mode! Play tons of unique minigames to earn treasure and experience. Upgrade and equip your character then battle your friends online!

Name: Divide By Sheep
Description:
Divide By Sheep is a math puzzler about the Grim Reaper's devious plan to make some sheepy friends. Grim can only befriend the dead, so he decided to unleash a great flood and drag the sheep under. Now stranded on small islands and sinking fast, the sheep need you to help them reach safety. You save the little animals by solving clever math puzzles. Divide By Sheep is a game of addition and subtraction by any means possible, where puzzles start off fairly easy and playful, yet quickly escalate in both difficulty and dark humor. The mighty features: 120 mind bending puzzles spread across 4 worlds Dark humor inbound, parental guidance advised! What happens when you divide a whole into half? You get two halves! Lasers, wolves... oh, and also a kraken (The Grim Reaper's pet) Drown sheep. Or wolves. Or pigs. Do whatever it takes to succeed Fabulous art-work that quickly goes from cute to disturbing USE PARENTAL CONTROLS BEFORE GIVING THE GAME TO KIDS! Main menu has the option to disable blood.

**LEGO® Batman™ 2: DC Super Heroes: Legends Unite!**

Prepare for an epic adventure as Gotham City faces an unprecedented threat in **LEGO® Batman™ 2: DC Super Heroes**. This thrilling installment sees the legendary duo, Batman and Robin, forge an unprecedented alliance with other iconic DC Comics titans, including Superman, Wonder Woman, and Green Lantern. Their paramount objective is to dismantle the nefarious schemes orchestrated by the formidable arch-villains, Lex Luthor and the Joker, before chaos engulfs the city.

This action-packed experience is brimming with an array of captivating features designed to immerse players in the DC Universe. You'll have the opportunity to **unlock and play as over 50 beloved DC Comics characters**, each with their unique abilities and charm. Prepare to witness the introduction of **new Super Abilities** that redefine gameplay; imagine soaring through the skies with **free-roaming flight**, employing **Super-Breath** to freeze and manipulate objects with strategic precision, and utilizing **Heat Vision** to effortlessly melt and cut through challenging obstacles. Furthermore, the game introduces **advanced suits and gadgets**, allowing you to don Batman's formidable **Power Suit** or equip Robin's specialized **Hazard Suit**, complete with a **Pressure Cannon** for expertly handling hazardous liquids. The expansive **Gotham City** awaits your exploration, offering the freedom to traverse the sprawling metropolis on foot, by air, or by piloting an impressive variety of unlockable vehicles, such as the iconic Batmobile, the agile Batwing, and the robust Batboat.

A groundbreaking feature for the LEGO video game franchise is the introduction of **fully voiced characters**, bringing your favorite heroes and villains to life with authentic dialogue. Enhancing the cooperative experience, **seamless drop-in/drop-out functionality** and **dynamic split-screen** ensure that friends and family can easily join the action at any time, making this a truly shared adventure.

Name: LEGO® Harry Potter: Years 5-7
Description:
Based on the last three Harry Potter books and final four films, LEGO Harry Potter: Years 5-7 takes players through Harry Potter's heroic adventures in the Muggle and wizarding worlds. From Privet Drive in Little Whinging to Diagon Alley, Hogsmeade and Hogwarts, players will encounter new faces, new challenges and new magic, preparing them for the ultimate face-off against Lord Voldemort! Key Features: Learn and use new charms and spells, including the Unforgivable Curses Master advanced duelling skills and battle Voldemort's Death Eaters Unlock over 100 characters, including Fenrir Greyback, Bellatrix Lestrange & Professor Slughorn Explore new locations, including Grimmauld Place, the Ministry of Magic, and Godric's Hollow Play with friends and family using easy drop-in/drop-out co-op play with dynamic split screen

**LEGO® City Undercover: Go undercover to stop Rex Fury!**

In LEGO® City Undercover, you play as Chase McCain. He's a police officer with a crucial mission: go undercover to catch the escaped criminal Rex Fury. Fury is causing a city-wide crime wave, and it's up to Chase to stop him.

**Explore a vast LEGO City.**

This game offers a **sprawling open-world metropolis** for you and a friend to explore. With **two-player co-op**, you can team up and investigate over **20 unique districts**. Your tasks include busting car thieves, finding **hilarious movie references**, and driving various vehicles. Plus, there are **hundreds of collectibles** to find!

LEGO City Undercover combines **witty, original storytelling** with the **signature LEGO humor** you love. It's a fun-filled experience for players of all ages.

Name: LEGO® The Lord of the Rings™
Description:
Based on The Lord of the Rings motion picture trilogy, LEGO® The Lord of the Rings follows the original story-lines of The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring, The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers, and The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King, taking players through the epic story events re-imagined with the humor and endless variety of LEGO play. Trusted with the dangerous task to destroy an ancient magical ring that threatens all that is good, Frodo is forced to leave his peaceful home. But the ring wants to be found and the road to Mount Doom, the only place where it can be destroyed, will be perilous and riddled with Orcs and fouler things. To help Frodo, a Fellowship is formed —Aragorn the Ranger, Gandalf the Wizard, Legolas the Elf, Gimli the Dwarf, Boromir a Man of Gondor, and Frodo’s Hobbit friends Sam, Merry and Pippin. Players relive the legend through the LEGO mini-figures, as they explore wonders, solve timeless riddles, and overcome endless foes in their quest to destroy the Ring. Key Features: Explore all of the open-world of Middle-earth and experience epic battles with Orcs, Uruk-hai, the Balrog, the Witch-king, and other fearsome creatures. Wield the power of the Palantír or Seeing-stone (‘one that looks far-away’), and jump between multiple story-lines. Experience the LEGO The Lord of the Rings heroes come to life in an all new way with the mini-fig characters delivering the dialogue from the films. Collect, combine and forge new items in the Blacksmith Shop using Mithril, the most precious metal in Middle-earth. Discover and unlock over more than 80 playable characters, including Frodo, Aragorn, Gandalf, and many others. Collect and use a variety of weaponry and magical items, including the Light of Earendil, Elven rope, swords, and bows. Play with family and friends with easy access drop-in, drop-out game play option.

Name: LEGO® Batman™: The Videogame
Description:
When all the villains in Arkham Asylum team up and break loose, only the dynamic duo is bold enough to take them on to save Gotham City. The fun of LEGO, the drama of Batman and the uniqueness of the combination makes for a comical and exciting adventure in LEGO Batman: The Videogame. Play as Batman and his sidekick Robin as you build, drive, swing and fight your way through Gotham City capturing escaped villains including The Joker, Penguin, Scarecrow and more. Then, jump into the story from the other side and play as Batmans foes! Enjoy the power you wield and battle Batman while spreading chaos throughout the city. There is no rest for the good (or evil!).

**LEGO® Harry Potter: Years 1-4**

Embark on a magical journey through the first four Harry Potter stories, reimagined with the signature charm and creativity of LEGO videogames. This adventure lets you **build the magic**, from the humble beginnings at Privet Drive all the way to the thrilling Triwizard Tournament.

**Experience the wonder of Hogwarts™ School of Witchcraft and Wizardry** like never before. You'll learn spells, brew potions, and relive iconic moments with a delightful dose of **tongue-in-cheek humor**. The unique LEGO style also offers **creative customization** throughout your gameplay.

**Key Features:**

*   **The Magic is Building!** Connect the bricks and experience the Harry Potter™ adventures – LEGO style.
*   **Play as Your Favorite Characters:** Step into the shoes of Harry, Ron, Hermione, and many other beloved characters.
*   **Explore Iconic Locations:** Discover the secrets of Hogwarts™ castle, wander through Diagon Alley™, brave the Forbidden Forest, and visit the charming village of Hogsmeade™.
*   **Co-op Play:** Team up with a friend to cast spells and play through the first four stories together.

Name: LEGO® Indiana Jones™: The Original Adventures
Description:
Build, Battle and Brawl your way out of trouble! Play through all three classic Indiana Jones™ movies and relive your favorite Indy adventures in the tongue-in-cheek worlds of LEGO®. Explore and Discover - Battle enemies, solve puzzles, and seek out the world's greatest treasures. More Than 60 Playable Characters - Take control of Indy, his friends, and even his enemies. Team up with a friend and together search for fortune and glory. Whip Into Action! - Attack and disarm enemies, swing over perilous pits, and interact with LEGO® objects and puzzles!

Name: LEGO® Marvel™ Super Heroes
Description:
LEGO® Marvel™ Super Heroes features an original story crossing the entire Marvel Universe. Players take control of Iron Man, Spider-Man, the Hulk, Captain America, Wolverine and many more Marvel characters as they unite to stop Loki and a host of other Marvel villains from assembling a super-weapon capable of destroying the world. Players will chase down Cosmic Bricks as they travel across LEGO Manhattan and visit key locations from the Marvel Universe, such as Stark Tower, Asteroid M, a Hydra base and the X-Mansion. Smash, swing and fly in the first LEGO videogame featuring more than 100 of your favorite Super Heroes and Super Villains from the Marvel Universe, including Iron Man, Wolverine, the Hulk, Spider-Man, Captain America, Black Widow, Loki and Deadpool. Help save Earth as your favorite Marvel character with your super-cool strengths and abilities: Iron Man flies, hovers, shoots missiles and unleashes a powerful unibeam directly from his chest. Spider-Man shoots webs, uses his spider-senses to spot objects invisible to others, crawls up walls and, of course, web-slings. Captain America throws his mighty shield at objects and enemies, embeds it into a wall to create a platform, and protects himself from damage. Hulk smashes! Perform new and powerful moves as “BIG-fig” characters like Hulk and Abomination. Leave a path of destruction as you smash through LEGO walls and throw cars using hyper strength. Discover LEGO Manhattan like never before, and travel to iconic locations from the Marvel Universe, such as the X-Mansion, Asteroid M and Asgard. Create unique Super Heroes with customizable characters. Enjoy an exciting original story, filled with classic LEGO videogame adventure and humor.

Name: LEGO® Star Wars™ - The Complete Saga
Description:
Kick Some Brick in I through VI Play through all six Star Wars movies in one videogame! Adding new characters, new levels, new features and for the first time ever, the chance to build and battle your way through a fun Star Wars galaxy on your PC! New Gameplay Features with enhanced Force Powers, new power-ups and new Challenge Modes. Solve Puzzles through the use of creative thinking, teamwork and unique building situations. Over 120 playable characters, and new characters like Watto, Zam Wessell, Boss Nass and more! Upgraded Character Customizer allowing millions of possibilities. With character parts from all 6 movies, create cross-Trilogy mash-up characters like Han Windu and Lando Amidala. Redesigned levels like the 'Mos Espa Podrace' and 'Gunship Cavalry' to take advantage of the the open vehicle gameplay of LEGO Star Wars II. Bonus levels and missions allow you to take 10 additional Bounty Hunter missions from Jabba the Hutt in the prequel trilogy. Two Player Local Co-Op lets friends and families play together.

Name: LEGO® DC Super-Villains
Description:
It's good to be bad… Embark on an all-new DC/LEGO® adventure by becoming the best villain the universe has seen. Players will create and play as an all-new super-villain throughout the game, unleashing mischievous antics and wreaking havoc in an action-packed story. Set in an open world experience within the DC universe, the Justice League has disappeared, leaving Earth's protection to their counterparts, who have proclaimed themselves as the 'Justice Syndicate'. It's up to you and a crazy group of misfits to uncover the intentions of Earth's new, strange, wannabe superheroes. Joined by renowned DC Super-Villains: The Joker, Harley Quinn, and countless others from the Injustice League, players will set out on an epic adventure.

Name: Sid Meier's Pirates!
Description:
Sail the Caribbean, marauding all on the high seas or ally your ship and crew as a privateer in search of riches - the life you choose is up to you. Face dogged enemies, raid unsuspecting villages, woo fair maidens, avoid capture or dig for buried treasure. Discover what it takes to become one of the most famous pirates in history!

Name: Burly Men at Sea
Description:
Burly Men at Sea is a folktale about a trio of large, bearded fishermen who step away from the ordinary to seek adventure. With gameplay halfway between a visual novel and a point-and-click adventure, the branching story carries its ungainly heroes into waters where lurk creatures from Scandinavian folklore and other misadventures. You play as storyteller and wayfinder, shaping a custom tale that begins again where it ends. FEATURES Branching Story : Play through multiple choice-driven adventures, each designed to be completed in a single sitting. Innovative Controls: Shape the narrative through a unique, draggable viewport and your interactions within it. Playful Aesthetic: Colorful art style with handcrafted animation, set to a whimsical original soundtrack inspired by folk music of the far north. ABOUT THE DEVELOPER Burly Men at Sea is the second game from married duo Brain&Brain, developed during their own adventures as nomads and erstwhile farmhands.

**Nantucket: A Whaling Adventure**

Embark on a seafaring strategy game where you'll hunt the legendary Moby Dick and relive the Golden Age of American whaling. Set sail across the globe, captain your ship, and manage your crew. You'll experience Ishmael's story, the lone survivor of the Pequod, years after Herman Melville's epic tale.

**Explore the Seas**

*   Sail the world and visit various cities.
*   Boost your prestige by hunting whales, taking on jobs, and seeking new adventures.

**Become the Captain You Desire**

Develop your character like an RPG. Improve your stats, make choices that shape your reactions, and hone your seafaring skills.

**Manage Your Ship and Crew**

*   Hire and direct your crew.
*   Assign them tasks on your ship.
*   Upgrade your vessel with new compartments to enhance its capabilities.

**Experience the Golden Age of Whaling**

Engage with over a thousand unique events that respond to your decisions. Face the consequences of your actions as you navigate this historical era.

**Hunt Whales and Battle Pirates**

*   Discover new whaling grounds.
*   Hunt whales for valuable blubber.
*   Defend your ship from pirates using a turn-based combat system.

**Pursue Moby Dick**

Follow an original storyline and complete quests. Uncover the mysteries surrounding Moby Dick and break Ahab's curse.

Name: Sea Dogs
Description:
Sea Dogs is an epic role-playing game for the pirate in all of us. Return to the age of sail as a young captain looking to make a name in the world. Develop your character from humble beginnings and rise to control all of the islands for your country or yourself. You can give your allegiance to one of three countries or choose to serve only yourself as a swashbuckling pirate. Build your wealth and reputation and use it to acquire bigger ships and better crewman. Hire other captains to join you in attacking and capturing other ships or forts. Where you go and what you do is up to you. The choices in Sea Dogs are endless, and so is the fun. Play as one of four sides (British, French, Spanish, or Pirate) or change allegiances during the game. Nonlinear campaign allows players to choose quests or play the game any way they want. 20 different ship types to choose from, from small boats to large battleships. Location-specific ship damage allows you to send their sails up in flames, bring the mast crashing to the deck, or shoot holes in the hull. Realistic and dynamic wind and weather effects as well as day and night cycle.

Embark on an unparalleled maritime adventure in **Fishing: Barents Sea**, a simulation game that places you at the helm of your own fishing vessel. Navigate the vast and challenging Norwegian waters, meticulously searching for the most abundant fishing grounds. Your journey commences with a humble boat, a legacy from your grandfather, and your ultimate objective is to master the art of fishing, accumulate wealth, and strategically reinvest in crucial upgrades and more powerful vessels. This is your opportunity to fulfill your deepest aspirations within the demanding yet rewarding fishing industry, all set against the breathtaking backdrop of the Barents Sea.

The core of **Fishing: Barents Sea** lies in its realistic simulation of the fishing profession. You will learn to expertly catch a diverse array of fish species, employing various fishing techniques and utilizing a range of equipment across multiple boats. While the game is designed to be accessible, achieving true mastery of these methods will undoubtedly test your strategic thinking and practical skills, providing a deeply engaging experience for aspiring fishing magnates. To further enhance your operational efficiency and maximize your hauls, you can leverage officially licensed Scanmar equipment, including advanced door sensors and TrawlEye technology, granting you complete control over your trawl's performance. However, success hinges on meticulous planning and adherence to yearly fishing quotas, a critical element that demands constant attention and strategic foresight for every expedition.

The game world itself is a testament to realism, featuring a dynamic environment shaped by twenty years of historical weather data. The fish populations within the Barents Sea are not static; they dynamically shift in response to seasonal changes and fluctuating water temperatures, compelling you to continuously adapt your strategies and fishing locations. Your primary operational hub is the bustling harbor, a central point for all your endeavors. Here, you can visit the local pub to recruit experienced crew members or accept challenging special missions that offer unique rewards. The port also serves as your base for essential ship maintenance, allowing you to repair or upgrade your fleet, secure vital financial support through bank loans, and replenish your supplies, including essential bait, from the conveniently located shop.

**Fishing: Barents Sea** invites you to freely explore an expansive open-world environment that faithfully recreates the stunning and rugged landscapes of northern Norway. To pinpoint the most lucrative fishing zones and secure the greatest profits, you will need to skillfully employ your sonar, radar, and GPS systems, navigating the waters with precision and strategic intent. The game boasts several key features designed to immerse you in this authentic fishing experience: **stunning visuals** rendered with the Unreal™ 4 Engine create a beautiful open-world, complemented by an **authentic world** map based on real Norwegian geography. Experience **dynamic cycles** of day, night, and moon, alongside realistic **seasonal effects** that bring about shifting weather patterns. You can pilot a **diverse fleet** of seven different playable ships, engaging in **engaging gameplay** with semi-realistic fishing methods that are easy to learn but challenging to master. The **intelligent prey** system features advanced fish AI that influences their behavior, adding another layer of complexity. Furthermore, the game includes officially licensed technology, such as Scanmar Catch Control Systems and an officially licensed Hermes trawler, alongside a practical **inventory management** system for tools like knives, hooks, and binoculars. Finally, enjoy a **lively atmosphere** within a beautiful and dynamic environment populated by AI ships and other fishing boats, creating a truly immersive simulation.

Name: Here Be Dragons
Description:
Here Be Dragons is a satirical turn-based strategy game featuring unique 'living map' graphics, where you lead a group of crazed captains and eradicate legendary monsters in order to allow Christopher Columbus the discovery of the New World. STORY Christopher Columbus discovered the Americas in 1492. In 10 weeks. With 100 men. With 3 ships. This is a LIE ! Firstly, someone had to defeat kraken and tritons. Someone had to vanquish the Leviathan. Someone had to banish all the ghost ships. The information about these deeds is missing from the archives, and you can’t find it in any great statesmen’s memoir. The knowledge of the “Avant Armada” was completely erased by some bloody officials. The people who took part in the expeditions were not sane people. Maniacs, psychos and common crackpots were forced by royal orders to eradicate Evil in the uncharted seas. “Here Be Dragons” describes these events. GAMEPLAY Use original Dice Activation System to attack enemies, heal your crew, and upgrade the fleet. Collect Ink and use Errata to turn the tide of the encounter. Cross the seas with an ancient, living map , full of terrible creatures that want to devour you! Confront the most fierce beasts that ever lived: leviathans and krakens, predatory whales and lustful mermaids. Decimate tritons, awake Dagon, and then erase them from human memory. SATIRE Meet an extraordinary company of weirdos, madmen and oddballs . Their vices and virtues fuel the journey. Experience clashes with bureaucratic machine. Don’t lose your mind when confronted by absurdities spewed by authorities and royal advisors. Sniff at pirates. Ignore the settlers. You are above them. You are a monster hunter traversing through the aqua incognita. Who cares if you are insane?

Name: Port Royale 4
Description:
Set sail and join the colonial powers of Spain , England , France and the Netherlands in their fight for supremacy of the Caribbean in the 17th century. In ‘ Port Royale 4 ’ you will take control of a colony as a young and ambitious governor who is eager to learn what it takes to manage and grow his small settlement into a bustling trader city. Develop production chains connecting multiple islands and create complex trade routes across the Caribbean, covering the ever-growing needs of the respective cities. Make use of the detailed sea map to avoid stormy weather regions, cliffs or shallow waters. Fulfill tasks for your nation’s viceroy, earning more fame to unlock town buildings, ships and more. Conquer the cities of rival nations or hunt down their fleets with a letter of marque while also keeping a keen eye out for pirates and other privateers. For the first time in the series, naval battles will be turn-based, with up to 8 ships battling at one time and tactical captain maneuvers that can turn the tide in even the most hopeless of situations for a glorious victory.

## East India Company: Build Your Trading Empire

In the game *East India Company*, you'll forge the world's most powerful trading empire. Engage in thrilling battles and manage your nation across Europe and the Far East. Choose from eight distinct nationalities: British, Dutch, French, Danish, Portuguese, Swedish, Spanish, and the Holy Roman Empire.

### Build Your Fleet and Trade Routes

Start small and build your fleet, establishing connections with distant lands. Keep rival nations in check by managing a diverse array of ship classes, including transport and military vessels. Create specialized fleets and assign them to specific trading routes.

### Strategic Domination

Control and upgrade well-situated ports as you develop your strategy for global domination. Conflicts and wars are inevitable. When hostile fleets clash, experience spectacular naval battles fought in real-time. Witness devastating broadsides and cannonballs tearing through enemy ships. For deeper tactical control, command your ships and issue independent orders to each fleet.

### Features of East India Company

*   **Cinematic Naval Battles:** Experience epic, visually stunning naval combat.
*   **Two Command Modes:** Choose between Real-Time Strategy (RTS) for overall command or Direct Command mode to control a single ship.
*   **War and Trading:** Enjoy a unique blend of military conflict and economic management.
*   **Advanced Diplomacy AI:** Engage with sophisticated artificial intelligence for diplomatic interactions.
*   **Eight Playable Nations:** Lead England, France, Holland, Portugal, Denmark, Sweden, Spain, or the Holy Roman Empire.
*   **Realistic Ships:** Command over 10 realistic ship types, from small sloops to powerful warships.
*   **Fast-Paced Combat:** Experience realistic yet dynamic naval warfare.
*   **Fleet Commanders:** Hire commanders who gain skills to enhance your fleets' abilities.
*   **Port Control:** Capture and upgrade ports, and protect your shipping routes to build the largest trading empire.

### Multiplayer Experience

Compete with up to 8 players online via the Internet or LAN. Player statistics are tracked on the EIC game server. Choose from various game modes, including single-player and team-based approaches. Improve your ranking by outmaneuvering opponents. Head-to-Head missions offer a true test of strategic skill.

### FIGHT!

Use military might to build your trading empire. Command ships and fleets independently. Wage war on the open sea, sinking rival ships or boarding them to seize control.

### MANAGE!

Hire fleet commanders to boost your fleet's capabilities. Utilize commander skills for a tactical advantage in battles. Upgrade your ports with new buildings. Buy and sell goods to establish profitable trading routes. Engage in diplomacy or declare war. Navigate tense political situations.

### RULE!

Lead the most powerful company in history. Conquer colonies and expand your empire. Employ well-modeled diplomacy to exert your influence. Capture strategic ports. Complete missions assigned by your company or the Crown.

Name: Windward
Description:
Designed from the start to be a fully procedural co-op game, Windward can be played by yourself, but it truly comes alive when playing with friends. Start by generating a procedural world that will be unique to you, design your own custom faction then sail forward fighting pirates, trading with towns, doing quests or simply exploring -- it's up to you how you want to play. As you sail about you will find resources you can make use of, upgrades for your ship, new towns that will ask your assistance, and as you get farther out from the starting area -- various pirates that will attempt to take what's rightfully yours. Combat experience will let you unlock new talents and abilities to make that particular line of work easier. As you take up consignments with towns and fulfill their production shortages, the towns will grow, offering more quests, more resources and better items. As the towns continue to grow they will offer you a choice to upgrade your ship itself. Would you prefer a fast Schooner to explore the world, or a heavy Galleon that's able to take up 5 consignments at once? Or perhaps a massive Ship of the Line to take the fight with the pirates to their heartlands? As you explore the world and get farther away from your starting area, the game will become progressively more difficult -- but so will the rewards. Throughout all of this you can expect the pirates to put up a fair fight, as the AI is bound by the same rules as the player: they have sight, and must explore the map before they can know what's there. Speaking of AI, build a fearsome reputation and the AI will respect you, even fear you -- avoiding you if at all possible. Some friendly AI will even choose to follow you and assist you in your own adventures. And so, on the topic of adventures -- ready to have yours?

Name: Sea Dogs: City of Abandoned Ships
Description:
Fortune and glory awaits you! In Sea Dogs - City of Abandoned Ships you can choose to go it alone and become the most feared pirate of the seven seas. Or you can prove your loyalty to one of four different navies; French, English, Spanish, or Dutch. Sail the high seas as a swashbuckling pirate or dashing naval captain. Explore strange new countries and undiscovered civilizations, raid and plunder ships, fortified ports, and cities. But beware, the dead do not sleep easy, and in the dark South American jungles myth and reality intertwine. Solve the ancient mysteries of a vanishing tribe, cross swords with the most notorious pirates ever to sail the ocean blue and make sure that none of your foes ever set foot on land again. Choose from 3 different characters and 3 different classes, Merchant, Corsair and Adventurer, each with its unique quest line Over 40 quest generators allowing for an additional infinite amount of quests Improved combat system and advanced trading system Choose from 3 weapon classes: Light, Medium, and Heavy New 'P.I.R.A.T.E.S' role playing system with the following characteristics: Power, Insight, Reaction, Authority, Talent, Endurance, Success A vast new world to explore! Navigate uncharted waters; seek out new islands, undiscovered cities, and hidden treasures

Portal 2 is a highly anticipated sequel that builds upon the groundbreaking gameplay, compelling narrative, and memorable soundtrack of its predecessor, which garnered over 70 industry awards and a dedicated fanbase. This new installment significantly expands the experience with a **rich single-player campaign** featuring dynamic new characters, innovative puzzle mechanics, and an expanded array of challenging test chambers.

Players will venture into **uncharted territories within the Aperture Science Labs**, encountering familiar faces and the return of GLaDOS, the iconic, albeit sometimes homicidal, AI who guided them previously. The game also introduces a **robust two-player cooperative mode**, boasting its own distinct storyline, unique test chambers, and two new playable characters. This cooperative element demands a new level of teamwork, requiring players to **think and act in unison** to overcome the intricate puzzles.

**Key features of Portal 2 include:**

*   **Extensive Single-Player Experience:** Enjoy next-generation gameplay and a deeply engaging story.
*   **Complete Two-Person Co-op:** A dedicated multiplayer campaign with its own narrative, characters, and gameplay mechanics.
*   **Advanced Physics Engine:** Enables the creation of novel and interesting challenges, resulting in a larger, yet accessible, game.
*   **Original Soundtrack:** Featuring new and captivating music.
*   **Massive Sequel:** Building on the success of the original Portal, which was widely recognized as Game of the Year by over 30 publications in 2007.
*   **Included Editing Tools:** Empowering players to create and share their own test chambers.

Name: FEZ
Description:
Gomez is a 2D creature living in a 2D world. Or is he? When the existence of a mysterious 3rd dimension is revealed to him, Gomez is sent out on a journey that will take him to the very end of time and space. Use your ability to navigate 3D structures from 4 distinct classic 2D perspectives. Explore a serene and beautiful open-ended world full of secrets, puzzles and hidden treasures. Unearth the mysteries of the past and discover the truth about reality and perception. Change your perspective and look at the world in a different way.

Name: Spelunky 2
Description:
Spelunky returns in this greatly-expanded sequel to the original roguelike platformer! Meet the next generation of explorers as they find themselves on the Moon, searching for treasure and missing family. Spelunky 2 builds upon the unique, randomized challenges that made the original a classic, offering a huge adventure designed to satisfy players old and new. A Bigger and More Dynamic World, with So Much to See and Do Spelunky 2's world is even denser than the one in the original game, offering many more areas, characters, traps, and items, as well as new ways to interact with them (and for them to interact with each other). The world has expanded in other ways, too, with branching paths and multi-layered levels adding a third dimension to the classic 2d platforming. Animals can also be tamed and ridden. And dynamic liquid physics create new challenges and make the world feel extra reactive and alive. Build a Community, Make Friends Back in Base Camp, characters you unlock will mill about and relax between runs, offering encouragement and advice. As you explore, your camp will expand and develop into a thriving little community to welcome you whenever you need a break from exploring. While there, you can also access shortcuts and practice your moves in safety. The Game is Yours to Explore Spelunky 2 is not just about 'getting good and beating the game' - more than that, it's an endlessly replayable playground to experiment in and find your own way, creating stories against the backdrop of an expansive, deeply-interactive world filled with secrets. The more you play, the more the game becomes yours! Key Features, Summarized: A Bigger World with all new areas, monsters, traps, and items! An Extra Dimension is added by allowing players to access a second layer behind the normal playfield. The second layer might contain treasure rooms, hidden passages, and other special places. Multiple Routes Through the Game will add variety and give players more ways to personalize a run. Find and Ride Mounts (like turkeys!) that have special abilities. Enemies may ride mounts, as well! New NPCs that you can help, hurt, or ignore… to make each run feel even more like a unique story. Variations and Changes to Classic Spelunky Concepts like shops and ghosts that will make veteran players rethink their strategies. Improved Liquid Physics allow water and lava to move and pour realistically, which drastically affects the playfield (and looks cool) Deadly Poison and Curses can be inflicted on players and enemies alike. Build a Permanent Home at Base Camp as you do runs and explore the caves. Improved Lighting and Special Effects are paired with richer visual and audio design. Deeper Mysteries that may require a community effort to unravel. Possibly More Eggplants

Name: Portal
Description:
Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay. The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation. Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.

Spelunky is a **roguelike platformer** renowned for its **unpredictable adventures** and **randomly generated levels**. Each playthrough offers a fresh, challenging experience as you delve deep underground, exploring wondrous locales filled with diverse monsters, treacherous traps, and hidden treasures. You have **complete freedom** to navigate these **fully-destructible environments**, uncovering their many secrets. Every decision—whether to stay or flee, fight or rescue, purchase or pilfer—is yours, and so are the consequences.

At its core, Spelunky's gameplay hinges on **quick thinking** and a **profound understanding of its mechanics**. This allows players to survive on a razor's edge within its dense, perilous environments.

The game enhances exploration with several key features:

*   **Explorer's Journal:** Track your progress and discoveries in a journal gifted by your mentor, Yang.
*   **Local Co-op:** Team up with up to four players for cooperative play, either to assist each other or to create delightful chaos.
*   **Deathmatch:** Unlock and battle in 72 distinct arenas against friends or AI opponents.
*   **Daily Challenge:** Compete online daily on a unique, randomly generated set of levels against the global Steam community.
*   **Unlockable Characters:** Discover and help 20 unique explorers, 16 of whom are unlockable, achieve their ambitious dreams.
*   **Embrace the Tough Love:** Expect numerous painful, humorous, and surprising deaths. Each setback offers a deeper understanding of Spelunky's intricate workings, bringing you closer to unraveling its profound mysteries.

## Braid: A Time-Bending Puzzle Adventure

**Braid** is a captivating puzzle-platformer that immerses players in a **beautifully hand-painted world** where the fundamental laws of time can be bent and manipulated. Your adventure commences in a humble city house, guiding you through a series of **distinct and imaginative worlds**. The ultimate objective is to unravel intricate puzzles and **rescue an abducted princess**.

The core of Braid's ingenious design lies in its **unique time-manipulation mechanics**, with each world introducing a novel way to control temporal flow. Players will discover abilities such as **rewinding time**, interacting with objects that remain unaffected by temporal shifts, and experiencing time that is **intrinsically linked to space**. The game further delves into complex concepts like **parallel realities and time dilation**, ensuring a constantly evolving and deeply engaging puzzle experience. Braid is meticulously crafted to respect your time, making every moment spent within its world **meaningful and intellectually stimulating**, with each puzzle unveiling new layers of its captivating narrative.

Key features that define Braid's exceptional gameplay include:

*   **Seamless Cloud Saves:** **Steam Cloud Support** allows you to save your progress and pick up your adventure on any computer connected to Steam, ensuring your journey is never interrupted.
*   **Uniquely Forgiving Yet Challenging:** As a 2-D platformer, Braid eliminates the frustration of death and failure. The true challenge resides in its **clever puzzle design**, rather than demanding precise platforming skills.
*   **Rich Puzzle Environments:** Explore a variety of diverse worlds, collect scattered puzzle pieces, and solve complex enigmas by creatively manipulating time. This involves **rewinding, creating alternate timelines, and utilizing pockets of dilated time**, all designed to foster fresh perspectives and innovative thinking.
*   **Stunning Aesthetic Design:** The game boasts a **breathtaking painterly art style**, harmoniously complemented by a **rich, organic soundtrack** that perfectly enhances the innovative gameplay.
*   **Nonlinear Storytelling and Progression:** Braid features a **non-linear narrative** that weaves together its disparate worlds, offering profound real-world metaphors for your temporal manipulations. These powers serve as playful explorations of complex themes, allowing you to examine consequences through imaginative "what-if" scenarios. Furthermore, the **non-linear progression** means you are free to tackle puzzles in any order, enabling you to move on from challenging sections and return later with fresh insight.

Name: Portal
Description:
Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay. The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation. Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.

Name: N++ (NPLUSPLUS)
Description:
N++ is a fast-paced, momentum-based platformer about darting around obstacles, narrowly evading enemies and collecting gold in a beautiful minimalist landscape. It’s the first N game on PC since 2004 and we’ve spent those 12 years perfecting the platformer. N++ is all about using your momentum to complete levels and get high scores, but in this sci-fi world, there’s a slew of inadvertently homicidal enemy robots trying to prevent you from completing your goal. Through the hand-crafted (NOT procedurally generated) levels, you’ll experience platforming at its most intense. Using only your fluid movement, you need to ‘solve’ each level and get to the exit. In addition to the lengthy and challenging single player campaign, we’ve packed a ton of features into this one last entry in the N series including: -4,340 hand-made levels -Custom Levels, Level Editor & Global Level Sharing -Leaderboards and replays for every level (even the ones you make) -Local Co-op Mode (up to 4 players) -Local Competitive Mode (up to 4 Players) -Hardcore Mode, an intense single-player challenge which only the best ninjas will survive -Intense, hidden Secret challenges to discover -63 tracks by top electronic artists -119 different color palettes let you customize the game’s look and keep it fresh every time you play -and more! Play a little, or a lot -- there's no skill ceiling, so you can always get better and better. N++ is a game that has enough bite-sized gameplay to last you a lifetime.

Embark on an **epic fairy tale journey** with "Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons," a captivating experience crafted by visionary Swedish film director Josef Fares and the acclaimed Starbreeze Studios. This unique game redefines co-op play by allowing you to **control both brothers simultaneously** in single-player mode, offering an unparalleled interactive adventure.

As you guide these two siblings, you'll encounter a variety of challenges. **Solve intricate puzzles**, explore richly detailed and diverse environments, and face off against formidable **boss battles**. The innovative control scheme requires you to master one brother with each thumbstick, demanding coordination and strategic thinking.

The narrative centers on a father clinging to life, leaving his two desperate sons with a singular, urgent mission. To save him, they must embark on a perilous quest to find and retrieve the legendary **'Water of Life.'** Along the way, their survival hinges entirely on their ability to **rely on one another**. They will discover that one must be **strong where the other is weak**, and **brave where the other is fearful**. This profound interdependence is the very essence of their bond – they are, truly, Brothers. Prepare for a journey that will undoubtedly leave an **unforgettable mark** on your gaming experience.

Name: The Making of Karateka
Description:
Prince of Persia creator Jordan Mechner was a college student when he created one of the biggest-selling games of 1984: Karateka. Now, in a new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse, the story of how a teenager with an Apple II created one of the most groundbreaking, influential games of all time. THE ORIGIN STORY OF A LEGENDARY GAME CREATOR Discover how Karateka was made through an exhaustive archive of design documents, playable prototypes, and all-new video features. Like walking through a museum, you can explore the interactive timelines at your own pace. PLAY THE ACCLAIMED ORIGINALS Enjoy pixel-perfect versions of the original Karateka games and a variety of never-before-seen early prototypes, with rich quality-of-life features like save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and director's commentary. TWO REMASTERED GAMES Karateka Remastered is an all-new version of the original game featuring cutting-room-floor content, commentary, achievements, and more. Deathbounce: Rebounded is a fast and frantic twin-stick shooter based on Jordan's unpublished prototype. A GROUNDBREAKING MASTERPIECE Discover how Karateka became one of the first games to include cinematic scenes, a moving original soundtrack, rotoscoped animation, and a Hollywood-style love story, influencing the decades of games that followed. THE GOLD MASTER SERIES New from Digital Eclipse (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection, Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration), the Gold Master Series presents iconic games in an innovative 'interactive documentary' format, putting the shared history of games and their creators into one comprehensive package.

Name: The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings Enhanced Edition
Description:
The second installment in the RPG saga about professional monster slayer Geralt of Rivia, The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings spins a mature, thought-provoking tale to produce one of the most elaborate and unique role-playing games ever released on PC. A time of untold chaos has come. Mighty forces clash behind the scenes in a struggle for power and influence. The Northern Kingdoms mobilize for war. But armies on the march are not enough to stop a bloody conspiracy... KEY FEATURES IMMERSIVE, MATURE, NON-LINEAR STORY Dive into an immense, emotionally-charged, non-linear story set in a fantasy world unlike any other. Embark on a complex, expansive adventure in which every decision may lead to dire consequences. Engage in over 40 hours of narrative-driven gameplay, featuring 4 different beginnings and 16 different endings. SPECTACULAR, BRUTAL, TACTICAL COMBAT Fight using a combat system that uniquely fuses dynamic action with well-developed RPG mechanics. Use an array of unique witcher weapons, featuring both melee and ranged options. Prepare for battle using a wide array of tactical options: craft potions, set traps and baits, cast magic and sneak up on your foes. REALISTIC, VAST, CONSISTENT GAME WORLD Discover a deep, rich game world where ominous events shape the lives of entire populations while bloodthirsty monsters rage about. Explore numerous, varied locations: from vibrant trading posts, to bustling mining towns, to mighty castles and fortresses; and discover the stories they have to tell and dark secrets they hide. CUTTING-EDGE TECHNOLOGY Experience a believable living and breathing world, featuring beautiful graphics and utilizing sophisticated in-game mechanics made possible thanks to CD PROJEKT RED in-house technology, REDengine. ABOUT THE WITCHER 2 ENHANCED EDITION The Enhanced Edition features lots of new and exciting content. Additional hours of gameplay: New adventures set in previously unseen locations, expanding the story and introducing new characters, mysteries and monsters. New game introduction and cinematics: All new animations and cutscenes, including a new pre-rendered cinematic intro directed by BAFTA Award winner and Academy Award nominee Tomasz Bagiński. All DLCs and improvements introduced in the 2.0 version of the game, including: Arena Mode — an arcade mode that allows players to fight against endless waves of enemies and test their combat skills. A new, extensive tutorial system, gradually and smoothly immersing players in the game world and Geralt’s adventures. Dark Mode — a difficulty level designed for hardcore players, with unique dark-themed items. At this difficulty level, even greater emphasis is placed on battle preparation, defensive maneuvers and opportunistic attacking. The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition comes with these bonus items: Official soundtrack in MP3 format A map of the game's world A quest handbook for both novice and experienced role-playing fans Game manual “Reasons of State” digital comic book.

Name: The Witcher: Enhanced Edition Director's Cut
Description:
The Witcher is a role-playing game set in a dark fantasy world where moral ambiguity reigns. Shattering the line between good and evil, the game emphasizes story and character development, while incorporating a tactically-deep, real-time combat system. Become The Witcher, Geralt of Rivia, and get caught in a web of intrigue woven by forces vying for control of the world. Make difficult decisions and live with the consequences in a game that will immerse you in an extraordinary tale like no other. KEY FEATURES GERALT OF RIVIA: A ONE-OF-A-KIND PROTAGONIST Take on the role of Geralt of Rivia: a charismatic swordmaster and professional monster slayer. Choose from over 250 special abilities, combat skills and magical powers to build a character best suited to your style of play. ORIGINAL FANTASY WORLD DRAWN FROM LITERATURE Enter a harsh fantasy world inspired by the writings of renowned Polish author Andrzej Sapkowski, where nothing is truly black or white, right or wrong. NON-LINEAR STORYLINE Immerse yourself in an epic narrative full of turns, twists and ambiguous moral decisions which have real impact on the storyline. Accomplish quests in a variety of ways and see how the narrative culminates in one of three different endings depending on your actions. STUNNING TACTICAL ACTION Engage in elaborate, yet intuitive real-time combat based on real medieval sword-fighting techniques. Battle using six combat styles, dozens of potions, complex alchemy system, modifiable weapons and powerful magic which all add tactical depth to the fluid real-time experience. Motion capture performed by medieval fighting experts at Frankfurt's renowned Metric Minds studio, resulting in 600 spectacular and authentic in-game combat animations. ABOUT THE WITCHER: ENHANCED EDITION The Witcher: Enhanced Edition takes all of the acclaimed gameplay that garnered the original game more than 90 industry awards and introduces a number of gameplay and technical improvements. Superior dialogue and cutscenes: Over 5000 rewritten and re-recorded lines of dialogue in English, completely redone German language version, as well as over 200 new gesture animations create a more consistent experience and make characters behave more believably in dialogue and cutscenes. Enhanced inventory: A separate sack for alchemy ingredients, as well as a simple sort-and-stack function streamline item organization and usage. Technical improvements: Numerous technical enhancements feature greatly reduced loading times, improved stability, combat responsiveness, faster inventory loading, an option to turn auto-saving on or off, and more. Character differentiation system: The system randomizes the appearance of dozens of in-game models in order to add more variety to monsters and NPCs. The Witcher Enhanced Edition comes with these bonus items: An interactive comic book D'jinni Adventure Editor Two new adventures offering 5+ hours of gameplay Official Soundtrack “Music Inspired by The Witcher” album “Making of” videos Official Game Guide Two maps of The Witcher's world

Name: Nancy Drew®: The Haunted Carousel
Description:
Nancy Drew®: The Haunted Carousel is a first-person perspective, point-and-click adventure game. The player is Nancy Drew and has to solve a mystery. Explore rich environments for clues, interrogate suspects, and solve puzzles and mini-games. You, as Nancy Drew, have just entered a tightening circle of fear and crime as you explore a seaside amusement park that’s swirling with secrets. An antique carousel horse as been stolen! Now, late at night, the merry-go-round takes off on bizarre riderless journeys to nowhere. Are the painted ponies searching for their missing lead horse, or is there another explanation for the midnight rides? Take a spin with danger to unravel the mystery of a ghostly carousel! Dare to Play. Play mini-games in the arcade Reconstruct a historic carousel Keep track of clues and suspects with your laptop Erase Mistakes with the 'Second Chance' option Use a cell phone to take and make calls anywhere   About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series The original #1 selling PC adventure series. See a comparison of the Dossier and Adventure Series

Name: Middle-earth™: Shadow of Mordor™
Description:
Note: certain features for the Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor videogame will no longer be available beginning Dec. 31, 2020. Affected Features: • The Nemesis Forge feature will no longer be available. Therefore, players will no longer be able to transfer their in-game Nemeses from Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor to Middle-earth: Shadow of War. • Vendetta missions and Leaderboards will no longer be available. • WBPlay will no longer be available, but the epic runes 'Orc Hunter' and 'Gravewalker' will automatically be awarded to all players. Winner of over 50 “Best of 2014” Awards including Game of the Year, Best Action Game and Most Innovative Game.

Name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl
Description:
In 1986, the world's worst nuclear disaster occurred at the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant. Soviet authorities established an 'Exclusion Zone' around, but a second explosion hit the reactor in 2006, creating The Zone as we know it – dangerous place, filled with mutated creatures, deadly radiation, and a strange, anomalous energy. The Zone was cordoned off by the military, who would shoot on sight anyone foolish enough to get inside. Year 2012. The Zone is still a dangerous place and a threat to all mankind. Mercenaries, bounty hunters and explorers ventured further and further into the heart of the Zone driven by reports of strange 'artifacts' imbued with anomalous energy. To sell them on the black market or trying to find the 'truth' behind the Zone. Whatever their motivation, over time these individuals - Scavengers, Trespassers, Adventurers, Loners, Killers, Explorers and Robbers - have become known as S.T.A.L.K.E.R.s. You will have to find your own way to survive in the Zone! An immersive storyline, seamlessly blended with a living, breathing, non-linear open-world environment. An accurately modeled real-world buildings and locations from deep inside of the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone. Unique 'Survival FPS' gameplay, which combines action, stealth, survival and RPG elements - to create an incomparable experience in the Zone. Enemy Threat Evaluation AI system - NPC characters react to changes in environments and situations. Realistic combat mechanics with accurate ballistic properties. Dynamic day-night cycle and weather system, that directly impacts gameplay. Advanced physics and dynamic lighting effects powered by the 'X-Ray Engine'. Intense multiplayer action, supporting up to 32 players.

Name: The Last Express Gold Edition
Description:
Step aboard the 1914 Orient Express in this award-winning mystery adventure from Prince of Persia creator Jordan Mechner. Described as one of the best adventure games of all time, The Last Express is an intrigue-filled adventure set aboard the luxurious Orient Express. In July 1914, on the eve of World War I, as the train departs on its final journey from Paris to Constantinople, you step into the shoes of Rober Cath, an American doctor who’s been invited from his best friend Tyler Whitney to join him on the Orient Express. Urged to find out why his best friend asked him to boards the train expressly, Robert Cath discovers Tyler, dead in his compartment with a mysterious scroll written in Russian. Explore all the carriages of the train, from your neighbour's compartment to the restaurant to keep up your investigations. The Last Express is an intrigue-filled adventure mixing up a complex story with unpredictable plot twists, conspiracy, romance, and murder aboard the luxurious Orient Express. Use this train ride to discuss, hear (or eavesdrop conversations), investigate and discover who has killed your best friend and why. ● Unique graphics with a modern style of its own ● Multiple endings depending on the choice you’ll make (actions got consequences) ● An immersive and tensed real-time system

Name: Nancy Drew®: Curse of Blackmoor Manor
Description:
Nancy Drew®: Curse of Blackmoor Manor is a first-person perspective, point-and-click adventure game. The player is Nancy Drew and has to solve a mystery. Explore rich environments for clues, interrogate suspects, and solve puzzles and mini-games. All is not well in Blackmoor Manor, a Fourteenth Century English mansion haunted by a tragic past. You, as Nancy Drew, embark on your first international adventure to visit Linda Penvellyn, your neighbor's daughter and newlywed wife of a British diplomat. A mysterious malady keeps Linda hidden behind thick bed curtains. Is she hiding from something or someone, or is a more menacing threat stalking her? Face your fears to find the truth! Dare to Play.™ Travel to England and solve challenging puzzles to break the manor’s evil curse. Snoop and sleuth through gorgeously detailed rooms for clues. Meet intriguing suspects, including a sardonic talking parrot. Erase mistakes by using the ‘Second Chance’ feature. Play at your own pace with Junior and Senior detective levels.   About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series The original #1 selling PC adventure series. See a comparison of the Dossier and Adventure Series

Name: Nancy Drew®: Danger on Deception Island
Description:
Nancy Drew®: Danger on Deception Island is a first-person perspective, point-and-click adventure game. The player is Nancy Drew and has to solve a mystery. Explore rich environments for clues, interrogate suspects, and solve puzzles and mini-games. A much-anticipated vacation to a remote island in the Pacific Northwest abruptly runs aground when you, as Nancy Drew, discover that an unseen assailant has vandalized the whale-watching boat owned by your host, Katie Firestone. But that’s just the first in a string of nasty 'accidents.' Is the trouble in Snake Horse Harbor related to the orphaned orca whale roaming the nearby channel, or is there a deeper threat shrouded in the approaching fog? Plunge into danger to bring a mysterious island’s secrets to the surface! Dare to Play. Kayak in coastal waters and caves. Solve puzzles using Morse code and the Anagram Buster. Build sandcastles, dig for clams, and play chess. Choose from Junior or Senior Detective difficulty levels.   About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series The original #1 selling PC adventure series. See a comparison of the Dossier and Adventure Series

Name: Nancy Drew®: Secret of the Old Clock
Description:
Nancy Drew®: Secret of the Old Clock is a first-person perspective, point-and-click adventure game. The player is Nancy Drew and has to solve a mystery. Explore rich environments for clues, interrogate suspects, and solve puzzles and mini-games. The year is 1930. A fiery explosion at the Lilac Inn leaves its owner, Emily Crandall, teetering on the edge of sanity and propels you, as Nancy Drew, headlong into adventure. A will left behind by an eccentric millionaire could solve Emily’s problems, and fortunately, you’ve got a car and can drive anywhere you want. But watch out! When you’re on the trail of a desperate villain, the road can get very bumpy! Dare to Play.™ Drive Nancy’s blue roadster Go back in time to 1930 Play miniature golf Based on the first Nancy Drew book   About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series The original #1 selling PC adventure series. See a comparison of the Dossier and Adventure Series

**Nancy Drew®: Legend of the Crystal Skull: Unravel a Mysterious Inheritance**

In *Nancy Drew®: Legend of the Crystal Skull*, you step into the shoes of the renowned detective to solve a perplexing mystery. The game is a captivating first-person, point-and-click adventure where your mission is to unravel the secrets surrounding the death of Bruno Bolet and the disappearance of his legendary crystal skull.

Bruno Bolet, the former owner of the "Whisperer," believed his crystal skull offered protection from all but murder. After his untimely demise, his nephew Henry arrived at the eerie Bolet manor to settle his affairs. However, the skull was nowhere to be found amidst the manor's disarray. Now, you must join forces with Nancy's loyal friend, Bess Marvin, to locate this powerful artifact before it falls into the wrong hands.

### Uncover the Secrets of Bolet Manor

Explore the sinister world of the Bolet manor, a place filled with unusual obstacles and hidden dangers. You'll need to infiltrate a secret society, unlock hidden crypts, and collect peculiar items like glass eyeballs. Be prepared to confront Bruno's exotic pets, including an iguana, alligator, and spider, as you navigate the manor's secrets.

### Play as Two Iconic Detectives

Embark on this thrilling investigation with two iconic characters: Nancy Drew and her loyal friend, Bess Marvin. Their combined detective skills will be crucial in solving the mystery.

### Engage in Fun Mini-Games

Test your skills with a variety of engaging mini-games. These arcade-style challenges include bowling, blasting angry wasps, and dodging perilous chomping teeth, adding an extra layer of fun to your investigation.

### Choose Your Detective Level

Customize your gameplay experience by selecting either Junior or Senior detective mode. This allows you to adjust the difficulty and even correct mistakes without restarting the game, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable adventure.

### About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series

*Nancy Drew®: Legend of the Crystal Skull* is part of the original, best-selling PC adventure series featuring Nancy Drew. Discover a comparison between the Dossier and Adventure Series to learn more about this beloved franchise.

## Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition: Your Epic Journey Awaits

Step into the boots of a Grey Warden, one of the last of a legendary order of guardians, in **Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition**. Mankind's ancient enemy has returned, and the kingdom is fractured by civil war. Fate has chosen you to unite these shattered lands and defeat the archdemon.

### Explore a Rich and Dangerous World

Prepare to explore a stunning world filled with complex moral choices that will shape your destiny. Engage in intense, bone-crushing combat against massive and terrifying creatures. Your decisions matter, and the fate of the kingdom rests on your shoulders.

### The Awakening Expansion: A New Chapter

The saga of the Grey Wardens continues in the **Awakening Expansion Pack**. You'll be named their commander, facing new enemies and discovering new skills and spells. Explore an entirely new region of the world, Amaranthine, and uncover its secrets.

### All Nine Content Packs: Deepen Your Adventure

Dive even deeper into the Dragon Age storyline with all nine included content packs:

*   **The Stone Prisoner**
*   **Warden's Keep**
*   **Return to Ostagar**
*   **Feastday Gifts**
*   **The Darkspawn Chronicles**
*   **Feastday Pranks**
*   **Leliana's Song**
*   **The Golems of Amgarrak**
*   **Witch Hunt**

These packs offer new rewards, introduce new party members, and expand the lore of the Dragon Age universe.

**Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition** is a critically acclaimed title, recognized with over 50 awards, including more than 30 'Best of 2009' accolades.

**The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings Enhanced Edition**

Step into the dark and intricate world of **The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings Enhanced Edition**, the second chapter in the epic RPG saga of Geralt of Rivia, a professional monster slayer. This installment delivers a mature, thought-provoking narrative, crafting one of the most **elaborate and unique role-playing games** ever released on PC. A time of **untold chaos** has descended. Powerful forces are secretly vying for control, and the Northern Kingdoms are mobilizing for war. However, armies alone cannot thwart a **bloody conspiracy**.

**Key Features:**

*   **Immersive, Mature, Non-Linear Story:** Immerse yourself in a vast, emotionally charged, and non-linear story set in a truly unique fantasy world. Embark on a complex adventure where **every decision carries dire consequences**. Experience over 40 hours of narrative-driven gameplay, featuring **4 distinct beginnings and 16 different endings**.

*   **Spectacular, Brutal, Tactical Combat:** Engage in combat that masterfully blends **dynamic action with deep RPG mechanics**. Wield an arsenal of unique witcher weapons, offering both **melee and ranged options**. Prepare for battle with a wide array of tactical choices: **craft potions, set traps, cast magic, and utilize stealth**.

*   **Realistic, Vast, Consistent Game World:** Discover a deep, rich game world where **ominous events shape populations** and bloodthirsty monsters roam. Explore diverse locations, from bustling trading posts and mining towns to imposing castles and fortresses, uncovering their hidden stories and **dark secrets**.

*   **Cutting-Edge Technology:** Experience a **believable, living world** with stunning graphics, powered by CD PROJEKT RED's in-house **REDengine technology**.

**About The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition:**

The Enhanced Edition significantly expands the experience with exciting new content. Enjoy **additional hours of gameplay** through new adventures in previously unseen locations, introducing fresh characters, mysteries, and monsters. A **new game introduction and cinematics**, including a pre-rendered intro directed by BAFTA winner Tomasz Bagiński, enhance the narrative.

This edition also includes all DLCs and improvements from version 2.0:

*   **Arena Mode:** Test your combat skills against **endless waves of enemies** in this arcade-style mode.
*   **Extensive Tutorial System:** A new, gradual tutorial smoothly introduces players to the game world and Geralt's adventures.
*   **Dark Mode:** A challenging difficulty level for **hardcore players**, featuring unique dark-themed items and demanding a greater focus on **battle preparation, defense, and opportunistic attacks**.

The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition comes bundled with these bonus items:

*   Official soundtrack in MP3 format
*   A map of the game's world
*   A quest handbook for all players
*   Game manual
*   “Reasons of State” digital comic book

**The Wolf Among Us: A Gritty Fairytale Thriller**

Step into the shoes of **Bigby Wolf**, the notorious Big Bad Wolf, in **The Wolf Among Us**. This mature and violent thriller, from the creators of the acclaimed 2012 Game of the Year, The Walking Dead, plunges you into a world based on the award-winning Fables comic books from DC Comics/Vertigo.

Prepare for a **brutal and bloody murder** that is just the beginning of your troubles. In this game series, **every decision you make carries enormous consequences**. Experience an evolution of Telltale's groundbreaking choice and consequence mechanics. As Bigby Wolf, the Sheriff of Fabletown, you'll discover that life in this **big, bad city is terrifying and dangerous**.

The game unfolds over **5 episodes**, each available now:

*   **Episode 1: Faith**
*   **Episode 2: Smoke and Mirrors**
*   **Episode 3: A Crooked Mile**
*   **Episode 4: In Sheep's Clothing**
*   **Episode 5: Cry Wolf**

**Key Features:**

*   From the **award-winning team** behind The Walking Dead.
*   Based on the **Eisner Award-winning Fables comic book series**.
*   Your choices matter, but **WHEN you choose to act is just as crucial**.
*   A **mature and gritty reimagining** of fairytale, legend, and folklore characters living in our world.
*   A **perfect starting point** for the Fables universe, even if you're new to the comics. The game is set **before the events of the first comic issue**.

Name: Waking Mars
Description:
In 2097, life is discovered on Mars. When your mission of first contact becomes trapped by a cave-in, you must master the alien ecosystem to survive. Soon you stumble upon more than anyone expected, and with time running out, you will make a decision that determines the fate of a lost planet. Waking Mars is a one-of-a-kind adventure in which you jetpack through subterranean Mars encountering a host of extraordinary alien lifeforms that operate as a living, breathing ecosystem. Learn and master the behaviors of these creatures to create ecosystems of your own design if you are to survive and discover the secrets of Mars’ past. Key Features Explore an open-ended network of exotic caverns. Decode mysterious signals and discover long lost ruins. Survive an unearthly world of strange creatures and hazardous terrain. Grow a vibrant, interconnected ecosystem of exotic plants and alien creatures. Cultivate one species to feed another, eliminate unwanted infestations, and research unique behaviors. 2012 IGF Nominee: Excellence in Audio. Features nearly two hours of critically acclaimed original music. A fully PC native control scheme, designed for both mouse+keyboard and for gamepads.

**MASAGORO: A First-Person Horror Exploration Game**

Step into the shoes of a lone explorer in "MASAGORO," a chilling first-person horror game. This single-player experience centers on the exploration of an abandoned Ryokan, a traditional Japanese inn, also named 'Masagoro'. As you delve deeper into its decaying halls, you'll uncover the secrets of its past by piecing together various clues scattered throughout the narrative.

**The Story's Genesis:**

The protagonist, a former resident of 'Meshii-village', is suddenly reminded of a forgotten, abandoned Ryokan. Driven by a fascination with derelict structures, he embarks on a journey to explore this forgotten place.

**The Setting: An Early Showa Period Ryokan:**

The Ryokan itself is meticulously designed to reflect the architectural style of the early Showa period (1926-1989). Its design draws inspiration from real-life abandoned Japanese hotels and incorporates insights from experienced urban explorers.

**Immersive Horror with 3D Sound:**

Prepare for an intensely immersive experience thanks to Valve's Steam Audio technology. This advanced 3D audio solution will draw you closer to the unsettling phenomena that plague Masagoro, amplifying the horror.

**Gameplay Experience:**

"MASAGORO" offers a compelling horror experience that typically takes two to three hours to complete. Players will navigate the eerie interior of the Ryokan, confronting and battling malevolent spirits that lurk within.

**Winter Voices: A Deep Dive into a Unique Seasonal RPG Adventure**

Winter Voices presents a truly unique, narrative-driven, and episodic role-playing game experience, inviting players into a timeless, imaginary world poised on the brink of the Industrial Revolution. At its core, the game centers on a 24-year-old heroine grappling with the profound grief of her father's recent death. Her arduous journey will lead her through the unforgiving heart of winter, where her most formidable adversaries are not external threats, but the deeply entrenched inner demons she must confront and overcome.

The inaugural season of Winter Voices is comprised of seven downloadable episodes, each meticulously crafted to unveil new layers of the protagonist's compelling and emotionally resonant story. The gameplay ingeniously fuses real-time "point and click" exploration with strategic, turn-based combat. As players navigate intricate dialogue options and explore the richly detailed world, they will find themselves engaging in a unique form of psychic warfare, all conducted through turn-based mechanics.

**Key Features of Winter Voices:**

*   **A Mature and Exceptionally Creative Narrative:** Delve into the complexities of human consciousness and become fully immersed in an evocative and chilling role-playing experience that explores profound emotional themes.
*   **Thought-Provoking and Innovative Gameplay Mechanics:** Players will engage in unique "defense of the mind" mechanics, where the character actively battles her inner demons, confronting her deepest fears, pervasive illusions, overwhelming guilt, and encroaching madness.
*   **Tactical Combat with a Distinctive Twist:** Experience a strictly defensive approach to turn-based combat, emphasizing strategic thinking and resource management over aggressive offense.
*   **A Wondrous and Unconventionally Unusual World:** Discover a meticulously crafted imaginary setting, existing outside of conventional time, situated at the evocative dawn of the Industrial Revolution.
*   **A Dynamic and Evocative Soundtrack:** A collection of haunting melodies masterfully guides your journey of self-discovery, establishing a dark, intriguing, and atmospheric mood that perfectly complements the character's cold path and her deeply mysterious past.

**Winter Voices Prologue: Avalanche**

The narrative begins with a poignant drama unfolding in a snow-buried village, nestled deep within the secluded valley of a Three-River Principality. A sudden, tragic death, a now-hostile home environment, and the emergence of unsettling sensory abilities all signal an inevitable departure for the young heroine. Compelled by her unconscious mind, the newly orphaned protagonist is driven to leave her father's village. This arduous journey, undertaken in search of answers, will lead players through a multitude of challenging events. Ultimately, players will guide the heroine as she overcomes anger, sadness, pain, and fear, striving to finally comprehend the profound whispers of Winter.

Name: Letters - a written adventure
Description:
Handwritten nostalgia Journey back to the 90s and move through beautifully hand-drawn letters, as you follow the life of Sarah. Learn more about her friends, nerdy obsessions or why she has the most annoying sister ever. Then go digital as Sarah grows older. Revel in the nostalgic pixel world of the early 2000s internet while navigating all the drama, anxiety and joys of teenagehood. Shape your future Watch Sarah grow up and make decisions that will change how her life will turn out as an adult (no pressure). Take revenge on your sister, play video games all day or fall in love. It’s all up to you. Don’t like the outcome? Just go ahead and rewrite her story. (See? we told you, no pressure.) Power of words In a world made from paper and computers, words matter. So use them to change drawings that block your way, help friendly characters and interact with Sarah's friends. Finding the right words is hard sometimes. Especially for shy people like Sarah. So help her by breaking them apart and creating new ones for her to use instead. Playfully wholesome Letters is a cozy, often funny, sometimes sad game about friendship, growing up and finding your way in life. Explore Sarah’s colorful world and use the power of words to change her life! Or… just stack cats or something. FEATURES innovative word-based riddle mechanic , you've never seen before relatable coming of age story , inspired by real-life branching storyline where you can discover new possibilities with every playthrough beautifully hand-drawn visuals & pixel art evolving with Sarah’s age comfy, playful & casual game that focuses on narration and having fun with words good for practicing English skills in a fun way QUICK FACTS language: English playtime: approx. 3 hours (1 playthrough)

Here's a revised version of the document, aiming to meet your quality targets:

**ANOTHER EDEN: An Epic RPG Across Time and Space**

ANOTHER EDEN is a highly-rated RPG with a Metascore of 88. This exciting and epic adventure brings together acclaimed creators from a number of well-known and popular series.

**A Story of Loss and Hope**

The narrative begins with a personal tragedy: "It all started the day she disappeared right before my eyes." This event is followed by the sudden destruction of the city. Fueled by this loss, a solemn oath is made: "Once again, I'm setting out on a journey beyond time and space. To save our lost future. Before the darkness of time falls upon us all..."

**Game Overview**

ANOTHER EDEN offers a unique RPG experience that transcends space and time.

*   **Epic Storytelling:** Master storyteller Masato Kato, known for his work on *Chrono Trigger*, crafts an epic story that spans the Antiquity, Present, and Future.
*   **Memorable Soundtrack:** The main theme is composed by Yasunori Mitsuda, and the original soundtrack features over 60 songs performed by orchestras and folk instruments.

**Explore a Vast World**

Embark on an adventure across multiple continents and three distinct time periods: Antiquity, the Present, and the Future.

**Strategic Gameplay**

*   **Turn-Based Battles:** Engage in highly strategic turn-based combat. Fill your gauge to unleash a powerful Another Force attack.
*   **Party Customization:** Combine your allies' attributes, equipment, and abilities to achieve victory.
