Elder Puzzle - A puzzle game with classic game modes, dozens of levels and beautiful pictures made in the pixel-art style, in this game you can train your quick thinking and reaction, collecting puzzles into a single picture, choosing the difficulty level for your style of play. A colorful puzzle game where you collect puzzle pieces into a coherent picture, go through dozens of levels and choose your level of difficulty, each of which is limited by its own time and amount of life. Train your brains! Game features: - Choice of levels - Beautiful Pixel-Art - Choice of difficulty modes

Name: Untangle
Description:
SUMMARY Untangle the mystery surrounding Alisha's disappearance. Alisha was a top student with lots of rumors and stories, and a school bullying victim. One day, you were dragged into an otherworldly school where you were trapped with her vengeful spirit. The only hope of survival is to reveal the chilling truth behind her murder. ABOUT THIS GAME Untangle provides a first-person thriller-horror survival experience taking in a school. The fictitious storyline is set to raise awareness of school violence and bullying. Are you a bully or victim? SYPNOSIS Alisha was reported missing in your former school. She was a top student and a school bullying victim. One day, you were dragged into the alternative version of your school. Here, you discovered Alisha was dead and her vengeful spirit avenged herself with a large massacre of the school bullies. To make sure you are not going to be collateral damage, figure out what happened to Alisha and help her out! I'm sorry But Alisha can't come to the phone right now. Why? Oh, 'cause she's dead (oh) KEY FEATURES • First-Person Gameplay • Atmospheric and appealing graphics • Interesting Puzzles You can disable the effects (Bloom, Film Grain, Motion Blur, Ambient Occlusion) in the setting. It would be highly recommended to remain the settings to enhance the game experience. However, It will slow down the fps at the same time. It's best only when it fits your computer graphics setting.

Name: Relaxicon
Description:
Relaxicon helps you learn English and improve your vocabulary in a meditative way. Combine letters into words to get their definitions, score points, unlock over 70 types of challenges and enjoy original atmospheric background music and in-tune sound effects for a relaxing meditation. Use mouse or keyboard to combine words together. Press Enter to score the word and get a definition. If you made a mistake, use backspace to remove the last letter and continue typing the correct word. Or press delete to break the whole word. When you have a challenge, press space to toggle the description. Game contains over 130000 English word definitions! Soundtrack consists of 9 original ambient pieces , and all sound effects were built specifically in tune with soundtrack, for maximum relaxation and ear pleasure. Headphones are highly recommended. Newer Games by Kodo Linija / / /

Name: Undergrowth: VR Maze
Description:
When inside Undergrowth: VR Maze, this is your world. Relax, explore, and take in the view! As you explore inside the maze you will find museum pieces found around the world. With Xera as your guide, you will find nothing but positive vibes and stunning visuals with Crytek's Cryengine! The VR simulator contains an environment from nature, and the layered ambient sound is created to make it as authentic as possible. Jump in and explore with good vibes!

Name: NUMTATE
Description:
NUMTATE is a challenging grid based puzzle game in which you move blocks around by rotating, pushing and attracting them to solve numeric puzzles. The game includes 50 handcrafted Levels. Each one with another take on the mechanics which can interact with each other to create more and more complex situations. With the help of the Undo/Redo -System, you can go back and forth in your steps, if you made a mistake or want to see the puzzle in an earlier state. If you need the numbers and positions in check, the Mark-System helps you out. An optional color pallete and pattern are available if needed. The Levels in the game are not enough? Create your own levels with the Level Editor and share them via the export function or the Steam Workshop! IN SHORT: 50 handcrafted puzzles Easy mechanics, complex levels Colorblind options Intuitive level editor Custom level export function Steam Workshop support

Street Fighter® IV revitalizes the iconic fighting series by returning to its core. It blends the beloved moves and techniques of Street Fighter® II with Capcom's cutting-edge technology. This creates an extraordinary experience that reintroduces the world to the art of virtual martial arts.

**Street Fighter IV brings back everything that made Street Fighter II a global hit.** Players can choose from classic characters like Ryu, Ken, Chun-Li, and Guile. They can also meet new fighters such as Crimson Viper, Abel, El Fuerte, and Rufus.

The game features **stylized 3D characters and environments**. However, gameplay remains in the classic **2D Street Fighter perspective**, enhanced with 3D camera effects. The familiar **six-button control scheme returns**, now packed with new special moves and features.

**Key Features of Street Fighter IV:**

*   **High Definition:** Experience stylized 3D environments and characters.
*   **Classic Gameplay:** Enjoy traditional '2D' Street Fighter six-button gameplay.
*   **25 Fighters:** This includes reimagined classic characters from Street Fighter II and new brawlers. Meet female super-spy Crimson Viper, lucha libre wrestler El Fuerte, and mixed martial artist Abel, among others.
*   **New Special Moves:** Prepare for moves beyond imagination, including **Focus Attacks**, **Super Combos**, and the **Ultra Combo system**.
*   **Engaging Gameplay:** New elements challenge both newcomers and seasoned pros.
*   **Global Online Play:** Compete with players worldwide.
*   **PC Exclusive Visuals:** The PC version offers three unique visual shaders: Watercolor, Poster, and Sumi-E ink styles, inspired by the game's artistic trailers.

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

**Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition**

Experience **Batman: Arkham City**, a thrilling sequel that expands on the acclaimed **Batman: Arkham Asylum**. This new installment throws you into **Arkham City**, a sprawling, maximum-security prison five times larger than the original game's world. It's the new home for Gotham's worst: thugs, gangsters, and criminal masterminds.

Step into the cowl as **The Dark Knight** and deliver justice. You'll face an **incredible Rogues Gallery** of Gotham's most dangerous villains. Prepare to confront **Catwoman, The Joker, The Riddler, Two-Face, Harley Quinn, The Penguin, Mr. Freeze**, and many more.

The **Game of the Year Edition** is packed with extra content. It includes all the original game's features plus significant DLC.

**DLC included:**

*   **Catwoman Pack**
*   **Nightwing Bundle Pack**
*   **Robin Bundle Pack**
*   **Harley Quinn’s Revenge**
*   **Challenge Map Pack**
*   **Arkham City Skins Pack**

This edition offers **new gameplay content**. You get **seven new maps**, **three playable characters**, and **12 unique skins** beyond the original release.

**New Maps:**

*   Wayne Manor
*   Main Hall
*   Freight Train
*   Black Mask
*   The Joker's Carnival
*   Iceberg Lounge
*   Batcave

**Playable Characters:**

*   Catwoman
*   Robin
*   Nightwing

**New Skins:**

*   1970s Batsuit
*   Year One Batman
*   The Dark Knight Returns
*   Earth One Batman
*   Batman Beyond
*   Animated Batman
*   Sinestro Corps Batman
*   Long Halloween Catwoman
*   Animated Catwoman
*   Animated Robin
*   Red Robin
*   Animated Nightwing

Name: Bayonetta
Description:
From PlatinumGames’ legendary director Hideki Kamiya of Resident Evil and Devil May Cry fame, SEGA brings one of the most universally acclaimed character action games of all time to PC. Bayonetta. The last survivor of an ancient witch clan who keep the balance between light, dark and chaos. Entombed to protect herself – and the world as we know it – Bayonetta is discovered and revived after 500 years, sparking a chain of events with cataclysmic repercussions. Thrust straight into battle, with only one clue to her past, Bayonetta must discover the truth and fight for the future. Her daunting conquest sees her face off against countless angelic enemies and giant foes in a game of 100% pure action. BAYONETTA ON PC IS BEST EXPERIENCED WITH A CONTROLLER. Features Deadly Grace An alluring, stylish and all-action heroine unlike anyone else on the gaming landscape, Bayonetta is ready to push your senses to the limit. Climax Action Over-the-top action in extreme environments resulting in continuous high levels of tension and excitement – Bayonetta pushes the genre into new realms of intensity. Extravagant Combat Bayonetta wields an impressive arsenal of weapons through an intuitive and fluid combat system, unleashing deadly combos and special attacks with devastating results. Supernatural Powers Unleash gruesome torture attacks such as the Iron Maiden, Guillotine and more to finish off enemies and send them to hell. Full Steam Support Steam Achievements, Steam Cloud Save, Trading Cards, Leader Boards, and Big Picture Mode. Enhanced PC Graphics Options Unlocked resolutions up to 4K, anti-aliasing, anisotropic filtering, SSAO lighting, scalable texture and shadow quality, and more. English and Japanese Voice Overs Freely switch languages and subtitles at any time.

Name: Guacamelee! Gold Edition
Description:
Guacamelee! Gold Edition is a Metroidvania-style action-platformer set in a magical Mexican-inspired world. The game draws its inspiration from traditional Mexican culture and folklore, and features many interesting and unique characters. Guacamelee! builds on the classic open-world Metroidvania style of games by adding deep melee combat, a new dimension switching mechanic, and cooperative local multiplayer. The game also blurs the boundaries between combat and platforming by making many moves useful and necessary for both. Travel through a mystical and mysterious Mexican world as a luchador using the power of your two fists to battle evil. Uncover hidden wrestling techniques like the Rooster Uppercut, and Dimension Swap to open new areas and secrets. Key Features Use combat moves for both fighting enemies and platforming challenges Swap between multiple overlapping dimensions (World of the Living and the World of the Dead) 'El Infierno' level expansion. Brave the fires of El Infierno and prove yourself in a series of challenges to unlock powerful new costumes for Juan and Tostada Player costumes! Swap costumes to change the attributes of your Hero, and obtain new achievements Steam Achievements, Leaderboards, Cloud Save, and Big Picture Mode Trading Cards Create new custom costumes and share these with others via Steam Workshop Drop in/out 2-Player local co-operative play for the entire story Chickens. Lots and lots of Chickens Also Available: Super Turbo Championship Edition! An alternate, expanded edition of Guacamelee! is now available to Steam PC users! Guac STCE adds to the Gold Edition with extra powers, levels and enemies, and enhancements to gameplay and graphics. Click the banner to find out more.

In a post-apocalyptic world where humanity clings to survival amidst chaos, destruction, and mutated creatures, a new and **sinister threat** has emerged: the world's dogs are disappearing. You step into the role of Alpha, a solitary wanderer haunted by the loss of his own canine companion in his youth. While navigating the desolate wastelands, Alpha unexpectedly encounters a group of mutants abducting a lost puppy. This confrontation reveals Alpha's extraordinary ability to **understand the pup**, who introduces himself as T. Juan!

Together, Alpha and T. Juan embark on an epic quest to unravel the mystery behind the widespread vanishing of dogs, urging you to join them on the road to discovery and rescue.

**Assemble Your Canine Companions:**

Your journey will be aided by a diverse cast of canine allies, each with unique abilities to aid you in your mission. The **Newfoundland** offers a crucial passive healing ability, ensuring your team remains resilient in the face of danger. When the situation escalates, the **Tibetan Mastiff** can unleash a formidable "beast mode," turning the tide of battle. Furthermore, the **Beagle** contributes its undeniable charisma and a set of distinctive skills that prove invaluable. It is your responsibility to rescue these brave pups and deploy them strategically against the villains threatening their existence. Prepare to explore a world that has truly gone to the dogs, venturing through **desolate badlands**, **ruined cities**, **military bases**, and **forgotten jungles**, all while traveling in an **upgradable RV**.

**Engage in a Dog-Eat-Dog Combat System:**

This challenging environment will pit you against a variety of adversaries, ranging from grotesque mutated creatures to electrifying foes. To overcome these threats, you must bring your best and go "all paws" against the numerous antagonists you will encounter. Beyond direct combat, your strategic prowess will be tested in a unique take on tower defense. When confronting mutated enemies, you will have access to a wide array of offensive and defensive options to safeguard your territory. Your arsenal includes **super soakers**, **steel walls**, and **wire traps**, offering a plethora of choices for strategic gameplay.

## Yakuza 0: Dive into 1980s Japan

Experience the vibrant, decadent world of 1980s Japan in Yakuza 0. This action-adventure game throws you into the neon-lit streets of Tokyo and Osaka, where you'll fight your way through a gripping narrative.

### Two Protagonists, One Turbulent Story

You'll play as two iconic characters: Kazuma Kiryu and Goro Majima.

#### Kazuma Kiryu's Descent into Trouble

Follow Kazuma Kiryu as a routine debt collection spirals out of control. Kiryu finds himself entangled in a dangerous web when his target is brutally murdered, setting him on a path of escalating conflict.

#### Goro Majima's "Normal" Life

Then, step into the flamboyant world of Goro Majima. Explore his seemingly ordinary existence as the charismatic owner of a bustling cabaret club.

### Dynamic Combat and Environmental Mayhem

Yakuza 0 features a fluid combat system that allows you to switch between three distinct fighting styles on the fly. Take down hordes of enemies with brutal efficiency. Elevate your fighting by incorporating environmental objects into your attacks. Use bicycles, signposts, and even car doors to unleash bone-crunching combos and savage takedowns.

### More Than Just Fighting: Explore 1988's Japan

Beyond the intense battles, 1988's Japan offers a wealth of distractions. Immerse yourself in the era's entertainment, from energetic discos and glamorous hostess clubs to classic SEGA arcades. The richly detailed, neon-lit world is brimming with activities to pursue.

### Uncover 100 Side Stories

Engage with the colorful inhabitants of the red-light district. You might find yourself assisting a budding S&M dominatrix or ensuring a street performer reaches the restroom in time. Discover over 100 unique and memorable side stories that flesh out the game's world.

Name: Injustice™ 2
Description:
Power up and build the ultimate version of your favourite DC legends in INJUSTICE 2. •EVERY BATTLE DEFINES YOU: With every match you'll earn gear to equip, customise and evolve your roster. •A NEW THREAT RISES: Picking up where Injustice left off, Batman struggles against Superman's regime, as a new threat appears that will put Earth's very existence at risk. •THE BEST OF DC: Choose from the biggest DC Universe roster ever and battle across iconic locations in epic-scale battles. •BUILT BY NETHERREALM: Developers of the best-selling and critically acclaimed MORTAL KOMBAT franchise.

## Full Metal Furies: A True Cooperative Action RPG Experience

Embark on an epic adventure with FULL METAL FURIES, a groundbreaking 'true-cooperative' action RPG from the acclaimed creators of Rogue Legacy, where seamless teamwork is not just encouraged, it's absolutely essential for survival. This innovative title places a profound emphasis on collaborative play, featuring a unique combat system meticulously designed to ensure every player's contribution is vital to overcoming formidable challenges and ultimately saving a world teetering on the brink of self-destruction.

### Unite for Victory: The Power of Cooperative Combat

FULL METAL FURIES revolutionizes the action RPG genre by demanding genuine coordination to vanquish your adversaries. Enemies will emerge onto the battlefield protected by colored barriers, and only allies possessing a matching hue can effectively shatter these defenses, necessitating constant communication and strategic positioning. Furthermore, the game emphasizes the critical importance of reviving fallen comrades, as revive bars naturally replenish over time, but a swift helping hand can make all the difference in the heat of battle. This commitment to cooperation extends to all aspects of gameplay, eliminating the common frustrations of competing for last hits, battling over loot, or vying for health drops, as all resources are shared, allowing players to fully immerse themselves in working together harmoniously.

### Master Your Role: Four Distinct Classes

Choose from four distinct classes, each offering a unique playstyle and contributing specialized abilities to the team's success:

*   **Alex the Friendly Fighter:** Excels in close-quarters combat, utilizing a dynamic array of counters and devastating combos to overwhelm opponents.
*   **Meg the Near-sighted Sniper:** Controls the battlefield from a distance by strategically planting mines and executing aerial juggles on enemies.
*   **Triss the Boxy Tank:** Protects allies with her formidable shield and possesses the power to send enemies flying with forceful attacks.
*   **Erin the Ovally Engineer:** Dominates the battlefield with her deployable turrets and also wields a powerful gun for offensive capabilities.

### Evolving Abilities: A Deep Skill Tree System

Each class boasts its own unique and extensive skill tree, offering a vast number of abilities to customize and experiment with, allowing players to adapt their playstyle on the fly. Instead of changing equipment, players can fundamentally alter their character's capabilities by swapping abilities. Imagine empowering the Tank with a FREEZING SHOUT, transforming the Fighter's Leap into a devastating POWER DIVE, or equipping the Engineer with a rapid-fire machine gun, showcasing the incredible depth and flexibility of the combat system.

### A Menagerie of Foes: Challenging Enemy Encounters

Prepare for a relentless onslaught of over 70 distinct enemy types, each meticulously designed with unique tells and specific counters, ensuring that no encounter feels like mere cannon fodder. Enemies will attack with a furious pace, offering no respite for the weary, and new threats are introduced in every single stage, keeping players constantly on their toes. The game culminates in epic, multi-phasic battles against colossal Titans, demanding the utmost skill and coordination to overcome.

### An Intriguing World: Exploration and Discovery

Embark on an adventure brimming with intrigue, unexpected twists, and memorable one-liners as you traverse a world scarred by conflict. Journey through the desolate, snow-capped town of Thessaly, bravely navigate the treacherous Folky Forest, delve into the ancient tombs of the Stygian Well, and explore numerous other captivating environments. However, be vigilant, as the world holds more secrets than initially meets the eye, with hidden clues, elusive secrets, and even entire hidden dimensions scattered throughout the landscape, waiting to be discovered. Uncover a rich narrative spanning over 20,000 words, translated into 8 different languages, and delight in the discovery of 20,000 unique one-liners.

### Play Your Way: Solo or With Friends

FULL METAL FURIES offers unparalleled flexibility in how you experience its cooperative gameplay. Up to four players can join the adventure together, supporting both **ONLINE** and **OFFLINE** play, with full couch co-op and online multiplayer options, along with every combination in between. For those who prefer to venture alone, the innovative **Pick 2** system allows you to select two party members to control, utilizing a quick-switch mechanic that retains all the strategic nuances of multi-player combat. Every action and combo possible in multiplayer can be executed in single-player, ensuring a complete and engaging experience regardless of your chosen playstyle.

### Addendum: An Allegorical Journey

This abstruse allegorical action adventure delves into themes of atonement, allusions, and alliteration, promising an unforgettable experience set in an alternate age amidst the ashes of ancient Athens.

PAYDAY 2 is an action-packed, four-player co-op shooter. Players once again don the masks of the original PAYDAY crew: Dallas, Hoxton, Wolf, and Chains. They descend on Washington D.C. for an epic crime spree.

The **CRIMENET network** offers a huge range of dynamic contracts. Players can choose from small-time convenience store hits or kidnappings. They can also opt for big league cyber-crime or emptying out major bank vaults for that epic **PAYDAY**. While in D.C., players can even participate in the local community and run political errands. Up to four friends can co-operate on these hits. As the crew progresses, the jobs become bigger, better, and more rewarding.

Along with earning more money and becoming a legendary criminal, players can enjoy a **character customization and crafting system**. This system lets crews build and customize their own guns and gear.

**Key Features:**

*   **Rob Banks, Get Paid:** Players must choose their crew carefully. When the job goes down, they will need the right mix of skills.
*   **CRIMENET:** This dynamic contract database lets gamers pick and choose from available jobs. They connect with local contacts like Vlad the Ukrainian, shady politician 'The Elephant', and South American drug trafficker Hector. Each contact has their own agenda and best interests in mind.
*   **PAYDAY Gunplay and Mechanics on a New Level:** Firing weapons and zip-tying civilians has never felt so good.
*   **Dynamic Scenarios:** No heist ever plays out the same way twice. Every single scenario features random geometry or even rare events.
*   **Choose Your Skills:** As players progress, they can invest in any of five special Skill Trees: Mastermind, Enforcer, Ghost, Technician, and Fugitive. Each features a deep customization tree of associated skills and equipment. These can be mixed and matched to create the ultimate heister.
*   **More Masks than Ever:** PAYDAY 2 features a completely new mask system. Players can craft their own unique mask with a pattern and color of their choice, resulting in millions of different combinations.
*   **Weapons and Modifications:** A brand new arsenal awaits serious heisters. This covers everything from sniper and assault rifles to compact PDWs and SMGs. Once you've settled on a favorite, you can modify it with optics, suppressors, fore grips, reticles, barrels, frames, stocks, and more. All of these will affect your weapon's performance. There are also purely aesthetic enhancements.
*   **Play It Your Way:** Each job allows for multiple approaches. You can choose slow and stealthy ambushes or run in guns blazing. Hit the target any way you want; each approach will provide a different experience.
*   **A Long History of Additional Content:** More than 70 updates have been released since launch. These include new heists, characters, weapons, and other gameplay features like driving cars and forklifts.

Name: Atomicrops
Description:
In Atomicrops you will... Farm by sowing and harvesting as many fast growing crops as you can before the day is done to earn a huge profit. Explore the far reaches of the biomes to find useful relics of farms long past. Powerful loot increases your farming abilities and helps you fight enemies. Defend your crops. Fend off nightly attackers looking to eat your crops and leave you starving. Or dead. Fight challenging bosses each season until you reach the final season - the Nuclear Winter. Purchase weapons and items in town at the end of each day. Celebrate the end of each season with special shops and rewards. Befriend an entourage of pig pals, chicken chums and cow colleagues to automate farming tasks. Woo and marry a kindred spirit from the local town to fight and farm alongside you. Permanently Upgrade your farming and fighting abilities. Earn a special currency each run that can be used on permanent improvements and unlocks. Die. Even the easiest difficulty will put your skills to the test. Victory is rewarding and hard earned. Unlock new characters, spouses, difficulties, and permanent upgrades. Most importantly, you can unlock many cats to permanently roam your homestead (yes, you can pet them). Play again! Atomicrops is designed to be heavily replayable with new surprises and item synergies to be discovered in every run. About Modern city life got you down? Well, you've just inherited your late uncle's farm. Time to pack your bags and start fresh in the peaceful countryside. What could possibly go wrong? A nuclear apocalypse, that's what. Now you're in a hellscape wasteland defending the last surviving source of sustenance - your crops. And every mutant wants a piece. Do as any self-respecting farmer would: Farm. Marry. Kill.

Name: Blacklight: Retribution
Description:
Take firefights to a futuristic new level in Blacklight: Retribution, a free-to-play FPS. See through walls with the HRV, deploy mechanized Hardsuits, and customize your weapons to dominate the opposition. In Blacklight, mastering the futuristic tech is half of victory. You'll need to carefully balance your loadout, from the extreme customization possible in designing your firearms, to the equipment you carry and the in-match bonuses you can unlock. The Hyper Reality Visor (HRV) allows you to look through walls and spot enemies, and attack from where they aren't expecting - but be careful, because you're vulnerable while using it. The other half of victory? Raw skill, same as it's always been. Good hunting, Agent... Key Features Hardsuits - Use a variety of upgrades in each match, including calling in the hulking Hardsuit mech. Powerful but slow, this armored suit packs a one-shot, one-kill railgun and a high velocity minigun to clear rooms... fast. Hyper Reality Vision - HRV Technology allows Agents to scout their enemies through the walls, pinpoint vital mission objectives, or locate weak points in an enemy Hardsuit. Weapon Depots - Scattered across the battlefield are Weapon Depots that supply your team with additional ammo, heavier weapons such as a Rocket Launcher, or provide the ability to call down airstrikes and Hardsuits. Free to Play! - Blacklight: Retribution is a fully Free-to-Play shooter. Earn Game Points (GP) after every match and use them to unlock various armor and weaponry for your Agent in game. Customize Your Loadout - An Agent’s gun is their livelihood. Choose from 1000 different gun combinations by modifying your receivers with customizable Stock, Muzzle, Barrel, Magazine, and Scope, Camo, and Weapon Tags. Protect Yourself - Whether your play style is run and gun, or survivability, or long range sniping the choice is yours to make in fully customizing your armor loadout. Level Progression - Gain experience and levels through combat to unlock access to additional weapons, armor, and equipment. Tons of Game Modes and Maps - Combat is engaged on a number of different 7 different game modes across 9 beautifully detailed maps. Game modes includes classics such Team Death Match, Domination, Capture the Flag, and Kill Confirmed while introducing new favorites likes Netwar. Private Servers - Want to scrim with your clan mates? Challenge someone 1vs1? The private server option allows Agents to set up their own password protected server away from the pesky trolls. Spectator Mode - Learn tips and tricks from the top players in Spectator mode, or simply enjoy the chaos from the best seat in the house.

Welcome to **Killsquad**, a co-op action game that masterfully blends the frantic pace of a **twin-stick shooter** with the visceral satisfaction of **hack and slash** combat. This exhilarating experience is further enhanced by deep **character customization and progression**, allowing you to forge your unique bounty hunter.

Embark on an epic journey across **five distinct planets**, each teeming with a relentless onslaught of enemies eager for annihilation. Your mission is to select your hero, meticulously choose their skills, arm yourself with powerful weapons, equip essential gears, and attune potent talismans. Then, unleash unbridled fury through waves of adversaries and formidable bosses. Killsquad delivers **frantic, direct, and skill-oriented control**, whether you're wielding a keyboard or a gamepad. The mantra is simple: shoot fast, dodge faster, or face swift demise.

The heart of Killsquad lies in its **short, adrenaline-pumping contracts**, designed to be completed in 10-20 minute bursts. These can be tackled solo or enjoyed with up to four friends in cooperative play. The gameplay evokes elements of a twin-stick shooter, a hack and slash adventure, a top-down dungeon crawler, and even a sci-fi bullet hell. Ultimately, it feels uniquely like **Killsquad**, offering immense fun whether you're playing alone or with companions.

Killsquad boasts **five distinct hero classes**, each offering unique weapons and skills that cater to a variety of playstyles, seamlessly integrating both melee and ranged combat. As you progress through your adventures, you'll acquire and equip **powerful upgrades for each of your skills**, which dynamically activate during your contracts. Upon successfully completing a contract, you'll claim your bounty, which can be spent on a vast array of new equipment, including weapons, power-ups, gear, and cosmetic items to personalize your hero.

Navigate through **over 30 contracts** on the Campaign Map, traversing five diverse planets. You can jump into the fray with friends or join any other bounty hunter. The game allows you to **join another squad mid-mission in real time**, offering a dynamic cooperative experience. You can either cooperate to achieve contract objectives or compete against each other to secure the highest scores.

Discover weapons and gears possessing **unique characteristics that significantly impact your hero's skills**. Earn the trust of the enigmatic Unseen by unearthing their Talismans – potent and intricate artifacts that grant exciting passive effects. Be warned: these abilities may initially prove detrimental, but through persistent effort and by vanquishing numerous monsters, they can be leveled up to transform into incredibly powerful items. Combine these with your skills and upgrades to engineer **game-breaking builds** and truly make your heroes your own.

However, no bounty hunter's party would be complete without the main event: the enemies. **Hordes and waves of disturbing foes** will relentlessly advance, clawing and biting until nothing remains. But fear not, for you are more than capable of handling them. It is the **bosses**, however, that will truly test your mettle. **More than 15 unique bosses** await, each featuring distinct mechanics and requiring specific strategies to overcome.

**MOTHERGUNSHIP: A Bullet-Hell FPS Revolution**

Prepare for an unparalleled gaming experience with **MOTHERGUNSHIP**, a title that masterfully fuses the relentless intensity of bullet-hell shooters with the dynamic action of first-person shooters. This game distinguishes itself by offering **one of the most extensive gun customization options ever witnessed in the video game landscape**. Your mission is clear: equip yourself with an arsenal of truly over-the-top weaponry and embark on a desperate mission to defeat the robotic alien armada that has brutally conquered Earth.

**Forge Your Ultimate Weaponry**

In **MOTHERGUNSHIP**, you are empowered to craft gun monstrosities that defy logic and gravity, weapons no ordinary person could ever hope to wield. Prepare to confront **gigantic bosses** and immerse yourself in a world of **randomized mayhem** as you fight your way to the very core of the alien fleet, with the ultimate objective of destroying the formidable **MOTHERGUNSHIP** itself!

**Engage in Unrelenting Combat**

Face overwhelming odds in **brutal, non-stop combat** where your ability to think on your feet is paramount for survival. Master the art of dodging hundreds of bullets through a unique FPS/Bullet-hell hybrid gameplay system. Each alien vessel you encounter is teeming with hordes of robotic enemies, treacherous traps, and intimidating bosses, all determined to prevent you from saving humanity. It's time to go get them!

**Unleash Your Creativity with Crafting**

To stand any chance against the **MOTHERGUNSHIP**, you will absolutely need your own **personalized arsenal of destruction**. Fortunately, **MOTHERGUNSHIP** provides one of the most **modular gun-crafting systems** ever conceived for a video game. Imagine wielding a twelve-barrel gun that fires homing rockets, or perhaps a devastating lightning shotgun. Even adding a fishtank to the top of your weapon is an option! The design of your destructive arsenal is entirely in your hands.

**Join the Resistance and Fight Together**

Become a vital part of the resistance movement against the relentless robotic alien invasion. Annihilate hordes of metallic fiends and earn your path to the **Mothergunship**. Furthermore, you can experience the thrill of the fight alongside a friend in a **full co-op experience**. Work together to carve a path through the alien fleet and achieve that ultimate, glorious goal: bringing down the **MOTHERGUNSHIP**!

Name: Sniper Ghost Warrior Contracts
Description:
Fulfill contracts that offer clear objectives with a fixed monetary reward and options to complete bonus challenges for payouts. With hundreds of ways to take down a wide range of targets, Contracts offers precise, strategic sniping gameplay at its absolute best. Play as a paid assassin; a hit man for hire, and beware of rival snipers who won’t hesitate to disrupt your best-laid plans. Open-ended contracts Bounties and challenges deliver strong replayability options to eliminate targets and collect cash to redeem for upgrades. An all-new Dynamic Reticle System Offers the most realistic and intense sniping experience. Upgradeable AR Mask With the ability to scan the environment and highlight weakness or objects of interest. An arsenal of new gadgets Including drones, remote sniper turrets and gas grenades. Show off your stealth skills, execute silent takedowns and be rewarded for a strategic play style. Battle the brutal wilderness of Siberia Fight to survive the intensity of snow-covered mountains, lush forests and secret bases hidden deep in the mountainside.

Name: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon: Future Soldier™
Description:
There is nothing fair, honorable, or just about combat. There is only winning and losing—the dead and the living. The Ghosts don’t worry about even odds. They do everything in their power to overwhelm and obliterate the enemy. Future technology is the key to winning an asymmetric battle. In Ghost Recon Future Soldier join an elite team of highly trained, cut-throat special-ops soldiers. Armed to the teeth with unrivalled combat technology and cutting-edge military hardware, Ghost Recon takes you to the globe’s most deadly warzones to hunt down the highest value targets. When you’re outnumbered…Only the dead fight fair. Key Features: In Ghost Recon Future Soldier you will be equipped with the most advanced combat technology designed to overwhelm and obliterate the enemy. Cross Com: Stay one step ahead of the enemy: Cross Com gives you real time intel projected directly on your goggles. The HUD allows you to control drones on the fly, as well as locate key enemy targets. Optical Camouflage: Be invisible: Use optical camouflage to move undetected through hot spots and gain the upper hand on your enemies. Sync Shot: Tag ‘em and bag ‘em: Use the tagging feature on the ground or by drone to coordinate synchronized attacks on enemy targets. Cover Swap: Stay out of enemy sight: Exploit unique cover system and swap through dynamic covers to surprise, flank and eliminate the enemies. Hand-to-Hand Combat: Become the ultimate “quiet professional”: hand-to-hand combat will give you brutal close-combat moves. Over the Shoulder Relish in over 2500 animations: Your Ghost Recon character will roll, cover, slide, climb and disappear to stalk and take down your prey. Single-Player Campaign: An all-new, epic Ghost Recon experience 12 missions 8 spectacular locales - Fight across diverse terrains from the dust of Africa, the suburbs of Moscow, to the icy territory of the Arctic Co-op Campaign: Team up with friends to take down the enemy Play through the 12 campaign missions cooperatively online with up to 3 friends. Perform highly coordinated takedowns and devastating large-scale strikes utilizing multiple viewpoints. Your “5th man” UAV drone can draw fire and target enemies. Lock onto enemy positions from the air or from the ground. Deploy sonic blasts to incapacitate your targets. Unleash the firepower of mounted weapons systems from jeeps to helicopters, and eliminate enemies with your shooting skill. Guerrilla Mode: Dominate hundreds in this brand-new combat mode You and your fellow Ghosts will face waves of enemies and utilize real-life techniques inspired by U.S. Army counter-insurgency experts. Enter, capture and secure a designated area, then prepare for up to 50 waves of enemies with increasing difficulty. Compete against friends in online leaderboards. Multiplayer Mode: Up to 12 players in 6Vs6 matches for a fast-paced, intense online experience Select from 3 classes (Rifleman, Engineer and Scout) and unlock new gear to battle online across 10 maps. Gain experience and levels, make decisive choices to customize and develop your character. Gather Intel on your enemies’ positions and share it with your teammates. Use the new suppression system to pin your enemies down while your teammates flank them. 4 game modes focused on objectives and cooperation, including new exclusives and GR’s classic Siege. Created by Red Storm, the studio behind the critically acclaimed Ghost Recon Advanced Warfighter multiplayer modes. Gunsmith Mode: With over 20MM weapons at your disposal you’ll have the perfect weapon for any combat situation Customize your weapon in the Gunsmith mode to gain the unfair advantage on your enemies. Choose from dozens of attachments and components. Replace triggers, barrels, stocks and much more to trick out your weapon and make it your own. Test your weapon in the firing range before taking it into battle for ultimate accuracy and performance. Compatible with Single-Player, Multi-Player and Co-Op.

**Brink** is an immersive first-person shooter that masterfully blends single-player, co-op, and multiplayer gameplay, allowing you to develop your character whether you're playing alone, with friends, or against others online. In this game, you'll choose your combat role as you fight to save yourself and humanity's last refuge, all within a world featuring dynamic battlefields, extensive customization, and an innovative control system.

The game unfolds on the Ark, a man-made floating city teetering on the brink of civil war. Originally conceived as an experimental, self-sufficient "green" habitat, rising ocean levels tragically forced the Ark to house thousands of refugees alongside its original founders. These escalating tensions between the two groups have ignited a fierce battle for control between the Security and Resistance forces. The critical question remains: **which side will you join?**

**Brink** distinguishes itself with several **key features**:

*   **Unparalleled Character Customization:** **Brink** provides advanced player customization with an astonishing array of appearance options, ensuring your character is truly one-of-a-kind. As you gain experience, you'll unlock even more possibilities to further personalize your avatar.
*   **Unified Character Across Modes:** You can choose to fight in the single-player campaign as either a member of the Resistance or Security. Crucially, you then take that **exact same character** online for both cooperative and competitive play, maintaining your progression and identity.
*   **Fluid Gameplay Transitions:** Experience seamless transitions between your single-player campaign, co-op sessions with friends, and intense multiplayer action at any moment. The multiplayer component supports up to seven other players (or AI) cooperatively against the opposing faction, or up to 16 players in competitive matches.
*   **Innovative SMART Movement System:** **Brink** utilizes familiar shooter controls but introduces the groundbreaking **SMART button**. A single press of this button allows the game to dynamically assess your intended destination and execute the most appropriate movement. This intelligent feature assists both veteran and new FPS players in making **smarter decisions** during fast-paced combat.
*   **Dynamic Objectives and Rewards:** Objectives, communications, missions, and inventory selections are generated dynamically, adapting to your role, condition, location, squadmates, and the overall status of the battle across all gameplay modes. You will **always know your objective**, what actions to take, and the **reward for your success**.

Name: BRINK
Description:
Brink is an immersive first-person shooter that blends single-player, co-op, and multiplayer gameplay into one seamless experience, allowing you to develop your character whether playing alone, with your friends, or against others online. You decide the combat role you want to assume in the world of Brink as you fight to save yourself and mankind’s last refuge. Brink offers a compelling mix of dynamic battlefields, extensive customization options, and an innovative control system that will keep you coming back for more. Brink takes place on the Ark, a man-made floating city that is on the brink of all-out civil war. Originally built as an experimental, self-sufficient and 100% “green” habitat, the reported rapid rise of the Earth’s oceans has forced the Ark to become home to not only the original founders and their descendants but also to thousands of refugees. With tensions between the two groups growing, Security and Resistance forces are locked in a heated battle for control of the Ark. Which side will you choose? KEY FEATURES: Not Just Another Hero – Brink's advanced player customization offers a near-endless combination of looks for your character – allowing for the appearance of your character to be truly unique. As you progress through the game and acquire more experience, you’ll have even more opportunities for customization. Two Sides to Every Story – Choose to fight through the single player campaign as either a member of the Resistance or the Security and then take your same character online to play cooperatively or competitively against other players. Blurring the Lines – Take your unique character online at any time you choose! Brink allows you to seamlessly move between your single player campaign, co-op with friends, and intense multiplayer action. Multiplayer takes the story online where you can play with up to seven other people (or AI characters) cooperatively as you take on the opposing faction or with up to 16 players competitively. Play SMART – Brink uses the familiar shooter controls that you’re used to, without frustrating, artificial constraints and adds a new feature: the SMART button. When you press the SMART button, the game dynamically evaluates where you’re trying to get to, and makes it happen. Whether you’re a seasoned FPS veteran or someone just getting started, you’ll be able to make more intelligent decisions during the fast-paced action with SMART. Context-Sensitive Goals and Rewards - Objectives, communications, missions, and inventory selection are all dynamically generated based on your role, your condition, your location, your squad-mates, and the overall status of the battle in all gameplay modes. You’ll always know exactly where to go, what to do when you get there, and what your reward will be for success.

Brink is an immersive first-person shooter that seamlessly blends single-player, co-op, and multiplayer gameplay. You can develop your character whether playing alone, with friends, or against others online. In Brink, you choose your combat role as you fight to save yourself and humanity's last refuge. The game features dynamic battlefields, extensive customization, and an innovative control system.

Brink is set on the Ark, a man-made floating city on the verge of civil war. Originally an experimental, self-sufficient "green" habitat, rising ocean levels forced the Ark to house thousands of refugees alongside its founders. Tensions between these groups have escalated, leading to a fierce battle for control between Security and Resistance forces. Which side will you join?

**Key Features of Brink:**

*   **Unique Character Customization:** Brink offers advanced player customization with countless appearance options, ensuring your character is truly unique. As you gain experience, you unlock even more customization possibilities.
*   **Two Factions, One Character:** Choose to fight in the single-player campaign as either a Resistance or Security member. Then, take your same character online for cooperative or competitive play.
*   **Seamless Gameplay Transitions:** Move between your single-player campaign, co-op with friends, and intense multiplayer action at any time. Multiplayer allows you to play with up to seven other players (or AI) cooperatively against the opposing faction, or with up to 16 players competitively.
*   **SMART Movement System:** Brink uses familiar shooter controls but adds the innovative SMART button. Pressing SMART allows the game to dynamically assess your intended destination and execute the movement. This feature helps both veteran and new FPS players make smarter decisions in fast-paced action.
*   **Dynamic Objectives and Rewards:** Objectives, communications, missions, and inventory selections are generated dynamically. These are based on your role, condition, location, squadmates, and the battle's status across all gameplay modes. You'll always know your objective, what to do, and your reward for success.

Name: The Longest Journey
Description:
The Longest Journey is an amazing graphical adventure, where the player controls the protagonist, April Ryan, on her journey between parallel universes. Embark on an exciting and original journey of discovery, where you will explore, solve puzzles, meet new people, face terrifying monsters, learn, grow, and live the adventure of a lifetime! Over 150 locations spanning two distinct and detailed worlds More than 70 speaking characters 40+ hours of gameplay 20+ minutes of high-resolution pre-rendered video footage Cinematic musical score

**Monkey Island™ 2 Special Edition: LeChuck’s Revenge™**

Return to the Caribbean with wannabe pirate Guybrush Threepwood and the zombie pirate LeChuck in this acclaimed LucasArts adventure. Monkey Island™ 2 Special Edition: LeChuck’s Revenge™ faithfully updates the classic sequel with stunning special edition details. Building on the success of The Secret of Monkey Island™: Special Edition, this reimagining offers new features and an unparalleled interactive experience.

After seemingly defeating LeChuck in their first encounter, Guybrush sets his sights on the legendary treasure of Big Whoop. However, LeChuck returns as a zombie, fueled by a desire for revenge. Guybrush must rely on his wit, humor, and adventurous spirit to finally defeat his nemesis and prove himself the greatest pirate in the Caribbean. Voodoo dolls, spitting contests, and amusement parks are just a few of the challenges Guybrush faces. He'll meet old friends, battle new enemies, and use all his mojo to overcome LeChuck's wrath.

Experience the game anew with these signature Special Edition features:

*   **High-Definition Graphics:** Enjoy a completely re-imagined art style, hand-drawn and presented in high definition.
*   **Full Voice Over:** Hear the story and characters come alive with complete voice acting from original Monkey Island franchise cast members, available in both Special Edition and Classic modes.
*   **Renewed Music Score:** A re-mastered and re-recorded musical score, performed with live instruments, enhances the atmosphere.
*   **Special Edition and Classic Modes:** Seamlessly switch between modes at any time with the scene-for-scene hot swap feature.
*   **Enhanced Gameplay:** A new, intuitive interface and controls offer a more interactive experience.
*   **In-Game Hint System:** Keep puzzles fresh and fun with an integrated hint system.

Discover all-new features:

*   **Direct Control:** Choose your playstyle with either the classic point-and-click interface or the new intuitive direct character control.
*   **Object Highlighting:** Quickly find hidden objects with interactive object highlighting.
*   **Behind-the-Scenes Art:** Explore an in-game art viewer showcasing never-before-seen artwork from both versions of the game.
*   **Original Developer Commentary:** Hear amusing stories and development insights from Ron Gilbert, Tim Schafer, and Dave Grossman.
*   **SteamWorks Achievements:** Test your pirate prowess by collecting a variety of achievements.

Name: The Secret of Monkey Island: Special Edition
Description:
Back by popular demand, The Secret of Monkey Island™: Special Edition faithfully re-imagines the internationally-acclaimed classic game (originally released in 1990) for original and new audiences alike. The development team at LucasArts is bringing the game into the modern era with an all new re-imagined contemporary art style, a re-mastered musical score, full voiceover, and an in-depth hint system to help players through the game’s side-splitting puzzles. Purists will also delight in the ability to seamlessly switch between the updated hand-drawn re-imagining and the original classic version. The game's twisty plot leads our naive hero on a hilarious, swash-buckling search for the fabled secret of Monkey Island. Tales of pirate wealth lure him to the port of Mêlée with high hopes, no money, and insatiable curiosity. If clever enough, he will win the confidence of Mêlée's pirates and find himself blown by the winds of fate toward the terrifying and legendary Monkey Island -- an adventure that would chill the bones of even the most bloodthirsty buccaneer. Relive the swashbuckling humorous misadventures of the wannabe pirate Guybrush Threepwood Go on a daring adventure in your attempt to become the most infamous pirate in the Caribbean Win the heart of the beautiful governor, Elaine Marley Along the way, confront the evil ghost pirate, LeChuck Play it again for the first time All new re-imagined contemporary art style, hand-drawn to feature animation quality Re-mastered music score presented in full orchestrated detail Complete voice over using the original Monkey Island™ franchise cast brings the story and characters of the original adventures to life like never before Scene-for-scene hot swap allows for seamless transition between special edition and classic modes anywhere and at any time Includes all new features All new intuitive game interface and controls provide a more interactive gameplay experience In-game puzzle hint system keeps the puzzles fresh and fun

Name: Zero Escape: The Nonary Games
Description:
Kidnapped and taken to an unfamiliar location, nine people find themselves forced to participate in a diabolical Nonary Game by an enigmatic mastermind called Zero. Why were they there? Why were they chosen to put their lives on the line as part of a dangerous life and death game? Who can be trusted? Tensions rise as the situation becomes more and more dire, and the nine strangers must figure out how to escape before they wind up dead. Two spine-tingling Nonary Games Zero welcomes you to take part in both the Nonary Game and the Nonary Game: Ambidex Edition as the award-winning escape-the-room visual novels Nine Hours, Nine Persons, Nine Doors (999) and its sequel, Virtue’s Last Reward (VLR), are together for the first time. A remastered and revamped Nine Hours The well-received classic Nintendo DS game 999 has been updated with hi-res graphics and a variety of new features including both Japanese and English voice acting! Seek a way out Search for clues within numerous locked rooms and solve mind-bending puzzles in order to escape. VLR even has two difficulty settings for more of a challenge. Fascinating theories and pseudo science ideas abound along the twisting, turning journey to uncover who Zero is, why everyone was kidnapped, and the shocking connection between the Nonary Games.

Name: Grim Fandango Remastered
Description:
Something's rotten in the land of the dead, and you're being played for a sucker. Meet Manny Calavera, travel agent at the Department of Death. He sells luxury packages to souls on their four-year journey to eternal rest. But there's trouble in paradise. Help Manny untangle himself from a conspiracy that threatens his very salvation. One of the most acclaimed adventure games of all time is now back, better than ever. Grim Fandango's epic story of four years in the life (or death) of Manny Calavera, travel agent to the dead, has been remastered to look, sound, and control even better than when it won GameSpot's Game of the Year award upon its original launch. Grim Fandango still stands as a classic of the genre, with unforgettable characters and unique combination of film noir and Mexican folklore. Remastered version includes Repainted, hi-res character textures New, dynamic lighting Classic score re-recorded with a full live orchestra Over 2 hours of exclusive developer commentary Concept art browser

Name: The Book of Unwritten Tales
Description:
In a world torn by war, the aged gremlin archaeologist Mortimer MacGuffin harbors the dark secret of a powerful artifact. Whoever calls this artifact his own, will determine the fate of the world. While the Army of the Shadows sends out its best and most devious agents to discover the secret, the Alliance's four heroes find themselves involuntarily drawn into the crisis... Key features: Humorous Point & Click homage to the RPG and fantasy genre. About 20 hours of gameplay in a massive game world with detailed graphics. Multi-character gameplay: Play as Wilbur, Nate, Ivo, and the Critter - in turn or simultaneously - and use the skills of your heroes wisely. Meet numerous crazy characters - from two-headed ogres and vegetarian dragons to good-natured zombies. Solve over 150 mind-boggling puzzles and discover more than 300 items that can be used and combined.

Name: Syberia
Description:
Kate Walker, a young ambitious lawyer from New York, is handed what seems a fairly straight forward assignment - a quick stopover to handle the sale of an old automaton factory hidden in the alpine valleys, then straight back home to the US. Little did she imagine when embarking on this task that her life would be turned upside down. On her expedition across Europe, traveling from Western Europe to the far reaches of Eastern Russia, she encounters a host of incredible characters and locations in her attempt to track down Hans, the genius inventor - the final key to unlock the mystery of Syberia. Her voyage across land and time throws all she values into question, while the deal she sets out to sign turns into a pact with destiny. Key Features A gripping script that goes beyond your imagination Rich and intriguing characters with detailed and realistic 3D environments Film-like camera angles, movements and framing Original and creative puzzles (completely integrated into the scenario)

Name: Gemini Rue
Description:
Azriel Odin, ex-assassin, arrives on the rain-drenched planet of Barracus. When things go horribly wrong, he can only seek help from the very criminals he used to work for. Meanwhile, across the galaxy, a man called Delta-Six wakes up in a hospital with no memory. Without knowing where to turn or who to trust, he vows to escape before he loses his identity completely. As fate brings these two closer together, we discover a world where life is cheap, identities are bought and sold, and a quest for redemption can change the fate of a whole galaxy. Key Features: Over 60 hand-drawn backgrounds A moody, film noir atmosphere Control both Azriel and Delta-Six An innovative investigation system A gripping sci-fi mystery DVD-style commentary track

**Syberia II: A Surreal Quest for the Last Mammoths**

In **Syberia II**, the adventure continues for Kate Walker, a sharp New York lawyer. After a demanding search across Europe to locate a missing heir and finalize an automaton factory buyout, her mission seemed complete. However, Kate's journey is far from over.

She unexpectedly teams up with the eccentric Hans Voralberg. Together, they embark on a new, **surreal quest**: to find the last of the legendary Syberian mammoths. This journey takes them deep into a forgotten world, far beyond anything they've encountered before.

Hans's lifelong quest, which he began alone years ago, is nearing its end. Kate and Hans will face **unprecedented dangers**, pushing their courage and resolve to the limit. A **mystical Syberia** lies ahead, promising an unforgettable experience.

**Key Features:**

*   **Original and Captivating Storyline:** Experience a unique narrative that draws you into Kate and Hans's extraordinary journey.
*   **Rich and Intriguing Characters:** Meet new, memorable characters who add depth to the unfolding story.
*   **Realistically Detailed 3D Environments:** Explore beautifully crafted worlds that bring the game's setting to life.
*   **Integrated Puzzles:** Encounter **cleverly designed puzzles** that seamlessly blend with the gameplay, challenging your skills throughout the adventure.

**Goodbye Deponia: The Chaotic Conclusion to a Junkyard Saga**

Get ready for **more chaos, more destruction, and more Rufus** in the long-awaited adventure comedy, **Goodbye Deponia**! This installment throws not one, not two, but **three Rufuses** into a whirlwind of mayhem. The Organon is plotting the destruction of Deponia, the lovely Goal has vanished (again!), and our anti-hero Rufus can't seem to stop sabotaging himself.

Rufus, an inventor and free spirit, dreams of escaping the junkyard planet Deponia for Elysium, a paradise orbiting above. His ticket to this celestial haven is the elevator, and **Goal, an ex-Elysian girl he's smitten with, remains the key** to his grand escape. Rufus believes he's finally devised a foolproof plan, but as usual, everything that can go wrong, does.

He finds himself on an Organon highway cruiser, disguised amongst stern officials, while Goal disappears. A chance encounter with a cloning machine offers a glimmer of hope. A clone is meant to help him out of his predicament, but an "inexplicable" error leads to complications, and Goal slips away once more. Now, Rufus faces **three monumental challenges**: find Goal, reach Elysium, and prevent the Organon from destroying Deponia entirely.

These are problems that only **three Rufuses could possibly solve**! Driven by necessity, the luckless inventor decides to clone himself, unleashing a cascade of crazy consequences. In Goodbye Deponia, players will **occasionally control all three Rufuses**, coordinating their efforts to complete tasks together, even as Rufus himself often stumbles over his own feet.

**Goodbye Deponia marks the epic conclusion to the Deponia trilogy** and is the sequel to the best German game of 2013 (German Computer Game Awards). The award-winning Deponia series offers three wacky adventures set on the junkyard planet. These classic point-and-click romps are perfect for comedy fans, adventure veterans, and newcomers alike. The series is renowned for its **beautiful, hand-drawn 2D comic graphics, sarcastic dialogues, and abundant black humor**. It has garnered numerous press awards, including the German Computer Game Award (Deutscher Computerspielpreis) and many other German developer accolades.

**Key Features:**

*   A **classic point-and-click adventure** set in a unique world, inspired by the works of Douglas Adams, Terry Pratchett, and Matt Groening.
*   From the creators of acclaimed titles like Memoria, Edna & Harvey: The Breakout, A New Beginning, and Edna & Harvey: Harvey's New Eyes.
*   The **epic conclusion to the iconic Deponia series**.
*   **Unique comic style** featuring lovingly realized, hand-drawn HD 2D graphics.
*   **Musical cutscenes** with beautifully animated sequences.

## Sid Meier's Civilization IV: A New Era of Strategy

Sid Meier's Civilization IV is a landmark title in the acclaimed PC game franchise, celebrated for its addictive gameplay and strategic depth. With over 6 million units sold worldwide and widespread critical praise, Civilization is a true gaming legend.

### Expanding Your Empire

Firaxis Games, led by Sid Meier, pushes the boundaries of this beloved series with Civilization IV. The game introduces innovative ways to play and achieve victory. You'll discover new tools designed to help you manage and grow your civilization effectively.

### Enhanced Gameplay and Modding

Civilization IV brings its world to life with a stunning, detailed 3D environment. This visual upgrade significantly enhances the overall gameplay experience. Furthermore, the game features all-new, user-friendly modding capabilities, allowing players to customize their game like never before. Intense multiplayer modes and options are also included, offering exciting competitive play.

### Critical Acclaim and Availability

Already recognized as one of the top ten games of 2005, Civilization IV is a must-have for gamers globally.

*Please note: Online multiplayer is no longer supported for the Mac version of Civilization IV.*

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

**Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition: A Gateway to Classic and Modern WWII Strategy**

This legacy version of **Company of Heroes (COH1)** grants you access to the latest updated version, also simply titled 'Company of Heroes,' within your Steam library. **It is strongly recommended to use the latter version for online play.** You can also explore the vibrant COH1 Steam Community and Modding scene by visiting the associated pages: [COH1 Community Hub](link) and [COH1 Steam Workshop](link).

**Experience the Sacrifice and Intensity of WWII**

Company of Heroes delivers a **visceral WWII gaming experience**, revolutionizing real-time strategy. It brings to life the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields. Starting with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, you will lead Allied squads against the German war machine through pivotal WWII battles.

**A Cinematic Single-Player Journey**

Immerse yourself in a **rich single-player campaign** that captures the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers facing extraordinary events. This experience portrays the turmoil of WWII like never before.

**Advanced Gameplay Features**

*   **Intelligent Squad AI:** Your soldiers come alive with advanced AI. They interact with the changing environment, seek cover, and employ sophisticated tactics to defeat enemy forces.
*   **Stunning Visuals:** Built on Relic's cutting-edge engine, Company of Heroes boasts unprecedented graphic quality and a physics-driven world for an RTS.
*   **Environmental Strategy:** Real-time physics and a **completely destructible environment** ensure no two battles are alike. Destroy anything and reshape the battlefield to your advantage. Utilize buildings and terrain, or deny them to your opponents.

**Multiplayer Competition**

Engage in **2-8 player multiplayer battles** via LAN or the internet. Join friends online for the ultimate Axis versus Allies showdown.

**Company of Heroes** offers a visceral WWII gaming experience, redefining real-time strategy. It brings to life the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields.

The game begins with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy. Players lead squads of Allied soldiers against the German war machine through pivotal WWII battles. A rich single-player campaign immerses you in the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers facing extraordinary events.

**Key Features:**

*   **Cinematic Single Player Experience:** Captures the turmoil of WWII like never before.
*   **Advanced Squad AI:** Soldiers interact with the environment, take cover, and execute tactics to eliminate enemies.
*   **Stunning Visuals:** Relic's cutting-edge engine delivers unprecedented graphic quality and a physics-driven world for an RTS.
*   **Environmental Strategy:** Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment ensure unique battles. Destroy anything and reshape the battlefield! Use buildings and terrain to your advantage or deny them to the enemy.
*   **Multiplayer Competition:** Engage in 2-8 player battles via LAN or Internet. Join the ultimate Axis versus Allies conflict online with friends.

**Additional User Reviews:** For more reviews, please visit the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page. Total conversions available on Steam for COH1 are also listed there.

Name: Rome: Total War™ - Collection
Description:
Once the Roman Empire is under your command, don't lay down your sword just yet - the Barbarians are coming. With two award-winning titles from the esteemed Total War series, you'll have twice as many obstacles and opportunities to control and conquer the greatest empire ever known to man. The Collection Edition includes: Rome: Total War Guide one of three noble Roman families on a century spanning quest to seize control of the Roman Empire. Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion (official expansion pack to Rome: Total War) Witness the decline of Rome as Barbarian hordes attack, forcing a bitter internal struggle between rival factions. Voted 2004 Best Strategy game by IGN, GameSpy and GameSpot. Fight alongside or against history's greatest leaders such as Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal to expand or destroy the Roman Empire. Lay siege against the Romans as Attila the Hun, fearful Saxons, or other savage factions using signature weapons and abilities. Command warrior-tested legions in cinematic epic battles with thousands of soldiers on-screen at once. A century-spanning campaign charges players with strategically managing the economic, civil, religious and military arms of their empire.

Your legacy awaits in **Crusader Kings III**, a grand strategy epic where you lead your dynasty through the Middle Ages. This acclaimed title from Paradox Development Studio masterfully blends **immersive grand strategy with deep, dramatic medieval roleplaying**. Your journey begins by choosing your noble house and guiding it to greatness across generations.

War is merely one tool in your arsenal. True reign requires **expert diplomatic skill, mastery of your realm, and true cunning**. Take command of your house and expand your dynasty through a meticulously researched medieval world. You can begin your saga in either **867 or 1066**, claiming lands, titles, and vassals to forge a realm worthy of your royal blood. Your death is but a footnote, as your lineage continues with new playable heirs, whether planned or… unexpected.

Discover a **sprawling simulated world** teeming with a diverse cast of characters. From peasants and knights to courtiers, spies, knaves, and jesters, you'll encounter secret love affairs and intricate political machinations. An extensive array of **historical characters can be romanced, betrayed, executed, or subtly influenced**.

Explore a **vast medieval map** stretching from the snowswept Nordic lands to the Horn of Africa, and from the British Isles in the west to the exotic riches of Burma in the east. You can **claim, conquer, and rule thousands of unique counties, duchies, kingdoms, and empires**.

Each character is larger than life, with **traits and lifestyle choices determining their actions and schemes**. Rule with an iron fist, prompting fear and dread, or inspire your subjects with magnanimous deeds. **Genetics can be passed along to your children**, bestowing the gift of genius or crippling stupidity. Groom your heir with appropriate guardians or educate them yourself. If they prove wanting, you can marry them off or **despatch them through other means**.

**Customize your ruler and noble house**, from appearance to attributes, creating a monarch worthy of their inherited virtues and vices. Govern an ever-evolving realm, granting titles as you see fit, or **usurp your liege to claim their crown**. Be wary of rivals, from restless serfs to revengeful concubines. The shadows stir frequently, and danger lurks around every darkened corner.

**Recruit agents and other unsavory elements** to undermine, blackmail, or murder those who stand in your path. Alternatively, be inspired by the bard and ballad, and **seduce your way to power and influence**. Blood will flow.

Assemble **men-at-arms units and powerful knights**, managing your battlefield tactics and armies. You can **raid and plunder nearby lands** or hire mercenaries and Holy Orders for your major conflicts. Be a pious king to invite religious powers to your side, or **design your own faith** as you battle between everlasting fame or eternal damnation.

Bring novel innovations to your culture and construct mighty castles and bastions to increase the wealth, prestige, and security of your realm. The paths to follow are limitless, offering **thousands of dynamic events and life-altering decisions** tailored to each conceivable situation and character. There are countless ways of securing and keeping your place in the history books.

Name: Call of Duty®
Description:
Call of Duty® delivers the gritty realism and cinematic intensity of World War II's epic battlefield moments like never before - through the eyes of citizen soldiers and unsung heroes from an alliance of countries who together helped shape the course of modern history. Play through the chaos of battle as part of a well-trained squad, that lays down covering fire and pulls its wounded to safety. In addition to authentic squad movements and tactics, each soldier's distinct personality and training comes out on the battlefield. No one soldier or nation single-handedly won the war. For the first time, Call of Duty® captures the war from multiple perspectives, through the eyes of American, British and Russian soldiers. Battle through 24 missions spanning 4 interconnected historical campaigns. Take on mission objectives ranging from sabotage and all-out assault to stealth, vehicle combat and rescue. Authentic weapons, locations, vehicles and sounds of war all contribute to the realism, immersing you in the most intense World War II experience yet. © 2003 Activision Publishing, Inc. Activision and Call of Duty are registered trademarks of Activision Publishing, Inc. All rights reserved. All other trademarks and trade names are the properties of their respective owners.

**Sid Meier's Civilization® V: Conquer the World**

Become the ruler of the world in Sid Meier's Civilization V, the acclaimed turn-based strategy game. Guide your civilization from its humble beginnings in the Stone Age all the way to the Space Age. Engage in warfare, master diplomacy, research groundbreaking technologies, and face off against legendary historical leaders. Your goal: to forge the most powerful empire the world has ever witnessed.

**An Intuitive and Deep Experience**

Civilization V welcomes players of all levels. Its intuitive interface makes it easy for newcomers to jump in and play at their own pace. Meanwhile, series veterans will discover the signature depth, intricate detail, and precise control that have defined the Civilization franchise.

**A Visually Stunning and Believable World**

Explore, conquer, and claim incredibly realistic landscapes brought to life with ultra-realistic graphics. The world of Civilization V is a lush and dynamic environment, ripe for exploration and strategic expansion.

**Engage with a Vibrant Community**

Test your skills against players worldwide or in local LAN matches. Civilization V also offers unprecedented modding capabilities. Discover and install mods directly through an in-game community hub, enhancing your gameplay experience without ever leaving the game.

**Broad System Compatibility**

Civilization V is designed to run on a wide range of systems, from powerful desktop computers to many popular laptops.

**Revolutionary New Features**

*   **Hex-Based Gameplay:** A new hex grid revolutionizes combat and city-building strategies, offering fresh tactical possibilities.
*   **City-States:** These independent cities become a crucial new element in your diplomatic struggles, offering unique advantages.
*   **Enhanced Diplomacy:** Negotiate with fully interactive leaders through an improved diplomacy system, making interactions more dynamic and meaningful.

*Note: The Modding SDK is available as a free download. The Mac and Linux + SteamOS versions of Sid Meier's Civilization V are available in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish only.*

**Sid Meier's Civilization® V: The Ultimate Turn-Based Strategy Experience**

Become the ruler of the world in **Sid Meier's Civilization® V**, the flagship turn-based strategy game. Lead your civilization from its humble beginnings at the dawn of man all the way to the space age. You'll **wage war, conduct diplomacy, and discover new technologies**. Go head-to-head with history's greatest leaders and build the most powerful empire the world has ever known.

**An Intuitive and Deep Gameplay Experience**

Civilization V offers an **inviting presentation** with an intuitive interface that makes it easy for new players to jump right in and play at their own pace. Veterans will appreciate the series' signature **depth, detail, and control**.

**A Believable and Engaging World**

Explore, battle over, and claim **lush landscapes** brought to life with ultra-realistic graphics. The world of Civilization V is designed to be immersive and visually stunning.

**Unprecedented Community and Multiplayer Features**

Compete with players worldwide or locally in LAN matches. **Mod the game in unprecedented ways** and install mods directly from an in-game community hub, all without leaving the game.

**All-New Features for Enhanced Strategy**

Civilization V introduces a **new hex-based gameplay grid**, opening up exciting new combat and build strategies. **City-States** are now a crucial resource in your diplomatic battles. An **improved diplomacy system** allows for negotiations with fully interactive leaders.

**Wide System Compatibility**

Civilization V is designed to operate on a **wide range of systems**, from high-end desktops to many laptops.
